native_cost_model.summary: C++ fast path takes parsed layer rows, model/global config, hardware topology, and GPU work maps; it returns per-op timing updates plus TPOT/TPS summaries used by throughput-vs-TPS sweeps.

call_stacks.title: Full NN workbook native path
call_stacks.description: 整网 workbook 路径从 Python dataframe/config 进入 native owned result，再写回每个 cell update。

steps.role: Python entry; prepares dataframe/config text.
ctypes wrapper for the native full-network API.
Builds native argument buffers and invokes the C++ bridge.
Calls owned-result native API and receives update buffers.
C++ bridge from schedule/config text to owned result.
Parses Python-exported config entries into native config values.
Runs schedule, event processing, record application, and finalize.
Creates records, executes scheduled events, and computes per-op results.
Converts native results into dataframe cell updates.
Builds final workbook summary rows and status fields.

call_stacks.title: Single-op batch native path
call_stacks.description: throughput sweep 和 layer parser 生成的算子行会批量进入 native single-op fast path。

steps.role: Batches rows to reduce Python/ctypes overhead.
Native ctypes entry for one row.
C++ single-op orchestration.
Resolves shape, depthwise/vector variants, and dispatch input.
Builds die/partition/GPC/SM work map from DP/TP/CP/EP settings.
Computes PP/TP/DP/EP/CP communication fields.
Dispatches GEMM, MHA, softmax, vector, or attention variant kernels.
Searches kernel-local candidates and computes compute/traffic cost.
Models L2/HBM placement, routing, and bandwidth bottlenecks.

call_stacks.title: Throughput vs TPS call stack
call_stacks.description: CLI 先枚举策略，再调用 layer parser 和 native single-op，最后汇总为 tps_per_user vs throughput_total_tps。

steps.role: Loads workbook/model/hardware inputs and starts the sweep.
Reads model config and decode-layer rows.
Enumerates legal DP/TP/CP/EP/PP system maps.
Optional CLI search-space restriction before cost-model runs.
Evaluates each strategy candidate.
Pre-filters configs whose estimated memory exceeds HBM.
Expands model/layer config into per-op rows.
Runs native cost model for every layer row.
Aggregates layer timings into TPOT, TPS/user, and total TPS.
Normalizes monolithic, PD, AF, and MTP rows.
Reduces plotted rows for visualization after evaluation.

call_stacks.title: Profile sweep runtime path
call_stacks.description: profile sweep 先跑 baseline，再用 seed rows 限制 MTP replay 规模。

steps.role: CLI entry for profile sweeps.
Creates baseline decode tasks.
Runs plot_throughput_tps jobs in parallel.
Keeps only top baseline seeds before replaying MTP.
Creates MTP task set from selected seeds.
Writes final decode/prefill/MTP data files.

runtime_optimizations.summary: 当 dense 候选超过上限时，只保留 stride、边界、preferred tile、向下对齐值和 powers-of-two 候选。
runtime_optimizations.why_runtime: 避免 M/N/K 三维 tile 形成过大的笛卡尔积，显著减少 NoC 评估次数。
runtime_optimizations.optimality_note: 如果真正最优 tile 不在保留集合中，后续 rank 和 NoC 阶段不会再看到它。
runtime_optimizations.mitigation: 需要最优性验证时提高 dense limit，或对关键 shape 运行 full/dense tile sweep 对比。

runtime_optimizations.summary: fit_list 先按启发式排序，只保留 top 50 进入完整 loop-order 和 NoC 评估。
runtime_optimizations.why_runtime: 减少每个算子候选的 NoC 模拟和 loop-order 枚举成本。
runtime_optimizations.optimality_note: 低排序候选可能由于更好的缓存/路由流量成为全局最优，但被截断后不会被评估。
runtime_optimizations.mitigation: 对敏感 shape 提高 top-k 或关闭截断，比较最优时间和选中 tile 是否变化。

runtime_optimizations.summary: 在昂贵的 layer parser 和 native single-op 之前，先用权重、KV cache、MLA 和 expert memory 估计 HBM 是否足够。
runtime_optimizations.why_runtime: 提前跳过明显超容量的策略，避免无意义的全层 cost-model 调用。
runtime_optimizations.optimality_note: 如果 memory model 偏保守或某个配置实际可以通过复用/分片落下，候选会在建模前被跳过。
runtime_optimizations.mitigation: 最优性扫参时保留被过滤配置的日志，并抽样运行 no-budget-filter 对照。

runtime_optimizations.summary: 通过 --tp-values、--cp-values、--pp-values 等参数限制策略枚举范围。
runtime_optimizations.why_runtime: 把搜索集中在用户指定的并行度组合，减少候选任务数。
runtime_optimizations.optimality_note: 最优配置如果落在指定范围之外，不会进入 cost model。
runtime_optimizations.mitigation: 做最终结论前运行完整 TP/CP/PP 范围，或用宽范围 sweep 验证边界处没有更优点。

runtime_optimizations.summary: MTP sweep 只从 baseline decode 结果里选 top seed rows 继续展开。
runtime_optimizations.why_runtime: 避免对所有 baseline 策略逐个 replay MTP stage。
runtime_optimizations.optimality_note: 某个 baseline 不靠前的策略可能在 MTP 加成后成为最优，但未被选中就不会 replay。
runtime_optimizations.mitigation: 提高 --mtp-seed-count，或对最终候选附近的硬件/GPU 数运行 all-seed MTP sweep。

runtime_optimizations.summary: PD/AF 组合时每个 batch 只保留吞吐最高的 prefill row 用于 pairing。
runtime_optimizations.why_runtime: 减少 prefill-decode 组合数量和 Pareto 计算规模。
runtime_optimizations.optimality_note: 单独 prefill 吞吐最高不一定带来端到端最佳平衡，较慢 prefill 可能搭配 decode 后更优。
runtime_optimizations.mitigation: 保留 top-N prefill rows 或对 PD 关键区域做完整 pairing 对照。

runtime_optimizations.summary: 当当前 best 已达到 compute_time 下界时停止继续搜索。
runtime_optimizations.why_runtime: 已经达到可证明的计算下界时，继续 NoC 搜索不能得到更低总时间。
runtime_optimizations.optimality_note: 在 compute_time 下界定义正确时不跳过更优解；最多跳过等价最优配置的细节。
runtime_optimizations.mitigation: 如需比较等价最优 tile，可关闭 early_break 记录完整候选。

runtime_optimizations.summary: 把多行算子批量送入 ctypes/native fast path。
runtime_optimizations.why_runtime: 减少 Python 循环和 ctypes 调用开销。
runtime_optimizations.optimality_note: 不改变候选集合、公式或比较逻辑。
runtime_optimizations.mitigation: 无需最优性补偿；只需保持 batch 与逐行结果一致性测试。

runtime_optimizations.summary: 对已经完成评估的结果做 Pareto frontier 后处理。
runtime_optimizations.why_runtime: 减少图表和表格需要展示的点数。
runtime_optimizations.optimality_note: 它不参与 cost-model 候选评估，只隐藏被支配的展示点。
runtime_optimizations.mitigation: 需要审计时切换 show-all 或查看 raw rows。

runtime_optimizations.summary: 用直接索引/预分配累加器替代更重的数据结构。
runtime_optimizations.why_runtime: 减少路由和 traffic 汇总过程中的分配、查找和类型转换。
runtime_optimizations.optimality_note: 只改变实现方式，不改变路由公式、候选集合或比较规则。
runtime_optimizations.mitigation: 用旧/新路径的 traffic 和 timing 回归测试验证数值一致。

nodes.name: alias_modules
nodes.docstring: Helper for the _alias workflow.
nodes.summary: Helper for the _alias workflow.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def alias_modules(package_name, module_names):
    """Helper for the _alias workflow."""
    package = sys.modules[package_name]
    exported = []
    for module_name in module_names:
        module = importlib.import_module(module_name)
        short_name = module_name.rsplit(".", 1)[-1]
        sys.modules[f"{package_name}.{short_name}"] = module
        setattr(package, short_name, module)
        exported.append(short_name)
    return exported

formulas.explanation: short_name 由 module_name.rsplit 等变量组合计算得到。

nodes.name: gpu_comm
nodes.docstring:
Model TP, DP, EP, and attention CP communication for one GPU-local layer shape.
Calls all_reduce_time for TP/DP and uses NVLink/NIC bandwidth branches for MoE dispatch and combine traffic.
nodes.summary: Model TP, DP, EP, and attention CP communication for one GPU-local layer shape.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def gpu_comm(model_args,global_config,gpu_m,gpu_n,gpu_k,gpu_e,gpu_batch,gpu_head,gpu_hidden,gpu_q_seq,gpu_kv_seq,top_k,line,nn_info,hw,pp,ep,dp,tp,is_backward,act_bpe,weight_bpe,is_seconde_gemm,is_ep_boundary,cp=1): 

    """
    Model TP, DP, EP, and attention CP communication for one GPU-local layer shape.
    Calls all_reduce_time for TP/DP and uses NVLink/NIC bandwidth branches for MoE dispatch and combine traffic.
    """
    row = nn_info.loc[line]
    token = _row_value(row, "token")
    c_in = _row_value(row, "c_in")
    gpu_comm_value = _row_value(row, "gpu_comm")
    if not _has_value(token):
        token = 0
    if not _has_value(c_in):
        c_in = 0

    return _native_cost.gpu_comm_apply_cells(
        op_type=row['type'],
        gpu_comm=gpu_comm_value,
        token=token,
        c_in=c_in,
        model_args=model_args,
        global_config=global_config,
        gpu_m=gpu_m,
        gpu_n=gpu_n,
        gpu_k=gpu_k,
        gpu_e=gpu_e,
        gpu_batch=gpu_batch,
        gpu_head=gpu_head,
        gpu_hidden=gpu_hidden,
        gpu_q_seq=gpu_q_seq,
        gpu_kv_seq=gpu_kv_seq,
        hw=hw,
        pp=pp,
        ep=ep,
        dp=dp,
        tp=tp,
        is_backward=is_backward,
        act_bpe=act_bpe,
        weight_bpe=weight_bpe,
        nn_info=nn_info,
        line=line,
        is_ep_boundary=is_ep_boundary,
        cp=cp,
    )

nodes.name: is_pp_boundary_allowed
nodes.docstring:
Return whether a row is a legal pipeline-parallel boundary.
Only transformer-block and MTP/module boundaries are allowed to emit PP send/receive traffic.
nodes.summary: Return whether a row is a legal pipeline-parallel boundary.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def is_pp_boundary_allowed(row):
    """
    Return whether a row is a legal pipeline-parallel boundary.
    Only transformer-block and MTP/module boundaries are allowed to emit PP send/receive traffic.
    """
    explicit_fields = (
        "pp boundary type",
        "pp_boundary_type",
        "pp boundary",
        "pp_boundary",
        "boundary type",
        "boundary_type",
    )
    for field in explicit_fields:
        value = _row_value(row, field)
        if _has_value(value):
            text = _normalize_boundary_text(value)
            return (
                "mtp" in text
                or "transformer module" in text
                or "transformer block" in text
                or text.strip() == "transformer"
            )

    text_fields = ("NN name", "module", "stage", "op layout")
    text = " ".join(
        _normalize_boundary_text(_row_value(row, field))
        for field in text_fields
        if _has_value(_row_value(row, field))
    )
    return "mtp" in text or "transformer module" in text or "transformer block" in text

nodes.name: comm_transfer_time_ns
nodes.docstring:
Return transfer time in ns for byte_count over a GB/s link plus per-message latency.
Formula: bytes / (GBps * 1e9) * 1e9 + latency_ns * messages.
nodes.summary: 把字节量、带宽和消息延迟统一换算成 ns 级传输时间。
guide_steps: 先用字节数除以带宽得到纯传输时间。
再把消息条数乘以单消息 latency。
两者相加得到总传输时间。

formulas.explanation: 总时间 = 字节传输时间 + 消息数 × 单消息延迟。

formulas.explanation: 返回值 由传输字节数除以链路带宽，再叠加每条消息的固定延迟得到。

nodes.name: hw_noc_run
nodes.docstring:
Evaluate one kernel NoC/memory schedule in native C++ and update nn_info when it is best.
Formula: op time is e_iter times the max of compute time and each SM/GPC/L2/HBM/link/D2D path time.
nodes.summary: 把 A/B/O 张量映射到 L2 和 HBM，再根据 work map 估算 SM、GPC、partition、die 间的流量和总时间。
guide_steps: 先计算全 GPU 范围下的 A/B/O footprint。
再根据 L2/HBM 容量决定各张量的落点，并得到 L2 hit rate。
最后结合 work map 和 mesh 路由结果汇总 SM/GPC/L2/HBM/link/D2D 的瓶颈时间。
nodes.source_excerpt:
def hw_noc_run(gemm_loop_order,min_time,compute_time,a_size,b_size,o_size,is_bypass_a,hw,
               b_raw_size,a_raw_size,o_raw_size,work_map,
               m_t,n_t,k_t,a_bpe,b_bpe,o_bpe,nn_info,line,e_iter,tp,logger):
    """
    Evaluate one kernel NoC/memory schedule in native C++ and update nn_info when it is best.
    Formula: op time is e_iter times the max of compute time and each SM/GPC/L2/HBM/link/D2D path time.
    """
    result = _native_cost.hw_noc_run(
        min_time=min_time,
        compute_time=compute_time,
        a_size=a_size,
        b_size=b_size,
        o_size=o_size,
        is_bypass_a=is_bypass_a,
        hw=hw,
        b_raw_size=b_raw_size,
        a_raw_size=a_raw_size,
        o_raw_size=o_raw_size,
        work_map=work_map,
        m_t=m_t,
        n_t=n_t,
        k_t=k_t,
        a_bpe=a_bpe,
        b_bpe=b_bpe,
        o_bpe=o_bpe,
        e_iter=e_iter,
        tp=tp,
    )

    return write_hw_noc_result(
        result=result,
        gemm_loop_order=gemm_loop_order,
        min_time=min_time,
        compute_time=compute_time,
        a_size=a_size,
        b_size=b_size,
        o_size=o_size,
        is_bypass_a=is_bypass_a,
        b_raw_size=b_raw_size,
        a_raw_size=a_raw_size,
        o_raw_size=o_raw_size,
        work_map=work_map,
        m_t=m_t,
        n_t=n_t,
        k_t=k_t,
        a_bpe=a_bpe,
        b_bpe=b_bpe,
        o_bpe=o_bpe,
        nn_info=nn_info,
        line=line,
        logger=logger,
    )

nodes.name: mesh_read_traffic
nodes.docstring:
Route fixed src/dst read flows and return per-edge mesh traffic.

Request packets are routed requester -> target in x->y order.
Response packets are routed target -> requester in y->x order. Link and
D2D loads are directional because hardware bandwidth is modeled as
one-direction bandwidth. Adjacent partitions in different dies are charged
to D2D instead of partition link bandwidth.
nodes.summary: Route fixed src/dst read flows and return per-edge mesh traffic.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def mesh_read_traffic(hw, requesters, targets, request_bytes_per_pair=0, response_bytes_per_pair=0):
    """Route fixed src/dst read flows and return per-edge mesh traffic.

    Request packets are routed requester -> target in x->y order.
    Response packets are routed target -> requester in y->x order. Link and
    D2D loads are directional because hardware bandwidth is modeled as
    one-direction bandwidth. Adjacent partitions in different dies are charged
    to D2D instead of partition link bandwidth.
    """
    return _native_cost.mesh_read_traffic(hw, requesters, targets, request_bytes_per_pair, response_bytes_per_pair)

nodes.name: _attention_gpu_shape
nodes.docstring:
Thin shim around the native attention shape helper kept for backward-compat.

``single_op_process`` no longer calls this; it goes straight to
the native C++ shape helper. Existing tests / docs still import this name,
so we keep it as an adapter that translates the legacy return schema
(``gpu_hidden`` / ``gpu_cp``).
nodes.summary: 把 attention 的 batch/head/seq/hidden 维度切到单 GPU，并对序列与 hidden 做 tile 对齐。
guide_steps: 按 DP/TP 先求单卡 batch、Q head 和 KV head。
把 query seq、KV seq、hidden 分别对齐到硬件 GEMM N/K tile。
返回单卡 attention 视角下的 shape，供后续再分到 SM。
nodes.source_excerpt:
def _attention_gpu_shape(batch, q_head, kv_head, h, w, ich, och, dp, tp, hw, precision, cp=1):
    """Thin shim around the native attention shape helper kept for backward-compat.

    ``single_op_process`` no longer calls this; it goes straight to
    the native C++ shape helper. Existing tests / docs still import this name,
    so we keep it as an adapter that translates the legacy return schema
    (``gpu_hidden`` / ``gpu_cp``).
    """
    shape = _native_cost.attention_gpu_shape(
        batch=batch,
        q_head=q_head,
        kv_head=kv_head,
        q_seq=int(h) * int(w),
        kv_seq=ich,
        hidden_qk=och,
        hidden_v=och,
        dp=dp,
        tp=tp,
        cp=cp,
        hw=hw,
        precision=precision,
    )
    return {
        'gpu_batch': shape['gpu_batch'],
        'gpu_head': shape['gpu_head'],
        'gpu_kv_head': shape['gpu_kv_head'],
        'gpu_q_seq': shape['gpu_q_seq'],
        'gpu_kv_seq': shape['gpu_kv_seq'],
        'gpu_kv_seq_global': shape['gpu_kv_seq_global'],
        'gpu_hidden': shape['gpu_hidden_qk'],
        'gpu_cp': shape['cp'],
        'kv_replication': shape['kv_replication'],
    }

def _task_logger_name(phase, task_id):
    """Build an isolated logger name for one scheduled run."""
    digest = hashlib.sha1(str(task_id).encode("utf-8")).hexdigest()[:12]
    return f"{phase}.{digest}"

nodes.name: gpu_nmk_shape
nodes.docstring:
Return the single-GPU N/M/K/E shape used by single_op_process.
Formula: DP divides batch/token work, TP divides M or K depending on tp_split_k,
EP divides expert count, and all GEMM dimensions are rounded up to hardware tile sizes.
nodes.summary: 把算子的全局 M/N/K/E 形状切到单 GPU，并按硬件 GEMM tile 做向上对齐。
guide_steps: 先根据 EP/TP/DP 判断单卡应承担多少 expert、head、batch。
再把 M/N/K 分别对齐到硬件 `hw_gemm_m/n/k_*` 粒度，确保后续 kernel 搜索合法。
最后同时返回原始 shape 和单卡 shape，供 `single_op_process()` 继续切到 SM 级。
nodes.source_excerpt:
def gpu_nmk_shape(
    op_type,
    ich,
    och,
    batch,
    expert,
    topk,
    q_head,
    kv_head,
    kh,
    kw,
    h,
    w,
    stride,
    group,
    hw,
    dp,
    tp,
    ep,
    tp_split_k,
    precision,
):
    """
    Return the single-GPU N/M/K/E shape used by single_op_process.
    Formula: DP divides batch/token work, TP divides M or K depending on tp_split_k,
    EP divides expert count, and all GEMM dimensions are rounded up to hardware tile sizes.
    """
    native_shape = _native_cost.gpu_nmk_shape(
        op_type,
        ich,
        och,
        batch,
        expert,
        topk,
        q_head,
        kv_head,
        kh,
        kw,
        h,
        w,
        stride,
        group,
        hw,
        dp,
        tp,
        ep,
        tp_split_k,
        precision,
    )
    if native_shape["m"] < 0:
        raise ValueError(f"Invalid grouped conv: c_in={ich}, c_out={och}, group={group}")

    return GpuNmkShape(
        m=native_shape["m"],
        n=native_shape["n"],
        k=native_shape["k"],
        e=native_shape["e"],
        batch=native_shape["batch"],
        head=native_shape["head"],
        source_m=native_shape["source_m"],
        source_n=native_shape["source_n"],
        source_k=native_shape["source_k"],
        source_e=native_shape["source_e"],
        tp_div_reminder=native_shape["tp_div_reminder"],
        is_depthwise=native_shape["is_depthwise"],
    )

nodes.name: read_llm_layer_table
nodes.docstring: Read a prefill or decode layer table from the compact workbook phase sheet.
nodes.summary: Read a prefill or decode layer table from the compact workbook phase sheet.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def read_llm_layer_table(xls_file, phase="decode", sheet_name=None):
    """Read a prefill or decode layer table from the compact workbook phase sheet."""
    xls_file = resolve_data_file(xls_file)
    phase_key = str(phase).lower()
    if phase_key in ("prefill", "prompt"):
        phase_sheet = "Prefill"
    elif phase_key in ("decode", "generation"):
        phase_sheet = "Decode"
    else:
        raise ValueError(f"Unsupported LLM layer phase: {phase}")
    sheet = sheet_name or phase_sheet
    llm_data = pd.read_excel(xls_file, sheet_name=sheet)
    if "NN name" not in llm_data.columns or "type" not in llm_data.columns:
        raise ValueError(f"Workbook sheet {sheet!r} must contain LLM layer columns")
    nonempty = llm_data["NN name"].map(_is_nonempty_cell) | llm_data["type"].map(_is_nonempty_cell)
    llm_data = llm_data.loc[nonempty].copy()
    llm_data = llm_data.reindex(columns=LLM_LAYER_COLUMNS, fill_value=0)
    llm_data.index = list(range(len(llm_data)))
    llm_data.replace(np.nan, 0, inplace=True)
    return llm_data

formulas.explanation: nonempty 由 _is_nonempty_cell, llm_data 等变量组合计算得到。

def single_op_process(logger,gpu_sys_map,ModelArg,global_config,data_paser,hw,dp,tp,ep,pp,nn_info,line,tp_split_k,is_ep_boundary=False,cp=1):

nodes.name: generate_gpu_work_map_bruteforce
nodes.docstring: 暴力枚举法（用于对比测试）
nodes.summary: 暴力枚举法（用于对比测试）
nodes.source_excerpt:
def generate_gpu_work_map_bruteforce(self, x: int, gpc_sm_num: int,
                                        gpc_num_par: int, die_num: int,
                                        par_num_die: int) -> List[Dict]:
        """暴力枚举法（用于对比测试）"""
        result = []
        seen = set()
        div_combinations = self.get_valid_div_combinations(x)
        max_f_vals = (die_num, par_num_die, gpc_num_par, gpc_sm_num)
        max_w_vals = (die_num, par_num_die, gpc_num_par, gpc_sm_num)

        for div_combo in div_combinations:
            f_combos = self.generate_4d_combinations(max_f_vals, div_combo['f_div'])
            w_combos = self.generate_4d_combinations(max_w_vals, div_combo['w_div'])
            for f_die, f_par, f_gpc, f_sm in f_combos:
                for w_die, w_par, w_gpc, w_sm in w_combos:
                    config = {
                        'b_die': f_die, 'b_par': f_par,
                        'b_gpc': f_gpc, 'b_sm': f_sm,
                        'a_die': w_die, 'a_par': w_par,
                        'a_gpc': w_gpc, 'a_sm': w_sm,
                        'ich_div': div_combo['ich_div'], 'och_div': div_combo['och_div'],
                        'batch_div': div_combo['batch_div'], 'h_div': div_combo['h_div']
                    }
                    key = tuple(sorted(config.items()))
                    if key not in seen:
                        seen.add(key)
                        result.append(config)
        return result

nodes.name: generate_gpu_work_map_efficient
nodes.docstring: 高效生成gpu_work_map
nodes.summary: 高效生成gpu_work_map
nodes.source_excerpt:
def generate_gpu_work_map_efficient(self, x: int, gpc_sm_num: int, 
                                       gpc_num_par: int, die_num: int, 
                                       par_num_die: int) -> List[Dict]:
        """高效生成gpu_work_map"""
        self.gpu_work_map = []
        
        # 边界检查
        if x <= 0 or any(v <= 0 for v in [gpc_sm_num, gpc_num_par, die_num, par_num_die]):
            return self.gpu_work_map
        
        # 预计算所有有效的div组合
        div_combinations = self.get_valid_div_combinations(x)
        if not div_combinations:
            return self.gpu_work_map
        
        # 预定义最大约束值
        max_f_vals = (die_num, par_num_die, gpc_num_par, gpc_sm_num)
        max_w_vals = (die_num, par_num_die, gpc_num_par, gpc_sm_num)
        
        seen = set()

        for div_combo in div_combinations:
            f_product = div_combo['f_div']
            w_product = div_combo['w_div']

            f_combos = self.generate_4d_combinations(max_f_vals, f_product)
            if not f_combos:
                continue
            
            w_combos = self.generate_4d_combinations(max_w_vals, w_product)
            if not w_combos:
                continue
            
            # 组合f组和w组
            for f_die, f_par, f_gpc, f_sm in f_combos:
                for w_die, w_par, w_gpc, w_sm in w_combos:
                    config = {
                        'b_die': f_die,
                        'b_par': f_par,
                        'b_gpc': f_gpc,
                        'b_sm': f_sm,
                        'a_die': w_die,
                        'a_par': w_par,
                        'a_gpc': w_gpc,
                        'a_sm': w_sm,
                        'ich_div': div_combo['ich_div'],
                        'och_div': div_combo['och_div'],
                        'batch_div': div_combo['batch_div'],
                        'h_div': div_combo['h_div'],
                    }
                    key = tuple(sorted(config.items()))
                    if key not in seen:
                        seen.add(key)
                        self.gpu_work_map.append(config)
        
        return self.gpu_work_map

nodes.name: generate_gpu_work_map_for_active_sms
nodes.docstring: Generate maps for the effective SM count, or the largest representable count below it.
nodes.summary: Generate maps for the effective SM count, or the largest representable count below it.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def generate_gpu_work_map_for_active_sms(self, x: int, gpc_sm_num: int,
                                             gpc_num_par: int, die_num: int,
                                             par_num_die: int) -> Tuple[List[Dict], int]:
        """Generate maps for the effective SM count, or the largest representable count below it."""
        for active_work_count in range(int(x), 0, -1):
            result = self.generate_gpu_work_map_efficient(
                active_work_count,
                gpc_sm_num,
                gpc_num_par,
                die_num,
                par_num_die,
            )
            if result:
                return result, active_work_count
        return [], 0

nodes.name: get_valid_div_combinations
nodes.docstring: 预计算所有满足GPU级MNK切分关系的div组合
nodes.summary: 预计算所有满足GPU级MNK切分关系的div组合
nodes.source_excerpt:
def get_valid_div_combinations(self, x: int) -> List[Dict]:
        """预计算所有满足GPU级MNK切分关系的div组合"""
        results = []
        factors = self.get_factors(x)
        
        # ich_div * och_div * batch_div * h_div == x
        for ich in factors:
            remaining1 = x // ich
            for och in self.get_factors(remaining1):
                remaining2 = remaining1 // och
                for batch in self.get_factors(remaining2):
                    h = remaining2 // batch
                    
                    # A is partitioned by M and K, B is partitioned by N and K.
                    # K split is shared by both operands, so total work
                    # partitions count it once instead of multiplying A and B
                    # data partitions together.
                    w_div = ich * och
                    f_div = batch * h * ich

                    results.append({
                        'ich_div': ich,
                        'och_div': och,
                        'batch_div': batch,
                        'h_div': h,
                        'w_div': w_div,
                        'f_div': f_div
                    })
        return results

formulas.explanation: remaining1 由 ich, x 等变量组合计算得到。
remaining2 由 och, remaining1 等变量组合计算得到。
输入 feature map 高度或 query token 轴 由 batch, remaining2 等变量组合计算得到。
w_div 由 ich, och 等变量组合计算得到。
f_div 由 batch, h, ich 等变量组合计算得到。

nodes.summary: 专项性能基准测试
nodes.source_excerpt:
def benchmark_performance():
    """专项性能基准测试"""
    print("\n" + "="*60)
    print("专项性能基准测试")
    print("="*60)
    
    mapper = GPUWorkMapper()
    
    # 测试不同规模的问题
    test_scales = [
        (100, 5, 3, 2, 2),
        (1000, 8, 4, 3, 3),
        (5000, 12, 6, 4, 4),
        (10000, 16, 8, 5, 5),
        (20000, 20, 10, 6, 6),
    ]
    
    print(f"{'x值':<8} {'配置数':<8} {'高效耗时':<12} {'暴力耗时':<12} {'加速比':<8}")
    print("-" * 60)
    
    for x, gpc_sm_num, gpc_num_par, die_num, par_num_die in test_scales:
        # 只测高效方法
        start = time.time()
        efficient_result = mapper.generate_gpu_work_map_efficient(
            x, gpc_sm_num, gpc_num_par, die_num, par_num_die
        )
        efficient_time = time.time() - start
        
        # 对小规模问题才测暴力方法
        if x <= 5000:
            start = time.time()
            brute_result = mapper.generate_gpu_work_map_bruteforce(
                x, gpc_sm_num, gpc_num_par, die_num, par_num_die
            )
            brute_time = time.time() - start
            speedup = brute_time / efficient_time
        else:
            brute_time = float('inf')
            speedup = float('inf')
        
        print(f"{x:<8} {len(efficient_result):<8} "
              f"{efficient_time:<12.6f} {brute_time:<12.6f} {speedup:<8.2f}x")

formulas.explanation: efficient_time 是时间/时延公式，用工作量除以频率或带宽，再结合必要的固定开销换算得到。
brute_time 是时间/时延公式，用工作量除以频率或带宽，再结合必要的固定开销换算得到。
相对 baseline 的加速比 表示吞吐或速率，通常由收益与总时间共同决定。
brute_time 是时间/时延公式，用工作量除以频率或带宽，再结合必要的固定开销换算得到。
相对 baseline 的加速比 表示吞吐或速率，通常由收益与总时间共同决定。

nodes.name: run_comprehensive_tests

nodes.summary: 运行全面测试套件
nodes.source_excerpt:
def run_comprehensive_tests():
    """运行全面测试套件"""
    mapper = GPUWorkMapper()
    
    test_cases = [
        # (名称, x, gpc_sm_num, gpc_num_par, die_num, par_num_die)
        ("小数字-基础", 288, 18, 4, 2, 2),

    ]
    
    results = []
    total_speedup = 0
    correct_count = 0
    
    print("GPU工作映射配置生成器 - 全面测试")
    print("=" * 60)
    
    for i, (name, *params) in enumerate(test_cases, 1):
        try:
            is_correct, speedup, count = test_case(mapper, f"{i}. {name}", *params)
            results.append((name, is_correct, speedup, count))
            if is_correct:
                correct_count += 1
                total_speedup += speedup
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"\n测试失败: {e}")
            results.append((name, False, 0, 0))
    
    # 汇总报告
    print(f"\n{'='*60}")
    print("测试汇总")
    print(f"{'='*60}")
    print(f"总测试数: {len(test_cases)}")
    print(f"通过测试: {correct_count}")
    print(f"平均性能提升: {total_speedup/correct_count:.2f} 倍")
    
    print("\n详细结果:")
    for name, is_correct, speedup, count in results:
        status = "✓ 通过" if is_correct else "✗ 失败"
        print(f"  {name:<25} {status:>6} | 配置数: {count:>4} | 加速比: {speedup:>7.2f}x")
    
    # 性能趋势分析
    print("\n性能分析:")
    small_results = [r for r in results if r[3] < 50]  # 配置数<50
    large_results = [r for r in results if r[3] >= 50]  # 配置数>=50
    
    if small_results:
        avg_speedup_small = sum(r[2] for r in small_results) / len(small_results)
        print(f"  小规模问题(<50配置): 平均加速比 {avg_speedup_small:.2f}x")
    
    if large_results:
        avg_speedup_large = sum(r[2] for r in large_results) / len(large_results)
        print(f"  大规模问题(≥50配置): 平均加速比 {avg_speedup_large:.2f}x")

formulas.statement: avg_speedup_small = sum(r[2] for r in small_results) / len(small_results)
formulas.expression: sum(r[2] for r in small_results) / len(small_results)
formulas.explanation: avg_speedup_small 表示吞吐或速率，通常由收益与总时间共同决定。

formulas.statement: avg_speedup_large = sum(r[2] for r in large_results) / len(large_results)
formulas.expression: sum(r[2] for r in large_results) / len(large_results)

nodes.source_excerpt:
def test_case(mapper: GPUWorkMapper, name: str, x: int, gpc_sm_num: int,
              gpc_num_par: int, die_num: int, par_num_die: int):
    """执行单个测试用例并输出结果"""
    print(f"\n{'='*60}")
    print(f"测试用例: {name}")
    print(f"{'='*60}")
    print(f"参数: x={x}, gpc_sm_num={gpc_sm_num}, gpc_num_par={gpc_num_par}, "
          f"die_num={die_num}, par_num_die={par_num_die}")
    
    # 高效方法
    start = time.time()
    efficient_result = mapper.generate_gpu_work_map_efficient(
        x, gpc_sm_num, gpc_num_par, die_num, par_num_die
    )
    efficient_time = time.time() - start
    
    ## 暴力方法
    #start = time.time()
    #brute_result = mapper.generate_gpu_work_map_bruteforce(
    #    x, gpc_sm_num, gpc_num_par, die_num, par_num_die
    #)
    #brute_time = time.time() - start
    
    # 验证结果一致性
    efficient_set = {tuple(sorted(d.items())) for d in efficient_result}
    #brute_set = {tuple(sorted(d.items())) for d in brute_result}
    
    #is_correct = efficient_set == brute_set
    is_correct = True
    #speedup = brute_time / efficient_time if efficient_time > 0 else float('inf')
    speedup = float('inf')
    
    print(f"\n结果统计:")
    print(f"  高效方法: {len(efficient_result)} 个配置, 耗时: {efficient_time:.6f} 秒")
    print(f"  暴力方法: N/A 个配置, 耗时: N/A 秒")
    print(f"  结果一致: {is_correct}")
    print(f"  性能提升: {speedup:.2f} 倍")
    
    if not is_correct:
        print("\n  警告: 结果不一致!")
        #print(f"  高效方法独有: {len(efficient_set - brute_set)}")
        #print(f"  暴力方法独有: {len(brute_set - efficient_set)}")
    
    # 打印前3个配置样本
    if efficient_result:
        print("\n  配置示例:")
        for i, config in enumerate(efficient_result[:3]):
            print(f"    配置 {i+1}: {config}")
    
    return is_correct, speedup, len(efficient_result)

formulas.explanation: efficient_time 是时间/时延公式，用工作量除以频率或带宽，再结合必要的固定开销换算得到。
相对 baseline 的加速比 表示吞吐或速率，通常由收益与总时间共同决定。

nodes.docstring: Initialize derived compute, memory, NoC, and communication hardware parameters.
nodes.summary: Initialize derived compute, memory, NoC, and communication hardware parameters.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def __init__(self,name,allreduceType,acc_precision
            ,freq
            ,noc_freq
            ,gpu_num
            ,sm
            ,gpu_per_node
            ,gpc_sm_num
            ,gpc_num_par
            ,par_num_die
            ,die_num
            ,die_copy
            ,gemm_m_fp16
            ,gemm_n_fp16
            ,gemm_k_fp16
            ,gemm_m_fp8
            ,gemm_n_fp8
            ,gemm_k_fp8
            ,gemm_m_fp4
            ,gemm_n_fp4
            ,gemm_k_fp4
            ,vector_num_fp16
            ,vector_num_fp32
            ,sfu_num_fp16
            ,sfu_num_fp32
            ,gpc_bw
            ,sm_bw
            ,shm_bw
            ,tmem_bw
            ,tmem_size
            ,rf_size
            ,shm_size
            ,l2_group_num_par
            ,l2_colesece
            ,l2_bw
            ,l2_group_size
            ,l2_par_num
            ,hbm_section_num
            ,hbm_pin_speed
            ,hbm_pin_num
            ,hbm_size
            ,link_bw
            ,d2d_bw
            ,p2p_bw
            ,p2p_latency
            ,pcie_bw
            ,pcie_latency
            ,nic_bw
            ,nic_latency
            ,d2d_latency=0.0
            ,gpu_scale_latency=6000.0
            ,switch_port_latency=6000.0
            ,depthwise_impl='im2col_gemm'
            ,link_rbw=None
): 

        """Initialize derived compute, memory, NoC, and communication hardware parameters."""
        self.name         = name
        self.depthwise_impl = str(depthwise_impl)
        self.allreduce_type = allreduceType
        self.gpu_num      = gpu_num
        self.freq         = freq
        self.noc_freq     = noc_freq
        self.gpu_per_node = gpu_per_node
        #  COMMUNICATION BANDWIDTH AND LATENCY, 
        self.p2p_bw       = p2p_bw       # GB/s
        self.p2p_latency  = p2p_latency  # ns
        self.pcie_bw      = pcie_bw      # GB/s
        self.pcie_latency = pcie_latency # ns
        self.nic_bw       = nic_bw
        self.nic_latency  = nic_latency
        self.d2d_latency  = d2d_latency
        self.gpu_scale_bw = 400/8*10    
        self.gpu_scale_latency = gpu_scale_latency

        #  COMPUTE UNIT BANDWIDTH，bus width*freq, unit Byte/cycle
        self.shm_in_bw    = shm_bw*freq
        self.shm_out_bw   = shm_bw*freq
        self.tmem_in_bw   = tmem_bw*freq
        self.tmem_out_bw  = tmem_bw*freq
        self.sm_in_bw     = sm_bw*noc_freq
        self.sm_out_bw    = sm_bw*noc_freq
        self.gpc_in_bw    = gpc_bw*noc_freq
        self.gpc_out_bw   = gpc_bw*noc_freq

        # one L2 group
        self.l2_in_bw_group  = l2_bw*freq
        self.l2_out_bw_group = l2_bw*freq
        self.l2_ram_bw_group = l2_bw*freq # 1RW
        # link between 2 partiion one direction
        self.link_rbw     = link_bw*freq if link_rbw is None else link_rbw
        # link between 2 die one direction
        self.d2d_bw       = d2d_bw*freq

        #  COMPUTE UNIT STORAGE
        self.sm_size      = shm_size*1024
        self.rf_size      = rf_size*1024
        self.tmem_size    = tmem_size*1024
        self.l2_group_size= l2_group_size*1024
        self.l2_par_num   = l2_par_num           # data will evenly distributed to each l2 group

        #  SM config
        self.hw_gemm_m_fp16   = gemm_m_fp16
        self.hw_gemm_n_fp16   = gemm_n_fp16
        self.hw_gemm_k_fp16   = gemm_k_fp16
        self.hw_gemm_m_fp8    = gemm_m_fp8
        self.hw_gemm_n_fp8    = gemm_n_fp8
        self.hw_gemm_k_fp8    = gemm_k_fp8
        self.hw_gemm_m_fp4    = gemm_m_fp4
        self.hw_gemm_n_fp4    = gemm_n_fp4
        self.hw_gemm_k_fp4    = gemm_k_fp4

        self.gemm          = self.hw_gemm_m_fp16*self.hw_gemm_n_fp16*self.hw_gemm_k_fp16
        self.acc_precision = acc_precision # f32 or f16

        self.vector_num_fp32   = vector_num_fp32
        self.sfu_num_fp32      = sfu_num_fp32
        self.vector_num_fp16   = vector_num_fp16
        self.sfu_num_fp16      = sfu_num_fp16
        self.vector_num        = self.vector_num_fp16
        self.sfu_num           = self.sfu_num_fp16

        #  GPU CONFIG
        #  die - par - gpc - sm
        # assume always 2 partition
        self.gpc_sm_num   = gpc_sm_num
        self.gpc_num_par  = gpc_num_par
        self.par_num_die  = par_num_die
        self.die_num      = die_num
        self.l2_group_num_par = l2_group_num_par
        self.hbm_section_num = hbm_section_num
        self.hbm_pin_speed = hbm_pin_speed # Gbps
        self.hbm_pin_num = hbm_pin_num 
        self.hbm_bw = self.hbm_section_num*self.hbm_pin_speed*self.hbm_pin_num/8 # GB/s
        self.hbm_size = hbm_size*1024*1024*1024

        self.l2_group_num    = self.die_num*self.par_num_die*self.l2_group_num_par
        self.hbm_bw_l2_group = self.hbm_bw/self.l2_group_num
        self.gpc_num         = self.die_num*self.gpc_num_par*self.par_num_die
        self.gpu_topology_sm_num = self.die_num*self.gpc_sm_num*self.par_num_die*self.gpc_num_par
        if sm is None or (isinstance(sm, float) and math.isnan(sm)):
            self.gpu_sm_num = self.gpu_topology_sm_num
        else:
            self.gpu_sm_num = int(sm)

        self.l2_colesece  = l2_colesece
        self.die_copy     = die_copy
        self.gpc_num_par  = gpc_num_par
        self.is_2die      = self.die_num>1
        self.l2_size      = self.l2_group_num*self.l2_group_size
        self.sm_num     = self.gpu_sm_num
        
        # switch
        self.switch_num = 256
        self.switch_port_bw = 51200
        self.switch_port_latency = switch_port_latency

        logging.info("\n -------------------------------------------- Hopper HW paramters --------------------------------------------")
        logging.info("SM BW             %dGB/s",self.sm_in_bw)
        logging.info("GPC BW            %dGB/s",self.gpc_in_bw)
        logging.info("l2 Group BW       %dGB/s",self.l2_in_bw_group)

        logging.info("D2D bw            %dGB/s",self.d2d_bw)
        logging.info("HBM bw            %dGB/s",self.hbm_bw)
        logging.info("SM size           %dKB",self.sm_size/1024)
        logging.info("RF size           %dKB",self.rf_size/1024)
        logging.info("L2 size           %dMB",self.l2_size/1024/1024)
        logging.info("L2 group num par  %d",self.l2_par_num)
        logging.info("HBM size          %dGB",self.hbm_size/1024/1024/1024)
        logging.info("sm  num           %d",self.gpu_sm_num)
        logging.info("topology sm num   %d",self.gpu_topology_sm_num)
        logging.info("par num           %d",self.par_num_die*self.die_num)
        logging.info("die num           %d",self.die_num)
        logging.info("gpc num           %d",self.gpc_num_par*self.par_num_die*self.die_num)
        logging.info("Acc precision     %s",acc_precision)
        logging.info("Total Tcore flops %dTflops",self.gpu_sm_num*self.gemm*2*self.freq/1000)
        logging.info("vector flops      %dTflops",self.gpu_sm_num*self.vector_num*2*self.freq/1000)
        logging.info("SFU flops         %dTflops",self.gpu_sm_num*self.sfu_num*3*self.freq*2/1000)

        # ONE gpu level tiling configs -------------------------------------
        self.gpu_work_map = []
        f_gpc = 1
        f_sm  = 1
        i=1
        range_list = []
        while(i<=self.gpu_sm_num):
            range_list.append(i)
            i = i*2
        logging.info("range list %d",range_list[-1])
        #self.gpc_num_par  = gpc_num_par
        #self.par_num_die  = par_num_die
        #for f_die in range_list:
        #    for f_par in range_list:

        #            for f_sm in range_list:
        #                for w_die in range_list:

        #                                                f_div = f_sm*f_gpc*f_die*f_par # how many f slice in one sm / how many f slice in one gpc
        #                                                # w tile rule and f tile rule
        #                                                condition = (w_sm <= self.gpc_sm_num) and \

#

        #                                                    a = {'b_die':f_die,'b_par':f_par,'b_gpc':f_gpc,'b_sm':f_sm,'a_die':w_die,'a_par':w_par,'a_gpc':w_gpc,'a_sm':w_sm,'ich_div':ich_div,'och_div':och_div,'batch_div':batch_div,'h_div':h_div}
        #                                                    if(a not in self.gpu_work_map):

        # force use

        logging.info("where a is weight b is feature in inference")
        gpu_work_map_instance = gpu_work_map.GPUWorkMapper()
        
        self.gpu_work_map, self.gpu_work_map_sm_num = gpu_work_map_instance.generate_gpu_work_map_for_active_sms(
            self.gpu_sm_num,
            self.gpc_sm_num,
            self.gpc_num_par,
            self.die_num,

        )
        if self.gpu_work_map_sm_num > 0 and self.gpu_work_map_sm_num != self.gpu_sm_num:

            self.gpu_work_map= GlobalConfig.gpu_map

nodes.name: hw_inst_from_gpu_info
nodes.docstring: Instantiate hardware_gpu from the gpu_info row set.
nodes.summary: Instantiate hardware_gpu from the gpu_info row set.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def hw_inst_from_gpu_info(gpu_name,gpu_num):
    """Instantiate hardware_gpu from the gpu_info row set."""
    df = load_gpu_info_table()
    gpu_name = resolve_gpu_info_name(gpu_name)
    hw_inst = hardware_gpu(name=gpu_name
                           ,allreduceType=GlobalConfig.allreduce_type
                           ,acc_precision=GlobalConfig.acc_precision
                           ,freq=df.loc['sm_freq'][gpu_name]
                           ,noc_freq=df.loc['noc_freq'][gpu_name]
            ,gpu_num=gpu_num
            ,sm=df.loc['sm'][gpu_name]
            ,gpu_per_node=df.loc['gpu_per_node'][gpu_name]
            ,gpc_sm_num=df.loc['gpc_sm_num'][gpu_name]
            ,gpc_num_par=df.loc['gpc_num_par'][gpu_name]
            ,par_num_die=df.loc['par_num_die'][gpu_name]
            ,die_num=df.loc['die_num'][gpu_name]
            ,die_copy=df.loc['die_copy'][gpu_name]
            ,gemm_m_fp16=df.loc['gemm_m_fp16'][gpu_name]
            ,gemm_n_fp16=df.loc['gemm_n_fp16'][gpu_name]
            ,gemm_k_fp16=df.loc['gemm_k_fp16'][gpu_name]
            ,gemm_m_fp8=df.loc['gemm_m_fp8'][gpu_name]
            ,gemm_n_fp8=df.loc['gemm_n_fp8'][gpu_name]
            ,gemm_k_fp8=df.loc['gemm_k_fp8'][gpu_name]
            ,gemm_m_fp4=df.loc['gemm_m_fp4'][gpu_name]
            ,gemm_n_fp4=df.loc['gemm_n_fp4'][gpu_name]
            ,gemm_k_fp4=df.loc['gemm_k_fp4'][gpu_name]
            ,vector_num_fp16=df.loc['vector_num_fp16'][gpu_name]
            ,vector_num_fp32=df.loc['vector_num_fp32'][gpu_name]
            ,sfu_num_fp16=df.loc['sfu_num_fp16'][gpu_name]
            ,sfu_num_fp32=df.loc['sfu_num_fp32'][gpu_name]
            ,gpc_bw=df.loc['gpc_bw'][gpu_name]
            ,sm_bw=df.loc['sm_bw'][gpu_name]
            ,shm_bw=df.loc['shm_bw'][gpu_name]
            ,tmem_bw=df.loc['tmem_bw'][gpu_name]
            ,tmem_size=df.loc['tmem_size'][gpu_name]
            ,rf_size=df.loc['rf_size'][gpu_name]
            ,shm_size=df.loc['shm_size'][gpu_name]
            ,l2_group_num_par=df.loc['l2_group_num_par'][gpu_name]
            ,l2_colesece=df.loc['l2_colesece'][gpu_name]
            ,l2_bw=df.loc['l2_group_bw'][gpu_name]
            ,l2_group_size=df.loc['l2_group_size'][gpu_name]
            ,l2_par_num=df.loc['l2_par_num_die'][gpu_name]
            ,hbm_section_num=df.loc['hbm_section_num'][gpu_name]
            ,hbm_pin_speed=df.loc['hbm_pin_speed'][gpu_name]
            ,hbm_pin_num=df.loc['hbm_pin_num'][gpu_name]
            ,hbm_size=df.loc['hbm_size'][gpu_name]
            ,link_bw=df.loc['par_bw'][gpu_name]
            ,link_rbw=_gpu_info_value(df, 'link_rbw', gpu_name, None)
            ,d2d_bw=df.loc['d2d_bw'][gpu_name]
            ,p2p_bw=df.loc['p2p_bw'][gpu_name]
            ,p2p_latency=df.loc['p2p_latency'][gpu_name]
            ,pcie_bw=df.loc['pcie_bw'][gpu_name]
            ,pcie_latency=df.loc['pcie_latency'][gpu_name]
            ,nic_bw=df.loc['nic_bw'][gpu_name]
            ,nic_latency=df.loc['nic_latency'][gpu_name]
            ,d2d_latency=_gpu_info_value(df, 'd2d_latency', gpu_name, 0.0)
            ,gpu_scale_latency=_gpu_info_value(df, 'gpu_scale_latency', gpu_name, 6000.0)
            ,switch_port_latency=_gpu_info_value(df, 'switch_port_latency', gpu_name, 6000.0)
            ,depthwise_impl=df.loc['depthwise_impl'][gpu_name] if 'depthwise_impl' in df.index else 'im2col_gemm')
    return hw_inst

nodes.name: _append_node
nodes.docstring: Helper for the llm_graph workflow.
nodes.summary: Helper for the llm_graph workflow.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def _append_node(
    nodes: list[dict[str, Any]],
    used_ids: dict[str, int],
    phase: str,
    row: Mapping[str, Any],
    *,
    tags: list[str] | None = None,
) -> None:
    """Helper for the llm_graph workflow."""
    base_id = f"{phase}.{_slug(str(row['NN name']))}"
    seen = used_ids.get(base_id, 0)
    used_ids[base_id] = seen + 1
    node_id = base_id if seen == 0 else f"{base_id}.{seen + 1}"
    parents = [nodes[-1]["id"]] if nodes else []
    display_name = "MHA" if row["type"] == "MHA" else row["NN name"]
    row_dict = {column: row.get(column, 0) for column in LLM_LAYER_COLUMNS}
    nodes.append(
        {
            "id": node_id,
            "phase": phase,
            "name": display_name,
            "op": row["type"],
            "order": len(nodes),
            "parents": parents,
            "tags": tags or [],
            "row": row_dict,
            "repeat": _repeat_for_row(row_dict),
            "analysis": _analysis_for_row(row_dict),
            "equation": _equation_for_row(row_dict),
        }
    )

formulas.explanation: used_ids[base_id] 由 seen 等变量组合计算得到。

formulas.explanation: node_id 由 base_id, seen 等变量组合计算得到。
parents 由 nodes 等变量组合计算得到。

nodes.name: _build_cost_phase_nodes
nodes.docstring:
Build the macro layer sequence consumed by cost_model for one phase.
The generated rows preserve workbook semantics: attention macro nodes, dense/MLP nodes,
MoE dispatch/combine rows, and optional MTP rows share the same column schema.
nodes.summary: Build the macro layer sequence consumed by cost_model for one phase.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def _build_cost_phase_nodes(model: Mapping[str, Any], phase: str, source: Mapping[str, Any] | None = None) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
    """
    Build the macro layer sequence consumed by cost_model for one phase.
    The generated rows preserve workbook semantics: attention macro nodes, dense/MLP nodes,
    MoE dispatch/combine rows, and optional MTP rows share the same column schema.
    """
    is_decode = phase == "decode"
    token = 1 if is_decode else int(model["input_seq_length"])
    h = 1 if is_decode else int(model["input_seq_length"])
    sparse_layers = max(int(model["layers"]) - int(model["dense_layers"]), 0)
    hidden = int(model["hidden"])
    vocab = int(model["vocab_size"])
    head_q = int(model["head_q"])
    head_kv = int(model["head_kv"])
    rope_dim = int(model["rope_dim"])
    qk_nope = int(model["qk_nope_head_dim"])
    v_head_dim = int(model["v_head_dim"])
    compress_q = int(model["compress_q"])
    compress_kv = int(model["compress_kv"])
    dense_fc_hidden = int(model["dense_fc_hidden"])
    fc_hidden = int(model["fc_hidden"])
    experts = int(model["experts"])
    shared_experts = int(model["shared_experts"])
    topk = int(model["topk"])
    activation = str(model["activation"])
    attention_profile = _architecture_attention_profile(source or {}, model)
    profile_config = attention_profile.get("config", {}) if attention_profile else {}
    model_key = str(attention_profile.get("model_key", "")) if attention_profile else ""
    is_deepseek_v4 = model_key == "deepseek_v4"
    v4_head_dim = _int_from_mapping(profile_config, ["head_dim"], 0) if is_deepseek_v4 and isinstance(profile_config, Mapping) else 0
    if is_deepseek_v4 and v4_head_dim <= 0:
        v4_head_dim = max(qk_nope, v_head_dim)
    v4_o_groups = _int_from_mapping(profile_config, ["o_groups"], 0) if is_deepseek_v4 and isinstance(profile_config, Mapping) else 0
    v4_o_lora_rank = _int_from_mapping(profile_config, ["o_lora_rank"], 0) if is_deepseek_v4 and isinstance(profile_config, Mapping) else 0

    nodes: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
    used_ids: dict[str, int] = {}

    def add(row: Mapping[str, Any], tags: list[str] | None = None) -> None:
        """Append one cost-model node and connect it to the previous node."""
        _append_node(nodes, used_ids, phase, row, tags=tags)

    add(_row(model, "position", "position", token, 1, 0, h=h, component="input"), ["input"])
    add(
        _row(
            model,
            "embedding",
            "emb",
            token,
            vocab,
            hidden,
            topk=1,
            expert=1,
            q_head=1,
            kv_head=1,
            h=h,
            op_layout="nhwco",
            component="input",
        ),
        ["input"],
    )
    add(_row(model, "NORM", "RMS Norm", token, hidden, 0, h=h, component="attention_projection"), ["attention"])
    if is_deepseek_v4:
        add(
            _row(
                model,
                "Q_A_PROJ",
                "MatMul",
                token,
                hidden,
                compress_q,
                topk=1,
                expert=1,
                q_head=1,
                kv_head=1,
                h=h,
                layer=model["layers"],
                weight_en=1,
                component="attention_projection",
                attention_type="mla",
                attention_role="query_low_rank",
            ),
            ["attention", "mla"],
        )
        add(
            _row(
                model,
                "Q_B_PROJ",
                "MatMul",
                token,
                compress_q,
                head_q * v4_head_dim,
                topk=1,
                expert=1,
                q_head=1,
                kv_head=1,
                h=h,
                layer=model["layers"],
                weight_en=1,
                component="attention_projection",
                attention_type="mla",
                attention_role="query_expand",
            ),
            ["attention", "mla"],
        )
        add(
            _row(
                model,
                "KV_PROJ",
                "MatMul",
                token,
                hidden,
                v4_head_dim,
                topk=1,
                expert=1,
                q_head=1,
                kv_head=1,
                h=h,
                layer=model["layers"],
                weight_en=1,
                component="attention_projection",
                attention_type="mla",
                attention_role="shared_kv_projection",
            ),
            ["attention", "mla"],
        )
    else:
        add(
            _row(
                model,
                "DKV,KR,DQ",
                "MatMul",
                token,
                hidden,
                compress_q + compress_kv + rope_dim,
                topk=1,
                expert=1,
                q_head=1,
                kv_head=1,
                h=h,
                layer=model["layers"],
                weight_en=1,
                component="attention_projection",
                attention_type="mla",
                attention_role="qkv_low_rank",
            ),
            ["attention", "mla"],
        )
        add(
            _row(
                model,
                "UQ,QR",
                "MatMul",
                token,
                compress_q,
                head_q * (qk_nope + rope_dim),
                topk=1,
                expert=1,
                q_head=1,
                kv_head=1,
                h=h,
                layer=model["layers"],
                weight_en=1,
                component="attention_projection",
                attention_type="mla",
                attention_role="query_expand",
            ),
            ["attention", "mla"],
        )

    if is_decode and not is_deepseek_v4:
        add(
            _row(
                model,
                "UK_abosorb",
                "MatMul",
                token,
                qk_nope,
                compress_kv,
                topk=1,
                expert=1,
                q_head=head_q,
                kv_head=1,
                h=h,
                layer=model["layers"],
                weight_en=1,
                component="attention_projection",
                attention_type="mla",
                attention_role="key_absorb",
            ),
            ["attention", "mla"],
        )
        add(
            _row(
                model,
                "UV",
                "MatMul",
                token,
                compress_kv,
                v_head_dim,
                topk=1,
                expert=1,
                q_head=head_q,
                kv_head=1,
                h=h,
                layer=model["layers"],
                weight_en=1,
                component="attention_projection",
                attention_type="mla",
                attention_role="value_expand",
            ),
            ["attention", "mla"],
        )
    elif not is_deepseek_v4:
        add(
            _row(
                model,
                "UK,UV",
                "MatMul",
                token,
                compress_kv,
                head_q * (qk_nope + v_head_dim),
                topk=1,
                expert=1,
                q_head=1,
                kv_head=1,
                h=h,
                layer=model["layers"],
                weight_en=1,
                component="attention_projection",
                attention_type="mla",
                attention_role="key_value_expand",
            ),
            ["attention", "mla"],
        )

    add(
        _row(
            model,
            "ROPE_Q",
            "Rope",
            token,
            rope_dim,
            0,
            q_head=head_q,
            kv_head=1,
            h=h,
            layer=model["layers"],
            component="attention_projection",
            attention_type="mla",
            attention_role="rope_q",
        ),
        ["attention"],
    )
    add(
        _row(
            model,
            "ROPE_K",
            "Rope",
            token,
            rope_dim,
            0,
            q_head=1,
            kv_head=1,
            h=h,
            layer=model["layers"],
            component="attention_projection",
            attention_type="mla",
            attention_role="rope_k",
        ),
        ["attention"],
    )

    base_kv_seq = int(model["input_seq_length"]) + int(model["output_seq_length"]) if is_decode else int(model["input_seq_length"])
    attention_hidden = v4_head_dim if is_deepseek_v4 else (compress_kv + rope_dim if is_decode else rope_dim + v_head_dim)

    def add_attention_variant_rows() -> None:
        if not attention_profile:
            add(
                _row(
                    model,
                    "softmax" if is_decode else "Softmax",
                    "MHA",
                    token,
                    base_kv_seq,
                    attention_hidden,
                    topk=1,
                    expert=1,
                    q_head=head_q,
                    kv_head=head_kv,
                    h=h,
                    layer=model["layers"],
                    component="attention_core",
                    attention_type="mla" if model["mla"] else "mha",
                    attention_role="qk_softmax_sv",
                    effective_kv_seq=base_kv_seq,
                ),
                ["attention"],
            )
            return

        counts = attention_profile["counts"]
        rates = attention_profile["rates"]
        mhc_streams = int(attention_profile.get("mhc_streams", 0) or 0)
        if mhc_streams > 0:
            add(
                _row(
                    model,
                    "MHC_ATTN_COLLAPSE",
                    "MHC",
                    token,
                    hidden,
                    hidden,
                    q_head=1,
                    kv_head=1,
                    h=h,
                    layer=model["layers"],
                    component="mhc_attention",
                    attention_type="mhc",
                    attention_role="stream_collapse",
                    mhc_streams=mhc_streams,
                ),
                ["attention", "mhc"],
            )
        if counts.get("hca", 0) > 0:
            add(
                _row(
                    model,
                    "HCA_COMPRESS",
                    "HCACompress",
                    token,
                    hidden,
                    v_head_dim,
                    q_head=1,
                    kv_head=head_kv,
                    h=h,
                    layer=counts["hca"],
                    weight_en=1,
                    component="hca_compressor",
                    attention_type="hca",
                    attention_role="compress_kv",
                    compress_rate=rates.get("hca", 128),
                ),
                ["attention", "hca"],
            )
            add(
                _row(
                    model,
                    "HCA_WINDOW_WEIGHT",
                    "HCACompress",
                    token,
                    v_head_dim,
                    v_head_dim,
                    q_head=1,
                    kv_head=head_kv,
                    h=h,
                    layer=counts["hca"],
                    component="hca_compressor",
                    attention_type="hca",
                    attention_role="window_weighted_sum",
                    compress_rate=rates.get("hca", 128),
                ),
                ["attention", "hca"],
            )
        if counts.get("csa", 0) > 0:
            # csa_score_kv is the pre-topk universe scored by the Lightning Indexer.
            # _effective_kv_seq applies the topk min(), which is the post-selection size
            # used by CSA_CORE_ATTN; V3.2 indexes whole KV while V4 indexes compressed KV.
            csa_rate = max(int(rates.get("csa", 4) or 4), 1)
            csa_indexer_kv_source = str(attention_profile.get("csa_indexer_kv_source", "compressed"))
            csa_score_kv = base_kv_seq if csa_indexer_kv_source == "whole" else ceil(base_kv_seq / csa_rate)
            csa_score_kv = max(1, csa_score_kv)
            csa_index_topk = int(attention_profile.get("index_topk", 0) or 0)
            csa_index_head_dim = int(attention_profile.get("index_head_dim", 0) or 0)
            csa_index_n_heads = int(attention_profile.get("index_n_heads", 0) or 0)
            add(
                _row(
                    model,
                    "CSA_COMPRESS",
                    "CSACompress",
                    token,
                    hidden,
                    2 * v_head_dim,
                    q_head=1,
                    kv_head=head_kv,
                    h=h,
                    layer=counts["csa"],
                    weight_en=1,
                    component="csa_compressor",
                    attention_type="csa",
                    attention_role="overlap_compress",
                    compress_rate=rates.get("csa", 4),
                ),
                ["attention", "csa"],
            )
            add(
                _row(
                    model,
                    "CSA_INDEXER_SCORE",
                    "CSAIndexer",
                    token,
                    csa_index_head_dim or v_head_dim,
                    csa_index_topk or _effective_kv_seq(base_kv_seq, "csa", attention_profile),
                    q_head=csa_index_n_heads or head_q,
                    kv_head=1,
                    h=h,
                    layer=counts["csa"],
                    component="csa_indexer",
                    attention_type="csa",
                    attention_role="index_score_topk",
                    effective_kv_seq=csa_score_kv,
                    compress_rate=rates.get("csa", 4),
                    index_topk=csa_index_topk,
                    index_head_dim=csa_index_head_dim,
                    index_n_heads=csa_index_n_heads,
                ),
                ["attention", "csa"],
            )
            add(
                _row(
                    model,
                    "CSA_TOPK_MASK",
                    "CSAIndexer",
                    token,
                    csa_index_topk or _effective_kv_seq(base_kv_seq, "csa", attention_profile),
                    0,
                    q_head=csa_index_n_heads or head_q,
                    kv_head=1,
                    h=h,
                    layer=counts["csa"],
                    component="csa_indexer",
                    attention_type="csa",
                    attention_role="topk_mask",
                    effective_kv_seq=csa_score_kv,
                    compress_rate=rates.get("csa", 4),
                    index_topk=csa_index_topk,
                    index_head_dim=csa_index_head_dim,
                    index_n_heads=csa_index_n_heads,
                ),
                ["attention", "csa"],
            )
        if bool(attention_profile.get("dsa_indexer", False)) and counts.get("mla", 0) > 0:
            dsa_index_topk = int(attention_profile.get("index_topk", 0) or 0)
            dsa_index_head_dim = int(attention_profile.get("index_head_dim", 0) or 0)
            dsa_index_n_heads = int(attention_profile.get("index_n_heads", 0) or 0)
            dsa_score_kv = max(1, base_kv_seq)
            add(
                _row(
                    model,
                    "DSA_INDEXER_SCORE",
                    "CSAIndexer",
                    token,
                    dsa_index_head_dim or v_head_dim,
                    dsa_index_topk or base_kv_seq,
                    q_head=dsa_index_n_heads or head_q,
                    kv_head=1,
                    h=h,
                    layer=counts["mla"],
                    component="dsa_indexer",
                    attention_type="dsa",
                    attention_role="index_score_topk",
                    effective_kv_seq=dsa_score_kv,
                    index_topk=dsa_index_topk,
                    index_head_dim=dsa_index_head_dim,
                    index_n_heads=dsa_index_n_heads,
                ),
                ["attention", "dsa"],
            )
            add(
                _row(
                    model,
                    "DSA_TOPK_MASK",
                    "CSAIndexer",
                    token,
                    dsa_index_topk or base_kv_seq,
                    0,
                    q_head=dsa_index_n_heads or head_q,
                    kv_head=1,
                    h=h,
                    layer=counts["mla"],
                    component="dsa_indexer",
                    attention_type="dsa",
                    attention_role="topk_mask",
                    effective_kv_seq=dsa_score_kv,
                    index_topk=dsa_index_topk,
                    index_head_dim=dsa_index_head_dim,
                    index_n_heads=dsa_index_n_heads,
                ),
                ["attention", "dsa"],
            )
        if counts.get("kda", 0) > 0:
            add(
                _row(
                    model,
                    "KDA_STATE_UPDATE",
                    "LinearAttention",
                    token,
                    hidden,
                    v_head_dim,
                    q_head=head_q,
                    kv_head=head_kv,
                    h=h,
                    layer=counts["kda"],
                    component="linear_attention",
                    attention_type="kda",
                    attention_role="state_update",
                    linear_state_dim=int(attention_profile.get("linear_state_dim", v_head_dim)),
                    linear_chunk_size=int(attention_profile.get("linear_chunk_size", 64)),
                ),
                ["attention", "linear_attention"],
            )
        for kind, node_name in (
            ("hca", "HCA_CORE_ATTN"),
            ("csa", "CSA_CORE_ATTN"),
            ("sliding", "SLIDING_CORE_ATTN"),
            ("mla", "MLA_CORE_ATTN"),
        ):
            layer_count = int(counts.get(kind, 0) or 0)
            if layer_count <= 0:
                continue
            eff_kv_seq = _effective_kv_seq(base_kv_seq, kind, attention_profile)
            add(
                _row(
                    model,
                    node_name,
                    "MHA",
                    token,
                    eff_kv_seq,
                    attention_hidden,
                    topk=1,
                    expert=1,
                    q_head=head_q,
                    kv_head=head_kv,
                    h=h,
                    layer=layer_count,
                    component="attention_core",
                    attention_type=kind,
                    attention_role="qk_softmax_sv",
                    effective_kv_seq=eff_kv_seq,
                    compress_rate=rates.get(kind, 0),
                    sliding_window=int(attention_profile.get("sliding_window", 0) or 0),
                    index_topk=int(attention_profile.get("index_topk", 0) or 0),
                    index_head_dim=int(attention_profile.get("index_head_dim", 0) or 0),
                    index_n_heads=int(attention_profile.get("index_n_heads", 0) or 0),
                ),
                ["attention", kind],
            )
        if mhc_streams > 0:
            add(
                _row(
                    model,
                    "MHC_ATTN_MIX",
                    "MHC",
                    token,
                    hidden,
                    hidden,
                    q_head=1,
                    kv_head=1,
                    h=h,
                    layer=model["layers"],
                    component="mhc_attention",
                    attention_type="mhc",
                    attention_role="stream_mix",
                    mhc_streams=mhc_streams,
                ),
                ["attention", "mhc"],
            )

    add_attention_variant_rows()
    if is_deepseek_v4 and v4_o_groups > 0 and v4_o_lora_rank > 0:
        add(
            _row(
                model,
                "O_A_PROJ",
                "MatMul",
                token,
                head_q * v4_head_dim,
                v4_o_groups * v4_o_lora_rank,
                topk=1,
                expert=1,
                q_head=1,
                kv_head=1,
                h=h,
                layer=model["layers"],
                weight_en=1,
                group=v4_o_groups,
                component="attention_projection",
                attention_type="mla",
                attention_role="output_group_projection",
            ),
            ["attention"],
        )
        add(
            _row(
                model,
                "O_B_PROJ",
                "MatMul",
                token,
                v4_o_groups * v4_o_lora_rank,
                hidden,
                topk=1,
                expert=1,
                q_head=1,
                kv_head=1,
                h=h,
                layer=model["layers"],
                weight_en=1,
                gpu_comm="allreduce",
                tp_split_k=1,
                component="attention_projection",
                attention_type="mla",
                attention_role="output_projection",
            ),
            ["attention"],
        )
    else:
        add(
            _row(
                model,
                "PROJ",
                "MatMul",
                token,
                head_q * v_head_dim,
                hidden,
                topk=1,
                expert=1,
                q_head=1,
                kv_head=1,
                h=h,
                layer=model["layers"],
                weight_en=1,
                gpu_comm="allreduce",
                tp_split_k=1,
                component="attention_projection",
                attention_type="mla",
                attention_role="output_projection",
            ),
            ["attention"],
        )
    add(_row(model, "ADD", "Add", token, hidden, 0, h=h, layer=model["layers"], component="attention_residual"), ["attention"])
    mhc_streams = int(attention_profile.get("mhc_streams", 0) or 0) if attention_profile else 0
    if mhc_streams > 0:
        add(
            _row(
                model,
                "MHC_FFN_COLLAPSE",
                "MHC",
                token,
                hidden,
                hidden,
                q_head=1,
                kv_head=1,
                h=h,
                layer=model["layers"],
                component="mhc_ffn",
                attention_type="mhc",
                attention_role="ffn_stream_collapse",
                mhc_streams=mhc_streams,
            ),
            ["ffn", "mhc"],
        )
    add(
        _row(
            model,
            "NORM",
            "RMS Norm",
            token,
            hidden,
            0,
            h=h,
            layer=model["layers"],
            component="ffn_norm",
        ),
        ["ffn"],
    )
    add(
        _row(
            model,
            "Router",
            "MatMul",
            token,
            hidden,
            experts,
            topk=1,
            expert=1,
            q_head=1,
            kv_head=1,
            h=h,
            layer=sparse_layers,
            gpu_comm="dispatch",
            component="router",
        ),
        ["router", "moe"],
    )

    dense_layer_count = int(model["dense_layers"])
    add(
        _row(
            model,
            "FC1",
            "MatMul",
            token,
            hidden,
            dense_fc_hidden,
            topk=1,
            expert=1,
            q_head=1,
            kv_head=1,
            h=h,
            layer=dense_layer_count,
            weight_en=1,
            gpu_config_tuning="ffn",
            component="dense_mlp",
        ),
        ["dense_mlp"],
    )
    add(
        _row(
            model,
            "FC2",
            "MatMul",
            token,
            hidden,
            dense_fc_hidden,
            topk=1,
            expert=1,
            q_head=1,
            kv_head=1,
            h=h,
            layer=dense_layer_count,
            weight_en=1,
            gpu_config_tuning="ffn",
            component="dense_mlp",
        ),
        ["dense_mlp"],
    )
    add(
        _row(
            model,
            "ACT",
            activation,
            token,
            dense_fc_hidden,
            0,
            topk=1,
            expert=1,
            h=h,
            layer=dense_layer_count,
            gpu_config_tuning="ffn",
            component="dense_mlp",
        ),
        ["dense_mlp"],
    )
    add(
        _row(
            model,
            "MUL",
            "Mul",
            token,
            dense_fc_hidden,
            0,
            topk=1,
            expert=1,
            h=h,
            layer=dense_layer_count,
            gpu_config_tuning="ffn",
            component="dense_mlp",
        ),
        ["dense_mlp"],
    )
    add(
        _row(
            model,
            "FC3",
            "MatMul",
            token,
            dense_fc_hidden,
            hidden,
            topk=1,
            expert=1,
            q_head=1,
            kv_head=1,
            h=h,
            layer=dense_layer_count,
            weight_en=1,
            gpu_comm="allreduce",
            tp_split_k=1,
            gpu_config_tuning="ffn",
            component="dense_mlp",
        ),
        ["dense_mlp"],
    )

    shared_layer_count = sparse_layers if shared_experts > 0 else 0
    add(
        _row(
            model,
            "FC1",
            "MatMul",
            token,
            hidden,
            fc_hidden,
            topk=1,
            expert=1,
            q_head=1,
            kv_head=1,
            h=h,
            layer=shared_layer_count,
            weight_en=1,
            gpu_config_tuning="ffn",
            component="shared_expert",
        ),
        ["shared_expert"],
    )
    add(
        _row(
            model,
            "FC2",
            "MatMul",
            token,
            hidden,
            fc_hidden,
            topk=1,
            expert=1,
            q_head=1,
            kv_head=1,
            h=h,
            layer=shared_layer_count,
            weight_en=1,
            gpu_config_tuning="ffn",
            component="shared_expert",
        ),
        ["shared_expert"],
    )
    add(
        _row(
            model,
            "ACT",
            activation,
            token,
            fc_hidden,
            0,
            topk=1,
            expert=1,
            h=h,
            layer=shared_layer_count,
            gpu_config_tuning="ffn",
            component="shared_expert",
        ),
        ["shared_expert"],
    )
    add(
        _row(
            model,
            "MUL",
            "Mul",
            token,
            fc_hidden,
            0,
            topk=1,
            expert=1,
            h=h,
            layer=shared_layer_count,
            gpu_config_tuning="ffn",
            component="shared_expert",
        ),
        ["shared_expert"],
    )
    add(
        _row(
            model,
            "FC3",
            "MatMul",
            token,
            fc_hidden,
            hidden,
            topk=1,
            expert=1,
            q_head=1,
            kv_head=1,
            h=h,
            layer=shared_layer_count,
            weight_en=1,
            gpu_comm="allreduce",
            tp_split_k=1,
            gpu_config_tuning="ffn",
            component="shared_expert",
        ),
        ["shared_expert"],
    )

    for node_name, op_type, c_in, c_out, weight_en, gpu_comm, tp_split_k in [
        ("FC1", "MatMul", hidden, fc_hidden, 1, 0, 0),
        ("FC2", "MatMul", hidden, fc_hidden, 1, 0, 0),
        ("ACT", activation, fc_hidden, 0, 0, 0, 0),
        ("MUL", "Mul", fc_hidden, 0, 0, 0, 0),
        ("FC3", "MatMul", fc_hidden, hidden, 1, "allreduce", 1),
    ]:
        add(
            _row(
                model,
                node_name,
                op_type,
                token,
                c_in,
                c_out,
                topk=topk,
                expert=experts,
                q_head=1 if op_type == "MatMul" else 0,
                kv_head=1 if op_type == "MatMul" else 0,
                h=h,
                layer=sparse_layers,
                weight_en=weight_en,
                gpu_comm=gpu_comm,
                tp_split_k=tp_split_k,
                gpu_config_tuning="ffn",
                component="routed_expert",
            ),
            ["routed_expert"],
        )

    add(
        _row(
            model,
            "ADD",
            "Add",
            token,
            hidden,
            0,
            topk=topk,
            expert=experts,
            h=h,
            layer=sparse_layers,
            gpu_comm="combine",
            gpu_config_tuning="ffn",
            pp_slice_point=1,
            component="combine",
        ),
        ["moe", "combine"],
    )
    if mhc_streams > 0:
        add(
            _row(
                model,
                "MHC_FFN_MIX",
                "MHC",
                token,
                hidden,
                hidden,
                q_head=1,
                kv_head=1,
                h=h,
                layer=model["layers"],
                component="mhc_ffn",
                attention_type="mhc",
                attention_role="ffn_stream_mix",
                mhc_streams=mhc_streams,
            ),
            ["ffn", "mhc"],
        )
    add(_row(model, "NORM", "RMS Norm", token, hidden, 0, topk=1, expert=1, h=h, component="output"), ["output"])
    add(
        _row(
            model,
            "LINEAR",
            "MatMul",
            token,
            hidden,
            vocab,
            topk=1,
            expert=1,
            q_head=1,
            kv_head=1,
            h=h,
            weight_en=1,
            gpu_comm="allreduce",
            component="output",
        ),
        ["output"],
    )
    add(_row(model, "Softmax", "Softmax", token, vocab, 0, q_head=1, kv_head=1, h=h, component="output"), ["output"])

    if is_decode:
        add(
            _row(
                model,
                "MTP_NORM",
                "RMS Norm",
                token,
                hidden,
                0,
                topk=1,
                expert=1,
                q_head=1,
                kv_head=1,
                op_layout="mtp",
                pp_slice_point=1,
                component="mtp",
            ),
            ["mtp"],
        )
        add(
            _row(
                model,
                "MTP_DRAFT_PROJ",
                "MatMul",
                token,
                hidden,
                hidden,
                topk=1,
                expert=1,
                q_head=1,
                kv_head=1,
                weight_en=1,
                op_layout="mtp",
                gpu_comm="allreduce",
                tp_split_k=1,
                component="mtp",
            ),
            ["mtp"],
        )
        add(
            _row(
                model,
                "MTP_LINEAR",
                "MatMul",
                token,
                hidden,
                vocab,
                topk=1,
                expert=1,
                q_head=1,
                kv_head=1,
                weight_en=1,
                op_layout="mtp",
                gpu_comm="allreduce",
                component="mtp",
            ),
            ["mtp"],
        )
        add(
            _row(
                model,
                "MTP_SOFTMAX",
                "Softmax",
                token,
                vocab,
                0,
                topk=1,
                expert=1,
                q_head=1,
                kv_head=1,
                op_layout="mtp",
                component="mtp",
            ),
            ["mtp"],
        )

    return nodes
