nodes.name: add_attention_variant_rows
nodes.summary: 这是一个核心调度或硬件配置函数，提取到 12 条关键计算公式，并直接关联 2 个仓库内函数。
nodes.source_excerpt:
def add_attention_variant_rows() -> None:
        if not attention_profile:
            add(
                _row(
                    model,
                    "softmax" if is_decode else "Softmax",
                    "MHA",
                    token,
                    base_kv_seq,
                    attention_hidden,
                    topk=1,
                    expert=1,
                    q_head=head_q,
                    kv_head=head_kv,
                    h=h,
                    layer=model["layers"],
                    component="attention_core",
                    attention_type="mla" if model["mla"] else "mha",
                    attention_role="qk_softmax_sv",
                    effective_kv_seq=base_kv_seq,
                ),
                ["attention"],
            )
            return

        counts = attention_profile["counts"]
        rates = attention_profile["rates"]
        mhc_streams = int(attention_profile.get("mhc_streams", 0) or 0)
        if mhc_streams > 0:
            add(
                _row(
                    model,
                    "MHC_ATTN_COLLAPSE",
                    "MHC",
                    token,
                    hidden,
                    hidden,
                    q_head=1,
                    kv_head=1,
                    h=h,
                    layer=model["layers"],
                    component="mhc_attention",
                    attention_type="mhc",
                    attention_role="stream_collapse",
                    mhc_streams=mhc_streams,
                ),
                ["attention", "mhc"],
            )
        if counts.get("hca", 0) > 0:
            add(
                _row(
                    model,
                    "HCA_COMPRESS",
                    "HCACompress",
                    token,
                    hidden,
                    v_head_dim,
                    q_head=1,
                    kv_head=head_kv,
                    h=h,
                    layer=counts["hca"],
                    weight_en=1,
                    component="hca_compressor",
                    attention_type="hca",
                    attention_role="compress_kv",
                    compress_rate=rates.get("hca", 128),
                ),
                ["attention", "hca"],
            )
            add(
                _row(
                    model,
                    "HCA_WINDOW_WEIGHT",
                    "HCACompress",
                    token,
                    v_head_dim,
                    v_head_dim,
                    q_head=1,
                    kv_head=head_kv,
                    h=h,
                    layer=counts["hca"],
                    component="hca_compressor",
                    attention_type="hca",
                    attention_role="window_weighted_sum",
                    compress_rate=rates.get("hca", 128),
                ),
                ["attention", "hca"],
            )
        if counts.get("csa", 0) > 0:
            # csa_score_kv is the pre-topk universe scored by the Lightning Indexer.
            # _effective_kv_seq applies the topk min(), which is the post-selection size
            # used by CSA_CORE_ATTN; V3.2 indexes whole KV while V4 indexes compressed KV.
            csa_rate = max(int(rates.get("csa", 4) or 4), 1)
            csa_indexer_kv_source = str(attention_profile.get("csa_indexer_kv_source", "compressed"))
            csa_score_kv = base_kv_seq if csa_indexer_kv_source == "whole" else ceil(base_kv_seq / csa_rate)
            csa_score_kv = max(1, csa_score_kv)
            csa_index_topk = int(attention_profile.get("index_topk", 0) or 0)
            csa_index_head_dim = int(attention_profile.get("index_head_dim", 0) or 0)
            csa_index_n_heads = int(attention_profile.get("index_n_heads", 0) or 0)
            add(
                _row(
                    model,
                    "CSA_COMPRESS",
                    "CSACompress",
                    token,
                    hidden,
                    2 * v_head_dim,
                    q_head=1,
                    kv_head=head_kv,
                    h=h,
                    layer=counts["csa"],
                    weight_en=1,
                    component="csa_compressor",
                    attention_type="csa",
                    attention_role="overlap_compress",
                    compress_rate=rates.get("csa", 4),
                ),
                ["attention", "csa"],
            )
            add(
                _row(
                    model,
                    "CSA_INDEXER_SCORE",
                    "CSAIndexer",
                    token,
                    csa_index_head_dim or v_head_dim,
                    csa_index_topk or _effective_kv_seq(base_kv_seq, "csa", attention_profile),
                    q_head=csa_index_n_heads or head_q,
                    kv_head=1,
                    h=h,
                    layer=counts["csa"],
                    component="csa_indexer",
                    attention_type="csa",
                    attention_role="index_score_topk",
                    effective_kv_seq=csa_score_kv,
                    compress_rate=rates.get("csa", 4),
                    index_topk=csa_index_topk,
                    index_head_dim=csa_index_head_dim,
                    index_n_heads=csa_index_n_heads,
                ),
                ["attention", "csa"],
            )
            add(
                _row(
                    model,
                    "CSA_TOPK_MASK",
                    "CSAIndexer",
                    token,
                    csa_index_topk or _effective_kv_seq(base_kv_seq, "csa", attention_profile),
                    0,
                    q_head=csa_index_n_heads or head_q,
                    kv_head=1,
                    h=h,
                    layer=counts["csa"],
                    component="csa_indexer",
                    attention_type="csa",
                    attention_role="topk_mask",
                    effective_kv_seq=csa_score_kv,
                    compress_rate=rates.get("csa", 4),
                    index_topk=csa_index_topk,
                    index_head_dim=csa_index_head_dim,
                    index_n_heads=csa_index_n_heads,
                ),
                ["attention", "csa"],
            )
        if bool(attention_profile.get("dsa_indexer", False)) and counts.get("mla", 0) > 0:
            dsa_index_topk = int(attention_profile.get("index_topk", 0) or 0)
            dsa_index_head_dim = int(attention_profile.get("index_head_dim", 0) or 0)
            dsa_index_n_heads = int(attention_profile.get("index_n_heads", 0) or 0)
            dsa_score_kv = max(1, base_kv_seq)
            add(
                _row(
                    model,
                    "DSA_INDEXER_SCORE",
                    "CSAIndexer",
                    token,
                    dsa_index_head_dim or v_head_dim,
                    dsa_index_topk or base_kv_seq,
                    q_head=dsa_index_n_heads or head_q,
                    kv_head=1,
                    h=h,
                    layer=counts["mla"],
                    component="dsa_indexer",
                    attention_type="dsa",
                    attention_role="index_score_topk",
                    effective_kv_seq=dsa_score_kv,
                    index_topk=dsa_index_topk,
                    index_head_dim=dsa_index_head_dim,
                    index_n_heads=dsa_index_n_heads,
                ),
                ["attention", "dsa"],
            )
            add(
                _row(
                    model,
                    "DSA_TOPK_MASK",
                    "CSAIndexer",
                    token,
                    dsa_index_topk or base_kv_seq,
                    0,
                    q_head=dsa_index_n_heads or head_q,
                    kv_head=1,
                    h=h,
                    layer=counts["mla"],
                    component="dsa_indexer",
                    attention_type="dsa",
                    attention_role="topk_mask",
                    effective_kv_seq=dsa_score_kv,
                    index_topk=dsa_index_topk,
                    index_head_dim=dsa_index_head_dim,
                    index_n_heads=dsa_index_n_heads,
                ),
                ["attention", "dsa"],
            )
        if counts.get("kda", 0) > 0:
            add(
                _row(
                    model,
                    "KDA_STATE_UPDATE",
                    "LinearAttention",
                    token,
                    hidden,
                    v_head_dim,
                    q_head=head_q,
                    kv_head=head_kv,
                    h=h,
                    layer=counts["kda"],
                    component="linear_attention",
                    attention_type="kda",
                    attention_role="state_update",
                    linear_state_dim=int(attention_profile.get("linear_state_dim", v_head_dim)),
                    linear_chunk_size=int(attention_profile.get("linear_chunk_size", 64)),
                ),
                ["attention", "linear_attention"],
            )
        for kind, node_name in (
            ("hca", "HCA_CORE_ATTN"),
            ("csa", "CSA_CORE_ATTN"),
            ("sliding", "SLIDING_CORE_ATTN"),
            ("mla", "MLA_CORE_ATTN"),
        ):
            layer_count = int(counts.get(kind, 0) or 0)
            if layer_count <= 0:
                continue
            eff_kv_seq = _effective_kv_seq(base_kv_seq, kind, attention_profile)
            add(
                _row(
                    model,
                    node_name,
                    "MHA",
                    token,
                    eff_kv_seq,
                    attention_hidden,
                    topk=1,
                    expert=1,
                    q_head=head_q,
                    kv_head=head_kv,
                    h=h,
                    layer=layer_count,
                    component="attention_core",
                    attention_type=kind,
                    attention_role="qk_softmax_sv",
                    effective_kv_seq=eff_kv_seq,
                    compress_rate=rates.get(kind, 0),
                    sliding_window=int(attention_profile.get("sliding_window", 0) or 0),
                    index_topk=int(attention_profile.get("index_topk", 0) or 0),
                    index_head_dim=int(attention_profile.get("index_head_dim", 0) or 0),
                    index_n_heads=int(attention_profile.get("index_n_heads", 0) or 0),
                ),
                ["attention", kind],
            )
        if mhc_streams > 0:
            add(
                _row(
                    model,
                    "MHC_ATTN_MIX",
                    "MHC",
                    token,
                    hidden,
                    hidden,
                    q_head=1,
                    kv_head=1,
                    h=h,
                    layer=model["layers"],
                    component="mhc_attention",
                    attention_type="mhc",
                    attention_role="stream_mix",
                    mhc_streams=mhc_streams,
                ),
                ["attention", "mhc"],
            )

formulas.explanation: mhc_streams 由 attention_profile.get 等变量组合计算得到。
csa_rate 由 rates.get 等变量组合计算得到。

nodes.name: _build_layer_template_graph
nodes.summary: 这是一个核心调度或硬件配置函数，提取到 0 条关键计算公式，并直接关联 4 个仓库内函数。
nodes.source_excerpt:
def _build_layer_template_graph(
    model: Mapping[str, Any],
    phase: str,
    cost_graph: Mapping[str, Any],
) -> dict[str, Any]:
    cost_nodes = list(cost_graph.get("nodes", []))
    layer_tags = {
        "attention",
        "mla",
        "ffn",
        "router",
        "moe",
        "dense_mlp",
        "shared_expert",
        "routed_expert",
        "combine",
    }
    compact_nodes: list[dict[str, Any]] = []

    input_children = _ids_with_any_tag(cost_nodes, {"input"})
    if input_children:
        compact_nodes.append(
            _compact_template_node(
                phase=phase,
                node_id=f"{phase}.input",
                name="InputEmbedding",
                op="Input",
                order=len(compact_nodes),
                children=input_children,
                parents=[],
                repeat={"axis": "sequence", "count": 1, "draw": "single_node"},
                equation={
                    "plain": "x_0 = token_embedding(input_ids) + position.",
                    "latex": "x_0=Embed(input_ids)+Pos",
                },
                tags=["input", "compact"],
            )
        )

    layer_children = _ids_with_any_tag(cost_nodes, layer_tags)
    if layer_children:
        compact_nodes.append(
            _compact_template_node(
                phase=phase,
                node_id=f"{phase}.transformer_layer",
                name="TransformerLayer",
                op="TransformerLayer",
                order=len(compact_nodes),
                children=layer_children,
                parents=[compact_nodes[-1]["id"]] if compact_nodes else [],
                repeat={
                    "axis": "layer",
                    "count": int(model["layers"]),
                    "dense_layers": int(model["dense_layers"]),
                    "sparse_layers": max(int(model["layers"]) - int(model["dense_layers"]), 0),
                    "draw": "single_node",
                },
                equation=_transformer_layer_equation(model),
                tags=["layer_template", "compact"],
            )
        )

    output_children = _ids_with_any_tag(cost_nodes, {"output"})
    if output_children:
        compact_nodes.append(
            _compact_template_node(
                phase=phase,
                node_id=f"{phase}.output_head",
                name="OutputHead",
                op="Output",
                order=len(compact_nodes),
                children=output_children,
                parents=[compact_nodes[-1]["id"]] if compact_nodes else [],
                repeat={"axis": "phase", "count": 1, "draw": "single_node"},
                equation={
                    "plain": "logits = output_projection(RMSNorm(x_L)); probabilities = softmax(logits).",
                    "latex": "logits=RMSNorm(x_L)W_vocab; p=softmax(logits)",
                },
                tags=["output", "compact"],
            )
        )

    mtp_children = _ids_with_any_tag(cost_nodes, {"mtp"})
    if mtp_children:
        compact_nodes.append(
            _compact_template_node(
                phase=phase,
                node_id=f"{phase}.mtp_head",
                name="MTPDraftHead",
                op="MTP",
                order=len(compact_nodes),
                children=mtp_children,
                parents=[compact_nodes[-1]["id"]] if compact_nodes else [],
                repeat={"axis": "draft_stage", "count": 1, "draw": "single_node"},
                equation={
                    "plain": "Draft logits are produced from the decode hidden state for multi-token prediction.",
                    "latex": "draft_logits=MTPHead(x_L)",
                },
                tags=["mtp", "compact"],
            )
        )

    return _phase_graph(compact_nodes)

nodes.name: _build_raw_phase_nodes
nodes.docstring: Helper for the llm_graph workflow.
nodes.summary: Helper for the llm_graph workflow.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def _build_raw_phase_nodes(
    model: Mapping[str, Any],
    phase: str,
    source: Mapping[str, Any] | None = None,
) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
    """Helper for the llm_graph workflow."""
    cost_nodes = _build_cost_phase_nodes(model, phase, source=source)
    nodes: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
    used_ids: dict[str, int] = {}

    for cost_node in cost_nodes:
        if cost_node["op"] == "MHA":
            row = cost_node["row"]
            attention_attrs = {
                "cost_op": "MHA",
                "token": row["token"],
                "q_head": row["q_head"],
                "kv_head": row["kv_head"],
                "kv_seq": row["c_in"],
                "hidden": row["c_out"],
                "source_cost_node": cost_node["id"],
            }
            _append_raw_node(
                nodes,
                used_ids,
                phase,
                "QK",
                "MatMul",
                tags=["attention", "raw_attention", "merge_candidate"],
                attrs={**attention_attrs, "role": "qk_score"},
            )
            _append_raw_node(
                nodes,
                used_ids,
                phase,
                "ATTENTION_SOFTMAX",
                "Softmax",
                tags=["attention", "raw_attention", "merge_candidate"],
                attrs={**attention_attrs, "role": "attention_softmax"},
            )
            _append_raw_node(
                nodes,
                used_ids,
                phase,
                "SV",
                "MatMul",
                tags=["attention", "raw_attention", "merge_candidate"],
                attrs={**attention_attrs, "role": "score_value"},
            )
            continue

        _append_raw_node(
            nodes,
            used_ids,
            phase,
            str(cost_node["name"]),
            str(cost_node["op"]),
            tags=list(cost_node.get("tags", [])),
            attrs={
                "cost_op": cost_node["op"],
                "source_cost_node": cost_node["id"],
                "row": cost_node.get("row", {}),
            },
        )

    return nodes

nodes.name: _compact_template_node
nodes.summary: 这是一个核心调度或硬件配置函数，提取到 0 条关键计算公式，并直接关联 0 个仓库内函数。
nodes.source_excerpt:
def _compact_template_node(
    *,
    phase: str,
    node_id: str,
    name: str,
    op: str,
    order: int,
    children: list[str],
    parents: list[str],
    repeat: Mapping[str, Any],
    equation: Mapping[str, str],
    tags: list[str],
) -> dict[str, Any]:
    return {
        "id": node_id,
        "phase": phase,
        "name": name,
        "op": op,
        "order": order,
        "parents": parents,
        "children": children,
        "repeat": dict(repeat),
        "analysis": {
            "mode": "template_node_with_child_cost_rows",
            "child_count": len(children),
            "note": "Visualization node only; cost model consumes child rows once with their layer multipliers.",
        },
        "equation": dict(equation),
        "tags": tags,
    }

nodes.name: _model_dict_from_spec
nodes.docstring: Helper for the llm_graph workflow.
nodes.summary: Helper for the llm_graph workflow.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def _model_dict_from_spec(spec: Any) -> dict[str, Any]:
    """Helper for the llm_graph workflow."""
    hidden = _int_value(spec, "hidden")
    head_q = _int_value(spec, "head_q", 1)
    v_head_dim = _int_value(spec, "v_head_dim", max(hidden // max(head_q, 1), 1))
    fc_hidden = _int_value(spec, "fc_hidden")
    dense_fc_hidden = _int_value(spec, "dense_fc_hidden", fc_hidden)

    precision = _precision_text(_value(spec, "precision", "fp4"))
    feature_precision = _precision_text(_value(spec, "feature_precision", precision))
    weight_precision = _precision_text(_value(spec, "weight_precision", "nvfp4" if precision == "fp4" else precision))
    output_precision = _precision_text(_value(spec, "output_precision", feature_precision))
    attention_feature_precision = _precision_text(
        _value(spec, "attention_feature_precision", feature_precision),
        feature_precision,
    )
    attention_weight_precision = _precision_text(
        _value(spec, "attention_weight_precision", weight_precision),
        weight_precision,
    )
    attention_output_precision = _precision_text(
        _value(spec, "attention_output_precision", attention_feature_precision),
        attention_feature_precision,
    )
    attention_weight_scale_group = _int_value(
        spec,
        "attention_weight_scale_group",
        8 if attention_weight_precision == "nvfp4" else 0,
    )
    attention_weight_scale_bpe = _float_value(
        spec,
        "attention_weight_scale_bpe",
        1.0 if attention_weight_precision == "nvfp4" and attention_weight_scale_group > 0 else 0.0,
    )

    return {
        "model_name": str(_value(spec, "model_name", "Unknown")),
        "precision": precision,
        "feature_precision": feature_precision,
        "weight_precision": weight_precision,
        "output_precision": output_precision,
        "attention_feature_precision": attention_feature_precision,
        "attention_weight_precision": attention_weight_precision,
        "attention_output_precision": attention_output_precision,
        "attention_weight_scale_group": attention_weight_scale_group,
        "attention_weight_scale_bpe": attention_weight_scale_bpe,
        "max_batch_size": _int_value(spec, "batch", 1),
        "batch": _int_value(spec, "batch", 1),
        "vocab_size": _int_value(spec, "vocab_size"),
        "hidden": hidden,
        "mla": _bool_value(spec, "mla", False),
        "compress_q": _int_value(spec, "compress_q", hidden),
        "compress_kv": _int_value(spec, "compress_kv", v_head_dim),
        "head_q": head_q,
        "head_kv": _int_value(spec, "head_kv", 1),
        "rope_dim": _int_value(spec, "rope_dim", 64),
        "qk_nope_head_dim": _int_value(spec, "qk_nope_head_dim", v_head_dim),
        "v_head_dim": v_head_dim,
        "fc_hidden": fc_hidden,
        "dense_fc_hidden": dense_fc_hidden,
        "shared_experts": _int_value(spec, "shared_experts", 0),
        "experts": _int_value(spec, "experts", 1),
        "topk": _int_value(spec, "topk", 1),
        "dense_layers": _int_value(spec, "dense_layers", 0),
        "layers": _int_value(spec, "layers", 1),
        "activation": str(_value(spec, "activation", "Silu")),
        "feature_bpe": _float_value(spec, "feature_bpe", 1.0),
        "kv_cache_bpe": _float_value(spec, "kv_cache_bpe", 1.0),
        "weight_bpe": _float_value(spec, "weight_bpe", 1.0),
        "output_bpe": _float_value(spec, "output_bpe", 1.0),
        "optimizer_bpe": _float_value(spec, "optimizer_bpe", 1.0),
        "input_seq_length": _int_value(spec, "input_seq_length", 1024),
        "output_seq_length": _int_value(spec, "output_seq_length", 8192),
    }

formulas.explanation: v_head_dim 由 _int_value, head_q, hidden, spec 等变量组合计算得到。

nodes.name: _precision_text
nodes.docstring: Normalize precision aliases used by HF configs and LLMPerf rows.
nodes.summary: Normalize precision aliases used by HF configs and LLMPerf rows.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def _precision_text(value: Any, default: str = "fp4") -> str:
    """Normalize precision aliases used by HF configs and LLMPerf rows."""
    text = str(value if value is not None else default).strip().lower()
    aliases = {
        "bfloat16": "bf16",
        "torch.bfloat16": "bf16",
        "float16": "fp16",
        "torch.float16": "fp16",
        "half": "fp16",
        "float32": "fp32",
        "torch.float32": "fp32",
        "nv_fp4": "nvfp4",
        "nv-fp4": "nvfp4",
    }
    return aliases.get(text, text or default)

nodes.name: _row
nodes.docstring: Read one field from a row-like object with a safe default.
nodes.summary: Read one field from a row-like object with a safe default.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def _row(
    model: Mapping[str, Any],
    name: str,
    op_type: str,
    token: int,
    c_in: int | float = 0,
    c_out: int | float = 0,
    *,
    topk: int | float = 0,
    expert: int | float = 0,
    q_head: int | float = 0,
    kv_head: int | float = 0,
    h: int | float | None = None,
    w: int | float = 1,
    layer: int | float = 1,
    weight_en: int | float = 0,
    op_layout: str = "nhwc",
    group: int | float = 1,
    gpu_comm: str | int = 0,
    tp_split_k: int | float = 0,
    gpu_config_tuning: str = "attn",
    precision_group: int | float | None = None,
    pp_slice_point: int | float = 0,
    tp: int | float = 1,
    dp: int | float = 1,
    ep: int | float = 1,
    pp: int | float = 1,
    component: str = "",
    attention_type: str = "",
    attention_role: str = "",
    effective_kv_seq: int | float = 0,
    compress_rate: int | float = 0,
    sliding_window: int | float = 0,
    index_topk: int | float = 0,
    index_head_dim: int | float = 0,
    index_n_heads: int | float = 0,
    mhc_streams: int | float = 0,
    linear_state_dim: int | float = 0,
    linear_chunk_size: int | float = 0,
) -> dict[str, Any]:
    """Read one field from a row-like object with a safe default."""
    if h is None:
        h = token
    if precision_group is None:
        precision_group = 16 if op_type in {"MatMul", "MHA"} else 0
    row_feature_precision = model["feature_precision"]
    row_weight_precision = model["weight_precision"]
    row_output_precision = model["output_precision"]
    row_weight_scale_group = 0
    row_weight_scale_bpe = 0.0
    row_weight_effective_bpe = float(model["weight_bpe"])
    row_a_bpe = float(model["weight_bpe"])
    row_b_bpe = float(model["feature_bpe"])
    row_o_bpe = float(model["output_bpe"])
    row_precision = model["precision"]
    if _is_attention_projection_matmul(op_type, component, weight_en):
        row_feature_precision = model["attention_feature_precision"]
        row_weight_precision = model["attention_weight_precision"]
        row_output_precision = model["attention_output_precision"]
        row_weight_scale_group = model["attention_weight_scale_group"]
        row_weight_scale_bpe = model["attention_weight_scale_bpe"]
        row_weight_effective_bpe = _effective_weight_bpe(
            row_weight_precision,
            row_weight_scale_group,
            row_weight_scale_bpe,
            float(model["weight_bpe"]),
        )
        row_a_bpe = row_weight_effective_bpe
        row_b_bpe = _bpe_for_precision(row_feature_precision, float(model["feature_bpe"]))
        row_o_bpe = _bpe_for_precision(row_output_precision, float(model["output_bpe"]))
        row_precision = _compute_precision_for_operands(
            row_feature_precision,
            row_weight_precision,
            model["precision"],
        )

    row = {
        "NN name": name,
        "type": op_type,
        "token": token,
        "c_in": c_in,
        "c_out": c_out,
        "topk": topk,
        "expert": expert,
        "q_head": q_head,
        "kv_head": kv_head,
        "kh": 1,
        "kw": 1,
        "h": h,
        "w": w,
        "stride": 1,
        "group": group,
        "layer": layer,
        "weight_en": weight_en,
        "a_bpe": row_a_bpe,
        "b_bpe": row_b_bpe,
        "o_bpe": row_o_bpe,
        "op layout": op_layout,
        "weight": 0,
        "feature": 0,
        "out": 0,
        "is_mla": bool(model["mla"]),
        "precision": row_precision,
        "precision_group": precision_group,
        "feature_precision": row_feature_precision,
        "weight_precision": row_weight_precision,
        "output_precision": row_output_precision,
        "weight_scale_group": row_weight_scale_group,
        "weight_scale_bpe": row_weight_scale_bpe,
        "weight_effective_bpe": row_weight_effective_bpe,
        "pp_slice_point": pp_slice_point,
        "gpu_comm": gpu_comm,
        "tp split k": tp_split_k,
        "TP": tp,
        "DP": dp,
        "EP": ep,
        "PP": pp,
        "gpu_config_tuning": gpu_config_tuning,
        "component": component,
        "attention_type": attention_type,
        "attention_role": attention_role,
        "effective_kv_seq": effective_kv_seq,
        "compress_rate": compress_rate,
        "sliding_window": sliding_window,
        "index_topk": index_topk,
        "index_head_dim": index_head_dim,
        "index_n_heads": index_n_heads,
        "mhc_streams": mhc_streams,
        "linear_state_dim": linear_state_dim,
        "linear_chunk_size": linear_chunk_size,
    }
    return row

formulas.explanation: row_weight_effective_bpe 由 model 等变量组合计算得到。
row_a_bpe 由 model 等变量组合计算得到。
row_b_bpe 由 model 等变量组合计算得到。
row_o_bpe 由 model 等变量组合计算得到。
row_weight_effective_bpe 由 _effective_weight_bpe, model, row_weight_precision, row_weight_scale_bpe, row_weight_scale_group 等变量组合计算得到。
row_b_bpe 由 _bpe_for_precision, model, row_feature_precision 等变量组合计算得到。
row_o_bpe 由 _bpe_for_precision, model, row_output_precision 等变量组合计算得到。

def _slug(text: str) -> str:
    """Helper for the llm_graph workflow."""
    slug = re.sub(r"[^a-zA-Z0-9]+", "_", text.strip().lower()).strip("_")
    return slug or "node"

nodes.name: graph_to_layer_dataframe
nodes.docstring: Convert a cost graph phase into the tabular layer schema consumed by cost_model.
nodes.summary: Convert a cost graph phase into the tabular layer schema consumed by cost_model.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def graph_to_layer_dataframe(graph: Mapping[str, Any], phase: str = "decode"):
    """Convert a cost graph phase into the tabular layer schema consumed by cost_model."""
    import pandas as pd

    phase_key = phase.lower()
    if phase_key in {"prompt", "prefill"}:
        phase_key = "prefill"
    elif phase_key in {"generation", "decode"}:
        phase_key = "decode"
    else:
        raise ValueError(f"Unsupported LLM graph phase: {phase}")

    phase_graph = graph.get("cost_graphs", graph.get("graphs", {})).get(phase_key)
    if not phase_graph:
        raise ValueError(f"Graph has no phase: {phase_key}")
    rows = [node.get("row", {}) for node in phase_graph.get("nodes", [])]
    dataframe = pd.DataFrame(rows, columns=LLM_LAYER_COLUMNS)
    dataframe = dataframe.fillna(0)
    dataframe.index = list(range(len(dataframe)))
    return dataframe

def graph_to_model_args(graph: Mapping[str, Any]) -> ModelArgs:
    """Helper for the llm_graph workflow."""
    model = graph["model"]
    args = ModelArgs()
    args.model_name = str(model["model_name"])
    args.max_batch_size = int(model["max_batch_size"])
    args.batch_size = int(model["batch"])
    args.vocabulare = int(model["vocab_size"])
    args.vocab_size = int(model["vocab_size"])
    args.precision = str(model["precision"])
    args.feature_precision = str(model.get("feature_precision", model["precision"]))
    args.weight_precision = str(model.get("weight_precision", model["precision"]))
    args.output_precision = str(model.get("output_precision", model["precision"]))
    args.attention_feature_precision = str(model.get("attention_feature_precision", args.feature_precision))
    args.attention_weight_precision = str(model.get("attention_weight_precision", args.weight_precision))
    args.attention_output_precision = str(model.get("attention_output_precision", args.output_precision))
    args.attention_weight_scale_group = int(model.get("attention_weight_scale_group", 0))
    args.attention_weight_scale_bpe = float(model.get("attention_weight_scale_bpe", 0.0))
    args.hidden = int(model["hidden"])
    args.dim = int(model["hidden"])
    args.MLA = bool(model["mla"])
    args.compress_q = int(model["compress_q"])
    args.compress_kv = int(model["compress_kv"])
    args.head_q = int(model["head_q"])
    args.head_kv = int(model["head_kv"])
    args.n_heads = int(model["head_q"])
    args.rope_dim = int(model["rope_dim"])
    args.qk_nope_head_dim = int(model["qk_nope_head_dim"])
    args.qk_rope_head_dim = int(model["rope_dim"])
    args.v_head_dim = int(model["v_head_dim"])
    args.fc_hidden = int(model["fc_hidden"])
    args.moe_inter_dim = int(model["fc_hidden"])
    args.inter_dim = int(model["dense_fc_hidden"])
    args.n_shared_experts = int(model["shared_experts"])
    args.expert = int(model["experts"])
    args.n_routed_experts = int(model["experts"])
    args.topk = int(model["topk"])
    args.n_activated_experts = int(model["topk"])
    args.dense_layer = int(model["dense_layers"])
    args.n_dense_layers = int(model["dense_layers"])
    args.layer = int(model["layers"])
    args.n_layers = int(model["layers"])
    args.act = str(model["activation"])
    args.f_bpe = float(model["feature_bpe"])
    args.kv_cache_bpe = float(model["kv_cache_bpe"])
    args.weight_bpe = float(model["weight_bpe"])
    args.output_bpe = float(model["output_bpe"])
    args.optimizer_bpe = float(model["optimizer_bpe"])
    args.input_seq_length = int(model["input_seq_length"])
    args.output_seq_length = int(model["output_seq_length"])
    args.max_seq_len = args.input_seq_length + args.output_seq_length
    return args

nodes.name: load_llm_graph
nodes.docstring: Load and validate an LLM graph JSON file.
nodes.summary: Load and validate an LLM graph JSON file.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def load_llm_graph(path: str | Path) -> dict[str, Any]:
    """Load and validate an LLM graph JSON file."""
    graph_path = Path(path)
    graph = json.loads(graph_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    if graph.get("schema_version") != SCHEMA_VERSION:
        raise ValueError(f"Unsupported LLM graph schema: {graph.get('schema_version')}")
    return graph

nodes.docstring: Write an LLM graph JSON file.
nodes.summary: Write an LLM graph JSON file.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def write_llm_graph(graph: Mapping[str, Any], path: str | Path) -> Path:
    """Write an LLM graph JSON file."""
    output_path = Path(path)
    output_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    output_path.write_text(json.dumps(graph, indent=2, sort_keys=True), encoding="utf-8")
    return output_path

nodes.name: setup_logger
nodes.docstring: Helper for the log workflow.
nodes.summary: Helper for the log workflow.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def setup_logger(self, name, log_file):
        """Helper for the log workflow."""
        logger = logging.getLogger(name)
        logger.setLevel(logging.ERROR)

        for handler in list(logger.handlers):
            logger.removeHandler(handler)
            handler.close()

        directory = os.path.dirname(log_file)
        if directory:
            os.makedirs(directory, exist_ok=True)
        # Ensure the log file exists before attaching the handler
        open(log_file, 'a').close()

        handler = logging.FileHandler(log_file)
        handler.setFormatter(
            logging.Formatter('%(asctime)s - %(levelname)s - %(message)s')
        )
        logger.addHandler(handler)
        logger.propagate = False
        self._handlers[name] = handler
        
        return logger

nodes.name: _atomic_write_state
nodes.docstring:
Write the state dict to disk atomically.

Uses a temporary file + rename to avoid partial writes.
nodes.summary: Write the state dict to disk atomically.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def _atomic_write_state(state: Dict[str, Any]) -> None:
    """Write the state dict to disk atomically.

    Uses a temporary file + rename to avoid partial writes.
    """
    directory = os.path.dirname(_STATE_FILE)
    os.makedirs(directory, exist_ok=True)
    tmp_path = _STATE_FILE + ".tmp"
    with open(tmp_path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        json.dump(state, f, indent=2, sort_keys=True)
    try:
        # On POSIX rename is atomic; on Windows this still effectively
        # replaces the file for our purposes.
        os.replace(tmp_path, _STATE_FILE)
    except PermissionError:
        # On Windows the target may be locked temporarily (e.g. opened in an editor
        # or written by another process). Failing here shouldn't kill the whole
        # cost_model run; we just lose this status update.
        try:
            # Best effort: delete tmp to avoid accumulation.
            os.remove(tmp_path)
        except Exception:
            pass

formulas.explanation: tmp_path 由 _STATE_FILE 等变量组合计算得到。

nodes.name: clear_all_tasks
nodes.docstring:
Clear all recorded task state (reset to empty dict).

Use this when doing a full forced regeneration so prior entries don't
block re-enqueueing. This is atomic.
nodes.summary: Clear all recorded task state (reset to empty dict).
nodes.source_excerpt:
def clear_all_tasks() -> None:
    """Clear all recorded task state (reset to empty dict).

    Use this when doing a full forced regeneration so prior entries don't
    block re-enqueueing. This is atomic.
    """
    with _lock:
        _atomic_write_state({})

nodes.summary: Return the status string for the given task_id, or None if unknown.

nodes.name: set_task_status
nodes.docstring:
Set the status for task_id and persist to disk.

Parameters
----------
task_id: str
    Unique identifier for the task, e.g. the result Excel file path.
status: str
    One of "pending", "running", "done", "failed".
meta: Optional[dict]
    Optional additional info (e.g., error message, config summary).
nodes.summary: Set the status for task_id and persist to disk.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def set_task_status(task_id: str, status: str, meta: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None) -> None:
    """Set the status for task_id and persist to disk.

    Parameters
    ----------
    task_id: str
        Unique identifier for the task, e.g. the result Excel file path.
    status: str
        One of "pending", "running", "done", "failed".
    meta: Optional[dict]
        Optional additional info (e.g., error message, config summary).
    """
    if not task_id:
        return
    if status not in {"pending", "running", "done", "failed"}:
        raise ValueError(f"Invalid task status: {status}")

    with _lock:
        state = _load_state()
        entry: Dict[str, Any] = {
            "status": status,
        }
        if meta:
            entry["meta"] = meta
        state[task_id] = entry
        _atomic_write_state(state)

nodes.name: flash_attention_aux_ops
nodes.docstring:
Count FlashAttention auxiliary non-GEMM work.
Formula: SIMT counts score max/sum/scale plus online state updates and optional O rescale; SFU counts exp(score-m_new) plus exp(m_old-m_new).
nodes.summary: Count FlashAttention auxiliary non-GEMM work.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def flash_attention_aux_ops(q_t, kv_t, q_iter, kv_iter, sm_head, sm_batch, hidden_size_v=0, include_output_rescale=False):
    """
    Count FlashAttention auxiliary non-GEMM work.
    Formula: SIMT counts score max/sum/scale plus online state updates and optional O rescale; SFU counts exp(score-m_new) plus exp(m_old-m_new).
    """
    native = _native_cost.flash_attention_aux_ops(
        q_t,
        kv_t,
        q_iter,
        kv_iter,
        sm_head,
        sm_batch,
        hidden_size_v=hidden_size_v,
        include_output_rescale=include_output_rescale,
    )
    return FlashAttentionAuxOps(
        score_elements=native["score_elements"],
        row_elements=native["row_elements"],
        output_elements=native["output_elements"],
        simt_flops=native["simt_flops"],
        sfu_flops=native["sfu_flops"],
    )

nodes.name: sm_csa_compress
nodes.docstring:
Estimate CSA overlap-compression rows before sparse attention indexing.

Same GEMM-like Linear(ich -> och) shape as ``sm_hca_compress`` with a
larger SIMT term for the rolling overlap merge. Goes through the native
NoC evaluator for realistic L2 / HBM traffic.
nodes.summary: Estimate CSA overlap-compression rows before sparse attention indexing.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def sm_csa_compress(
    global_config,
    line,
    nn_info,
    hw,
    data_paser,
    logger,
    *,
    dp: int,
    tp: int,
    ep: int,
    pp: int,
    cp: int = 1,
    attention_shape: dict | None = None,
    sm_partition: dict | None = None,
):
    """Estimate CSA overlap-compression rows before sparse attention indexing.

    Same GEMM-like Linear(ich -> och) shape as ``sm_hca_compress`` with a
    larger SIMT term for the rolling overlap merge. Goes through the native
    NoC evaluator for realistic L2 / HBM traffic.
    """
    (
        _nn_name,
        _gpu_config_tuning,
        _tp_excel,
        _dp_excel,
        _ep_excel,
        _pp_excel,
        _type,
        ich,
        och,
        _batch,
        _expert,
        _topk,
        _q_head,
        _kv_head,
        _kh,
        _kw,
        _h,
        _w,
        _stride,
        _group,
        _layer,
        weight_en,
        a_bpe,
        b_bpe,
        o_bpe,
        _tp_split_k,
        precision,
        _precision_group,
    ) = data_paser
    if attention_shape is None or sm_partition is None:
        raise RuntimeError("sm_csa_compress requires attention_shape and sm_partition")

    compress_rate = max(_row_int(nn_info, line, "compress_rate", 4), 1)
    native = _native_cost.attention_variant_kernel(
        variant="csa_compress",
        ich=ich,
        och=och,
        weight_en=weight_en,
        q_head=1,
        tp=tp,
        cp=cp,
        a_bpe=a_bpe,
        b_bpe=b_bpe,
        o_bpe=o_bpe,
        attention_shape=attention_shape,
        sm_partition=sm_partition,
        hw=hw,
        compress_rate=compress_rate,
    )

    _run_variant_noc(
        nn_info=nn_info,
        line=line,
        hw=hw,
        logger=logger,
        precision=precision,
        native_result=native,
        sm_partition=sm_partition,
    )

formulas.explanation: compress_rate 由 _row_int, line, nn_info 等变量组合计算得到。

nodes.name: sm_csa_indexer
nodes.docstring:
Estimate Lightning-indexer score / top-k rows for CSA.

``index_score_topk`` is modeled as a GEMM-like score where Q is per-SM
(``_distinct_q_work_map``) and K is the shared compressed cache;
``topk_mask`` is a memory-bound heap select with per-token mask buffers.
nodes.summary: Estimate Lightning-indexer score / top-k rows for CSA.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def sm_csa_indexer(
    global_config,
    line,
    nn_info,
    hw,
    data_paser,
    logger,
    *,
    dp: int,
    tp: int,
    ep: int,
    pp: int,
    cp: int = 1,
    attention_shape: dict | None = None,
    sm_partition: dict | None = None,
):
    """Estimate Lightning-indexer score / top-k rows for CSA.

    ``index_score_topk`` is modeled as a GEMM-like score where Q is per-SM
    (``_distinct_q_work_map``) and K is the shared compressed cache;
    ``topk_mask`` is a memory-bound heap select with per-token mask buffers.
    """
    (
        _nn_name,
        _gpu_config_tuning,
        _tp_excel,
        _dp_excel,
        _ep_excel,
        _pp_excel,
        _type,
        ich,
        och,
        _batch,
        _expert,
        _topk,
        q_head,
        _kv_head,
        _kh,
        _kw,
        _h,
        _w,
        _stride,
        _group,
        _layer,
        _weight_en,
        _a_bpe,
        b_bpe,
        o_bpe,
        _tp_split_k,
        precision,
        _precision_group,
    ) = data_paser
    if attention_shape is None or sm_partition is None:
        raise RuntimeError("sm_csa_indexer requires attention_shape and sm_partition")

    index_n_heads = max(_row_int(nn_info, line, "index_n_heads", max(int(q_head), 1)), 1)
    index_dim = max(_row_int(nn_info, line, "index_head_dim", max(int(ich), 1)), 1)
    selected = max(_row_int(nn_info, line, "index_topk", max(int(och), 1)), 1)
    score_kv_global = max(_row_int(nn_info, line, "effective_kv_seq", selected), 1)
    role = _row_text(nn_info, line, "attention_role")
    native = _native_cost.attention_variant_kernel(
        variant="csa_indexer",
        role=role,
        ich=ich,
        och=och,
        weight_en=0,
        q_head=q_head,
        tp=tp,
        cp=cp,
        a_bpe=b_bpe,
        b_bpe=b_bpe,
        o_bpe=o_bpe,
        attention_shape=attention_shape,
        sm_partition=sm_partition,
        hw=hw,
        index_n_heads=index_n_heads,
        index_head_dim=index_dim,
        index_topk=selected,
        effective_kv_seq=score_kv_global,
    )
    _run_variant_noc(
        nn_info=nn_info,
        line=line,
        hw=hw,
        logger=logger,
        precision=precision,
        native_result=native,
        sm_partition=sm_partition,
    )

formulas.explanation: index_n_heads 由 _row_int, line, nn_info, q_head 等变量组合计算得到。
index_dim 由 _row_int, ich, line, nn_info 等变量组合计算得到。
selected 由 _row_int, line, nn_info, och 等变量组合计算得到。
score_kv_global 由 _row_int, line, nn_info, selected 等变量组合计算得到。

nodes.name: sm_hca_compress
nodes.docstring:
Estimate DeepSeek V4 HCA compressor rows before the fused MHA core.

Two ``attention_role`` modes:

- ``compress_kv``: Linear(D=ich -> Hd=och) applied to each KV-side token.
  Modeled as a GEMM tile (M = tokens/SM × kv_heads/SM, N = och, K = ich)
  with the weight shared across SMs (``_broadcast_weight_work_map``).
- ``window_weighted_sum``: per-token weighted merge of ``compress_rate``
  compressed slots; no GEMM weight, purely feature-bandwidth-bound.

Both go through ``_run_variant_noc`` so native L2 / HBM / GPC / SM /
link / d2d traffic is computed from the per-SM tile rather
than a flat ``mem_bytes / hbm_bw`` chip estimate.
nodes.summary: Estimate DeepSeek V4 HCA compressor rows before the fused MHA core.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def sm_hca_compress(
    global_config,
    line,
    nn_info,
    hw,
    data_paser,
    logger,
    *,
    dp: int,
    tp: int,
    ep: int,
    pp: int,
    cp: int = 1,
    attention_shape: dict | None = None,
    sm_partition: dict | None = None,
):
    """Estimate DeepSeek V4 HCA compressor rows before the fused MHA core.

    Two ``attention_role`` modes:

    - ``compress_kv``: Linear(D=ich -> Hd=och) applied to each KV-side token.
      Modeled as a GEMM tile (M = tokens/SM × kv_heads/SM, N = och, K = ich)
      with the weight shared across SMs (``_broadcast_weight_work_map``).
    - ``window_weighted_sum``: per-token weighted merge of ``compress_rate``
      compressed slots; no GEMM weight, purely feature-bandwidth-bound.

    Both go through ``_run_variant_noc`` so native L2 / HBM / GPC / SM /
    link / d2d traffic is computed from the per-SM tile rather
    than a flat ``mem_bytes / hbm_bw`` chip estimate.
    """
    (
        _nn_name,
        _gpu_config_tuning,
        _tp_excel,
        _dp_excel,
        _ep_excel,
        _pp_excel,
        _type,
        ich,
        och,
        _batch,
        _expert,
        _topk,
        _q_head,
        _kv_head,
        _kh,
        _kw,
        _h,
        _w,
        _stride,
        _group,
        _layer,
        weight_en,
        a_bpe,
        b_bpe,
        o_bpe,
        _tp_split_k,
        precision,
        _precision_group,
    ) = data_paser
    if attention_shape is None or sm_partition is None:
        raise RuntimeError("sm_hca_compress requires attention_shape and sm_partition")
    compress_rate = max(_row_int(nn_info, line, "compress_rate", 128), 1)
    role = _row_text(nn_info, line, "attention_role")
    native = _native_cost.attention_variant_kernel(
        variant="hca_compress",
        role=role,
        ich=ich,
        och=och,
        weight_en=weight_en,
        q_head=1,
        tp=tp,
        cp=cp,
        a_bpe=a_bpe,
        b_bpe=b_bpe,
        o_bpe=o_bpe,
        attention_shape=attention_shape,
        sm_partition=sm_partition,
        hw=hw,
        compress_rate=compress_rate,
    )

    _run_variant_noc(
        nn_info=nn_info,
        line=line,
        hw=hw,
        logger=logger,
        precision=precision,
        native_result=native,
        sm_partition=sm_partition,
    )

formulas.explanation: compress_rate 由 _row_int, line, nn_info 等变量组合计算得到。

nodes.name: sm_linear_attention
nodes.docstring:
Estimate Kimi-K2.5 / KDA / GLA / RWKV / Mamba-2 chunkwise linear attention.

Per-token math (for chunkwise linear attention, KDA variant):

- **State update**     ``S += k_t ⊗ v_t``                     ~ 2 · state_dim · value_dim FLOPs
- **Output projection** ``o_t = q_t · S``                     ~ 2 · state_dim · value_dim FLOPs
- **(KDA only) delta-rule gating** ``S = (I - β·k_t·k_t^T)·S + β·k_t·v_t^T``
                        ~ 1-2 · state_dim · value_dim FLOPs extra

So we charge ~5 · state_dim · value_dim FLOPs per token, **not 2 ·**
(the old code only modeled the state update term, missing the
output projection entirely).

Memory traffic (per (batch, head), per chunk):

- Read state from HBM/L2, write back: ``2 · state_dim · value_dim · bpe``
- Read q / k / v for the chunk: ``chunk_size · (2·state_dim + value_dim) · bpe``
  (NOT ``chunk_size · hidden`` -- q/k/v are already projected
  upstream by the MatMul rows; their fan-in to the recurrent kernel
  is the projected dimension, not the layer hidden D)
- Write output for the chunk: ``chunk_size · value_dim · bpe``

The dispatcher forces ``no_kv_split=True`` for this kernel because
multi-SM kv-parallelism would race on the recurrent state. Fan-out
happens only across (batch, head) groups; ``_per_sm_distinct_work_map``
captures that "each SM has its own state and its own tokens, nothing
shared" -- so chip-total state traffic scales with active_sms (i.e.
with the number of (batch, head) groups), not with one shared stream.
nodes.summary: Estimate Kimi-K2.5 / KDA / GLA / RWKV / Mamba-2 chunkwise linear attention.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def sm_linear_attention(
    global_config,
    line,
    nn_info,
    hw,
    data_paser,
    logger,
    *,
    dp: int,
    tp: int,
    ep: int,
    pp: int,
    cp: int = 1,
    attention_shape: dict | None = None,
    sm_partition: dict | None = None,
):
    """Estimate Kimi-K2.5 / KDA / GLA / RWKV / Mamba-2 chunkwise linear attention.

    Per-token math (for chunkwise linear attention, KDA variant):

    - **State update**     ``S += k_t ⊗ v_t``                     ~ 2 · state_dim · value_dim FLOPs
    - **Output projection** ``o_t = q_t · S``                     ~ 2 · state_dim · value_dim FLOPs
    - **(KDA only) delta-rule gating** ``S = (I - β·k_t·k_t^T)·S + β·k_t·v_t^T``
                            ~ 1-2 · state_dim · value_dim FLOPs extra

    So we charge ~5 · state_dim · value_dim FLOPs per token, **not 2 ·**
    (the old code only modeled the state update term, missing the
    output projection entirely).

    Memory traffic (per (batch, head), per chunk):

    - Read state from HBM/L2, write back: ``2 · state_dim · value_dim · bpe``
    - Read q / k / v for the chunk: ``chunk_size · (2·state_dim + value_dim) · bpe``
      (NOT ``chunk_size · hidden`` -- q/k/v are already projected
      upstream by the MatMul rows; their fan-in to the recurrent kernel
      is the projected dimension, not the layer hidden D)
    - Write output for the chunk: ``chunk_size · value_dim · bpe``

    The dispatcher forces ``no_kv_split=True`` for this kernel because
    multi-SM kv-parallelism would race on the recurrent state. Fan-out
    happens only across (batch, head) groups; ``_per_sm_distinct_work_map``
    captures that "each SM has its own state and its own tokens, nothing
    shared" -- so chip-total state traffic scales with active_sms (i.e.
    with the number of (batch, head) groups), not with one shared stream.
    """
    (
        _nn_name,
        _gpu_config_tuning,
        _tp_excel,
        _dp_excel,
        _ep_excel,
        _pp_excel,
        _type,
        _ich,
        och,
        _batch,
        _expert,
        _topk,
        _q_head,
        _kv_head,
        _kh,
        _kw,
        _h,
        _w,
        _stride,
        _group,
        _layer,
        _weight_en,
        _a_bpe,
        b_bpe,
        o_bpe,
        _tp_split_k,
        precision,
        _precision_group,
    ) = data_paser
    if attention_shape is None or sm_partition is None:
        raise RuntimeError("sm_linear_attention requires attention_shape and sm_partition")

    state_dim = max(_row_int(nn_info, line, "linear_state_dim", max(int(och), 1)), 1)
    chunk_size = max(_row_int(nn_info, line, "linear_chunk_size", 64), 1)
    native = _native_cost.attention_variant_kernel(
        variant="linear_attention",
        ich=och,
        och=och,
        weight_en=0,
        q_head=1,
        tp=tp,
        cp=cp,
        a_bpe=b_bpe,
        b_bpe=b_bpe,
        o_bpe=o_bpe,
        attention_shape=attention_shape,
        sm_partition=sm_partition,
        hw=hw,
        linear_state_dim=state_dim,
        linear_chunk_size=chunk_size,
    )

    _run_variant_noc(
        nn_info=nn_info,
        line=line,
        hw=hw,
        logger=logger,
        precision=precision,
        native_result=native,
        sm_partition=sm_partition,
    )

formulas.explanation: state_dim 由 _row_int, line, nn_info, och 等变量组合计算得到。
chunk_size 主要通过把相关维度相乘得到总规模，通常表示字节数、元素数或 FLOPs。

nodes.name: sm_mhc
nodes.docstring:
Estimate Manifold-Constrained Hyper-Connections stream collapse / mix.

MHC operates on per-token hidden activations (no KV cache touch, no
weight matrix beyond a small per-stream mixing factor). Modeled as a
pure feature-bandwidth row through the native NoC evaluator so HBM / L2
hits get counted properly.
nodes.summary: Estimate Manifold-Constrained Hyper-Connections stream collapse / mix.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def sm_mhc(
    global_config,
    line,
    nn_info,
    hw,
    data_paser,
    logger,
    *,
    dp: int,
    tp: int,
    ep: int,
    pp: int,
    cp: int = 1,
    attention_shape: dict | None = None,
    sm_partition: dict | None = None,
):
    """Estimate Manifold-Constrained Hyper-Connections stream collapse / mix.

    MHC operates on per-token hidden activations (no KV cache touch, no
    weight matrix beyond a small per-stream mixing factor). Modeled as a
    pure feature-bandwidth row through the native NoC evaluator so HBM / L2
    hits get counted properly.
    """
    (
        _nn_name,
        _gpu_config_tuning,
        _tp_excel,
        _dp_excel,
        _ep_excel,
        _pp_excel,
        _type,
        ich,
        och,
        _batch,
        _expert,
        _topk,
        _q_head,
        _kv_head,
        _kh,
        _kw,
        _h,
        _w,
        _stride,
        _group,
        _layer,
        _weight_en,
        _a_bpe,
        b_bpe,
        o_bpe,
        _tp_split_k,
        precision,
        _precision_group,
    ) = data_paser
    if attention_shape is None or sm_partition is None:
        raise RuntimeError("sm_mhc requires attention_shape and sm_partition")

    streams = max(_row_int(nn_info, line, "mhc_streams", 1), 1)
    native = _native_cost.attention_variant_kernel(
        variant="mhc",
        ich=ich,
        och=och,
        weight_en=0,
        q_head=1,
        tp=tp,
        cp=cp,
        a_bpe=b_bpe,
        b_bpe=b_bpe,
        o_bpe=o_bpe,
        attention_shape=attention_shape,
        sm_partition=sm_partition,
        hw=hw,
        mhc_streams=streams,
    )

    _run_variant_noc(
        nn_info=nn_info,
        line=line,
        hw=hw,
        logger=logger,
        precision=precision,
        native_result=native,
        sm_partition=sm_partition,
    )

formulas.explanation: streams 由 _row_int, line, nn_info 等变量组合计算得到。

nodes.name: estimate_depthwise_simt
nodes.docstring:
Estimate depthwise convolution on a SIMT-vector implementation.
The model charges horizontal kernel moves, per-warp channel groups, vector compute cycles, and feature/output memory time.
nodes.summary: Estimate depthwise convolution on a SIMT-vector implementation.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def estimate_depthwise_simt(
    hw,
    batch: int,
    channels: int,
    channel_multiplier: int,
    h: int,
    w: int,
    kh: int,
    kw: int,
    stride: int,
    b_bpe: float,
    o_bpe: float,
) -> DepthwiseSimtResult:
    """
    Estimate depthwise convolution on a SIMT-vector implementation.
    The model charges horizontal kernel moves, per-warp channel groups, vector compute cycles, and feature/output memory time.
    """
    native = _native_cost.depthwise_simt(
        hw=hw,
        batch=batch,
        channels=channels,
        channel_multiplier=channel_multiplier,
        h=h,
        w=w,
        kh=kh,
        kw=kw,
        stride=stride,
        b_bpe=b_bpe,
        o_bpe=o_bpe,
    )
    return DepthwiseSimtResult(
        impl=native["impl"],
        op_time=native["op_time"],
        simt_time=native["simt_time"],
        mem_time=native["mem_time"],
        horizontal_moves=native["horizontal_moves"],
        warp_ops=native["warp_ops"],
    )

nodes.name: _rank_tile_candidates
nodes.docstring: Return deterministic high-throughput GEMM tile candidates up to limit.
nodes.summary: Return deterministic high-throughput GEMM tile candidates up to limit.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def _rank_tile_candidates(candidates, limit=50):
    """Return deterministic high-throughput GEMM tile candidates up to limit."""
    ranked = sorted(
        candidates,
        key=lambda tile: (
            tile[0] * tile[1] * tile[2],
            tile[0] * tile[1],
            tile[0] * tile[2],
            tile[1] * tile[2],
            tile[0],
            tile[1],
            tile[2],
        ),
        reverse=True,
    )
    return ranked[:limit]

nodes.name: sm_gemm
nodes.docstring:
Search SM-level GEMM tile shapes and loop orders in native C++ for one GPU work-map candidate.
Formula: compute time comes from ceil(M/tile_m)*ceil(N/tile_n)*ceil(K/tile_k)/freq; native C++ also evaluates NoC timing for the selected candidate.
nodes.summary: 在单个 SM 视角下枚举 GEMM tile 与 loop order，比较 compute 与 NoC 时间，找出最优配置。
guide_steps: 先根据 `sm_m/sm_n/sm_k` 估算 GEMM 周期和纯计算时间。
再估算 A/B/O footprint，判断是否需要 reload 与 tile 搜索。
对每个候选 tile 和 loop order 计算真实流量，再交给 `hw_noc_run()` 比较总时间。

def sm_gemm(global_config,sm_e,sm_m,sm_n,sm_k,hw,nn_info,line,data_paser,dp,pp,ep,tp,min_time,gpu_work_map,precison,logger):

    """
    Search SM-level GEMM tile shapes and loop orders in native C++ for one GPU work-map candidate.
    Formula: compute time comes from ceil(M/tile_m)*ceil(N/tile_n)*ceil(K/tile_k)/freq; native C++ also evaluates NoC timing for the selected candidate.
    """
    nn_name,gpu_config_tuning,tp_excel,dp_excel,ep_excel,pp_excel,type,ich,och,batch,expert,topk,q_head,kv_head,kh,kw,h,w,stride,group,layer,weight_en,a_bpe,b_bpe,o_bpe,tp_split_k,precision,precision_group = data_paser

    return _native_cost.sm_gemm_apply_cells(
        is_decode=global_config.is_decode,
        sm_e=sm_e,
        sm_m=sm_m,
        sm_n=sm_n,
        sm_k=sm_k,
        hw=hw,
        min_time=min_time,
        gpu_work_map=gpu_work_map,
        precision=precision,
        stride_precision=precison,
        dp=dp,
        pp=pp,
        ep=ep,
        tp=tp,
        group=group,
        kh=kh,
        kw=kw,
        weight_en=weight_en,
        a_bpe=a_bpe,
        b_bpe=b_bpe,
        o_bpe=o_bpe,
        nn_info=nn_info,
        line=line,
        logger=logger,
    )

def sm_mha(global_config,sm_q_seq,sm_kv_seq,sm_k_hidden,sm_v_hidden,sm_head,sm_batch,is_mla,line,nn_info,hw,data_paser,dp,pp,ep,tp,min_time,gpu_work_map,logger,sm_kv_head=None,cp=1):

    """
    Model SM-level MHA for flash and non-flash paths through the native C++ kernel evaluator.
    The selected native NoC result is written into nn_info without rerunning the Python NoC evaluator.
    """
    nn_name,gpu_config_tuning,tp_excel,dp_excel,ep_excel,pp_excel,layer,ich,och,batch,expert,topk,qhead,kvhead,kh,kw,h,w,stride,group,layer,weight_en,q_bpe,k_bpe,o_bpe,tp_split_k,precision,precision_group = data_paser

    sm_kv_head = kvhead if sm_kv_head is None else sm_kv_head
    if min_time is None:
        min_time = float('inf')

    return _native_cost.sm_mha_apply_cells(
        sm_q_seq=sm_q_seq,
        sm_kv_seq=sm_kv_seq,
        sm_k_hidden=sm_k_hidden,
        sm_v_hidden=sm_v_hidden,
        sm_head=sm_head,
        sm_batch=sm_batch,
        is_mla=is_mla,
        sm_kv_head=sm_kv_head,
        hw=hw,
        global_config=global_config,
        min_time=min_time,
        tp=tp,
        q_bpe=q_bpe,
        k_bpe=k_bpe,
        o_bpe=o_bpe,
        precision=precision,
        dp=dp,
        pp=pp,
        ep=ep,
        cp=cp,
        nn_info=nn_info,
        line=line,
        gpu_work_map=gpu_work_map,
        logger=logger,
    )

def sm_vector(global_config,line,nn_info,hw,data_paser,vecotr_cost,logger):

    """
    Model GPU-level vector operations such as ROPE and RMS_NORM.
    Combines vector/SFU/RF cycles with optional L2 synchronization cost for hidden-dimension reductions.
    """
    nn_name,gpu_config_tuning,tp_excel,dp_excel,ep_excel,pp_excel,type,ich,och,batch,expert,topk,q_head,kv_head,kh,kw,h,w,stride,group,layer,weight_en,a_bpe,b_bpe,o_bpe,tp_split_k,precision,precision_group  = data_paser

    if(q_head==0 or q_head is None):
        q_head = 1

    layout = nn_info.at[line, 'op layout']
    op_type = nn_info.at[line, 'type']
    if(op_type not in vecotr_cost):
        logger.info(str(op_type)+" vector type not found,only load store cost")

    _native_cost.vector_op_apply_cells(
        op_type=op_type,
        layout=layout,
        ich=ich,
        och=och,
        h=h,
        w=w,
        batch=batch,
        b_bpe=b_bpe,
        precision=precision,
        hw=hw,
        cost_table=vecotr_cost,
        nn_info=nn_info,
        line=line,
    )

nodes.name: estimate_vector_l2_sync_time
nodes.docstring:
Estimate inter-SM reduction synchronization through L2.
Formula: time = (stores + atomics + loads) * latency_cycle, with atomics scaled by hidden slices per token.
nodes.summary: Estimate inter-SM reduction synchronization through L2.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def estimate_vector_l2_sync_time(
    function_name,
    active_sm_count,
    latency_cycle=L2_SYNC_LATENCY_CYCLE,
    hidden_slices_per_token=None,
    token_reductions=1,
):
    """
    Estimate inter-SM reduction synchronization through L2.
    Formula: time = (stores + atomics + loads) * latency_cycle, with atomics scaled by hidden slices per token.
    """
    spec = vector_l2_sync_cost.get(function_name)
    if spec is None:
        return VectorL2SyncCost(
            time=0,
            active_sm_count=0,
            latency_cycle=latency_cycle,
            store_ops=0,
            atomic_ops=0,
            load_ops=0,
        )

    active_sm_count = max(int(active_sm_count), 1)
    hidden_slices_per_token = active_sm_count if hidden_slices_per_token is None else max(int(hidden_slices_per_token), 1)
    token_reductions = max(int(token_reductions), 1)
    if hidden_slices_per_token <= 1:
        return VectorL2SyncCost(
            time=0,
            active_sm_count=0,
            latency_cycle=latency_cycle,
            store_ops=0,
            atomic_ops=0,
            load_ops=0,
        )

    # One reduction stores each token's partial result, performs atomic updates
    # from every hidden slice, and reloads the merged scalar. Each operation is
    # charged with the configured L2 latency cycle cost.
    store_ops = spec.reductions * spec.store_ops_per_reduction * token_reductions
    atomic_ops = spec.reductions * spec.atomic_ops_per_reduction * hidden_slices_per_token * token_reductions
    load_ops = spec.reductions * spec.load_ops_per_reduction * token_reductions
    total_ops = store_ops + atomic_ops + load_ops

    return VectorL2SyncCost(
        time=total_ops * latency_cycle,
        active_sm_count=active_sm_count,
        latency_cycle=latency_cycle,
        store_ops=store_ops,
        atomic_ops=atomic_ops,
        load_ops=load_ops,
    )

formulas.explanation: active_sm_count 表示离散切分后的份额，通常会配合 `ceil`/`max` 保证至少切出一个合法分块。

formulas.statement: hidden_slices_per_token = active_sm_count if hidden_slices_per_token is None else max(int(hidden_slices_per_token), 1)
formulas.expression: active_sm_count if hidden_slices_per_token is None else max(int(hidden_slices_per_token), 1)
formulas.explanation: hidden_slices_per_token 由 active_sm_count, hidden_slices_per_token 等变量组合计算得到。
token_reductions 由 token_reductions 等变量组合计算得到。
store_ops 由 spec.reductions, spec.store_ops_per_reduction, token_reductions 等变量组合计算得到。
atomic_ops 由 hidden_slices_per_token, spec.atomic_ops_per_reduction, spec.reductions, token_reductions 等变量组合计算得到。
load_ops 由 spec.load_ops_per_reduction, spec.reductions, token_reductions 等变量组合计算得到。
total_ops 由 atomic_ops, load_ops, store_ops 等变量组合计算得到。

formulas.statement:
VectorL2SyncCost(
        time=total_ops * latency_cycle,
        active_sm_count=active_sm_count,
        latency_cycle=latency_cycle,
        store_ops=store_ops,

nodes.name: _apply_scalar_dataframe_write_ops_bulk
nodes.docstring: Apply consecutive scalar native update ops with one DataFrame write per row.
nodes.summary: Apply consecutive scalar native update ops with one DataFrame write per row.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def _apply_scalar_dataframe_write_ops_bulk(nn_info, scalar_ops):
    """Apply consecutive scalar native update ops with one DataFrame write per row."""
    if not scalar_ops:
        return

    seen_columns = set()
    ordered_columns = []
    by_line = {}
    for op in scalar_ops:
        line = int(op.line)
        column = _native_char_buffer_text(op.column)
        if column not in seen_columns:
            seen_columns.add(column)
            ordered_columns.append(column)
        values = by_line.setdefault(line, {})
        values[column] = _full_nn_dataframe_write_op_scalar_to_python(op)

    missing_columns = [column for column in ordered_columns if column not in nn_info.columns]
    if missing_columns:
        nn_info.loc[:, missing_columns] = None

    target_lines = list(by_line.keys())
    if len(target_lines) == 1:
        target_line = target_lines[0]
        values_by_column = by_line[target_line]
        columns = list(values_by_column.keys())
        values = list(values_by_column.values())
        nn_info.loc[target_line, columns] = values
        return

    patch_frame = nn_info.loc[target_lines, ordered_columns].copy()
    for line, values_by_column in by_line.items():
        for column, value in values_by_column.items():
            patch_frame.at[line, column] = value
    nn_info.loc[target_lines, ordered_columns] = patch_frame

formulas.explanation: line 由 op.line 等变量组合计算得到。

def _build_library(lib_path: Path) -> None:
    cxx = os.environ.get("CXX", "g++")
    compile_cmd = [
        cxx,
        "-O3",
        "-std=c++17",
        "-shared",
        "-fPIC",
        str(_SOURCE),
        "-o",
        str(lib_path),
    ]
    subprocess.run(compile_cmd, check=True, stdout=subprocess.PIPE, stderr=subprocess.PIPE)

nodes.source_excerpt:
def _copy_ctypes_struct(struct_type, value):
    copied = struct_type()
    ctypes.memmove(ctypes.byref(copied), ctypes.byref(value), ctypes.sizeof(struct_type))
    return copied

nodes.name: _full_nn_owned_postprocess_application
nodes.summary: 这是一个仓库内函数，提取到 1 条关键计算公式，并直接关联 2 个仓库内函数。
nodes.source_excerpt:
def _full_nn_owned_postprocess_application(result, columns):
    column_names = [str(column) for column in columns]
    column_count = len(column_names)
    column_array_type = ctypes.c_char_p * max(column_count, 1)
    column_array = (
        column_array_type(*(_to_native_text(column) for column in column_names))
        if column_count
        else column_array_type()
    )
    lib = _require_native("full_nn_owned_postprocess_application")
    application = FastFullNnOwnedPostprocessApplication()
    try:
        rc = lib.llm_cost_full_nn_owned_postprocess_application(
            ctypes.byref(result),
            column_array,
            column_count,
            ctypes.byref(application),
        )
    except (ctypes.ArgumentError, OSError, TypeError, ValueError) as error:
        lib.llm_cost_free_full_nn_owned_postprocess_application(ctypes.byref(application))
        raise RuntimeError("Native full_nn_owned_postprocess_application call failed.") from error
    if rc != 0:
        lib.llm_cost_free_full_nn_owned_postprocess_application(ctypes.byref(application))
        raise RuntimeError(f"Native full_nn_owned_postprocess_application returned error code {rc}.")
    return application

formulas.explanation: column_array_type 由 column_count, ctypes.c_char_p 等变量组合计算得到。

def _full_nn_owned_update_application(current_column_count, updates, update_count, columns):
    update_array, update_count = _full_nn_update_array_with_count(updates, update_count)
    column_names = [str(column) for column in columns]
    column_count = len(column_names)
    column_array_type = ctypes.c_char_p * max(column_count, 1)
    column_array = (
        column_array_type(*(_to_native_text(column) for column in column_names))
        if column_count
        else column_array_type()
    )
    lib = _require_native("full_nn_owned_update_application")
    application = FastFullNnOwnedUpdateApplication()
    try:
        rc = lib.llm_cost_full_nn_owned_update_application(
            int(current_column_count),
            update_array,
            int(update_count),
            column_array,
            column_count,
            ctypes.byref(application),
        )
    except (ctypes.ArgumentError, OSError, TypeError, ValueError) as error:
        lib.llm_cost_free_full_nn_owned_update_application(ctypes.byref(application))
        raise RuntimeError("Native full_nn_owned_update_application call failed.") from error
    if rc != 0:
        lib.llm_cost_free_full_nn_owned_update_application(ctypes.byref(application))
        raise RuntimeError(f"Native full_nn_owned_update_application returned error code {rc}.")
    return application

nodes.name: _full_nn_process_apply_native_owned_result
nodes.summary: 这是一个仓库内函数，提取到 0 条关键计算公式，并直接关联 6 个仓库内函数。
nodes.source_excerpt:
def _full_nn_process_apply_native_owned_result(
    *,
    hw,
    llm_data,
    is_decode,
    model_args,
    gpu_sys_map,
    global_config,
):
    inputs = _full_nn_schedule_inputs(llm_data, gpu_sys_map, global_config)
    process_inputs = _full_nn_process_record_inputs(llm_data, hw, model_args, global_config)
    finalize_inputs = _full_nn_finalize_input_args(llm_data, model_args, gpu_sys_map, global_config, hw, is_decode)
    lib = _require_native("full_nn_process_apply_owned_result")

    result = FastFullNnOwnedApplyResult()
    try:
        lib.llm_cost_run_full_nn_process_apply_owned_result_from_schedule_sequence_text(
            *inputs,
            *process_inputs,
            *finalize_inputs,
            ctypes.byref(result),
        )
    except (ctypes.ArgumentError, OSError, TypeError) as error:
        raise RuntimeError("Native full_nn_process_apply call failed.") from error
    try:
        _raise_full_nn_process_apply_error(result, hw)
    except Exception:
        _free_full_nn_owned_apply_result_updates(result)
        raise
    return result

nodes.name: _full_nn_process_record_inputs
nodes.summary: 这是一个仓库内函数，提取到 2 条关键计算公式，并直接关联 4 个仓库内函数。
nodes.source_excerpt:
def _full_nn_process_record_inputs(llm_data, hw, model_args, global_config):
    line_count = len(llm_data)

    schema = _full_nn_input_schema()
    text_array_type = ctypes.c_char_p * max(line_count, 1)

    def text_column_values(name):
        return text_array_type(*(_to_native_text(value) for value in _text_column(llm_data, name)))

    row_columns = tuple(
        text_column_values(name)
        for name in _full_nn_schema_texts(schema.process_record_column_names, schema.process_record_column_count)
    )
    default_maps_text = _config_text(hw, "gpu_work_map")
    precision_hw_values_text = _config_entries_text(hw)
    precision_hw_precisions_text = b""
    row_args = row_columns
    process_hw_config_entries_text = _config_entries_text(hw)
    process_model_config_entries_text = _config_entries_text(model_args)
    process_global_config_entries_text = _config_entries_text(global_config)
    return row_args + (
        precision_hw_values_text,
        precision_hw_precisions_text,
        process_hw_config_entries_text,
        process_model_config_entries_text,
        process_global_config_entries_text,
        default_maps_text,
    )

formulas.explanation: text_array_type 由 ctypes.c_char_p, line_count 等变量组合计算得到。

nodes.name: _full_nn_schedule_inputs
nodes.summary: 这是一个仓库内函数，提取到 1 条关键计算公式，并直接关联 6 个仓库内函数。
nodes.source_excerpt:
def _full_nn_schedule_inputs(llm_data, gpu_sys_map, global_config):
    line_count = len(llm_data)

    schema = _full_nn_input_schema()
    text_array_type = ctypes.c_char_p * max(line_count, 1)
    column_names = _full_nn_schema_texts(schema.schedule_column_names, schema.schedule_column_count)
    column_values = tuple(_text_column(llm_data, name) for name in column_names)
    native_columns = tuple(
        text_array_type(*(_to_native_text(value) for value in values))
        for values in column_values
    )
    schedule_config_values = tuple(
        _config_text(global_config, name)
        for name in _full_nn_schema_texts(schema.schedule_config_arg_names, schema.schedule_config_arg_count)
    )
    schedule_config_values_text = _to_native_text(schedule_config_values)
    gpu_map_values = tuple(
        _gpu_map_text(gpu_sys_map, name)
        for name in _full_nn_schema_texts(schema.gpu_map_field_names, schema.gpu_map_field_count)
    )
    gpu_map_values_text = _to_native_text(gpu_map_values)

    call_args = (
        line_count,
        *native_columns,
        schedule_config_values_text,
        gpu_map_values_text,
    )
    return call_args

formulas.explanation: text_array_type 由 ctypes.c_char_p, line_count 等变量组合计算得到。

nodes.name: _full_nn_workbook_column_widths
nodes.summary: 这是一个仓库内函数，提取到 4 条关键计算公式，并直接关联 3 个仓库内函数。
nodes.source_excerpt:
def _full_nn_workbook_column_widths(values):
    columns = _full_nn_workbook_column_value_lists(values)
    column_count = len(columns)
    row_count = max((len(column) for column in columns), default=0)
    flat_values = [
        _to_native_text("None" if (row >= len(column) or column[row] is None) else column[row])
        for column in columns
        for row in range(row_count)
    ]
    value_array_type = ctypes.c_char_p * max(len(flat_values), 1)
    native_values = value_array_type(*flat_values) if flat_values else value_array_type()
    widths = (ctypes.c_int * max(column_count, 1))()
    width_count = ctypes.c_int()
    lib = _require_native("full_nn_workbook_column_widths")
    try:
        rc = lib.llm_cost_full_nn_workbook_column_widths(
            native_values,
            column_count,
            row_count,
            widths,
            column_count,
            ctypes.byref(width_count),
        )
    except (ctypes.ArgumentError, OSError, TypeError, ValueError) as error:
        raise RuntimeError("Native full_nn_workbook_column_widths call failed.") from error
    if rc != 0:
        raise RuntimeError(f"Native full_nn_workbook_column_widths returned error code {rc}.")
    return [int(widths[index]) for index in range(int(width_count.value))]

formulas.statement: row_count = max((len(column) for column in columns), default=0)
formulas.expression: max((len(column) for column in columns), default=0)
formulas.explanation: row_count 表示离散切分后的份额，通常会配合 `ceil`/`max` 保证至少切出一个合法分块。
value_array_type 由 ctypes.c_char_p, flat_values 等变量组合计算得到。
widths 由 column_count, ctypes.c_int 等变量组合计算得到。
返回值 由 index, width_count.value, widths 等变量组合计算得到。

nodes.source_excerpt:
def _gpu_comm_result_to_dict(out):
    return {
        "comm_time": float(out.comm_time),
        "ep_comm_time": float(out.ep_comm_time),
        "ep_size_gpu_kb": float(out.ep_size_gpu_kb),
        "ep_gpu_comm_time_intra_node": float(out.ep_gpu_comm_time_intra_node),
        "ep_gpu_comm_time_inter_node": float(out.ep_gpu_comm_time_inter_node),
        "dp_size_kb": float(out.dp_size_kb),
        "dp_comm_time": float(out.dp_comm_time),
        "tp_comm_time": float(out.tp_comm_time),
        "tp_size_kb": float(out.tp_size_kb),
        "cp_comm_bytes": float(out.cp_comm_bytes),
        "cp_size_kb": float(out.cp_size_kb),
        "cp_comm_time": float(out.cp_comm_time),
        "cp_comm_transport": _transport_name(out.cp_comm_transport),
    }

def _init_native() -> ctypes.CDLL | None:
    force_disable = os.environ.get("LLM_PERF_DISABLE_NATIVE_COST_MODEL", "").strip().lower() in {"1", "true", "yes", "on"}
    if force_disable:
        return None

    try:
        lib = _load_library()
    except (OSError, subprocess.CalledProcessError, NativeLoadError, FileNotFoundError):
        return None
    except Exception:
        return None

    char_pp = ctypes.POINTER(ctypes.c_char_p)

    lib.llm_cost_conv_gemm_shape.argtypes = [

nodes.name: _mesh_direction_loads_from_result
nodes.summary: 这是一个仓库内函数，提取到 2 条关键计算公式，并直接关联 0 个仓库内函数。
nodes.source_excerpt:
def _mesh_direction_loads_from_result(result):
    traffic = result.get("partition_direction_traffic", {}) if isinstance(result, dict) else {}
    items = list(traffic.items()) if isinstance(traffic, dict) else []
    array_type = FastMeshDirectionLoad * max(len(items), 1)
    if not items:
        return array_type(), 0

    loads = array_type()
    for index, (coord, values) in enumerate(items):
        x, y = coord
        loads[index] = FastMeshDirectionLoad(
            int(x),
            int(y),
            float(values.get("north_in", 0.0)),
            float(values.get("north_out", 0.0)),
            float(values.get("south_in", 0.0)),
            float(values.get("south_out", 0.0)),
            float(values.get("east_in", 0.0)),
            float(values.get("east_out", 0.0)),
            float(values.get("west_in", 0.0)),
            float(values.get("west_out", 0.0)),
        )
    return loads, len(items)

formulas.explanation: array_type 由 FastMeshDirectionLoad, items 等变量组合计算得到。

nodes.name: _run_gpu_comm_native_result
nodes.summary: 这是一个仓库内函数，提取到 1 条关键计算公式，并直接关联 4 个仓库内函数。
nodes.source_excerpt:
def _run_gpu_comm_native_result(
    *,
    op_type,
    gpu_comm,
    token,
    c_in,
    model_args,
    global_config,
    gpu_m,
    gpu_n,
    gpu_k,
    gpu_e,
    gpu_batch,
    gpu_head,
    gpu_hidden,
    gpu_q_seq,
    gpu_kv_seq,
    hw,
    pp,
    ep,
    dp,
    tp,
    is_backward,
    act_bpe,
    weight_bpe,
    cp=1,
):
    lib = _require_native("gpu_comm")
    out = FastGpuCommResult()
    try:
        rc = lib.llm_cost_gpu_comm_from_text(
            _op_type_id(op_type),
            _to_native_text("" if gpu_comm is None else gpu_comm),
            _to_native_text(token),
            _to_native_text(c_in),
            _config_text(model_args, "n_activated_experts"),
            _config_text(model_args, "n_routed_experts"),
            _config_text(global_config, "is_decode"),
            _config_text(global_config, "use_fp16_combine"),
            _config_text(global_config, "ep_decode_static_latency_ns"),
            _config_text(global_config, "ep_prefill_static_latency_ns"),
            float(gpu_m),
            float(gpu_n),
            float(gpu_k),
            float(gpu_e),
            float(gpu_batch),
            float(gpu_head),
            float(gpu_hidden),
            float(gpu_q_seq),
            float(gpu_kv_seq),
            _config_text(hw, "gpu_num"),
            _config_text(hw, "gpu_per_node"),
            _config_text(hw, "p2p_bw"),
            _config_text(hw, "nic_bw"),
            _config_text(hw, "p2p_latency"),
            _config_text(hw, "nic_latency"),
            _config_text(hw, "gpu_scale_bw"),
            _config_text(hw, "gpu_scale_latency"),
            _config_text(hw, "allreduce_type"),
            int(pp),
            int(ep),
            int(dp),
            int(tp),
            1 if bool(is_backward) else 0,
            float(act_bpe),
            float(weight_bpe),
            int(cp),
            ctypes.byref(out),
        )
        if rc != 0:
            raise RuntimeError(f"Native gpu_comm returned error code {rc}.")
    except (ctypes.ArgumentError, OSError, TypeError) as error:
        raise RuntimeError("Native gpu_comm call failed.") from error
    return out
