def get_final_res(is_decode: bool):
    # 配置参数
    """Return a normalized value or lookup result for the caller."""
    directory = './result/'  # 根目录
    if not is_decode:
        filename_pattern = '*prefill*.xlsx'  # 包含prefill的xlsx文件
    else:
        filename_pattern = '*decode*.xlsx'  # 包含decode的xlsx文件

    # 查找所有符合条件的文件（包含子目录）
    search_pattern = os.path.join(directory, '**', filename_pattern)
    file_paths = glob.glob(search_pattern, recursive=True)

    # 存储所有最后一行的数据
    # 存储所有最后一行的数据和路径信息
    all_last_rows = []
    file_names = []
    models = []      # 第一级子目录名，作为 model 列
    precisions = []  # 第二级子目录名，作为 precision 列

    for file_path in file_paths:
        try:
            # 读取Excel文件
            df = pd.read_excel(file_path)

            # 获取最后一行数据
            if(is_last_layer):
                summary_header = df.iloc[-2, 1:].tolist() if len(df) >= 2 else []
                summary_values = df.iloc[-1, 1:].tolist()
                if summary_header and str(summary_header[0]).strip() == "GPU":
                    last_row = {
                        str(key): value
                        for key, value in zip(summary_header, summary_values)
                        if key is not None and str(key).strip() not in ("", "nan")
                    }
                else:
                    last_row = df.iloc[-1,1:33].to_dict()
            else:
                last_row = df.iloc[layer_id,1:].to_dict()
            all_last_rows.append(last_row)

            # 提取文件名作为行索引
            file_name = os.path.basename(file_path).replace('.xlsx', '')
            file_names.append(file_name)

            # 提取第一级子目录名作为 model，第二级子目录名作为 precision
            rel_path = os.path.relpath(file_path, directory)
            parts = rel_path.split(os.sep)
            if len(parts) > 1:
                model_name = parts[0]
                precision = parts[1] if len(parts) > 1 else ''
            else:
                model_name = ''
                precision = ''
            models.append(model_name)
            precisions.append(precision)

        except Exception as e:
            print(f"Error processing {file_path}: {e}")

    # 合并所有最后一行数据
    if all_last_rows:
        # 创建新的DataFrame（只包含原始数值列，不含 model/precision）
        combined_df = pd.DataFrame(all_last_rows)

        # 设置行索引名称（文件名）
        combined_df.index = file_names
        combined_df.index.name = 'Config_Name'
        combined_df.insert(0, 'model', models)
        combined_df.insert(0, 'precision_all', precisions)

        if not is_last_layer:
            # 非最后一层场景，保留原有超长列名列表
            combined_df.columns = [
                'NN name', 'type', 'batch', 'token', 'c_in', 'c_out', 'topk', 'expert', 'q_head', 'kv_head', 'kh', 'kw', 'h', 'w',
                'stride', 'group', 'layer', 'weight_en', 'a_bpe', 'b_bpe', 'o_bpe', 'op layout', 'weight', 'feature', 'out',
                'is_mla', 'pp_slice_point', 'gpu_comm', 'tp split k', 'TP', 'DP', 'EP', 'PP', 'gpu_config_tuning',
                'gpu_dp_head_div', 'gpu_dp_n_div', 'gpu_dp_q_div', 'gpu_tp_div_reminder', 'dp', 'tp', 'ep', 'pp', 'gpu_batch',
                'gpu_head', 'gpu_m', 'gpu_n', 'gpu_k', 'gpu_e', 'gpu_q_seq', 'gpu_kv_seq', 'gpu_hidden', 'simt time',
                'sfu time', 'mem time', 'op time', 'sm_m', 'sm_n', 'sm_k', 'b_gpc', 'b_sm', 'a_gpc', 'a_sm', 'ich_div',
                'och_div', 'batch_div', 'h_div', 'ao_size', 'b_size', 'o_size', 'sm_tillng_m', 'sm_tillng_n', 'sm_tillng_k',
                'gemm_loop_order', 'a size', 'b size', 'o size', 'a_raw_size', 'b_raw_size', 'o_raw_size', 'a load ratio',
                'b load ratio', 'o store ratio', 'is_bypass_a', 'compute time', 'd2d time', 'link time', 'l2 in time',
                'l2 out time', 'l2 ram time', 'gpc in time', 'gpc out time', 'sm in time', 'sm out time', 'hbm time',
                'd2d %', 'link %', 'l2 in %', 'l2 out %', 'l2 ram %', 'gpc in %', 'gpc out %', 'sm in %', 'sm out %',
                'compute %', 'gemm time', 'sm_batch', 'sm_head', 'sm_q_seq', 'sm_kv_seq', 'sm_k_hidden', 'sm_v_hidden',
                'gpu level map', 'sm batch', 'sm head', 'sm q seq length', 'sm kv seq length', 'sm k hidden size',
                'sm v hidden size', 'qk hidden_size', 'is_flash_attention', 'kv load time', 'q_size', 'k_size', 'v_size',
                'sm_q_t', 'sm_kv_t', 'sm_q_iter', 'sm_kv_iter', 'sm q load size', 'sm k load size', 'sm v load size',
                'sm qk load size', 'sm qk store size', 'sm o store size', 'ep gpu comm time(intra node)',
                'ep gpu comm time(inter node)', 'dp_size KB', 'dp comm time', 'allreduce_algo', 'tp comm time',
                'tp_size KB', 'comm time', 'ep_size gpu KB', 'ep comm time', 'kv_seq_len', 's_size', 'sm s load size'
            ]


        if is_decode:
            output_file = './dashboard/data/final_decode_all.xlsx'
        else:
            output_file = './dashboard/data/final_prefill_all.xlsx'
        os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(output_file), exist_ok=True)
        combined_df.to_excel(output_file)

        print(f"成功合并 {len(all_last_rows)} 个文件的最后一行")
        print(f"结果已保存到: {output_file}")

        # 显示合并后的数据预览
        print("\n合并后的数据预览:")
        print(combined_df)

        # 返回合并后的 DataFrame，方便在主函数中单独绘图
        return combined_df
    else:
        print("没有找到符合条件的文件或处理失败")
        return None

nodes.name: architecture_report_to_llm_graph
nodes.docstring: Build a cost-model graph from an HF architecture report.
nodes.summary: Build a cost-model graph from an HF architecture report.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def architecture_report_to_llm_graph(
    report: Mapping[str, Any],
    *,
    model_name: str | None = None,
    batch: int = 4,
    input_len: int = 1024,
    output_len: int = 8192,
    precision: str = "fp4",
    attention_feature_precision: str | None = None,
    attention_weight_precision: str | None = None,
    attention_output_precision: str | None = None,
    attention_weight_scale_group: int | None = None,
    attention_weight_scale_bpe: float | None = None,
    optimize: bool = False,
) -> dict[str, Any]:
    """Build a cost-model graph from an HF architecture report."""
    spec = architecture_report_to_spec(
        report,
        model_name=model_name,
        batch=batch,
        input_len=input_len,
        output_len=output_len,
        precision=precision,
        attention_feature_precision=attention_feature_precision,
        attention_weight_precision=attention_weight_precision,
        attention_output_precision=attention_output_precision,
        attention_weight_scale_group=attention_weight_scale_group,
        attention_weight_scale_bpe=attention_weight_scale_bpe,
    )
    source = architecture_report_to_source(report)
    graph = build_llm_graph(spec, source=source, optimize=optimize)
    graph["hf_architecture"] = source["hf_architecture"]
    return graph

nodes.name: architecture_report_to_source
nodes.docstring: Return graph source metadata preserving the semantic HF architecture report.
nodes.summary: Return graph source metadata preserving the semantic HF architecture report.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def architecture_report_to_source(report: Mapping[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
    """Return graph source metadata preserving the semantic HF architecture report."""
    config = architecture_report_config(report)
    operator_rows = _list_payload(report, "operator_rows")
    hf_architecture = {
        "model_id": str(report.get("model_id") or ""),
        "revision": str(report.get("revision") or ""),
        "model_type": str(report.get("model_type") or config.get("model_type") or "unknown"),
        "config": dict(config),
        "summary": _dict_payload(report, "summary"),
        "layer_schedule": _list_payload(report, "layer_schedule"),
        "merged_layer_groups": _list_payload(report, "merged_layer_groups"),
        "operator_rows": operator_rows,
        "operator_row_count": len(operator_rows),
        "model_operators": _list_payload(report, "model_operators"),
        "sources": _list_payload(report, "sources"),
        "notes": _list_payload(report, "notes"),
    }
    return {
        "kind": "hf_architecture_report",
        "source_kind": "hf_architecture_report",
        "model": hf_architecture["model_id"] or str(config.get("model_type", "unknown")),
        "model_type": hf_architecture["model_type"],
        "code_files": [],
        "warnings": [],
        "hf_architecture": hf_architecture,
    }

def architecture_report_to_spec(
    report: Mapping[str, Any],
    *,
    model_name: str | None = None,
    batch: int = 4,
    input_len: int = 1024,
    output_len: int = 8192,
    precision: str = "fp4",
    attention_feature_precision: str | None = None,
    attention_weight_precision: str | None = None,
    attention_output_precision: str | None = None,
    attention_weight_scale_group: int | None = None,
    attention_weight_scale_bpe: float | None = None,
) -> LLMPerfModelSpec:
    """Convert an HF architecture report into the LLMPerf cost-model spec."""
    config = architecture_report_config(report)
    return normalize_config(
        config,
        model_name=model_name or _default_report_model_name(report, config),
        batch=batch,
        input_len=input_len,
        output_len=output_len,
        precision=precision,
        attention_feature_precision=attention_feature_precision,
        attention_weight_precision=attention_weight_precision,
        attention_output_precision=attention_output_precision,
        attention_weight_scale_group=attention_weight_scale_group,
        attention_weight_scale_bpe=attention_weight_scale_bpe,
    )

def _node_tensor_meta(node: Any) -> tuple[list[int] | None, str | None]:
    """Helper for the hf_meta_trace workflow."""
    meta = node.meta.get("tensor_meta") if hasattr(node, "meta") else None
    if meta is None:
        return None, None
    shape = list(meta.shape) if hasattr(meta, "shape") else None
    dtype = str(meta.dtype) if hasattr(meta, "dtype") else None
    return shape, dtype

def _write_success_outputs(result: dict[str, Any], graph_module: Any, options: MetaTraceOptions) -> dict[str, Any]:
    """Helper for the hf_meta_trace workflow."""
    output_path = Path(options.output)
    output_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    output_path.write_text(json.dumps(result, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")
    if options.graphmodule_output is not None:
        graphmodule_path = Path(options.graphmodule_output)
        graphmodule_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        graphmodule_path.write_text(graph_module.code, encoding="utf-8")
        result["graphmodule_output"] = str(graphmodule_path)
        output_path.write_text(json.dumps(result, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")
    return result

nodes.source_excerpt:
def build_arg_parser() -> argparse.ArgumentParser:
    """Build the structured data used by downstream calls."""
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Run a HuggingFace model meta-tensor make_fx trace.")
    parser.add_argument("--model", required=True, help="Local model directory or HuggingFace model id.")
    parser.add_argument("--output", required=True, type=Path, help="Output trace summary JSON.")
    parser.add_argument("--graphmodule-output", type=Path, default=None, help="Optional output for GraphModule code.")
    parser.add_argument("--batch", type=int, default=1)
    parser.add_argument("--seq-len", type=int, default=4)
    parser.add_argument("--trace-layers", type=int, default=1)
    parser.add_argument("--trace-hidden", type=int, default=128)
    parser.add_argument("--trace-intermediate", type=int, default=256)
    parser.add_argument("--trace-moe-intermediate", type=int, default=32)
    parser.add_argument("--trace-heads", type=int, default=4)
    parser.add_argument("--trace-kv-heads", type=int, default=1)
    parser.add_argument("--trace-vocab", type=int, default=128)
    parser.add_argument("--tracing-mode", default="real", choices=("real", "fake", "symbolic"))
    parser.add_argument("--moe-policy", default="dense-only", choices=("dense-only", "as-is", "force-moe"))
    parser.add_argument("--trust-remote-code", action="store_true")
    parser.add_argument("--allow-failure", action="store_true", help="Write failure JSON and exit 0.")
    return parser

def main(argv: list[str] | None = None) -> dict[str, Any]:
    """CLI entry point for this module."""
    args = build_arg_parser().parse_args(argv)
    options = MetaTraceOptions(
        model=args.model,
        output=args.output,
        graphmodule_output=args.graphmodule_output,
        batch=args.batch,
        seq_len=args.seq_len,
        trace_layers=args.trace_layers,
        trace_hidden=args.trace_hidden,
        trace_intermediate=args.trace_intermediate,
        trace_moe_intermediate=args.trace_moe_intermediate,
        trace_heads=args.trace_heads,
        trace_kv_heads=args.trace_kv_heads,
        trace_vocab=args.trace_vocab,
        trust_remote_code=args.trust_remote_code,
        tracing_mode=args.tracing_mode,
        moe_policy=args.moe_policy,
        allow_failure=args.allow_failure,
    )
    result = run_hf_meta_trace(options)
    print(f"{result['status']}: wrote {args.output}")
    return result

nodes.name: prepare_trace_config
nodes.docstring: Helper for the hf_meta_trace workflow.
nodes.summary: Helper for the hf_meta_trace workflow.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def prepare_trace_config(config: Any, options: MetaTraceOptions) -> Any:
    """Helper for the hf_meta_trace workflow."""
    trace_config = copy.deepcopy(config)
    hidden = int(options.trace_hidden)
    heads = max(int(options.trace_heads), 1)
    kv_heads = max(int(options.trace_kv_heads), 1)
    head_dim = max(hidden // heads, 1)
    value_head_dim = max(head_dim // 2, 1)
    q_lora_rank = max(hidden // 4, 1)
    kv_lora_rank = max(hidden // 8, 1)
    rope_dim = max(value_head_dim // 2, 1)
    nope_dim = value_head_dim

    for name, value in {
        "num_hidden_layers": int(options.trace_layers),
        "num_layers": int(options.trace_layers),
        "n_layers": int(options.trace_layers),
        "hidden_size": hidden,
        "dim": hidden,
        "intermediate_size": int(options.trace_intermediate),
        "ffn_hidden_size": int(options.trace_intermediate),
        "moe_intermediate_size": int(options.trace_moe_intermediate),
        "moe_inter_dim": int(options.trace_moe_intermediate),
        "num_attention_heads": heads,
        "n_heads": heads,
        "num_key_value_heads": kv_heads,
        "n_kv_heads": kv_heads,
        "q_lora_rank": q_lora_rank,
        "kv_lora_rank": kv_lora_rank,
        "qk_nope_head_dim": nope_dim,
        "qk_rope_head_dim": rope_dim,
        "rope_head_dim": rope_dim,
        "v_head_dim": value_head_dim,
        "head_dim": value_head_dim,
        "vocab_size": int(options.trace_vocab),
        "max_position_embeddings": max(int(options.seq_len) * 4, 16),
        "seq_length": max(int(options.seq_len) * 4, 16),
        "max_seq_len": max(int(options.seq_len) * 4, 16),
        "use_cache": False,
        "output_attentions": False,
    }.items():
        _set(trace_config, name, value)

    if _has(trace_config, "n_routed_experts"):
        _set(trace_config, "n_routed_experts", min(int(_get(trace_config, "n_routed_experts", 4)), 4))
    if _has(trace_config, "num_experts"):
        _set(trace_config, "num_experts", min(int(_get(trace_config, "num_experts", 4)), 4))
    if _has(trace_config, "num_experts_per_tok"):
        _set(trace_config, "num_experts_per_tok", min(int(_get(trace_config, "num_experts_per_tok", 2)), 2))
    if _has(trace_config, "n_activated_experts"):
        _set(trace_config, "n_activated_experts", min(int(_get(trace_config, "n_activated_experts", 2)), 2))
    if _has(trace_config, "n_group"):
        _set(trace_config, "n_group", 1)
    if _has(trace_config, "topk_group"):
        _set(trace_config, "topk_group", 1)
    if _has(trace_config, "routed_scaling_factor"):
        _set(trace_config, "routed_scaling_factor", 1.0)

    if options.moe_policy == "dense-only":
        _set(trace_config, "first_k_dense_replace", int(options.trace_layers))
        _set(trace_config, "n_dense_layers", int(options.trace_layers))
        _set(trace_config, "num_dense_layers", int(options.trace_layers))
    elif options.moe_policy == "force-moe":
        _set(trace_config, "first_k_dense_replace", 0)
        _set(trace_config, "n_dense_layers", 0)
        _set(trace_config, "num_dense_layers", 0)

    return trace_config

formulas.explanation: hidden 由 options.trace_hidden 等变量组合计算得到。
heads 由 options.trace_heads 等变量组合计算得到。
kv_heads 由 options.trace_kv_heads 等变量组合计算得到。
head_dim 由 heads, hidden 等变量组合计算得到。
value_head_dim 由 head_dim 等变量组合计算得到。
q_lora_rank 由 hidden 等变量组合计算得到。
kv_lora_rank 由 hidden 等变量组合计算得到。
ROPE 维度 由 value_head_dim 等变量组合计算得到。

nodes.name: run_hf_meta_trace
nodes.docstring: Load a Transformers model on meta tensors, run a symbolic forward trace, and write graph summaries.
nodes.summary: Load a Transformers model on meta tensors, run a symbolic forward trace, and write graph summaries.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def run_hf_meta_trace(options: MetaTraceOptions) -> dict[str, Any]:
    """Load a Transformers model on meta tensors, run a symbolic forward trace, and write graph summaries."""
    stage = "load_config"
    try:
        import torch
        from accelerate import init_empty_weights
        from torch.fx.experimental.proxy_tensor import make_fx
        from transformers import AutoModelForCausalLM

        config = load_transformers_config(options.model, trust_remote_code=options.trust_remote_code)
        stage = "prepare_trace_config"
        trace_config = prepare_trace_config(config, options)
        stage = "instantiate_empty_model"
        with init_empty_weights():
            model = AutoModelForCausalLM.from_config(
                trace_config,
                trust_remote_code=options.trust_remote_code,
            )
        model.eval()
        if options.moe_policy == "force-moe":
            model.train()

        input_shape = [int(options.batch), int(options.seq_len)]
        input_ids = torch.zeros(tuple(input_shape), dtype=torch.long, device="meta")
        stage = "meta_forward"
        with torch.no_grad():
            output = model(input_ids=input_ids, use_cache=False).logits
        output_shape = list(output.shape)
        stage = "make_fx"
        graph_module = make_fx(
            lambda x: model(input_ids=x, use_cache=False).logits,
            tracing_mode=options.tracing_mode,
        )(input_ids)
        result = summarize_fx_graph(
            graph_module,
            repo=options.model,
            trace_kind=f"make_fx_meta_{options.moe_policy}",
            input_shape=input_shape,
            output_shape=output_shape,
        )
        result["trace_options"] = {
            "tracing_mode": options.tracing_mode,
            "moe_policy": options.moe_policy,
            "trace_layers": options.trace_layers,
            "trace_hidden": options.trace_hidden,
        }
        return _write_success_outputs(result, graph_module, options)
    except BaseException as error:
        result = write_trace_failure(options.output, repo=options.model, stage=stage, error=error)
        if not options.allow_failure:
            raise
        return result

formulas.explanation: input_shape 由 options.batch, options.seq_len 等变量组合计算得到。

nodes.name: write_trace_failure
nodes.docstring: Write generated output for this workflow.
nodes.summary: Write generated output for this workflow.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def write_trace_failure(output: str | Path, *, repo: str, stage: str, error: BaseException) -> dict[str, Any]:
    """Write generated output for this workflow."""
    traceback_lines = traceback.format_exception(type(error), error, error.__traceback__)
    result = {
        "status": "failed",
        "repo": repo,
        "failure": {
            "stage": stage,
            "type": type(error).__name__,
            "message": str(error),
            "repr": repr(error),
            "traceback_tail": traceback_lines[-12:],
        },
    }
    output_path = Path(output)
    output_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    output_path.write_text(json.dumps(result, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")
    return result

formulas.explanation: result 由 error, repo, repr, stage, traceback_lines 等变量组合计算得到。

nodes.summary: Build the structured data used by downstream calls.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def build_arg_parser() -> argparse.ArgumentParser:
    """Build the structured data used by downstream calls."""
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(
        description="Generate an LLM-perf graph JSON from a HuggingFace/Transformers model."
    )
    input_group = parser.add_mutually_exclusive_group(required=True)
    input_group.add_argument("--model", help="Local model directory or HuggingFace model id.")
    input_group.add_argument(
        "--architecture-report",
        help="JSON report produced by external hf_arch_exporter.py; converted into an LLMPerf cost graph.",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--output",
        default=None,
        help="Output graph .json path. Defaults to external/LLM_HF_parser/generated/graphs/<model>_i<input>_o<output>_<precision>_graph.json.",
    )
    parser.add_argument("--input-len", type=int, default=1024, help="Input sequence length.")
    parser.add_argument("--output-len", type=int, default=8192, help="Output sequence length.")
    parser.add_argument("--batch", type=int, default=4, help="Batch size stored in the graph model metadata.")
    parser.add_argument("--precision", default="fp4", help="Precision stored in the graph nodes.")
    parser.add_argument("--attention-feature-precision", default=None, help="Feature precision for attention projection MatMul rows.")
    parser.add_argument("--attention-weight-precision", default=None, help="Weight precision for attention projection MatMul rows.")
    parser.add_argument("--attention-output-precision", default=None, help="Output precision for attention projection MatMul rows.")
    parser.add_argument("--attention-weight-scale-group", type=int, default=None, help="Elements per attention weight scale value.")
    parser.add_argument("--attention-weight-scale-bpe", type=float, default=None, help="Bytes per attention weight scale value.")
    parser.add_argument("--model-name", default=None, help="Override graph model name.")
    parser.add_argument(
        "--trust-remote-code",
        action="store_true",
        help="Pass trust_remote_code=True to transformers AutoConfig.",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--optimize",
        action="store_true",
        help="Run graph-preserving normalization passes and record them in the graph metadata.",
    )
    return parser

def main(argv: list[str] | None = None) -> Path:
    """CLI entry point for this module."""
    args = build_arg_parser().parse_args(argv)
    if args.architecture_report:
        from llm_perf.tools.hf_architecture_adapter import architecture_report_to_llm_graph, load_architecture_report

        report = load_architecture_report(args.architecture_report)
        graph = architecture_report_to_llm_graph(
            report,
            model_name=args.model_name,
            batch=args.batch,
            input_len=args.input_len,
            output_len=args.output_len,
            precision=args.precision,
            attention_feature_precision=args.attention_feature_precision,
            attention_weight_precision=args.attention_weight_precision,
            attention_output_precision=args.attention_output_precision,
            attention_weight_scale_group=args.attention_weight_scale_group,
            attention_weight_scale_bpe=args.attention_weight_scale_bpe,
            optimize=args.optimize,
        )
        graph_model = graph.get("model") if isinstance(graph.get("model"), dict) else {}
        output = args.output or default_hf_graph_path(
            str(graph_model.get("model_name") or args.architecture_report),
            input_len=args.input_len,
            output_len=args.output_len,
            precision=args.precision,
        )
        output_path = write_llm_graph(graph, output)
        print(f"Wrote {output_path}")
        return output_path

    config = load_transformers_config(args.model, trust_remote_code=args.trust_remote_code)
    model_name = args.model_name or _default_model_name(args.model, config)
    spec = normalize_config(
        config,
        model_name=model_name,
        batch=args.batch,
        input_len=args.input_len,
        output_len=args.output_len,
        precision=args.precision,
        attention_feature_precision=args.attention_feature_precision,
        attention_weight_precision=args.attention_weight_precision,
        attention_output_precision=args.attention_output_precision,
        attention_weight_scale_group=args.attention_weight_scale_group,
        attention_weight_scale_bpe=args.attention_weight_scale_bpe,
    )
    source = summarize_huggingface_source(args.model, config)
    graph = build_llm_graph(spec, source=source, optimize=args.optimize)
    output = args.output or default_hf_graph_path(
        spec.model_name,
        input_len=spec.input_seq_length,
        output_len=spec.output_seq_length,
        precision=spec.precision,
    )
    output_path = write_llm_graph(graph, output)
    print(f"Wrote {output_path}")
    return output_path

nodes.name: summarize_huggingface_source
nodes.docstring: Summarize raw model data into compact metrics.
nodes.summary: Summarize raw model data into compact metrics.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def summarize_huggingface_source(model: str, config: Any) -> dict[str, Any]:
    """Summarize raw model data into compact metrics."""
    model_path = Path(model)
    warnings: list[str] = []
    if model_path.exists():
        code_files = _collect_local_code_files(model_path)
        source_kind = "local"
    else:
        code_files, warnings = _collect_hub_code_files(model)
        source_kind = "huggingface_hub"

    return {
        "kind": source_kind,
        "model": model,
        "model_type": _source_model_type(config),
        "code_files": code_files,
        "warnings": warnings,
    }

def _infer_torch_dtype_precision(config: Any) -> str | None:
    """Return the feature dtype advertised by an HF config, when present."""
    value = _get(config, "torch_dtype", "dtype")
    if value is None:
        return None
    precision = _precision_text(value, "")
    return precision or None

nodes.summary: Normalize precision aliases used by HF configs and LLMPerf rows.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def _precision_text(value: Any, default: str = "fp4") -> str:
    """Normalize precision aliases used by HF configs and LLMPerf rows."""
    text = str(value if value is not None else default).strip().lower()
    aliases = {
        "bfloat16": "bf16",
        "torch.bfloat16": "bf16",
        "float16": "fp16",
        "torch.float16": "fp16",
        "half": "fp16",
        "float32": "fp32",
        "torch.float32": "fp32",
        "nv_fp4": "nvfp4",
        "nv-fp4": "nvfp4",
    }
    return aliases.get(text, text or default)

nodes.summary: Write normalized model metadata as a compact key/value table.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def _write_model_sheet(sheet: Worksheet, spec: LLMPerfModelSpec) -> None:
    """Write normalized model metadata as a compact key/value table."""
    sheet.cell(row=1, column=1, value="field")
    sheet.cell(row=1, column=2, value="value")
    for row_idx, field_name in enumerate(MODEL_FIELD_NAMES, start=2):
        sheet.cell(row=row_idx, column=1, value=field_name)
        sheet.cell(row=row_idx, column=2, value=_excel_value(getattr(spec, field_name)))
    sheet.freeze_panes = "A2"
    sheet.column_dimensions["A"].width = 28
    sheet.column_dimensions["B"].width = 32

nodes.name: build_arg_parser
nodes.docstring: Build the structured data used by downstream calls.
nodes.summary: Build the structured data used by downstream calls.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def build_arg_parser() -> argparse.ArgumentParser:
    """Build the structured data used by downstream calls."""
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(
        description="Generate an LLM-perf Excel workbook from a HuggingFace/Transformers config."
    )
    input_group = parser.add_mutually_exclusive_group(required=True)
    input_group.add_argument("--model", help="Local model directory or HuggingFace model id.")
    input_group.add_argument(
        "--architecture-report",
        help="JSON report produced by external hf_arch_exporter.py; converted into an LLMPerf workbook.",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--output",
        default=None,
        help="Output .xlsx path. Defaults to external/LLM_HF_parser/generated/workbooks/<model>_i<input>_o<output>_<precision>.xlsx.",
    )
    parser.add_argument("--input-len", type=int, default=1024, help="Input sequence length.")
    parser.add_argument("--output-len", type=int, default=8192, help="Output sequence length.")
    parser.add_argument("--batch", type=int, default=4, help="Batch size stored in the workbook.")
    parser.add_argument("--precision", default="fp4", help="Precision stored in the workbook.")
    parser.add_argument("--attention-feature-precision", default=None, help="Feature precision for attention projection MatMul rows.")
    parser.add_argument("--attention-weight-precision", default=None, help="Weight precision for attention projection MatMul rows.")
    parser.add_argument("--attention-output-precision", default=None, help="Output precision for attention projection MatMul rows.")
    parser.add_argument("--attention-weight-scale-group", type=int, default=None, help="Elements per attention weight scale value.")
    parser.add_argument("--attention-weight-scale-bpe", type=float, default=None, help="Bytes per attention weight scale value.")
    parser.add_argument("--model-name", default=None, help="Override workbook model name.")
    parser.add_argument(
        "--trust-remote-code",
        action="store_true",
        help="Pass trust_remote_code=True to transformers AutoConfig.",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--metadata-only",
        action="store_true",
        help="Write only the compact Model sheet and omit Prefill/Decode layer sheets.",
    )
    return parser

nodes.name: main
nodes.docstring: CLI entry point for this module.
nodes.summary: CLI entry point for this module.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def main(argv: list[str] | None = None) -> Path:
    """CLI entry point for this module."""
    args = build_arg_parser().parse_args(argv)
    layer_graph = None
    if args.architecture_report:
        from llm_perf.tools.hf_architecture_adapter import (
            architecture_report_to_llm_graph,
            architecture_report_to_spec,
            load_architecture_report,
        )

        report = load_architecture_report(args.architecture_report)
        spec = architecture_report_to_spec(
            report,
            model_name=args.model_name,
            batch=args.batch,
            input_len=args.input_len,
            output_len=args.output_len,
            precision=args.precision,
            attention_feature_precision=args.attention_feature_precision,
            attention_weight_precision=args.attention_weight_precision,
            attention_output_precision=args.attention_output_precision,
            attention_weight_scale_group=args.attention_weight_scale_group,
            attention_weight_scale_bpe=args.attention_weight_scale_bpe,
        )
        if not args.metadata_only:
            layer_graph = architecture_report_to_llm_graph(
                report,
                model_name=args.model_name,
                batch=args.batch,
                input_len=args.input_len,
                output_len=args.output_len,
                precision=args.precision,
                attention_feature_precision=args.attention_feature_precision,
                attention_weight_precision=args.attention_weight_precision,
                attention_output_precision=args.attention_output_precision,
                attention_weight_scale_group=args.attention_weight_scale_group,
                attention_weight_scale_bpe=args.attention_weight_scale_bpe,
            )
    else:
        config = load_transformers_config(args.model, trust_remote_code=args.trust_remote_code)
        model_name = args.model_name or _default_model_name(args.model, config)
        spec = normalize_config(
            config,
            model_name=model_name,
            batch=args.batch,
            input_len=args.input_len,
            output_len=args.output_len,
            precision=args.precision,
            attention_feature_precision=args.attention_feature_precision,
            attention_weight_precision=args.attention_weight_precision,
            attention_output_precision=args.attention_output_precision,
            attention_weight_scale_group=args.attention_weight_scale_group,
            attention_weight_scale_bpe=args.attention_weight_scale_bpe,
        )
    output = args.output or default_hf_workbook_path(
        spec.model_name,
        input_len=spec.input_seq_length,
        output_len=spec.output_seq_length,
        precision=spec.precision,
    )
    output_path = write_llmperf_xlsx(
        spec,
        output,
        write_layers=not args.metadata_only,
        layer_graph=layer_graph,
    )
    print(f"Wrote {output_path}")
    return output_path

        spec,
        output,
        write_layers=not args.metadata_only,
        layer_graph=layer_graph,
    )

nodes.name: normalize_config
nodes.docstring: Normalize a Hugging Face config into the LLMPerf workbook model specification.
nodes.summary: Normalize a Hugging Face config into the LLMPerf workbook model specification.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def normalize_config(
    config: Any,
    model_name: str | None = None,
    batch: int = 4,
    input_len: int = 1024,
    output_len: int = 8192,
    precision: str = "fp4",
    attention_feature_precision: str | None = None,
    attention_weight_precision: str | None = None,
    attention_output_precision: str | None = None,
    attention_weight_scale_group: int | None = None,
    attention_weight_scale_bpe: float | None = None,
) -> LLMPerfModelSpec:
    """Normalize a Hugging Face config into the LLMPerf workbook model specification."""
    vocab_size = _required_int(config, "vocab_size", "vocab_size", "padded_vocab_size")
    hidden = _required_int(config, "hidden_size", "hidden_size", "dim", "n_embd")
    layers = _required_int(config, "num_hidden_layers", "num_hidden_layers", "num_layers", "n_layers", "n_layer")
    head_q = _required_int(config, "num_attention_heads", "num_attention_heads", "n_heads", "n_head")
    raw_head_kv = int(_get(config, "num_key_value_heads", "n_kv_heads", "multi_query_group_num", default=head_q))
    v_head_dim = int(_get(config, "v_head_dim", "head_dim", default=max(hidden // head_q, 1)))
    qk_nope_head_dim = int(_get(config, "qk_nope_head_dim", default=max(v_head_dim, 1)))
    experts = int(_get(config, "n_routed_experts", "num_experts", "n_experts", default=1))
    topk = int(_get(config, "num_experts_per_tok", "n_activated_experts", "moe_top_k", "top_k", default=1))
    shared_experts = int(_get(config, "n_shared_experts", "num_shared_experts", default=0))
    # MLA detection follows common Kimi/DeepSeek/GLM-style config fields. When
    # absent, the workbook falls back to ordinary MHA dimensions.
    is_mla = any(
        _get(config, name) is not None
        for name in ("q_lora_rank", "kv_lora_rank", "qk_rope_head_dim", "v_head_dim", "head_dim")
    )

    fc_hidden = int(
        _get(
            config,
            "moe_intermediate_size",
            "moe_ffn_hidden_size",
            "moe_inter_dim",
            "expert_intermediate_size",
            "intermediate_size",
            "ffn_hidden_size",
            "n_inner",
        )
    )
    dense_fc_hidden = int(
        _get(
            config,
            "intermediate_size",
            "ffn_hidden_size",
            "n_inner",
            default=fc_hidden,
        )
    )
    dense_layers_default = layers if experts == 1 else 0
    dense_layers = int(
        _get(
            config,
            "first_k_dense_replace",
            "n_dense_layers",
            "num_dense_layers",
            default=dense_layers_default,
        )
    )
    activation = str(_get(config, "hidden_act", "activation_function", "activation", default="Silu"))
    rope_dim = int(_get(config, "qk_rope_head_dim", "rope_head_dim", "rope_dim", "rotary_dim", default=64))
    # Compression defaults preserve dense attention: Q uses hidden size, KV uses
    # kv_heads * v_head_dim unless the config advertises LoRA/MLA ranks.
    compress_q = int(_get(config, "q_lora_rank", default=hidden))
    kv_lora_rank = _get(config, "kv_lora_rank")
    head_kv = 1 if kv_lora_rank is not None else raw_head_kv
    compress_kv = int(kv_lora_rank if kv_lora_rank is not None else head_kv * v_head_dim)
    model_precision = _precision_text(precision)
    feature_precision = _precision_text(_infer_torch_dtype_precision(config), model_precision)
    weight_precision = _attention_weight_precision_from_model_precision(model_precision)
    output_precision = feature_precision
    resolved_attention_feature_precision = _precision_text(attention_feature_precision, feature_precision)
    resolved_attention_weight_precision = _precision_text(attention_weight_precision, weight_precision)
    resolved_attention_output_precision = _precision_text(attention_output_precision, resolved_attention_feature_precision)
    resolved_attention_weight_scale_group = _scale_group_for_weight_precision(
        resolved_attention_weight_precision,
        attention_weight_scale_group,
    )
    resolved_attention_weight_scale_bpe = _scale_bpe_for_weight_precision(
        resolved_attention_weight_precision,
        resolved_attention_weight_scale_group,
        attention_weight_scale_bpe,
    )

    return LLMPerfModelSpec(
        model_name=_model_name(config, model_name),
        precision=model_precision,
        feature_precision=feature_precision,
        weight_precision=weight_precision,
        output_precision=output_precision,
        attention_feature_precision=resolved_attention_feature_precision,
        attention_weight_precision=resolved_attention_weight_precision,
        attention_output_precision=resolved_attention_output_precision,
        attention_weight_scale_group=resolved_attention_weight_scale_group,
        attention_weight_scale_bpe=resolved_attention_weight_scale_bpe,
        batch=int(batch),
        vocab_size=vocab_size,
        hidden=hidden,
        mla=is_mla,
        compress_q=compress_q,
        compress_kv=compress_kv,
        head_q=head_q,
        head_kv=head_kv,
        rope_dim=rope_dim,
        v_head_dim=v_head_dim,
        fc_hidden=fc_hidden,
        shared_experts=shared_experts,
        experts=experts,
        topk=topk,
        dense_layers=dense_layers,
        layers=layers,
        activation=activation,
        feature_bpe=1,
        kv_cache_bpe=1,
        weight_bpe=1,
        output_bpe=1,
        optimizer_bpe=1,
        input_seq_length=int(input_len),
        output_seq_length=int(output_len),
        qk_nope_head_dim=qk_nope_head_dim,
        dense_fc_hidden=dense_fc_hidden,
    )

formulas.explanation: raw_head_kv 由 _get, config, head_q 等变量组合计算得到。
v_head_dim 由 _get, config, head_q, hidden 等变量组合计算得到。
qk_nope_head_dim 由 _get, config, v_head_dim 等变量组合计算得到。
experts 由 _get, config 等变量组合计算得到。
topk 由 _get, config 等变量组合计算得到。
shared_experts 由 _get, config 等变量组合计算得到。
fc_hidden 由 _get, config 等变量组合计算得到。
dense_fc_hidden 由 _get, config, fc_hidden 等变量组合计算得到。
dense_layers 由 _get, config, dense_layers_default 等变量组合计算得到。
ROPE 维度 由 _get, config 等变量组合计算得到。
compress_q 由 _get, config, hidden 等变量组合计算得到。

formulas.statement: compress_kv = int(kv_lora_rank if kv_lora_rank is not None else head_kv * v_head_dim)
formulas.expression: int(kv_lora_rank if kv_lora_rank is not None else head_kv * v_head_dim)

nodes.name: write_layer_tables
nodes.docstring: Populate prefill/decode operator rows from the normalized HF model spec.
nodes.summary: Populate prefill/decode operator rows from the normalized HF model spec.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def write_layer_tables(
    workbook: Workbook,
    spec: LLMPerfModelSpec,
    *,
    graph: Mapping[str, Any] | None = None,
) -> None:
    """Populate prefill/decode operator rows from the normalized HF model spec."""
    graph = graph or build_llm_graph(spec)
    prefill_rows = [node["row"] for node in graph["cost_graphs"]["prefill"]["nodes"]]
    decode_rows = [node["row"] for node in graph["cost_graphs"]["decode"]["nodes"]]
    prefill_sheet = workbook.create_sheet(PREFILL_SHEET)
    decode_sheet = workbook.create_sheet(DECODE_SHEET)
    _write_layer_sheet(prefill_sheet, prefill_rows)
    _write_layer_sheet(decode_sheet, decode_rows)

nodes.name: write_llmperf_xlsx
nodes.docstring: Write normalized model metadata and layer rows into a compact workbook.
nodes.summary: Write normalized model metadata and layer rows into a compact workbook.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def write_llmperf_xlsx(
    spec: LLMPerfModelSpec,
    output: str | Path,
    *,
    write_layers: bool = True,
    layer_graph: Mapping[str, Any] | None = None,
) -> Path:
    """Write normalized model metadata and layer rows into a compact workbook."""
    workbook = Workbook()
    sheet = workbook.active
    sheet.title = MODEL_SHEET
    _write_model_sheet(sheet, spec)

    if write_layers:
        write_layer_tables(workbook, spec, graph=layer_graph)

    output_path = Path(output)
    output_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    openpyxl_manifest.mimetypes.add_type("image/webp", ".webp", strict=True)
    workbook.save(output_path)
    return output_path

def build_arg_parser() -> argparse.ArgumentParser:
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Render an LLM-perf graph JSON as a compact HTML view.")
    parser.add_argument("--graph", required=True, help="Input LLM graph JSON.")
    parser.add_argument("--output", required=True, help="Output HTML path.")
    parser.add_argument("--phase", default="prefill", choices=("prefill", "decode"))
    return parser

nodes.source_excerpt:
def _single_op_gemm_case(*, gpu_name: str, gpu_num: int, precision: str, m: int, n: int, k: int):
    hw = hw_inst_from_gpu_info(gpu_name, gpu_num)
    row = {
        "NN name": "bench_gemm",
        "type": "Gemm",
        "gpu_comm": False,
        "pp_slice_point": False,
        "op layout": "nhwc",
        "token": 1,
        "c_in": k,
    }
    bpe = 2.0 if precision == "fp16" else 1.0
    data_paser = (
        "bench_gemm",
        "manual",
        1,
        1,
        1,
        1,
        "Gemm",
        int(k),
        int(m),
        1,
        1,
        1,
        1,
        1,
        1,
        1,
        1,
        int(n),
        1,
        1,
        1,
        1,
        bpe,
        bpe,
        bpe,
        False,
        precision,
        0,
    )
    model_args = SimpleNamespace(MLA=False, n_activated_experts=1, n_routed_experts=1, v_head_dim=128)
    global_config = SimpleNamespace(
        is_decode=False,
        use_fp16_combine=True,
        kv_split_by_sm=True,
        use_fp16_qk=True,
        ep_decode_static_latency_ns=5000,
        ep_prefill_static_latency_ns=50000,
        pp_intra_node_latency_ns=None,
        pp_inter_node_latency_ns=None,
    )

    def new_frame() -> pd.DataFrame:
        return pd.DataFrame([row])

    def full_run():
        nn_info = new_frame()
        native_cost.run_single_op_process(
            QuietLogger(),
            {},
            model_args,
            global_config,
            data_paser,
            hw,
            1,
            1,
            1,
            1,
            nn_info,
            0,
            False,
        )
        return nn_info

    def native_compute():
        nn_info = new_frame()
        result = native_cost.run_single_op_full_process_native(
            ModelArg=model_args,
            global_config=global_config,
            nn_info=nn_info,
            line=0,
            data_paser=data_paser,
            hw=hw,
            dp=1,
            tp=1,
            ep=1,
            pp=1,
            cp=1,
        )
        return result, nn_info

    def native_apply(payload):
        result, nn_info = payload
        return native_cost.single_op_full_process_apply_cells_native(
            native_result=result,
            nn_info=nn_info,
            line=0,
            hw=hw,
            dp=1,
            tp=1,
            ep=1,
            pp=1,
        )

    return full_run, native_compute, native_apply

nodes.name: benchmark_components
nodes.docstring: Time full execution, native compute, and native result application separately.
nodes.summary: Time full execution, native compute, and native result application separately.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def benchmark_components(
    *,
    name: str,
    repeats: int,
    warmups: int,
    full_run: Callable[[], Any],
    native_compute: Callable[[], Any],
    native_apply: Callable[[Any], Any],
    timer_ns: Callable[[], int] = time.perf_counter_ns,
) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
    """Time full execution, native compute, and native result application separately."""
    repeats = max(int(repeats), 1)
    warmups = max(int(warmups), 0)

    for _ in range(warmups):
        full_run()
        native_apply(native_compute())

    rows: list[dict[str, Any]] = []

    start_ns = timer_ns()
    for _ in range(repeats):
        full_run()
    rows.append(_timing_row(name, "full", repeats, timer_ns() - start_ns))

    native_payloads = []
    start_ns = timer_ns()
    for _ in range(repeats):
        native_payloads.append(native_compute())
    rows.append(_timing_row(name, "native_compute", repeats, timer_ns() - start_ns))

    start_ns = timer_ns()
    for payload in native_payloads:
        native_apply(payload)
    rows.append(_timing_row(name, "native_apply", repeats, timer_ns() - start_ns))

    return rows

formulas.explanation: repeats 由 repeats 等变量组合计算得到。
warmups 由 warmups 等变量组合计算得到。

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: 这是一个脚本入口或可视化辅助函数，提取到 0 条关键计算公式，并直接关联 4 个仓库内函数。
nodes.source_excerpt:
def main(argv: list[str] | None = None) -> int:
    args = parse_args(argv)
    if args.scenario != "single-op-gemm":
        raise ValueError(f"Unsupported benchmark scenario: {args.scenario}")

    full_run, native_compute, native_apply = _single_op_gemm_case(
        gpu_name=args.gpu_name,
        gpu_num=args.gpu_num,
        precision=args.precision,
        m=args.m,
        n=args.n,
        k=args.k,
    )
    name = f"{args.scenario}:{args.gpu_name}:{args.precision}:m{args.m}:n{args.n}:k{args.k}"
    rows = benchmark_components(
        name=name,
        repeats=args.repeats,
        warmups=args.warmups,
        full_run=full_run,
        native_compute=native_compute,
        native_apply=native_apply,
    )

    if args.output is not None:
        write_json_report(args.output, rows)
    else:
        print(json.dumps({"benchmarks": rows}, indent=2, sort_keys=True))
    return 0

nodes.name: parse_args
nodes.summary: 这是一个脚本入口或可视化辅助函数，提取到 0 条关键计算公式，并直接关联 0 个仓库内函数。
nodes.source_excerpt:
def parse_args(argv: list[str] | None = None) -> argparse.Namespace:
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Benchmark native cost-model bridge stages.")
    parser.add_argument("--scenario", default="single-op-gemm", choices=["single-op-gemm"])
    parser.add_argument("--gpu-name", default="HGX-H100")
    parser.add_argument("--gpu-num", type=int, default=1)
    parser.add_argument("--precision", default="fp16", choices=["fp16", "fp8", "fp4"])
    parser.add_argument("--m", type=int, default=4096)
    parser.add_argument("--n", type=int, default=4096)
    parser.add_argument("--k", type=int, default=4096)
    parser.add_argument("--repeats", type=int, default=10)
    parser.add_argument("--warmups", type=int, default=2)
    parser.add_argument("--output", type=Path, default=None)
    return parser.parse_args(argv)

nodes.name: write_json_report
nodes.summary: 这是一个脚本入口或可视化辅助函数，提取到 0 条关键计算公式，并直接关联 0 个仓库内函数。
nodes.source_excerpt:
def write_json_report(path: str | Path, rows: list[dict[str, Any]]) -> Path:
    output = Path(path)
    output.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    output.write_text(json.dumps({"benchmarks": rows}, indent=2, sort_keys=True) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")
    return output

nodes.name: _maybe_add
nodes.docstring: Helper for the build_call_graph_page workflow.
nodes.summary: Helper for the build_call_graph_page workflow.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def _maybe_add(self, target_text: str, expr: ast.AST, owner: ast.AST) -> None:
    """Helper for the build_call_graph_page workflow."""
    if not is_formula_expression(expr):
      return
    expression_text = extract_source_segment(self.source_text, expr)
    statement_text = expression_text if target_text == "return" else f"{target_text} = {expression_text}"
    symbols = collect_expression_symbols(expr)
    factors = flatten_expression_terms(expr, self.source_text, ast.Mult)
    terms = flatten_expression_terms(expr, self.source_text, ast.Add)
    kind = formula_kind(target_text, expression_text)
    self.entries.append(
      {
        "target": target_text,
        "line": int(getattr(owner, "lineno", 0)),
        "statement": statement_text,
        "expression": expression_text,
        "kind": kind,
        "symbols": symbols,
        "factors": factors,
        "terms": terms,
        "explanation": explain_formula(self.function_id, target_text, expression_text, kind, symbols),
      }
    )

        self.file_path = file_path
        self.repo_root = repo_root

        self.function_stack: list[str] = []
        self.functions: list[FunctionInfo] = []
        self.function_nodes: dict[str, ast.AST] = {}

nodes.name: _record_function
nodes.docstring: Helper for the build_call_graph_page workflow.
nodes.summary: Helper for the build_call_graph_page workflow.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def _record_function(self, node: ast.FunctionDef | ast.AsyncFunctionDef) -> None:
        """Helper for the build_call_graph_page workflow."""
        local_qualname = ".".join(self.class_stack + self.function_stack + [node.name])
        function_id = f"{self.module_name}.{local_qualname}"
        kind = "method" if self.class_stack and not self.function_stack else "function"
        if self.function_stack:
            kind = "nested"
        info = FunctionInfo(
            id=function_id,
            name=node.name,
            qualname=local_qualname,
            module=self.module_name,
            file=str(self.file_path.resolve().relative_to(self.repo_root.resolve())),
            line=int(getattr(node, "lineno", 0)),
            end_line=int(getattr(node, "end_lineno", getattr(node, "lineno", 0))),
            kind=kind,
        )
        self.functions.append(info)
        self.function_nodes[function_id] = node
        self.function_stack.append(node.name)
        self.generic_visit(node)
        self.function_stack.pop()

formulas.explanation: local_qualname 由 node.name, self.class_stack, self.function_stack 等变量组合计算得到。

def visit_ClassDef(self, node: ast.ClassDef) -> None:
        """AST visitor hook for this node type."""
        self.class_stack.append(node.name)
        self.generic_visit(node)
        self.class_stack.pop()

nodes.name: build_call_graph
nodes.docstring:
Parse source files, collect function metadata, resolve calls, and return the call graph payload.
Calls formula collectors so important assignments and return expressions are available in the interactive HTML view.
nodes.summary: Parse source files, collect function metadata, resolve calls, and return the call graph payload.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def build_call_graph(source_roots: Iterable[Path], repo_root: Path | None = None) -> dict:
    """
    Parse source files, collect function metadata, resolve calls, and return the call graph payload.
    Calls formula collectors so important assignments and return expressions are available in the interactive HTML view.
    """
    repo_root = Path(repo_root or Path.cwd()).resolve()
    roots = [Path(root).resolve() for root in source_roots]
    trees, modules_by_file, source_texts = parse_source_files(roots, repo_root)

    collectors: dict[str, FunctionCollector] = {}
    imports_by_module: dict[str, dict[str, str]] = {}
    nodes_by_id: dict[str, FunctionInfo] = {}
    function_nodes: dict[str, ast.AST] = {}
    module_local_names: dict[str, dict[str, str]] = {}
    class_methods: dict[tuple[str, str], str] = {}

    for file_key, tree in trees.items():
        path = Path(file_key)
        module_name = modules_by_file[file_key]
        collector = FunctionCollector(module_name, path, repo_root)
        collector.visit(tree)
        collectors[module_name] = collector
        imports_by_module[module_name] = collect_imports(tree, module_name)
        module_local_names[module_name] = {}
        for info in collector.functions:
            nodes_by_id[info.id] = info
            function_nodes[info.id] = collector.function_nodes[info.id]
            local_parts = info.id.removeprefix(f"{module_name}.").split(".")
            if len(local_parts) == 1:
                module_local_names[module_name][local_parts[0]] = info.id
            elif len(local_parts) == 2:
                class_methods[(local_parts[0], local_parts[1])] = info.id

    known_ids = set(nodes_by_id)
    edge_keys: set[tuple[str, str]] = set()
    external_by_function: dict[str, list[str]] = {}
    for function_id, node in function_nodes.items():
        module_name = nodes_by_id[function_id].module
        collector = CallCollector(
            function_id,
            module_name,
            imports_by_module.get(module_name, {}),
            module_local_names.get(module_name, {}),
            class_methods,
            known_ids,
        )
        for statement in getattr(node, "body", []):
            collector.visit(statement)
        for target_id in collector.calls:
            if target_id != function_id:
                edge_keys.add((function_id, target_id))
        external_by_function[function_id] = sorted(set(collector.external_calls))

    incoming_count = {node_id: 0 for node_id in known_ids}
    outgoing_count = {node_id: 0 for node_id in known_ids}
    outgoing_map = {node_id: [] for node_id in known_ids}
    incoming_map = {node_id: [] for node_id in known_ids}
    for source, target in edge_keys:
        outgoing_count[source] += 1
        incoming_count[target] += 1
        outgoing_map[source].append(target)
        incoming_map[target].append(source)

    for targets in outgoing_map.values():
        targets.sort()
    for sources in incoming_map.values():
        sources.sort()

    nodes = []
    for info in sorted(nodes_by_id.values(), key=lambda item: item.id):
        source_path = repo_root / info.file
        source_text = source_texts.get(str(source_path.resolve()), "")
        node = function_nodes[info.id]
        source_excerpt = extract_source_segment(source_text, node) if source_text else ""
        docstring = ast.get_docstring(node) or ""
        formulas = extract_formula_entries(info.id, node, source_text) if source_text else []
        summary = FUNCTION_GUIDES.get(info.id, {}).get("summary") or default_function_summary(
            info,
            docstring,
            formulas,
            outgoing_map.get(info.id, []),
        )
        nodes.append(
            {
                "id": info.id,
                "name": info.name,
                "qualname": info.qualname,
                "module": info.module,
                "file": info.file,
                "line": info.line,
                "end_line": info.end_line,
                "kind": info.kind,
                "incoming": incoming_count[info.id],
                "outgoing": outgoing_count[info.id],
                "callers": incoming_map.get(info.id, []),
                "callees": outgoing_map.get(info.id, []),
                "external_calls": external_by_function.get(info.id, []),
                "parameters": collect_parameters(node),
                "docstring": docstring,
                "summary": summary,
                "guide_steps": guide_steps_for(info.id),
                "source_excerpt": source_excerpt,
                "source_line_count": max(info.end_line - info.line + 1, 1),
                "formula_count": len(formulas),
                "formulas": formulas,
            }
        )

    edges = [
        {"source": source, "target": target}
        for source, target in sorted(edge_keys, key=lambda item: (item[0], item[1]))
    ]
    modules = sorted({node["module"] for node in nodes})
    total_formula_count = sum(node["formula_count"] for node in nodes)
    functions_with_formulas = sum(1 for node in nodes if node["formula_count"] > 0)
    return {
        "summary": {
            "generated_at": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),
            "source_roots": [str(root.relative_to(repo_root)) if root.is_relative_to(repo_root) else str(root) for root in roots],
            "module_count": len(modules),
            "function_count": len(nodes),
            "edge_count": len(edges),
            "formula_count": total_formula_count,
            "functions_with_formulas": functions_with_formulas,
        },
        "modules": modules,
        "glossary": VARIABLE_GLOSSARY,
        "native_cost_model": native_cost_model_reference(),
        "nodes": nodes,
        "edges": edges,
    }

formulas.explanation: source_path 由 info.file, repo_root 等变量组合计算得到。

nodes.docstring: Helper for the build_call_graph_page workflow.
nodes.summary: Helper for the build_call_graph_page workflow.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def class_name_for_function(function_id: str, module_name: str) -> str | None:
    """Helper for the build_call_graph_page workflow."""
    local = function_id.removeprefix(f"{module_name}.")
    parts = local.split(".")
    if len(parts) >= 2:
        return parts[0]
    return None

nodes.name: main
nodes.docstring: CLI entry point for this module.
nodes.summary: CLI entry point for this module.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def main() -> None:
    """CLI entry point for this module."""
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Build an interactive HTML page for Python function call relationships.")
    parser.add_argument("--source", action="append", default=None, help="Source root to scan. Can be repeated.")
    parser.add_argument("--html-out", default="web/function_call_graph.html")
    parser.add_argument("--data-out", default="web/data/function_call_graph.json")
    args = parser.parse_args()

    repo_root = Path.cwd()
    sources = args.source or ["llm_perf", "scripts"]
    graph = build_call_graph([repo_root / source for source in sources], repo_root=repo_root)
    write_outputs(graph, repo_root / args.html_out, repo_root / args.data_out)
    print("HTML", args.html_out)
    print("JSON", args.data_out)
    print(
        "Summary",
        f"functions={graph['summary']['function_count']}",
        f"edges={graph['summary']['edge_count']}",
        f"modules={graph['summary']['module_count']}",
    )

def native_cost_model_reference() -> dict:
  """Return curated C++ native cost-model inputs, call stacks, and runtime-pruning notes."""
  return {
    "summary": (
      "C++ fast path takes parsed layer rows, model/global config, hardware topology, and GPU work maps; "
      "it returns per-op timing updates plus TPOT/TPS summaries used by throughput-vs-TPS sweeps."
    ),
    "parameter_groups": [
      {
        "id": "layer_row_inputs",
        "title": "Layer row / operator inputs",
        "source": "layer_paser(), full_nn_process records, and single_op_process_batch rows",
        "description": "每一行描述一个待建模算子及其张量形状、精度、并行配置和通信角色。",
        "parameters": [
          {"name": "NN name / type / component / layer", "meaning": "标识模型层、算子类型、组件归属和结果表更新位置。"},
          {"name": "token / h / w / c_in / c_out", "meaning": "token 或 feature-map 形状，以及输入/输出通道或 hidden 维度。"},
          {"name": "q_head / kv_head / expert / topk / index_topk", "meaning": "attention 与 MoE 的 head、expert、routing 规模。"},
          {"name": "attention_type / attention_role / effective_kv_seq", "meaning": "MHA/MLA/HCA/CSA 等变体和有效 KV cache 序列长度。"},
          {"name": "precision / a_bpe / b_bpe / o_bpe", "meaning": "算子精度与 A/B/O 张量元素字节数。"},
          {"name": "gpu_config_tuning / gpu_comm / pp_comm", "meaning": "切分调优、GPU 间通信和 pipeline 通信开关。"},
        ],
      },
      {
        "id": "model_and_global_config",
        "title": "Model and global run config",
        "source": "ModelArgs, GlobalConfig, workbook metadata, throughput CLI arguments",
        "description": "控制 decode/prefill、batch、MTP、序列长度以及模型结构的全局参数。",
        "parameters": [
          {"name": "is_decode / batch_size / micro_batch_size", "meaning": "决定 decode 或 prefill 路径及单次建模 batch。"},
          {"name": "input_seq_length / output_seq_length", "meaning": "prefill 输入长度与 decode 输出长度，用于 KV cache、TPOT 和 TPS 换算。"},
          {"name": "n_layers / n_dense_layers / hidden_size", "meaning": "层数、dense 层数和 hidden 规模，影响权重、激活和 KV cache。"},
          {"name": "MTP_on / mtp_stage / mtp_accept_rate", "meaning": "MTP stage、接受率和 token 增益模型。"},
          {"name": "moe_intermediate_size / n_routed_experts / num_experts_per_tok", "meaning": "MoE FFN 和 expert 并行的容量与路由规模。"},
        ],
      },
      {
        "id": "hardware_inputs",
        "title": "Hardware topology and bandwidth inputs",
        "source": "GPU hardware workbook rows and native hw structs",
        "description": "描述 GEMM tile、SM/GPC/die 拓扑、缓存/HBM 容量和各级互连带宽。",
        "parameters": [
          {"name": "hw_gemm_m / hw_gemm_n / hw_gemm_k_*", "meaning": "硬件 GEMM tile 粒度，决定 M/N/K 对齐和候选 tile 合法性。"},
          {"name": "freq / gpu_sm_num / die_num / par_num_die", "meaning": "核心频率、SM 数、die/partition 数，用于计算和拓扑展开。"},
          {"name": "gpc_num_par / gpc_sm_num / l2_group_size", "meaning": "GPC、SM、L2 group 组织方式，影响 NoC 路由和缓存命中。"},
          {"name": "l2_size / hbm_size", "meaning": "L2 与 HBM 容量，用于 footprint 落点、HBM 预算和 capacity 判断。"},
          {"name": "sm_in_bw / sm_out_bw / gpc_in_bw / gpc_out_bw", "meaning": "SM/GPC 级输入输出带宽瓶颈。"},
          {"name": "l2_*_bw_group / hbm_bw_l2_group / link_rbw / d2d_bw", "meaning": "L2、HBM、跨 partition、跨 die 通信带宽。"},
          {"name": "simt_width / sfu_width / vector_width", "meaning": "非 GEMM kernel 的 SIMT/SFU/vector 计算能力。"},
        ],
      },
      {
        "id": "parallel_work_map_inputs",
        "title": "Parallelism and work-map inputs",
        "source": "gpu_sys_map, GPU config tuning, and llm_cost_single_op_work_map",
        "description": "把 DP/TP/CP/EP/PP 和 die/partition/GPC/SM 级映射转成 native work map。",
        "parameters": [
          {"name": "attn_dp / attn_tp / attn_cp / attn_ep", "meaning": "attention 侧数据、张量、context 和 expert 并行度。"},
          {"name": "ffn_dp / ffn_tp / ffn_ep / pp", "meaning": "FFN 侧并行度和 pipeline stage 数。"},
          {"name": "a_die / a_par / a_gpc / a_sm", "meaning": "A 张量在 die/partition/GPC/SM 上的分布或复制方式。"},
          {"name": "b_die / b_par / b_gpc / b_sm", "meaning": "B 张量的分布或复制方式，直接影响 B reload 与 NoC traffic。"},
          {"name": "ich_div / och_div / batch_div / h_div", "meaning": "输入通道、输出通道、batch、token/height 维切分。"},
        ],
      },
      {
        "id": "kernel_inputs",
        "title": "Kernel search and NoC inputs",
        "source": "SM GEMM/MHA/softmax/vector native kernels",
        "description": "进入 kernel 搜索后使用的 SM 级 shape、tile、footprint 和当前最优时间。",
        "parameters": [
          {"name": "sm_m / sm_n / sm_k / sm_e", "meaning": "单个 SM 负责的 M/N/K/expert 规模。"},
          {"name": "m_t / n_t / k_t / e_iter", "meaning": "候选 tile 和 expert loop 次数。"},
          {"name": "a_size / b_size / o_size", "meaning": "A/B/O footprint，用于 L2/HBM capacity 和 hit rate。"},
          {"name": "a_raw_size / b_raw_size / o_raw_size", "meaning": "当前 loop order 下真实访问流量。"},
          {"name": "compute_time / min_time", "meaning": "纯计算下界与当前最佳总时间，用于比较和 early break。"},
        ],
      },
      {
        "id": "throughput_sweep_inputs",
        "title": "Throughput vs TPS sweep inputs",
        "source": "scripts/plot_throughput_tps.py CLI and profile sweep data",
        "description": "控制吞吐曲线、TPS/user 曲线、Pareto frontier 和 profile sweep 的搜索空间。",
        "parameters": [
          {"name": "model / hardware / gpu_num / batch", "meaning": "被评估的模型、硬件、GPU 数和 batch 组合。"},
          {"name": "tp-values / cp-values / pp-values", "meaning": "限制策略枚举范围；范围外配置不会进入 cost model。"},
          {"name": "decode_layers / prefill_rows / profile_rows", "meaning": "decode、prefill 和 profile sweep 的输入数据表。"},
          {"name": "pd / af / mtp options", "meaning": "prefill-decode 分离、attention/FFN 分离和 MTP 组合策略。"},
        ],
      },
      {
        "id": "outputs",
        "title": "Native outputs and summary metrics",
        "source": "Owned result updates, timing summary, and throughput web payload",
        "description": "native 侧返回 dataframe cell updates，Python 汇总为 TPOT、TPS/user、total TPS 和页面数据。",
        "parameters": [
          {"name": "op_time / compute_time / noc_time / comm_time", "meaning": "单算子总时间、计算路径、NoC 和通信分量。"},
          {"name": "tpot_ns / tps_per_user / throughput_total_tps", "meaning": "单 token 延迟、单用户 TPS、系统总 token/s。"},
          {"name": "tps_per_gpu / decode_rps / prefill_rps", "meaning": "GPU 归一化吞吐和阶段请求速率。"},
          {"name": "traffic fields / hit rates / hbm_capacity_ok", "meaning": "NoC/HBM 诊断、缓存命中率和容量检查结果。"},
        ],
      },
    ],
    "call_stacks": [
      {
        "id": "full_nn_native",
        "title": "Full NN workbook native path",
        "description": "整网 workbook 路径从 Python dataframe/config 进入 native owned result，再写回每个 cell update。",
        "steps": [
          {"symbol": "llm_perf.core.cost_model.full_nn_process", "role": "Python entry; prepares dataframe/config text.", "node_id": "llm_perf.core.cost_model.full_nn_process"},
          {"symbol": "llm_perf.native.cost_model_fast.full_nn_process", "role": "ctypes wrapper for the native full-network API.", "node_id": "llm_perf.native.cost_model_fast.full_nn_process"},
          {"symbol": "run_full_nn_process_native", "role": "Builds native argument buffers and invokes the C++ bridge.", "node_id": "llm_perf.native.cost_model_fast.run_full_nn_process_native"},
          {"symbol": "_full_nn_process_apply_native_owned_result", "role": "Calls owned-result native API and receives update buffers.", "node_id": "llm_perf.native.cost_model_fast._full_nn_process_apply_native_owned_result"},
          {"symbol": "llm_cost_run_full_nn_process_apply_owned_result_from_schedule_sequence_text", "role": "C++ bridge from schedule/config text to owned result."},
          {"symbol": "build_full_nn_process_config_values_from_entries", "role": "Parses Python-exported config entries into native config values."},
          {"symbol": "llm_cost_run_full_nn_process_apply", "role": "Runs schedule, event processing, record application, and finalize."},
          {"symbol": "llm_cost_run_full_nn_process_records", "role": "Creates records, executes scheduled events, and computes per-op results."},
          {"symbol": "llm_cost_full_nn_process_records_apply_cells", "role": "Converts native results into dataframe cell updates."},
          {"symbol": "llm_cost_full_nn_finalize", "role": "Builds final workbook summary rows and status fields."},
        ],
      },
      {
        "id": "single_op_native",
        "title": "Single-op batch native path",
        "description": "throughput sweep 和 layer parser 生成的算子行会批量进入 native single-op fast path。",
        "steps": [
          {"symbol": "llm_perf.core.cost_model.single_op_process_batch", "role": "Batches rows to reduce Python/ctypes overhead.", "node_id": "llm_perf.core.cost_model.single_op_process_batch"},
          {"symbol": "llm_perf.native.cost_model_fast.run_single_op_full_process_native", "role": "Native ctypes entry for one row.", "node_id": "llm_perf.native.cost_model_fast.run_single_op_full_process_native"},

          {"symbol": "llm_cost_single_op_dispatch_process_apply", "role": "Dispatches GEMM, MHA, softmax, vector, or attention variant kernels."},
          {"symbol": "llm_cost_sm_gemm / llm_cost_sm_mha / llm_cost_sm_softmax", "role": "Searches kernel-local candidates and computes compute/traffic cost."},
          {"symbol": "llm_cost_hw_noc_run", "role": "Models L2/HBM placement, routing, and bandwidth bottlenecks."},
        ],

      {

        "steps": [
          {"symbol": "scripts.plot_throughput_tps.main", "role": "Loads workbook/model/hardware inputs and starts the sweep.", "node_id": "scripts.plot_throughput_tps.main"},
          {"symbol": "load_model_args / load_decode_layers", "role": "Reads model config and decode-layer rows.", "node_id": "scripts.plot_throughput_tps.load_model_args"},
          {"symbol": "generate_supported_sys_maps", "role": "Enumerates legal DP/TP/CP/EP/PP system maps.", "node_id": "scripts.plot_throughput_tps.generate_supported_sys_maps"},
          {"symbol": "filter_sys_maps_by_tp_values", "role": "Optional CLI search-space restriction before cost-model runs.", "node_id": "scripts.plot_throughput_tps.filter_sys_maps_by_tp_values"},
          {"symbol": "run_decode_strategy_worker -> run_decode_strategy", "role": "Evaluates each strategy candidate.", "node_id": "scripts.plot_throughput_tps.run_decode_strategy"},
          {"symbol": "apply_decode_memory_budget", "role": "Pre-filters configs whose estimated memory exceeds HBM.", "node_id": "scripts.plot_throughput_tps.apply_decode_memory_budget"},
          {"symbol": "layer_paser -> native layer_paser", "role": "Expands model/layer config into per-op rows.", "node_id": "llm_perf.native.cost_model_fast.layer_paser"},
          {"symbol": "single_op_process_batch -> run_single_op_full_process_native", "role": "Runs native cost model for every layer row.", "node_id": "llm_perf.core.cost_model.single_op_process_batch"},
          {"symbol": "summarize_decode -> summarize_llm_timing", "role": "Aggregates layer timings into TPOT, TPS/user, and total TPS.", "node_id": "scripts.plot_throughput_tps.summarize_decode"},
          {"symbol": "build_unified_strategy_candidates", "role": "Normalizes monolithic, PD, AF, and MTP rows.", "node_id": "scripts.plot_throughput_tps.build_unified_strategy_candidates"},
          {"symbol": "compute_pareto_frontier / build web payload", "role": "Reduces plotted rows for visualization after evaluation.", "node_id": "scripts.plot_throughput_tps.compute_pareto_frontier"},
        ],
      },
      {
        "id": "profile_sweep_runtime",
        "title": "Profile sweep runtime path",
        "description": "profile sweep 先跑 baseline，再用 seed rows 限制 MTP replay 规模。",
        "steps": [
          {"symbol": "scripts.run_profile_sweep.main", "role": "CLI entry for profile sweeps.", "node_id": "scripts.run_profile_sweep.main"},
          {"symbol": "build_decode_tasks", "role": "Creates baseline decode tasks.", "node_id": "scripts.run_profile_sweep.build_decode_tasks"},
          {"symbol": "_run_tasks", "role": "Runs plot_throughput_tps jobs in parallel.", "node_id": "scripts.run_profile_sweep._run_tasks"},
          {"symbol": "select_mtp_seed_rows", "role": "Keeps only top baseline seeds before replaying MTP.", "node_id": "scripts.run_profile_sweep.select_mtp_seed_rows"},
          {"symbol": "build_mtp_tasks", "role": "Creates MTP task set from selected seeds.", "node_id": "scripts.run_profile_sweep.build_mtp_tasks"},
          {"symbol": "_write_outputs / write_mtp_stage_outputs", "role": "Writes final decode/prefill/MTP data files.", "node_id": "scripts.run_profile_sweep._write_outputs"},
        ],
      },
    ],
    "runtime_optimizations": [
      {
        "symbol": "llm_bounded_gemm_tile_candidates",
        "location": "llm_perf/native/cost_model_fast/noc.cpp",
        "stage": "SM GEMM tile candidate generation",
        "summary": "当 dense 候选超过上限时，只保留 stride、边界、preferred tile、向下对齐值和 powers-of-two 候选。",
        "why_runtime": "避免 M/N/K 三维 tile 形成过大的笛卡尔积，显著减少 NoC 评估次数。",
        "can_miss_optimal": True,
        "optimality_note": "如果真正最优 tile 不在保留集合中，后续 rank 和 NoC 阶段不会再看到它。",
        "mitigation": "需要最优性验证时提高 dense limit，或对关键 shape 运行 full/dense tile sweep 对比。",
      },
      {
        "symbol": "llm_rank_sm_gemm_candidates",
        "location": "llm_perf/native/cost_model_fast/kernel_gemm_vector.cpp",
        "stage": "SM GEMM candidate ranking",
        "summary": "fit_list 先按启发式排序，只保留 top 50 进入完整 loop-order 和 NoC 评估。",
        "why_runtime": "减少每个算子候选的 NoC 模拟和 loop-order 枚举成本。",
        "can_miss_optimal": True,
        "optimality_note": "低排序候选可能由于更好的缓存/路由流量成为全局最优，但被截断后不会被评估。",
        "mitigation": "对敏感 shape 提高 top-k 或关闭截断，比较最优时间和选中 tile 是否变化。",
      },
      {
        "symbol": "apply_decode_memory_budget",
        "location": "scripts/plot_throughput_tps.py",
        "stage": "Throughput strategy pre-filter",
        "summary": "在昂贵的 layer parser 和 native single-op 之前，先用权重、KV cache、MLA 和 expert memory 估计 HBM 是否足够。",
        "why_runtime": "提前跳过明显超容量的策略，避免无意义的全层 cost-model 调用。",
        "can_miss_optimal": True,
        "optimality_note": "如果 memory model 偏保守或某个配置实际可以通过复用/分片落下，候选会在建模前被跳过。",
        "mitigation": "最优性扫参时保留被过滤配置的日志，并抽样运行 no-budget-filter 对照。",
      },
      {
        "symbol": "filter_sys_maps_by_tp_values",
        "location": "scripts/plot_throughput_tps.py / scripts/run_profile_sweep.py",
        "stage": "System-map enumeration",
        "summary": "通过 --tp-values、--cp-values、--pp-values 等参数限制策略枚举范围。",
        "why_runtime": "把搜索集中在用户指定的并行度组合，减少候选任务数。",
        "can_miss_optimal": True,
        "optimality_note": "最优配置如果落在指定范围之外，不会进入 cost model。",
        "mitigation": "做最终结论前运行完整 TP/CP/PP 范围，或用宽范围 sweep 验证边界处没有更优点。",
      },
      {
        "symbol": "select_mtp_seed_rows",
        "location": "scripts/run_profile_sweep.py",
        "stage": "Profile sweep MTP replay",
        "summary": "MTP sweep 只从 baseline decode 结果里选 top seed rows 继续展开。",
        "why_runtime": "避免对所有 baseline 策略逐个 replay MTP stage。",
        "can_miss_optimal": True,
        "optimality_note": "某个 baseline 不靠前的策略可能在 MTP 加成后成为最优，但未被选中就不会 replay。",
        "mitigation": "提高 --mtp-seed-count，或对最终候选附近的硬件/GPU 数运行 all-seed MTP sweep。",
      },
      {
        "symbol": "_best_pd_prefill_rows",
        "location": "scripts/plot_throughput_tps.py",
        "stage": "PD prefill pairing",
        "summary": "PD/AF 组合时每个 batch 只保留吞吐最高的 prefill row 用于 pairing。",
        "why_runtime": "减少 prefill-decode 组合数量和 Pareto 计算规模。",
        "can_miss_optimal": True,
        "optimality_note": "单独 prefill 吞吐最高不一定带来端到端最佳平衡，较慢 prefill 可能搭配 decode 后更优。",
        "mitigation": "保留 top-N prefill rows 或对 PD 关键区域做完整 pairing 对照。",
      },
      {
        "symbol": "llm_cost_sm_gemm early_break",
        "location": "llm_perf/native/cost_model_fast/noc.cpp / kernel_gemm_vector.cpp",
        "stage": "Kernel candidate loop",
        "summary": "当当前 best 已达到 compute_time 下界时停止继续搜索。",
        "why_runtime": "已经达到可证明的计算下界时，继续 NoC 搜索不能得到更低总时间。",
        "can_miss_optimal": False,
        "optimality_note": "在 compute_time 下界定义正确时不跳过更优解；最多跳过等价最优配置的细节。",
        "mitigation": "如需比较等价最优 tile，可关闭 early_break 记录完整候选。",
      },
      {
        "symbol": "single_op_process_batch",
        "location": "llm_perf/core/cost_model.py",
        "stage": "Python/native boundary",
        "summary": "把多行算子批量送入 ctypes/native fast path。",
        "why_runtime": "减少 Python 循环和 ctypes 调用开销。",
        "can_miss_optimal": False,
        "optimality_note": "不改变候选集合、公式或比较逻辑。",
        "mitigation": "无需最优性补偿；只需保持 batch 与逐行结果一致性测试。",
      },
      {
        "symbol": "compute_pareto_frontier",
        "location": "scripts/plot_throughput_tps.py",
        "stage": "Result visualization",
        "summary": "对已经完成评估的结果做 Pareto frontier 后处理。",
        "why_runtime": "减少图表和表格需要展示的点数。",
        "can_miss_optimal": False,
        "optimality_note": "它不参与 cost-model 候选评估，只隐藏被支配的展示点。",
        "mitigation": "需要审计时切换 show-all 或查看 raw rows。",
      },
      {
        "symbol": "direct-index NoC accumulators",
        "location": "llm_perf/native/cost_model_fast/noc.cpp",
        "stage": "NoC traffic accounting",
        "summary": "用直接索引/预分配累加器替代更重的数据结构。",
        "why_runtime": "减少路由和 traffic 汇总过程中的分配、查找和类型转换。",
        "can_miss_optimal": False,
        "optimality_note": "只改变实现方式，不改变路由公式、候选集合或比较规则。",
        "mitigation": "用旧/新路径的 traffic 和 timing 回归测试验证数值一致。",
      },
    ],
  }

nodes.name: write_outputs
nodes.docstring: Write the interactive call graph HTML and JSON data files.
nodes.summary: Write the interactive call graph HTML and JSON data files.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def write_outputs(graph: dict, html_path: Path, data_path: Path) -> None:
    """Write the interactive call graph HTML and JSON data files."""
    data_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    html_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    data_path.write_text(json.dumps(graph, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")
    relative_data = data_path.resolve().relative_to(html_path.parent.resolve()).as_posix()
    html_path.write_text(render_html(relative_data), encoding="utf-8")
