nodes.name: combine_disaggregated_pair
nodes.docstring:
Combine one prefill phase and one decode phase into a unified serving result.
Throughput is the minimum request rate across prefill, PD transfer, decode attention, AF transfer, and decode FFN stages.
nodes.summary: Combine one prefill phase and one decode phase into a unified serving result.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def combine_disaggregated_pair(
    prefill: PhaseResult,
    decode: PhaseResult,
    transfer_config: PdTransferConfig | None = None,
    decode_split_config: DecodeAttnFfnSplitConfig | None = None,
) -> dict:
    """
    Combine one prefill phase and one decode phase into a unified serving result.
    Throughput is the minimum request rate across prefill, PD transfer, decode attention, AF transfer, and decode FFN stages.
    """
    input_seq_len = max(prefill.input_seq_len, decode.input_seq_len, 1)
    output_seq_len = max(prefill.output_seq_len, decode.output_seq_len, 1)
    # Normalize each phase into requests per second, then make the serving
    # pipeline throughput equal to the slowest active stage.
    prefill_rps = prefill.throughput_total_tps / input_seq_len
    decode_rps = decode.throughput_total_tps / output_seq_len
    stage_rps = {"prefill": prefill_rps}

    pd_transfer = {
        "transport": "disabled",
        "bandwidth_GBps": 0.0,
        "latency_s": 0.0,
        "batch": 0,
        "bytes": 0.0,
        "time_s": 0.0,
        "rps": float("inf"),
    }
    if transfer_config is not None and transfer_config.enabled:
        transfer_config = _pd_transfer_config_for_pair(prefill, decode, transfer_config)
        pd_transfer = estimate_pd_transfer(prefill.effective_total_machine_batch, input_seq_len, transfer_config)
        stage_rps["pd_transfer"] = pd_transfer["rps"]

    decode_monolithic_latency_s = output_seq_len / max(decode.tps_per_user, 1e-12)
    decode_attention_latency_s = 0.0
    decode_attention_rps = float("inf")
    decode_ffn_latency_s = 0.0
    decode_ffn_rps = float("inf")
    lpx_ffn = {
        "lpx_ffn_enabled": False,
        "lpx_ffn_device_count": 0,
        "lpx_ffn_compute_tflops": 0.0,
        "lpx_ffn_ddr_bandwidth_GBps": 0.0,
        "lpx_ffn_sram_bytes": 0.0,
        "lpx_ffn_double_buffer_required_bytes": 0.0,
        "lpx_ffn_double_buffer_enabled": False,
        "lpx_ffn_dense_double_buffer_required_bytes": 0.0,
        "lpx_ffn_dense_double_buffer_enabled": False,
        "lpx_ffn_active_routed_experts": 0,
        "lpx_ffn_active_weight_experts": 0,
        "lpx_ffn_compute_tpot_s": 0.0,
        "lpx_ffn_weight_load_tpot_s": 0.0,
        "lpx_ffn_comm_tpot_s": 0.0,
        "lpx_ffn_tpot_s": 0.0,
    }
    decode_split_transfer = {
        "transport": "disabled",
        "bandwidth_GBps": 0.0,
        "latency_s": 0.0,
        "batch": 0,
        "bytes": 0.0,
        "messages": 0,
        "time_s": 0.0,
        "rps": float("inf"),
    }
    decode_split_enabled = decode_split_config is not None and decode_split_config.enabled
    if decode_split_enabled:
        decode_split_config = _decode_split_config_for_phase(decode, decode_split_config)
        attention_tpot_s = _component_sum(decode, DECODE_ATTENTION_COMPONENTS)
        ffn_tpot_s = _component_sum(decode, DECODE_FFN_COMPONENTS)
        if attention_tpot_s <= 0.0 and ffn_tpot_s <= 0.0:
            attention_tpot_s = decode.latency_s
        if decode_split_config.lpx_ffn_enabled:
            lpx_ffn.update(
                {
                    "lpx_ffn_enabled": True,
                    "lpx_ffn_device_count": max(int(decode_split_config.lpx_ffn_device_count), 1),
                    "lpx_ffn_compute_tflops": float(decode_split_config.lpx_ffn_compute_tflops),
                    "lpx_ffn_ddr_bandwidth_GBps": float(decode_split_config.lpx_ffn_ddr_bandwidth_GBps),
                    "lpx_ffn_sram_bytes": float(decode_split_config.lpx_ffn_sram_bytes),
                    "lpx_ffn_compute_tpot_s": _component_sum(
                        decode,
                        ("Dense MLP", "Shared Expert", "Routed expert"),
                    ),
                    "lpx_ffn_comm_tpot_s": _component_sum(
                        decode,
                        ("Dispatch time", "Combine time", "FFN all reduce"),
                    ),
                    "lpx_ffn_tpot_s": ffn_tpot_s,
                }
            )
        decode_attention_latency_s = attention_tpot_s * output_seq_len
        decode_ffn_latency_s = ffn_tpot_s * output_seq_len
        decode_attention_rps = decode.effective_total_machine_batch / max(decode_attention_latency_s, 1e-12)
        decode_ffn_rps = decode.effective_total_machine_batch / max(decode_ffn_latency_s, 1e-12)
        decode_split_transfer = estimate_stage_activation_transfer(
            decode.effective_total_machine_batch,
            output_seq_len,
            decode_split_config,
        )
        stage_rps["decode_attention"] = decode_attention_rps
        stage_rps["decode_ffn"] = decode_ffn_rps
        stage_rps["decode_attn_ffn_transfer"] = decode_split_transfer["rps"]
        # Latency stays serial for one user's decode step even though the
        # disaggregated stages can process different batches concurrently.
        decode_latency_s = decode_attention_latency_s + decode_split_transfer["time_s"] + decode_ffn_latency_s
    else:
        stage_rps["decode"] = decode_rps
        decode_latency_s = decode_monolithic_latency_s

    bottleneck = min(stage_rps, key=stage_rps.get)
    system_rps = stage_rps[bottleneck]

    prefill_latency_s = prefill.latency_s
    e2e_latency_s = prefill_latency_s + pd_transfer["time_s"] + decode_latency_s

    return {
        "prefill_name": prefill.name,
        "decode_name": decode.name,
        "prefill_gpu": prefill.gpu,
        "decode_gpu": decode.gpu,
        "prefill_gpu_num": prefill.gpu_num,
        "decode_gpu_num": decode.gpu_num,
        "total_gpu_num": prefill.gpu_num + decode.gpu_num,
        "prefill_batch_attn_gpu": prefill.effective_batch_attn_gpu,
        "decode_batch_attn_gpu": decode.effective_batch_attn_gpu,
        "prefill_batch_ffn_gpu": prefill.effective_batch_ffn_gpu,
        "decode_batch_ffn_gpu": decode.effective_batch_ffn_gpu,
        "prefill_total_machine_batch": prefill.effective_total_machine_batch,
        "decode_total_machine_batch": decode.effective_total_machine_batch,
        "input_seq_len": input_seq_len,
        "output_seq_len": output_seq_len,
        "prefill_latency_s": prefill_latency_s,
        "decode_monolithic_latency_s": decode_monolithic_latency_s,
        "pd_transfer_transport": pd_transfer["transport"],
        "pd_transfer_bandwidth_GBps": pd_transfer["bandwidth_GBps"],
        "pd_transfer_latency_s": pd_transfer["latency_s"],
        "pd_transfer_batch": pd_transfer["batch"],
        "pd_transfer_bytes": pd_transfer["bytes"],
        "pd_transfer_time_s": pd_transfer["time_s"],
        "pd_transfer_rps": pd_transfer["rps"],
        "decode_split_enabled": decode_split_enabled,
        "decode_attention_gpu": decode.gpu if decode_split_enabled else "",
        "decode_ffn_gpu": (decode_split_config.ffn_gpu or decode.gpu) if decode_split_enabled else "",
        "decode_attention_latency_s": decode_attention_latency_s,
        "decode_attention_rps": decode_attention_rps,
        "decode_ffn_latency_s": decode_ffn_latency_s,
        "decode_ffn_rps": decode_ffn_rps,
        "decode_attn_ffn_transfer_transport": decode_split_transfer["transport"],
        "decode_attn_ffn_transfer_bandwidth_GBps": decode_split_transfer["bandwidth_GBps"],
        "decode_attn_ffn_transfer_latency_s": decode_split_transfer["latency_s"],
        "decode_attn_ffn_transfer_batch": decode_split_transfer["batch"],
        "decode_attn_ffn_transfer_bytes": decode_split_transfer["bytes"],
        "decode_attn_ffn_transfer_messages": decode_split_transfer["messages"],
        "decode_attn_ffn_transfer_time_s": decode_split_transfer["time_s"],
        "decode_attn_ffn_transfer_rps": decode_split_transfer["rps"],
        "decode_latency_s": decode_latency_s,
        "e2e_latency_s": e2e_latency_s,
        "prefill_rps": prefill_rps,
        "decode_rps": decode_rps,
        "system_rps": system_rps,
        "bottleneck_phase": bottleneck,
        "prompt_throughput_tps": system_rps * input_seq_len,
        "generation_throughput_tps": system_rps * output_seq_len,
        "total_throughput_tps": system_rps * (input_seq_len + output_seq_len),
        "e2e_tps_per_user": output_seq_len / e2e_latency_s,
        "prefill_total_throughput_tps": prefill.throughput_total_tps,
        "decode_total_throughput_tps": decode.throughput_total_tps,
        **lpx_ffn,
    }

formulas.explanation: prefill 输入 token 长度 由 decode.input_seq_len, prefill.input_seq_len 等变量组合计算得到。

nodes.name: combine_disaggregated_results
nodes.docstring: Evaluate every prefill/decode result pair and return a combined disaggregated-serving table.
nodes.summary: Evaluate every prefill/decode result pair and return a combined disaggregated-serving table.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def combine_disaggregated_results(
    prefill_df: pd.DataFrame,
    decode_df: pd.DataFrame,
    transfer_config: PdTransferConfig | None = None,
    decode_split_config: DecodeAttnFfnSplitConfig | None = None,
) -> pd.DataFrame:
    """Evaluate every prefill/decode result pair and return a combined disaggregated-serving table."""
    prefill_results = [phase_result_from_row(row, "prefill") for _, row in prefill_df.iterrows()]
    decode_results = [phase_result_from_row(row, "decode") for _, row in decode_df.iterrows()]
    rows = [
        combine_disaggregated_pair(
            prefill,
            decode,
            transfer_config=transfer_config,
            decode_split_config=decode_split_config,
        )
        for prefill in prefill_results
        for decode in decode_results
    ]
    return pd.DataFrame(rows)

nodes.name: estimate_pd_transfer
nodes.docstring:
Estimate prefill-to-decode KV transfer cost.
Formula: bytes = batch * input_tokens * layers * (compress_kv + rope_dim) * kv_heads * kv_cache_bpe.
nodes.summary: 估算 prefill 到 decode 的 KV 迁移字节数、时间和阶段吞吐。
guide_steps: 先根据 batch、input tokens、层数和 KV 维度计算总字节数。
再用链路带宽与固定延迟换算单次传输时间。
最后用 batch / time 得到仅受该传输阶段限制时的请求速率。
nodes.source_excerpt:
def estimate_pd_transfer(batch: int, input_seq_len: int, config: PdTransferConfig) -> dict:
    """
    Estimate prefill-to-decode KV transfer cost.
    Formula: bytes = batch * input_tokens * layers * (compress_kv + rope_dim) * kv_heads * kv_cache_bpe.
    """
    if config.bandwidth_GBps <= 0:
        raise ValueError("pd transfer bandwidth_GBps must be positive")
    if config.latency_ns < 0:
        raise ValueError("pd transfer latency_ns must be non-negative")
    if config.compress_kv < 0 or config.rope_dim < 0 or config.head_kv < 0 or config.n_layers < 0:
        raise ValueError("pd transfer KV shape fields must be non-negative")
    if config.kv_cache_bpe < 0:
        raise ValueError("pd transfer kv_cache_bpe must be non-negative")

    transfer_batch = max(int(batch), 1)
    transfer_input = max(int(input_seq_len), 1)
    kv_elements_per_token = (config.compress_kv + config.rope_dim) * config.head_kv
    # PD split sends the completed KV cache for the prompt to the decode side.
    # Each token carries compressed KV plus ROPE dimensions for each KV head and
    # layer; transport choice is resolved before this function is called.
    transfer_bytes = transfer_batch * transfer_input * config.n_layers * kv_elements_per_token * config.kv_cache_bpe
    transfer_time_s = comm_transfer_time_s(transfer_bytes, config.bandwidth_GBps, config.latency_ns)
    transfer_rps = transfer_batch / max(transfer_time_s, 1e-12)

    return {
        "transport": config.transport,
        "bandwidth_GBps": config.bandwidth_GBps,
        "latency_s": config.latency_ns / 1e9,
        "batch": transfer_batch,
        "bytes": transfer_bytes,
        "time_s": transfer_time_s,
        "rps": transfer_rps,
    }

formulas.explanation: 实际参与传输的 batch，至少取 1 由 batch 等变量组合计算得到。
实际参与传输的输入 token 长度 由 input_seq_len 等变量组合计算得到。
每个 token 的 KV 元素数 = 压缩 KV 维度 + ROPE 维度，再乘 KV head 数。

formulas.statement: transfer_bytes = transfer_batch * transfer_input * config.n_layers * kv_elements_per_token * config.kv_cache_bpe
formulas.explanation: 传输字节数 = batch × input tokens × 层数 × 每 token 的 KV 元素数 × 每元素字节数。
传输时间 = 字节数 / 带宽 + 固定延迟。
传输阶段吞吐 = batch / 单次传输时间。
latency_s 是时间/时延公式，用工作量除以频率或带宽，再结合必要的固定开销换算得到。

nodes.name: estimate_stage_activation_transfer
nodes.docstring:
Estimate decode attention-to-FFN activation transfer cost for split decode serving.
Formula: bytes = batch * output_tokens * layers * hidden_size * activation_bpe * transfers_per_layer.
nodes.summary: 估算 decode attention/FFN 分离时的激活跨阶段传输成本。
guide_steps: 先根据 batch、output tokens、层数、hidden size 算出总激活字节数。
再乘上每层需要的传输次数，得到消息数和总时间。
最后换算成阶段请求速率。
nodes.source_excerpt:
def estimate_stage_activation_transfer(batch: int, output_seq_len: int, config: DecodeAttnFfnSplitConfig) -> dict:
    """
    Estimate decode attention-to-FFN activation transfer cost for split decode serving.
    Formula: bytes = batch * output_tokens * layers * hidden_size * activation_bpe * transfers_per_layer.
    """
    if config.bandwidth_GBps <= 0:
        raise ValueError("decode split transfer bandwidth_GBps must be positive")
    if config.latency_ns < 0:
        raise ValueError("decode split transfer latency_ns must be non-negative")
    if config.hidden_size < 0 or config.n_layers < 0 or config.transfers_per_layer < 0:
        raise ValueError("decode split transfer shape fields must be non-negative")
    if config.activation_bpe < 0:
        raise ValueError("decode split transfer activation_bpe must be non-negative")

    transfer_batch = max(int(batch), 1)
    transfer_output = max(int(output_seq_len), 1)
    # Decode attention/FFN split sends activations once per selected boundary
    # per transformer layer. transfers_per_layer allows modeling one-way or
    # bidirectional variants without changing the layer loop.
    transfer_bytes = (
        transfer_batch
        * transfer_output
        * config.n_layers
        * config.hidden_size
        * config.activation_bpe
        * config.transfers_per_layer
    )
    messages = config.n_layers * config.transfers_per_layer
    transfer_time_s = comm_transfer_time_s(transfer_bytes, config.bandwidth_GBps, config.latency_ns, messages)
    transfer_rps = transfer_batch / max(transfer_time_s, 1e-12)

    return {
        "transport": config.transport,
        "bandwidth_GBps": config.bandwidth_GBps,
        "latency_s": config.latency_ns / 1e9,
        "batch": transfer_batch,
        "bytes": transfer_bytes,
        "messages": messages,
        "time_s": transfer_time_s,
        "rps": transfer_rps,
    }

formulas.explanation: 实际参与传输的 batch，至少取 1 由 batch 等变量组合计算得到。
实际参与传输的输出 token 长度 由 output_seq_len 等变量组合计算得到。

formulas.statement:
transfer_bytes = transfer_batch
        * transfer_output
        * config.n_layers
        * config.hidden_size
        * config.activation_bpe
        * config.transfers_per_layer
formulas.expression:
transfer_batch
        * transfer_output
        * config.n_layers
        * config.hidden_size
        * config.activation_bpe
        * config.transfers_per_layer
formulas.explanation: 激活字节数 = batch × output tokens × 层数 × hidden size × 每元素字节数 × 每层传输次数。
消息数 = 层数 × 每层传输次数。
总传输时间 = 字节传输时间 + 每条消息的固定延迟。
阶段吞吐 = batch / 单次传输时间。
latency_s 是时间/时延公式，用工作量除以频率或带宽，再结合必要的固定开销换算得到。

nodes.name: phase_result_from_row
nodes.docstring: Normalize a workbook/result row into a PhaseResult dataclass.
nodes.summary: Normalize a workbook/result row into a PhaseResult dataclass.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def phase_result_from_row(row, phase: str) -> PhaseResult:
    """Normalize a workbook/result row into a PhaseResult dataclass."""
    default_name = row.name if isinstance(row, pd.Series) else ""
    name = str(_value(row, "Config_Name", _value(row, "name", default_name)))
    input_seq_len = _value(row, "input_seq_len")
    output_seq_len = _value(row, "output_seq_len")
    if input_seq_len is None or output_seq_len is None:
        inferred_input, inferred_output = infer_lengths_from_config_name(name)
        input_seq_len = inferred_input if input_seq_len is None else input_seq_len
        output_seq_len = inferred_output if output_seq_len is None else output_seq_len

    gpu_num = int(_value(row, "Gpu num", _value(row, "gpu_num", 1)))
    tps_per_gpu = float(_value(row, "TPS per gpu", _value(row, "tps_per_gpu", 0.0)))
    throughput_total = _value(row, "throughput_total_tps")
    if throughput_total is None:
        throughput_total = tps_per_gpu * gpu_num

    components = {
        key: _float_value(row, key)
        for key in DECODE_COMPONENTS
        if _value(row, key) is not None
    }

    batch_attn_gpu = int(_value(row, "batch_attn_gpu", _value(row, "Batch", _value(row, "batch", 1))))
    attn_dp = int(_value(row, "attn_dp", 1))
    ffn_dp = int(_value(row, "ffn_dp", 1))
    total_machine_batch = int(
        _value(row, "total_machine_batch", max(batch_attn_gpu, 1) * max(attn_dp, 1))
    )
    batch_ffn_gpu = int(
        _value(row, "batch_ffn_gpu", max(int(math.ceil(total_machine_batch / max(ffn_dp, 1))), 1))
    )

    return PhaseResult(
        phase=phase,
        name=name,
        gpu=str(_value(row, "GPU", _value(row, "hardware", ""))),
        gpu_num=gpu_num,
        batch=batch_attn_gpu,
        tpot_s=float(_value(row, "TPOT", _value(row, "tpot_s", _value(row, "tpot_ms", 0.0) / 1000.0))),
        tps_per_user=float(_value(row, "TPS per user", _value(row, "tps_per_user", 0.0))),
        tps_per_gpu=tps_per_gpu,
        throughput_total_tps=float(throughput_total),
        input_seq_len=int(input_seq_len),
        output_seq_len=int(output_seq_len),
        components=components,
        batch_attn_gpu=batch_attn_gpu,
        batch_ffn_gpu=batch_ffn_gpu,
        total_machine_batch=total_machine_batch,
    )

formulas.explanation: gpu_num 由 _value, row 等变量组合计算得到。
tps_per_gpu 表示吞吐或速率，通常由收益与总时间共同决定。
throughput_total 表示吞吐或速率，通常由收益与总时间共同决定。
batch_attn_gpu 由 _value, row 等变量组合计算得到。
attn_dp 由 _value, row 等变量组合计算得到。
ffn_dp 由 _value, row 等变量组合计算得到。
total_machine_batch 由 _value, attn_dp, batch_attn_gpu, row 等变量组合计算得到。
batch_ffn_gpu 由 _value, ffn_dp, row, total_machine_batch 等变量组合计算得到。

nodes.name: _lpx_breakdown_for_batch
nodes.summary: 这是一个脚本入口或可视化辅助函数，提取到 16 条关键计算公式，并直接关联 2 个仓库内函数。
nodes.source_excerpt:
def _lpx_breakdown_for_batch(
    spec: LpxModelSpec,
    batch: int,
    lpx_devices: int,
    compute_tflops: float,
    ddr_bandwidth_GBps: float,
    sram_bytes: float,
) -> dict[str, float | bool]:
    device_count = max(int(lpx_devices), 1)
    aggregate_flops_s = device_count * max(float(compute_tflops), 0.0) * 1e12
    aggregate_ddr_Bps = device_count * max(float(ddr_bandwidth_GBps), 0.0) * 1e9
    if aggregate_flops_s <= 0.0 or aggregate_ddr_Bps <= 0.0:
        return {}

    batch = max(int(batch), 1)
    sparse_expert_bytes = _swiglu_expert_bytes(spec.hidden_size, spec.sparse_intermediate_size)
    dense_intermediate_size = spec.dense_intermediate_size or spec.sparse_intermediate_size
    dense_expert_bytes = _swiglu_expert_bytes(spec.hidden_size, dense_intermediate_size)
    sparse_expert_flops = _swiglu_expert_flops_per_token(spec.hidden_size, spec.sparse_intermediate_size)
    dense_expert_flops = _swiglu_expert_flops_per_token(spec.hidden_size, dense_intermediate_size)
    active_routed_for_batch = min(spec.routed_experts, batch * spec.active_experts)
    active_weight_experts = active_routed_for_batch + spec.shared_experts
    sparse_experts_per_token = spec.active_experts + spec.shared_experts

    sparse_compute_s = (
        spec.sparse_layers * batch * sparse_experts_per_token * sparse_expert_flops / aggregate_flops_s
    )
    sparse_load_s = spec.sparse_layers * active_weight_experts * sparse_expert_bytes / aggregate_ddr_Bps
    dense_compute_s = spec.dense_layers * batch * dense_expert_flops / aggregate_flops_s
    dense_load_s = spec.dense_layers * dense_expert_bytes / aggregate_ddr_Bps
    sparse_double_buffer_required = 2.0 * sparse_expert_bytes if spec.sparse_layers > 0 else 0.0
    dense_double_buffer_required = 2.0 * dense_expert_bytes if spec.dense_layers > 0 else 0.0
    sparse_double_buffer = sram_bytes >= sparse_double_buffer_required > 0.0
    dense_double_buffer = sram_bytes >= dense_double_buffer_required > 0.0

    def layer_time(compute_s: float, load_s: float, layers: int, can_double_buffer: bool) -> float:
        if layers <= 0:
            return 0.0
        compute_per_layer = compute_s / layers
        load_per_layer = load_s / layers
        if can_double_buffer:
            return layers * max(compute_per_layer, load_per_layer)
        return layers * (load_per_layer + compute_per_layer)

    tpot_s = layer_time(sparse_compute_s, sparse_load_s, spec.sparse_layers, sparse_double_buffer) + layer_time(
        dense_compute_s,
        dense_load_s,
        spec.dense_layers,
        dense_double_buffer,
    )
    return {
        "active_weight_experts": active_weight_experts,
        "compute_tpot_s": sparse_compute_s + dense_compute_s,
        "weight_load_tpot_s": sparse_load_s + dense_load_s,
        "comm_tpot_s": 0.0,
        "tpot_s": tpot_s,
        "double_buffer_enabled": sparse_double_buffer,
        "double_buffer_required_bytes": sparse_double_buffer_required,
        "dense_double_buffer_enabled": dense_double_buffer,
        "dense_double_buffer_required_bytes": dense_double_buffer_required,
    }

formulas.explanation: device_count 表示离散切分后的份额，通常会配合 `ceil`/`max` 保证至少切出一个合法分块。
aggregate_flops_s 主要通过把相关维度相乘得到总规模，通常表示字节数、元素数或 FLOPs。

sparse_experts_per_token 由 spec.active_experts, spec.shared_experts 等变量组合计算得到。

formulas.statement: sparse_compute_s = spec.sparse_layers * batch * sparse_experts_per_token * sparse_expert_flops / aggregate_flops_s

nodes.name: _lpx_breakdown_rows

nodes.source_excerpt:
def _lpx_breakdown_rows() -> pd.DataFrame:
    compute_tflops = _hardware_peak_tflops("groq-lpx3", "fp4")
    ddr_bandwidth = _lpx3_ddr_bandwidth_GBps("groq-lpx3")
    sram_bytes = _lpx3_sram_bytes("groq-lpx3")
    rows = []
    for model_key, spec in LPX_MODEL_SPECS.items():
        for lpx_devices in LPX_DEVICE_COUNTS:
            for batch in LPX_BATCHES:
                breakdown = _lpx_breakdown_for_batch(
                    spec,
                    batch,
                    lpx_devices,
                    compute_tflops,
                    ddr_bandwidth,
                    sram_bytes,
                )
                if not breakdown:
                    continue
                compute_ms = float(breakdown["compute_tpot_s"]) * 1000.0
                load_ms = float(breakdown["weight_load_tpot_s"]) * 1000.0
                comm_ms = float(breakdown["comm_tpot_s"]) * 1000.0
                modeled_ms = float(breakdown["tpot_s"]) * 1000.0
                bottleneck = max(
                    (("compute", compute_ms), ("weight_load", load_ms), ("comm", comm_ms)),
                    key=lambda item: item[1],
                )[0]
                rows.append(
                    {
                        "model": model_key,
                        "batch": batch,
                        "lpx_devices": lpx_devices,
                        "active_weight_experts": int(breakdown["active_weight_experts"]),
                        "compute_ms_per_token": compute_ms,
                        "weight_load_ms_per_token": load_ms,
                        "comm_ms_per_token": comm_ms,
                        "modeled_tpot_ms": modeled_ms,
                        "tps_if_ffn_only": 1000.0 / modeled_ms if modeled_ms > 0 else 0.0,
                        "bottleneck": bottleneck,
                        "load_compute_ratio": load_ms / compute_ms if compute_ms > 0 else math.inf,
                        "ddr_GBps_per_lpx": ddr_bandwidth,
                        "compute_TFLOPS_per_lpx": compute_tflops,
                        "double_buffer": bool(breakdown["double_buffer_enabled"]),
                        "required_sram_MB": float(breakdown["double_buffer_required_bytes"]) / (1024.0 * 1024.0),
                        "sram_MB": sram_bytes / (1024.0 * 1024.0),
                    }
                )
    return pd.DataFrame(rows)

formulas.explanation: compute_ms 由 breakdown 等变量组合计算得到。
load_ms 由 breakdown 等变量组合计算得到。
comm_ms 由 breakdown 等变量组合计算得到。
modeled_ms 由 breakdown 等变量组合计算得到。

def _lpx_table(lpx_df: pd.DataFrame) -> str:
    display = lpx_df[
        (lpx_df["batch"].isin([1, 32, 128, 8192]))
        & (lpx_df["lpx_devices"].isin([1, 9, 72]))
    ].copy()
    rows = []
    for _, row in display.iterrows():
        rows.append(
            [
                html.escape(str(row["model"])),
                str(int(row["batch"])),
                str(int(row["lpx_devices"])),
                str(int(row["active_weight_experts"])),
                _display_float(row["compute_ms_per_token"], 3),
                _display_float(row["weight_load_ms_per_token"], 3),
                _display_float(row["modeled_tpot_ms"], 3),
                _display_float(row["tps_if_ffn_only"], 1),
                html.escape(str(row["bottleneck"])),
                _display_float(row["load_compute_ratio"], 1),
            ]
        )
    return _table(
        [
            "Model",
            "GPU batch",
            "LPX trays",
            "Active weight experts",
            "Compute ms",
            "DDR load ms",
            "Modeled TPOT ms",
            "FFN-only TPS",
            "Bottleneck",
            "Load/compute",
        ],
        rows,
        "dense-table",
    )

nodes.name: _summary_for_model
nodes.summary: 这是一个脚本入口或可视化辅助函数，提取到 0 条关键计算公式，并直接关联 0 个仓库内函数。
nodes.source_excerpt:
def _summary_for_model(label: str, df: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:
    records = []
    for (gpu_alias, gpu_name, op_name), group in df.groupby(["gpu_alias", "gpu_name", "op"], sort=False):
        group = group.sort_values("gpu_batch")
        peak = group.loc[group["useful_gpu_peak_util"].idxmax()]

        def row_for_batch(batch: int) -> pd.Series:
            rows = group[group["gpu_batch"] == batch]
            if rows.empty:
                return group.iloc[-1]
            return rows.iloc[0]

        b512 = row_for_batch(512)
        b8192 = row_for_batch(FULL_BATCH_END)
        ge90 = group[group["useful_gpu_peak_util"] >= 0.90]
        ge95 = group[group["useful_gpu_peak_util"] >= 0.95]
        records.append(
            {
                "model": label,
                "gpu": gpu_alias,
                "gpu_name": gpu_name,
                "op": op_name,
                "max_util_pct": round(float(peak["useful_gpu_peak_util"]) * 100.0, 2),
                "max_util_batch": int(peak["gpu_batch"]),
                "max_bottleneck": str(peak["overall_bottleneck"]),
                "b512_util_pct": round(float(b512["useful_gpu_peak_util"]) * 100.0, 2),
                "b512_bottleneck": str(b512["overall_bottleneck"]),
                "b8192_util_pct": round(float(b8192["useful_gpu_peak_util"]) * 100.0, 2),
                "b8192_bottleneck": str(b8192["overall_bottleneck"]),
                "dominant_bottleneck": str(group["overall_bottleneck"].mode().iloc[0]),
                "first_batch_ge90": int(ge90["gpu_batch"].min()) if not ge90.empty else math.nan,
                "first_batch_ge95": int(ge95["gpu_batch"].min()) if not ge95.empty else math.nan,
                "active_sm_count_at_peak": int(peak["active_sm_count"]),
                "sm_count": int(peak["sm_count"]),
                "min_kernel_N": int(peak["min_kernel_N"]),
                "gpu_peak_tflops": round(float(peak["gpu_peak_tflops"]), 2),
                "achieved_tflops_peak": round(float(peak["achieved_tflops"]), 2),
                "hbm_util_peak_pct": round(float(peak.get("hbm_util", 0.0)) * 100.0, 2),
            }
        )
    return pd.DataFrame(records)

nodes.source_excerpt:
def generate(result_root: Path, web_root: Path) -> dict[str, Path]:
    result_root = Path(result_root)
    web_root = Path(web_root)
    web_data_dir = web_root / "data" / "expert_gemm_single_gpu"
    web_data_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

    copied_outputs: dict[str, dict[str, str]] = {}
    summary_frames = []
    for key, spec in MODEL_SPECS.items():
        outputs = _find_model_outputs(result_root, spec)
        copied_outputs[key] = _copy_output_files(outputs, web_data_dir, result_root)
        full_df = pd.read_csv(outputs["full_csv"])
        summary_frames.append(_summary_for_model(spec.label, full_df))

    summary_df = pd.concat(summary_frames, ignore_index=True)
    summary_csv_result = result_root / "single_expert_all_gpu_1_8192_summary.csv"
    summary_csv_web = web_data_dir / summary_csv_result.name
    summary_df.to_csv(summary_csv_result, index=False)
    summary_df.to_csv(summary_csv_web, index=False)

    lpx_df = _lpx_breakdown_rows()
    lpx_csv_result = result_root / "lpx_decode_ffn_breakdown.csv"
    lpx_csv_web = web_data_dir / lpx_csv_result.name
    lpx_df.to_csv(lpx_csv_result, index=False)
    lpx_df.to_csv(lpx_csv_web, index=False)

    html_path = _write_html(
        web_root=web_root,
        copied_outputs=copied_outputs,
        summary=summary_df,
        lpx_df=lpx_df,
        lpx_csv_rel=str(lpx_csv_web.relative_to(web_root)),
        summary_csv_rel=str(summary_csv_web.relative_to(web_root)),
    )
    return {
        "html": html_path,
        "summary_csv": summary_csv_web,
        "lpx_csv": lpx_csv_web,
    }

formulas.explanation: web_data_dir 由 web_root 等变量组合计算得到。
summary_csv_result 由 result_root 等变量组合计算得到。
summary_csv_web 由 summary_csv_result.name, web_data_dir 等变量组合计算得到。
lpx_csv_result 由 result_root 等变量组合计算得到。
lpx_csv_web 由 lpx_csv_result.name, web_data_dir 等变量组合计算得到。

nodes.source_excerpt:
def main() -> None:
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Generate the web page for single-expert GEMM and LPX decode analysis.")
    parser.add_argument("--result-root", default="result/expert_gemm_single_gpu_models")
    parser.add_argument("--web-root", default="web")
    args = parser.parse_args()
    outputs = generate(Path(args.result_root), Path(args.web_root))
    for name, path in outputs.items():
        print(f"{name}: {path}")

def _plot_ep(rows: pd.DataFrame, path: Path, title: str) -> None:
    if rows is None or rows.empty:
        return
    ep_col = "ffn_ep" if "ffn_ep" in rows.columns else "ffn ep" if "ffn ep" in rows.columns else None
    y_col = "tps_per_gpu" if "tps_per_gpu" in rows.columns else "TPS per gpu" if "TPS per gpu" in rows.columns else None
    if ep_col is None or y_col is None:
        return
    plot_rows = rows.copy()
    plot_rows[ep_col] = pd.to_numeric(plot_rows[ep_col], errors="coerce")
    plot_rows[y_col] = pd.to_numeric(plot_rows[y_col], errors="coerce")
    plot_rows = plot_rows.dropna(subset=[ep_col, y_col])
    if plot_rows.empty:
        return
    grouped = plot_rows.groupby(ep_col, as_index=False)[y_col].max().sort_values(ep_col)
    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(7.2, 4.4))
    ax.plot(grouped[ep_col], grouped[y_col], marker="o", linewidth=1.6)
    ax.set_xlabel("FFN EP num")
    ax.set_ylabel("Throughput per GPU (TPS)")
    ax.set_title(title)
    ax.grid(True, alpha=0.25)
    fig.tight_layout()
    fig.savefig(path, dpi=160)
    plt.close(fig)

nodes.source_excerpt:
def _plot_mtp_stage(rows: pd.DataFrame, path: Path) -> None:
    if rows is None or rows.empty:
        return
    required = {"mtp_stage", "tps_per_user", "throughput_total_tps"}
    if not required.issubset(rows.columns):
        return
    plot_rows = rows.copy()
    for column in required:
        plot_rows[column] = pd.to_numeric(plot_rows[column], errors="coerce")
    plot_rows = plot_rows.dropna(subset=list(required)).sort_values("mtp_stage")
    if plot_rows.empty:
        return
    fig, ax1 = plt.subplots(figsize=(7.2, 4.4))
    ax1.plot(plot_rows["mtp_stage"], plot_rows["tps_per_user"], marker="o", color="#2563eb", label="TPS/user")
    ax1.set_xlabel("MTP stage")
    ax1.set_ylabel("TPS per user", color="#2563eb")
    ax1.tick_params(axis="y", labelcolor="#2563eb")
    ax1.grid(True, alpha=0.25)
    ax2 = ax1.twinx()
    ax2.plot(plot_rows["mtp_stage"], plot_rows["throughput_total_tps"], marker="s", color="#dc2626", label="Total throughput")
    ax2.set_ylabel("Total throughput (TPS)", color="#dc2626")
    ax2.tick_params(axis="y", labelcolor="#dc2626")
    fig.suptitle("MTP stage 0-9 effect")
    fig.tight_layout()
    fig.savefig(path, dpi=160)
    plt.close(fig)

nodes.name: _plot_pareto

nodes.source_excerpt:
def _plot_pareto(rows: pd.DataFrame, path: Path, title: str) -> None:
    if rows is None or rows.empty:
        return
    x_col = "tps_per_user" if "tps_per_user" in rows.columns else "TPS per user"
    y_col = "throughput_total_tps" if "throughput_total_tps" in rows.columns else "_throughput_total_tps"
    plot_rows = rows.copy()
    if y_col == "_throughput_total_tps":
        plot_rows[y_col] = _derive_total_throughput(plot_rows)
    if x_col not in plot_rows.columns:
        return
    plot_rows[x_col] = pd.to_numeric(plot_rows[x_col], errors="coerce")
    plot_rows[y_col] = pd.to_numeric(plot_rows[y_col], errors="coerce")
    plot_rows = plot_rows.dropna(subset=[x_col, y_col])
    if plot_rows.empty:
        return
    try:
        frontier = compute_pareto_frontier(plot_rows.rename(columns={x_col: "tps_per_user", y_col: "throughput_total_tps"}))
    except Exception:
        frontier = plot_rows.iloc[0:0]
    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(7.2, 4.4))
    ax.scatter(plot_rows[x_col], plot_rows[y_col], s=18, alpha=0.45, label="candidates")
    if not frontier.empty:
        ax.plot(frontier["tps_per_user"], frontier["throughput_total_tps"], marker="o", linewidth=1.6, label="pareto")
    ax.set_xlabel("TPS per user")
    ax.set_ylabel("Total throughput (TPS)")
    ax.set_title(title)
    ax.grid(True, alpha=0.25)
    ax.legend(loc="best")
    fig.tight_layout()
    fig.savefig(path, dpi=160)
    plt.close(fig)

nodes.source_excerpt:
def _run_layers_for_config(
    *,
    workbook: Path,
    phase: str,
    hardware: str,
    gpu_num: int,
    row: Mapping | pd.Series,
) -> pd.DataFrame:
    model_args = load_model_args(workbook)
    base_layers = read_llm_layer_table(workbook, phase=phase)
    gpu_config = _gpu_config_from_row(row)
    batch_size = _batch_from_row(row)

    global_config = GlobalConfig()
    global_config.is_decode = phase == "decode"
    global_config.batch_size = batch_size
    global_config.micro_batch_size = batch_size // 2 if global_config.two_micro_batch else batch_size
    mtp_stage = int(_number(_row_get(row, "mtp_stage"), 0))
    mtp_on = bool(_row_get(row, "mtp_on", False)) and mtp_stage > 0
    global_config.MTP_on = mtp_on
    global_config.mtp_enabled = mtp_on
    global_config.mtp_stage = mtp_stage if mtp_on else 0
    global_config.mtp_accept_rate = float(_number(_row_get(row, "mtp_accept_rate"), 0.7))
    global_config.parallel_enabled = False
    global_config.force_max_batch = False

    with redirect_stdout(io.StringIO()):
        hw = hw_inst_from_gpu_info(hardware, gpu_num)
    if phase == "decode":
        if not apply_decode_memory_budget(hw, model_args, gpu_config, batch_size, base_layers):
            return pd.DataFrame()
    elif not apply_memory_budget(hw, model_args, gpu_config, batch_size, False, None):
        return pd.DataFrame()

    llm_data = copy.deepcopy(base_layers)
    logger = QuietLogger() if phase == "decode" else WebTableLogger()
    previous_ep = 1
    batch_items = []

    def data_parser_with_batch(data_parser, batch_value: int):
        values = list(data_parser)
        values[9] = int(batch_value)
        return tuple(values)

    with warnings.catch_warnings():
        warnings.simplefilter("ignore")
        for line in range(len(llm_data)):
            data_parser = layer_paser(line, llm_data, global_config)
            if str(data_parser[6]) == "0":
                continue
            if data_parser[8] == 0 and data_parser[9] == 0:
                continue

            if data_parser[1] == "excel":
                tp = data_parser[2]
                dp = data_parser[3]
                ep = data_parser[4]
                pp = data_parser[5]
                cp = 1
            elif data_parser[1] == "attn":
                dp = gpu_config["attn_dp"]
                tp = gpu_config["attn_tp"]
                cp = gpu_config.get("attn_cp", gpu_config.get("attn_ep", 1))
                ep = 1
                pp = gpu_config["pp"]
                if phase == "decode" and data_parser[6] not in ATTENTION_PER_GPU_BATCH_OPS:
                    data_parser = data_parser_with_batch(data_parser, int(data_parser[9]) * int(gpu_config["attn_dp"]))
            else:
                dp = gpu_config["ffn_dp"]
                tp = gpu_config["ffn_tp"]
                ep = gpu_config["ffn_ep"]
                cp = 1
                pp = gpu_config["pp"]
                if phase == "decode":
                    data_parser = data_parser_with_batch(data_parser, int(data_parser[9]) * int(gpu_config["attn_dp"]))

            is_ep_boundary = ep != previous_ep
            previous_ep = ep
            batch_items.append(
                {
                    "logger": logger,
                    "gpu_sys_map": gpu_config,
                    "ModelArg": model_args,
                    "global_config": global_config,
                    "data_paser": data_parser,
                    "hw": hw,
                    "dp": dp,
                    "tp": tp,
                    "ep": ep,
                    "pp": pp,
                    "nn_info": llm_data,
                    "line": line,
                    "tp_split_k": data_parser[25],
                    "is_ep_boundary": is_ep_boundary,
                    "cp": cp,
                }
            )
        single_op_process_batch(batch_items)
    return llm_data

formulas.statement: global_config.micro_batch_size = batch_size // 2 if global_config.two_micro_batch else batch_size
formulas.explanation: global_config.micro_batch_size 主要通过把相关维度相乘得到总规模，通常表示字节数、元素数或 FLOPs。

nodes.source_excerpt:
def classify_row_bottleneck(row: Mapping | pd.Series) -> str:
    """Return the single dominant hardware or transport domain for one op row."""
    scores = bottleneck_domain_scores(row)
    domain = max(HARDWARE_BOTTLENECK_DOMAINS, key=lambda name: scores.get(name, 0.0))
    return domain if scores.get(domain, 0.0) > 0.0 else "unknown"

formulas.explanation: domain 由 HARDWARE_BOTTLENECK_DOMAINS, name, scores.get 等变量组合计算得到。

nodes.source_excerpt:
def main() -> None:
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Generate profile.md report bundle from full72 sweep artifacts.")
    parser.add_argument("--result-dir", required=True)
    parser.add_argument("--web-data-dir", required=True)
    parser.add_argument("--out-dir", required=True)
    parser.add_argument("--workbook", default=None)
    parser.add_argument("--model-label", required=True)
    parser.add_argument("--hardware", default="Vera-Rubin")
    parser.add_argument("--gpu-num", type=int, default=72)
    parser.add_argument("--input-len", type=int, required=True)
    parser.add_argument("--output-len", type=int, required=True)
    parser.add_argument("--prefix", default=None)
    parser.add_argument("--top-n", type=int, default=5)
    parser.add_argument("--skip-layer-replay", action="store_true")
    args = parser.parse_args()

    hardware = resolve_gpu_name(args.hardware)
    prefix = args.prefix or output_prefix(hardware, args.model_label)
    result_dir = Path(args.result_dir)
    web_data_dir = Path(args.web_data_dir)
    out_dir = Path(args.out_dir)
    decode_rows, prefill_rows, overall_rows = _load_artifact_frames(result_dir, web_data_dir, prefix)

    filtered_decode = _filter_gpu_rows(decode_rows, hardware, args.gpu_num)
    mtp_enabled = _bool_series(filtered_decode["mtp_on"]) if "mtp_on" in filtered_decode.columns else pd.Series(False, index=filtered_decode.index)
    decode_mtp_off = _top_rows(filtered_decode[~mtp_enabled], "tps_per_user", args.top_n)
    decode_mtp_on = _top_rows(filtered_decode[mtp_enabled], "tps_per_user", args.top_n)
    filtered_prefill = _filter_gpu_rows(prefill_rows, hardware, args.gpu_num)
    filtered_prefill["throughput_total_tps"] = _derive_total_throughput(filtered_prefill)
    prefill_top = _top_rows(filtered_prefill, "throughput_total_tps", args.top_n)

    workbook = Path(args.workbook) if args.workbook else None
    bottlenecks = pd.DataFrame()
    if not args.skip_layer_replay:
        bottlenecks = build_selected_bottlenecks(
            workbook=workbook,
            hardware=hardware,
            gpu_num=args.gpu_num,
            decode_mtp_off=decode_mtp_off,
            decode_mtp_on=decode_mtp_on,
            prefill_top=prefill_top,
        )

    write_profile_report(
        out_dir=out_dir,
        model_label=args.model_label,
        hardware=hardware,
        gpu_num=args.gpu_num,
        input_len=args.input_len,
        output_len=args.output_len,
        decode_rows=decode_rows,
        prefill_rows=prefill_rows,
        overall_rows=overall_rows,
        bottleneck_rows=bottlenecks,
        top_n=args.top_n,
    )
    print(out_dir / "profile_report.md")

formulas.explanation: decode_mtp_off 由 _top_rows, args.top_n, filtered_decode, mtp_enabled 等变量组合计算得到。

nodes.name: write_profile_report
nodes.docstring: Write the profile.md requested report bundle.
nodes.summary: Write the profile.md requested report bundle.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def write_profile_report(
    *,
    out_dir: Path,
    model_label: str,
    hardware: str,
    gpu_num: int,
    input_len: int,
    output_len: int,
    decode_rows: pd.DataFrame,
    prefill_rows: pd.DataFrame,
    overall_rows: pd.DataFrame,
    bottleneck_rows: pd.DataFrame,
    top_n: int = 5,
) -> None:
    """Write the profile.md requested report bundle."""
    out_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    decode_rows = _filter_gpu_rows(decode_rows, hardware, gpu_num)
    prefill_rows = _filter_gpu_rows(prefill_rows, hardware, gpu_num)
    overall_rows = _filter_gpu_rows(overall_rows, hardware, gpu_num)

    if "mtp_on" in decode_rows.columns:
        mtp_enabled = _bool_series(decode_rows["mtp_on"])
    else:
        mtp_enabled = pd.Series(False, index=decode_rows.index)
    decode_mtp_off = _component_share_rows(_top_rows(decode_rows[~mtp_enabled], "tps_per_user", top_n))
    decode_mtp_on = _component_share_rows(_top_rows(decode_rows[mtp_enabled], "tps_per_user", top_n))

    prefill_ranked = prefill_rows.copy()
    prefill_ranked["throughput_total_tps"] = _derive_total_throughput(prefill_ranked)
    prefill_top = _component_share_rows(_top_rows(prefill_ranked, "throughput_total_tps", top_n))

    overall_ranked = overall_rows.copy()
    overall_ranked["throughput_total_tps"] = _derive_total_throughput(overall_ranked)
    overall_top = _top_rows(overall_ranked, "throughput_total_tps", max(top_n, 20))
    mtp_stage_effect = _mtp_stage_effect_rows(decode_rows)

    _write_csv(out_dir / "decode_mtp_off_top5.csv", decode_mtp_off)
    _write_csv(out_dir / "decode_mtp_on_top5.csv", decode_mtp_on)
    _write_csv(out_dir / "decode_mtp_stage_0_9_effect.csv", mtp_stage_effect)
    _write_csv(out_dir / "prefill_top5.csv", prefill_top)
    _write_csv(out_dir / "overall_top.csv", overall_top)
    _write_csv(out_dir / "op_bottlenecks.csv", bottleneck_rows)

    _plot_pareto(decode_rows[~mtp_enabled], out_dir / "decode_mtp_off_throughput_vs_tps_pareto.png", "Decode MTP-OFF Pareto")
    _plot_pareto(decode_rows[mtp_enabled], out_dir / "decode_mtp_on_throughput_vs_tps_pareto.png", "Decode MTP-ON Pareto")
    _plot_pareto(prefill_ranked, out_dir / "prefill_throughput_vs_tps_pareto.png", "Prefill Pareto")
    _plot_pareto(overall_ranked, out_dir / "overall_throughput_vs_tps_pareto.png", "Overall Pareto")
    _plot_mtp_stage(mtp_stage_effect, out_dir / "decode_mtp_stage_0_9_effect.png")
    _plot_ep(decode_rows[~mtp_enabled], out_dir / "decode_mtp_off_tps_per_gpu_vs_ep.png", "Decode MTP-OFF EP Sweep")
    _plot_ep(decode_rows[mtp_enabled], out_dir / "decode_mtp_on_tps_per_gpu_vs_ep.png", "Decode MTP-ON EP Sweep")
    _plot_ep(prefill_ranked, out_dir / "prefill_tps_per_gpu_vs_ep.png", "Prefill EP Sweep")
    _plot_ep(overall_ranked, out_dir / "overall_tps_per_gpu_vs_ep.png", "Overall EP Sweep")

    report = [
        f"# {model_label} {hardware} {gpu_num} GPU profile",
        "",
        f"- Input/output: i{input_len}_o{output_len}",
        f"- Bottleneck domains: {', '.join(HARDWARE_BOTTLENECK_DOMAINS)}",
        "- Communication transport buckets: pcie/p2p/nic. p2p is intra-node GPU transport, nic is inter-node transport, and pcie covers explicit PCIe or untyped TP/DP all-reduce timing.",
        "",
        "## Decode",
        "",
        "- MTP-OFF top-5 TPS/user: `decode_mtp_off_top5.csv`",
        "- MTP-ON top-5 TPS/user: `decode_mtp_on_top5.csv`",
        "- MTP stage 0-9 effect: `decode_mtp_stage_0_9_effect.csv`, `decode_mtp_stage_0_9_effect.png`",
        "- Pareto plots: `decode_mtp_off_throughput_vs_tps_pareto.png`, `decode_mtp_on_throughput_vs_tps_pareto.png`",
        "- EP plots: `decode_mtp_off_tps_per_gpu_vs_ep.png`, `decode_mtp_on_tps_per_gpu_vs_ep.png`",
        "",
        "## Prefill",
        "",
        "- Top-5 max throughput rows: `prefill_top5.csv`",
        "- Pareto plot: `prefill_throughput_vs_tps_pareto.png`",
        "- EP plot: `prefill_tps_per_gpu_vs_ep.png`",
        "",
        "## Overall",
        "",
        "- PD/AF candidate rows: `overall_top.csv`",
        "- Pareto plot: `overall_throughput_vs_tps_pareto.png`",
        "- EP plot: `overall_tps_per_gpu_vs_ep.png`",
        "",
        "## Per-Op Bottlenecks",
        "",
        "- Per-op hardware-domain bottlenecks for selected top configs: `op_bottlenecks.csv`",
    ]
    (out_dir / "profile_report.md").write_text("\n".join(report) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")

formulas.explanation: decode_mtp_off 由 _component_share_rows, _top_rows, decode_rows, mtp_enabled, top_n 等变量组合计算得到。
overall_top 由 _top_rows, overall_ranked, top_n 等变量组合计算得到。

nodes.source_excerpt:
def _pareto_command(args: argparse.Namespace, python: str, gpu_name: str, mtp_stage_gpu_num: str, multi_stage_nums: bool) -> CommandStep:
    phase_gpu_nums = args.phase_gpu_nums or args.gpu_nums
    name = f"{gpu_name} decode pareto + MTP"
    if multi_stage_nums:
        name = f"{name} {mtp_stage_gpu_num}"
    argv = [
        python,
        "scripts/plot_throughput_tps.py",
        "--xls-file",
        args.pareto_xls_file,
        "--model-label",
        args.model_label,
        "--gpu-name",
        gpu_name,
        "--gpu-nums",
        phase_gpu_nums,
        "--pareto-gpu-nums",
        args.gpu_nums,
        "--batches",
        args.batches,
        "--tp-values",
        args.tp_values,
        "--cp-values",
        args.cp_values,
        "--pp-values",
        args.pp_values,
        "--input-len",
        str(args.input_len),
        "--output-len",
        str(args.output_len),
        "--precision",
        args.precision,
        "--workers",
        str(args.workers),
        "--web-data-dir",
        args.web_data_dir,
        "--prefill-table",
        f"{args.web_data_dir.rstrip('/')}/final_prefill_all.xlsx",
        "--out-dir",
        args.pareto_out_dir,
        "--mtp-stage-model",
        args.mtp_stage_model,
        "--mtp-stage-gpu-num",
        str(mtp_stage_gpu_num),
        "--mtp-stages",
        args.mtp_stages,
        "--mtp-accept-rate",
        str(args.mtp_accept_rate),
    ]
    if args.pareto_hf_config_json:
        argv.extend(["--hf-config-json", args.pareto_hf_config_json])
    if args.overwrite_pareto_workbook:
        argv.append("--overwrite-workbook")
    return CommandStep(name, argv)

nodes.name: parse_args
nodes.docstring: Parse the unified web-data generation CLI.
nodes.summary: Parse the unified web-data generation CLI.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def parse_args(argv: Sequence[str] | None = None) -> argparse.Namespace:
    """Parse the unified web-data generation CLI."""
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(
        description="Generate static web data tables plus per-GPU decode Pareto and MTP stage data."
    )
    parser.add_argument("--table-xls-file", default=None, help="Compact workbook used for web table generation.")
    parser.add_argument("--pareto-xls-file", default=None, help="Compact workbook used for Pareto generation.")
    parser.add_argument("--web-data-dir", default="web/data")
    parser.add_argument("--pareto-out-dir", default="result/decode_throughput_tps_all_gpu_mtp")
    parser.add_argument("--model-label", default="K2-thinking")
    parser.add_argument("--hardware", default=DEFAULT_HARDWARE, help="Comma-separated GPU aliases or gpu_info names.")
    parser.add_argument(
        "--gpu-nums",
        default=DEFAULT_GPU_NUMS,
        help="Fixed total GPU counts for the unified Pareto frontier.",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--phase-gpu-nums",
        default=None,
        help=(
            "Raw prefill/decode GPU counts to simulate before building fixed-GPU Pareto candidates. "
            "Use this to include the PD capped-prefill split, e.g. --gpu-nums 72 --phase-gpu-nums 1..72."
        ),
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--table-gpu-nums",
        default=None,
        help="GPU counts used only for final prefill/decode table generation. Defaults to --phase-gpu-nums.",
    )
    parser.add_argument("--batches", default=DEFAULT_BATCHES)
    parser.add_argument("--tp-values", default="1,2,4,8")
    parser.add_argument("--cp-values", default="1,2,4,8")
    parser.add_argument("--pp-values", default="1")
    parser.add_argument("--phases", default="prefill,decode")
    parser.add_argument("--map-mode", choices=["same-tp", "cartesian"], default="same-tp")
    parser.add_argument("--workers", type=int, default=8)
    parser.add_argument("--skip-tables", action="store_true", help="Skip final prefill/decode xlsx web tables.")
    parser.add_argument("--skip-pareto", action="store_true", help="Skip decode Pareto and MTP web JSON generation.")
    parser.add_argument("--input-len", type=int, default=1024)
    parser.add_argument("--output-len", type=int, default=8192)
    parser.add_argument("--precision", default="fp4")
    parser.add_argument(
        "--pareto-hf-config-json",
        default=None,
        help="Optional local Hugging Face config.json forwarded to the Pareto sweep to generate --pareto-xls-file.",
    )
    parser.add_argument("--overwrite-pareto-workbook", action="store_true")
    parser.add_argument("--mtp-stage-model", choices=["none", "eagle"], default="eagle")
    parser.add_argument(
        "--mtp-stage-gpu-nums",
        default="72",
        help="Comma-separated GPU counts for MTP stage sweeps, or 'all' to use --gpu-nums.",
    )
    parser.add_argument("--mtp-stages", default="0..9")
    parser.add_argument("--mtp-accept-rate", type=float, default=0.7)
    parser.add_argument(
        "--continue-on-error",
        action="store_true",
        help="Continue later table/Pareto steps when one hardware or sequence has no valid strategies.",
    )
    parser.add_argument("--dry-run", action="store_true", help="Print the underlying commands without running them.")
    args = parser.parse_args(argv)
    if args.skip_tables and args.skip_pareto:
        parser.error("at least one of tables or pareto generation must be enabled")
    if not args.skip_tables and not args.table_xls_file:
        parser.error("--table-xls-file is required unless --skip-tables is set")
    if not args.skip_pareto and not args.pareto_xls_file:
        parser.error("--pareto-xls-file is required unless --skip-pareto is set")
    return args

nodes.source_excerpt:
def _workbook_info(path: Path) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
    match = re.match(r"(?P<model>.+)_i(?P<input>\d+)_o(?P<output>\d+)_(?P<precision>[^.]+)\.xlsx$", path.name)
    if not match:
        return None
    model_sheet = _read_model_sheet(path)
    model_name = str(model_sheet.get("model_name") or match.group("model").replace("_", "/", 1))
    return {
        "modelKey": _safe_model_name(model_name),
        "modelName": model_name,
        "inputLen": int(match.group("input")),
        "outputLen": int(match.group("output")),
        "precision": str(model_sheet.get("precision") or match.group("precision")),
        "batch": int(model_sheet.get("batch") or 0),
        "workbookPath": path,
    }

formulas.explanation: inputLen 由 match.group 等变量组合计算得到。
outputLen 由 match.group 等变量组合计算得到。
请求 batch 大小 由 model_sheet.get 等变量组合计算得到。

nodes.source_excerpt:
def build_manifest(
    *,
    graph_dir: Path | None,
    workbook_dir: Path | None,
    web_data_root: Path,
    web_root: Path,
) -> dict[str, Any]:
    records: dict[tuple[str, int, int, str], dict[str, Any]] = {}
    if workbook_dir and workbook_dir.exists():
        for path in sorted(workbook_dir.glob("*.xlsx")):
            info = _workbook_info(path)
            if not info:
                continue
            key = (info["modelKey"], info["inputLen"], info["outputLen"], info["precision"])
            records.setdefault(key, {}).update(info)
    if graph_dir and graph_dir.exists():
        for path in sorted(graph_dir.glob("*_graph.json")):
            info = _graph_info(path)
            if not info:
                continue
            key = (info["modelKey"], info["inputLen"], info["outputLen"], info["precision"])
            records.setdefault(key, {}).update(info)

    models: dict[str, dict[str, Any]] = {}
    for (model_key, input_len, output_len, precision), info in sorted(records.items()):
        model_name = str(info.get("modelName") or model_key)
        model = models.setdefault(
            model_key,
            {
                "id": model_key,
                "value": _model_label(model_name),
                "label": _model_label(model_name),
                "modelName": model_name,
                "modelType": str(info.get("modelType") or ""),
                "sequences": [],
            },
        )
        sequence = {
            "id": f"i{input_len}_o{output_len}_{precision}",
            "label": _sequence_label(input_len, output_len, precision),
            "inputLen": input_len,
            "outputLen": output_len,
            "precision": precision,
            "batch": int(info.get("batch") or 0),
            "graphPath": _relative_to_web(info.get("graphPath"), web_root),
            "workbookPath": _relative_to_web(info.get("workbookPath"), web_root),
            "tables": _table_paths(web_data_root, model_key, input_len, output_len, web_root),
            "strategyPayloads": _strategy_payloads(
                web_data_root,
                model_key,
                model_name,
                str(info.get("modelType") or ""),
                input_len,
                output_len,
                web_root,
            ),
            "nodeCounts": info.get("nodeCounts", {"prefill": 0, "decode": 0}),
        }
        model["sequences"].append(sequence)

    model_list = sorted(models.values(), key=lambda item: item["label"].lower())
    for model in model_list:
        model["sequences"] = sorted(model["sequences"], key=lambda item: (item["inputLen"], item["outputLen"], item["precision"]))

    return {
        "schema_version": "web-model-inputs-v1",
        "models": model_list,
        "hardware": DEFAULT_HARDWARE,
        "gpuNums": DEFAULT_GPU_NUMS,
        "batches": DEFAULT_BATCHES,
    }

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: 这是一个脚本入口或可视化辅助函数，提取到 0 条关键计算公式，并直接关联 2 个仓库内函数。
nodes.source_excerpt:
def main() -> None:
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Generate web model/sequence inputs from LLM graph and workbook artifacts.")
    parser.add_argument("--graph-dir", default=str(HF_PARSER_GRAPH_DIR))
    parser.add_argument("--workbook-dir", default=str(HF_PARSER_WORKBOOK_DIR))
    parser.add_argument("--web-data-root", default="web/data/full_72gpu")
    parser.add_argument("--web-root", default="web")
    parser.add_argument("--out", default="web/data/model_inputs.json")
    args = parser.parse_args()

    manifest = build_manifest(
        graph_dir=Path(args.graph_dir),
        workbook_dir=Path(args.workbook_dir),
        web_data_root=Path(args.web_data_root),
        web_root=Path(args.web_root),
    )
    output = write_manifest(manifest, Path(args.out))
    print(f"Wrote {output} models={len(manifest['models'])}")

nodes.source_excerpt:
def write_manifest(manifest: dict[str, Any], output: Path) -> Path:
    output.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    output.write_text(json.dumps(manifest, indent=2, sort_keys=True), encoding="utf-8")
    return output

nodes.name: _run_layers
nodes.docstring: Evaluate one phase without writing the full per-layer workbook.
nodes.summary: Evaluate one phase without writing the full per-layer workbook.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def _run_layers(base_layers: pd.DataFrame, model_args, global_config, hw, gpu_config: dict) -> pd.DataFrame:
    """Evaluate one phase without writing the full per-layer workbook."""
    llm_data = copy.deepcopy(base_layers)
    logger = WebTableLogger()
    previous_ep = 1
    batch_items = []
    with warnings.catch_warnings():
        warnings.simplefilter("ignore")
        for line in range(len(llm_data)):
            data_parser = layer_paser(line, llm_data, global_config)
            if str(data_parser[6]) == "0":
                continue
            if data_parser[8] == 0 and data_parser[9] == 0:
                continue

            if data_parser[1] == "excel":
                tp = data_parser[2]
                dp = data_parser[3]
                ep = data_parser[4]
                pp = data_parser[5]
                cp = 1
            elif data_parser[1] == "attn":
                dp = gpu_config["attn_dp"]
                tp = gpu_config["attn_tp"]
                cp = gpu_config.get("attn_cp", 1)
                ep = 1
                pp = gpu_config["pp"]
            else:
                dp = gpu_config["ffn_dp"]
                tp = gpu_config["ffn_tp"]
                ep = gpu_config["ffn_ep"]
                cp = 1
                pp = gpu_config["pp"]

            is_ep_boundary = ep != previous_ep
            previous_ep = ep
            batch_items.append(
                {
                    "logger": logger,
                    "gpu_sys_map": gpu_config,
                    "ModelArg": model_args,
                    "global_config": global_config,
                    "data_paser": data_parser,
                    "hw": hw,
                    "dp": dp,
                    "tp": tp,
                    "ep": ep,
                    "pp": pp,
                    "nn_info": llm_data,
                    "line": line,
                    "tp_split_k": data_parser[25],
                    "is_ep_boundary": is_ep_boundary,
                    "cp": cp,
                }
            )
        single_op_process_batch(batch_items)
    return llm_data

nodes.name: apply_memory_budget
nodes.docstring: Return False when a strategy exceeds the modeled HBM budget.
nodes.summary: Return False when a strategy exceeds the modeled HBM budget.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def apply_memory_budget(
    hw,
    model_args,
    gpu_config: dict,
    batch_size: int,
    is_decode: bool,
    decode_layers: pd.DataFrame | None = None,
) -> bool:
    """Return False when a strategy exceeds the modeled HBM budget."""
    mla = 187.17 * 1024 * 1024 * model_args.weight_bpe
    expert_mem = 44.05 * 1024 * 1024 * model_args.weight_bpe
    redundant_experts = math.ceil(
        (
            math.ceil(model_args.n_routed_experts / gpu_config["ffn_ep"])
            * gpu_config["ffn_ep"]
            - model_args.n_routed_experts
        )
        / gpu_config["ffn_ep"]
    )
    if redundant_experts < 0:
        redundant_experts = 1
    gpu_experts = (
        math.ceil(model_args.n_routed_experts / gpu_config["ffn_ep"])
        + model_args.n_shared_experts
        + redundant_experts
    )
    remaining = (
        hw.hbm_size * 0.9
        - expert_mem * (model_args.n_layers - model_args.n_dense_layers) * gpu_experts
        - mla * model_args.n_layers / gpu_config["attn_tp"]
    )
    if is_decode:
        remaining -= decode_kv_cache_size_bytes(model_args, gpu_config, batch_size, decode_layers)
    hw.hbm_size = remaining
    return remaining >= 0

formulas.explanation: mla 由 model_args.weight_bpe 等变量组合计算得到。
expert_mem 由 model_args.weight_bpe 等变量组合计算得到。

            math.ceil(model_args.n_routed_experts / gpu_config["ffn_ep"])
            * gpu_config["ffn_ep"]
            - model_args.n_routed_experts
        )
        / gpu_config["ffn_ep"]
    )

nodes.name: init_worker
nodes.docstring: Load workbook-backed model and layer tables once per worker process.
nodes.summary: Load workbook-backed model and layer tables once per worker process.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def init_worker(xls_file: str) -> None:
    """Load workbook-backed model and layer tables once per worker process."""
    global _WORKER_MODEL_ARGS, _WORKER_PHASE_LAYERS
    xls_path = Path(resolve_data_file(xls_file))
    with warnings.catch_warnings():
        warnings.simplefilter("ignore")
        _WORKER_MODEL_ARGS = load_model_args(xls_path)
        _WORKER_PHASE_LAYERS = {
            "prefill": read_llm_layer_table(xls_path, phase="prefill"),
            "decode": read_llm_layer_table(xls_path, phase="decode"),
        }
    GlobalConfig.acc_precision = _WORKER_MODEL_ARGS.precision

nodes.name: main
nodes.docstring: Generate the xlsx summary tables consumed by the static web app.
nodes.summary: Generate the xlsx summary tables consumed by the static web app.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def main() -> None:
    """Generate the xlsx summary tables consumed by the static web app."""
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Generate web/data final prefill/decode xlsx tables.")
    parser.add_argument("--xls-file", required=True)
    parser.add_argument("--out-dir", default="web/data")
    parser.add_argument("--model-label", default="K2-thinking")
    parser.add_argument(
        "--hardware",
        default="H20,H800,HGX-H100,HGX-H200,DGX-B200,DGX-B300,GB200-NVL72,GB300-NV72,Vera-Rubin,Rubin-Ultra",
        help="Comma-separated GPU aliases or gpu_info names.",
    )
    parser.add_argument("--gpu-nums", default="36,72,144,288,576")
    parser.add_argument("--batches", default="16,32,64,96,128,256,384,512")
    parser.add_argument("--tp-values", default="1,2,4,8")
    parser.add_argument("--cp-values", default="1,2,4,8")
    parser.add_argument("--pp-values", default="1")
    parser.add_argument("--phases", default="prefill,decode")
    parser.add_argument("--map-mode", choices=["same-tp", "cartesian"], default="same-tp")
    parser.add_argument("--workers", type=int, default=8)
    args = parser.parse_args()

    tasks = build_tasks(args)
    rows = []
    print(f"tasks={len(tasks)} workers={args.workers} map_mode={args.map_mode}")
    if args.workers <= 1:
        init_worker(args.xls_file)
        for task in tasks:
            row = run_table_task(task)
            if row is not None:
                rows.append(row)
    else:
        with concurrent.futures.ProcessPoolExecutor(
            max_workers=args.workers,
            initializer=init_worker,
            initargs=(args.xls_file,),
        ) as executor:
            for row in executor.map(run_table_task, tasks, chunksize=4):
                if row is not None:
                    rows.append(row)

    write_phase_tables(rows, Path(args.out_dir))

nodes.source_excerpt:
def row_from_summary(
    phase: str,
    gpu_name: str,
    gpu_num: int,
    batch_size: int,
    gpu_config: dict,
    model_label: str,
    model_args,
    summary: dict,
) -> dict:
    """Convert model summary fields into the xlsx schema consumed by web/js."""
    dense_layers = summary["dense_layer_num"]
    sparse_layers = summary["sparse_layer_num"]
    verifier_tokens = summary["mtp_verifier_input_tokens"]
    is_decode = phase == "decode"
    row = {
        "Config_Name": config_name(gpu_name, gpu_num, phase, batch_size, model_args, gpu_config),
        "model": model_label,
        "GPU": gpu_name,
        "Gpu num": gpu_num,
        "Batch": batch_size,
        "pp": gpu_config["pp"],
        "attn dp": gpu_config["attn_dp"],
        "attn tp": gpu_config["attn_tp"],
        "attn cp": gpu_config.get("attn_cp", 1),
        "attn ep": gpu_config.get("attn_ep", 1),
        "ffn dp": gpu_config["ffn_dp"],
        "ffn tp": gpu_config["ffn_tp"],
        "ffn ep": gpu_config["ffn_ep"],
        "MLA": summary["sparse_mla"] * (sparse_layers + dense_layers) * verifier_tokens / 1e9,
        "Load KV": summary["kv_load_time"] * (sparse_layers + dense_layers) * verifier_tokens / 1e9,
        "Dense MLP": summary["dense_mlp"] * dense_layers * verifier_tokens / 1e9,
        "Dispatch time": summary["dispatch_time"] * sparse_layers * verifier_tokens / 1e9,
        "Shared Expert": summary["shared_expert"] * sparse_layers * verifier_tokens / 1e9,
        "Routed expert": summary["routed_expert"] * sparse_layers * verifier_tokens / 1e9,
        "Combine time": summary["combine_time"] * sparse_layers * verifier_tokens / 1e9,
        "final linear softmax": summary["final_linear_softmax"] * verifier_tokens / 1e9,
        "Total compute time": summary["total_compute_time"] / 1e9,
        "Total comm time": summary["total_comm_time"] / 1e9,
        "Combine overhead": summary["combine_overhead"],
        "Dispatch overhead": summary["dispatch_overhead"],
        "MLA all reduce": summary["mla_all_reduce_time"] * (sparse_layers + dense_layers) * verifier_tokens / 1e9,
        "MLA cp ring": summary["attention_cp_comm_time"] * (sparse_layers + dense_layers) * verifier_tokens / 1e9,
        "FFN all reduce": summary["ffn_all_reduce_time"] * (sparse_layers + dense_layers) * verifier_tokens / 1e9,
        "TPOT": summary["total_time"] / 1e9,
        "TPS per user": summary["tps_per_user"],
        "TPS per gpu": summary["tps_per_gpu"],
        "docode": is_decode,
        "use fp16 combine": bool(getattr(GlobalConfig, "use_fp16_combine", True)),
        "MTP on": bool(is_decode and summary["mtp_stage"] > 0),
        "pd disaggree": False,
        "force max batch": False,
        "MTP stage": summary["mtp_stage"],
        "MTP expected tokens": summary["mtp_expected_tokens"],
        "MTP time": summary["mtp_time_ns"] / 1e9,
        "MTP accept rate": summary["mtp_accept_rate"],
    }
    return row

nodes.name: run_table_task
nodes.docstring: Worker entrypoint for one web-table row.
nodes.summary: Worker entrypoint for one web-table row.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def run_table_task(task: tuple) -> dict | None:
    """Worker entrypoint for one web-table row."""
    phase, gpu_name, gpu_num, batch_size, gpu_config, model_label = task
    model_args = _WORKER_MODEL_ARGS
    base_layers = _WORKER_PHASE_LAYERS[phase]
    is_decode = phase == "decode"

    global_config = GlobalConfig()
    global_config.is_decode = is_decode
    global_config.batch_size = batch_size
    global_config.micro_batch_size = batch_size // 2 if global_config.two_micro_batch else batch_size
    global_config.MTP_on = False
    global_config.parallel_enabled = False
    global_config.force_max_batch = False

    with redirect_stdout(io.StringIO()):
        hw = hw_inst_from_gpu_info(gpu_name, gpu_num)
    if not apply_memory_budget(hw, model_args, gpu_config, batch_size, is_decode, base_layers if is_decode else None):
        return None

    llm_data = _run_layers(base_layers, model_args, global_config, hw, gpu_config)
    summary = summarize_llm_timing(
        llm_data,
        model_args,
        gpu_config,
        global_config,
        hw,
        batch=batch_size,
        h=int(llm_data.loc[0, "h"]),
        w=int(llm_data.loc[0, "w"]),
    )
    return row_from_summary(phase, gpu_name, gpu_num, batch_size, gpu_config, model_label, model_args, summary)

nodes.name: write_phase_tables
nodes.docstring: Write final web xlsx files.
nodes.summary: Write final web xlsx files.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def write_phase_tables(rows: list[dict], out_dir: Path) -> None:
    """Write final web xlsx files."""
    out_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    for phase in ("prefill", "decode"):
        phase_rows = [row for row in rows if bool(row["docode"]) == (phase == "decode")]
        df = pd.DataFrame(phase_rows)
        if not df.empty:
            df = df.reindex(columns=WEB_TABLE_COLUMNS)
            df = df.sort_values(["GPU", "Gpu num", "Batch", "attn tp", "ffn tp"]).reset_index(drop=True)
        output = out_dir / f"final_{phase}_all.xlsx"
        df.to_excel(output, index=False)
        print(f"{output} rows={len(df)}")

formulas.explanation: output 由 out_dir, phase 等变量组合计算得到。

nodes.source_excerpt:
def _best_rows(df: pd.DataFrame, group_column: str, metric_column: str = "throughput_total_tps") -> pd.DataFrame:
    rows = df.copy()
    rows["throughput_total_tps"] = _numeric(rows, "throughput_total_tps")
    rows["tps_per_user"] = _numeric(rows, "tps_per_user")
    rows[metric_column] = _numeric(rows, metric_column)
    rows[group_column] = _numeric(rows, group_column)
    rows = rows.dropna(subset=[group_column, metric_column])
    best_index = rows.groupby(group_column)[metric_column].idxmax()
    best = rows.loc[best_index].sort_values(group_column).reset_index(drop=True)
    return best

nodes.name: _save_batch_plot

nodes.source_excerpt:
def _save_batch_plot(batch_best: pd.DataFrame, output_dir: Path, prefix: str, title: str) -> Path:
    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10.5, 5.8))
    ax.plot(
        batch_best["batch"],
        batch_best["throughput_total_tps"],
        marker="o",
        linewidth=2.2,
        label="total throughput",
        color="#059669",
    )
    ax.set_xlabel("Decode batch")
    ax.set_ylabel("Best total throughput (tokens/s)")
    ax.set_xscale("log", base=2)
    ax.grid(True, which="both", alpha=0.28)
    ax2 = ax.twinx()
    ax2.plot(
        batch_best["batch"],
        batch_best["tps_per_user"],
        marker="s",
        linewidth=1.8,
        label="TPS/user",
        color="#dc2626",
    )
    ax2.set_ylabel("TPS/user")
    for _, row in batch_best.iterrows():
        ax.annotate(
            _config_label(row),
            (row["batch"], row["throughput_total_tps"]),
            textcoords="offset points",
            xytext=(0, 8),
            ha="center",
            fontsize=8,
        )
    lines, labels = ax.get_legend_handles_labels()
    lines2, labels2 = ax2.get_legend_handles_labels()
    ax.legend(lines + lines2, labels + labels2, loc="best")
    ax.set_title(title)
    fig.tight_layout()
    path = output_dir / f"{prefix}_batch_vs_tps.png"
    fig.savefig(path, dpi=170, bbox_inches="tight")
    plt.close(fig)
    return path

nodes.name: _save_ep_plot

def _save_ep_plot(
    ep_best: pd.DataFrame,
    output_dir: Path,
    prefix: str,
    title: str,
    metric: dict[str, str],
    suffix: str | None = None,
) -> Path:
    metric_column = metric["column"]
    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(9.5, 5.6))
    ax.plot(ep_best["ffn_ep"], ep_best[metric_column], marker="o", linewidth=2.2, color="#2563eb")
    for index, (_, row) in enumerate(ep_best.iterrows()):
        offset_y = 10 if index % 2 == 0 else -18
        ax.annotate(
            _config_label(row),
            (row["ffn_ep"], row[metric_column]),
            textcoords="offset points",
            xytext=(0, offset_y),
            ha="center",
            va="bottom" if offset_y > 0 else "top",
            fontsize=8,
            bbox={"boxstyle": "round,pad=0.15", "fc": "white", "ec": "none", "alpha": 0.75},
        )
    ax.set_xlabel("FFN EP")
    ax.set_ylabel(metric["ylabel"])
    x_values = sorted(int(value) for value in ep_best["ffn_ep"].dropna().unique())
    if x_values:
        ax.set_xscale("log", base=2)
        ax.set_xticks(x_values)
        ax.set_xticklabels([str(value) for value in x_values])
    ax.margins(x=0.08, y=0.12)
    ax.set_title(title)
    ax.grid(True, alpha=0.3)
    fig.tight_layout()
    path = output_dir / f"{prefix}_{suffix or metric['plot_suffix']}.png"
    fig.savefig(path, dpi=170, bbox_inches="tight")
    plt.close(fig)
    return path

formulas.explanation: offset_y 由 index 等变量组合计算得到。

formulas.statement: x_values = sorted(int(value) for value in ep_best["ffn_ep"].dropna().unique())
formulas.explanation: x_values 由 ep_best, value 等变量组合计算得到。
path 由 metric, output_dir, prefix, suffix 等变量组合计算得到。

nodes.name: generate
nodes.summary: 这是一个脚本入口或可视化辅助函数，提取到 6 条关键计算公式，并直接关联 10 个仓库内函数。
nodes.source_excerpt:
def generate(
    input_csv: Path,
    output_dir: Path,
    web_root: Path,
    web_data_dir: Path,
    prefix: str,
    title: str,
    min_batch: int,
    ep_values: list[int] | None = None,
    cp_values: list[str | int] | None = None,
    ep_metric: str = "throughput_per_gpu",
) -> dict[str, Path]:
    output_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    df = pd.read_csv(input_csv)
    if "mtp_on" in df.columns:
        df = df[~df["mtp_on"].fillna(False).astype(bool)].copy()
    if "strategy_type" in df.columns:
        df = df[df["strategy_type"].fillna("monolithic").astype(str).eq("monolithic")].copy()
    for column in ("batch", "ffn_ep", "throughput_total_tps", "tps_per_user", "tps_per_gpu"):
        if column not in df.columns:
            raise ValueError(f"missing required column: {column}")
    df = df[_numeric(df, "batch") >= int(min_batch)].copy()
    if ep_values is not None:
        allowed_ep = {int(value) for value in ep_values}
        df = df[_numeric(df, "ffn_ep").isin(allowed_ep)].copy()
    if df.empty:
        raise ValueError(f"no rows remain after min_batch={min_batch} and ep_values={ep_values} filters")

    metric = _metric_config(ep_metric)
    metric_column = metric["column"]
    ep_best = _best_rows(df, "ffn_ep", metric_column)
    batch_best = _best_rows(df, "batch")
    ep_csv = output_dir / f"{prefix}_ep_best.csv"
    batch_csv = output_dir / f"{prefix}_batch_best.csv"
    ep_best.to_csv(ep_csv, index=False)
    batch_best.to_csv(batch_csv, index=False)
    ep_png = _save_ep_plot(ep_best, output_dir, prefix, f"{title}: FFN EP vs {metric['title_suffix']}", metric)
    batch_png = _save_batch_plot(batch_best, output_dir, prefix, f"{title}: batch vs throughput / TPS-user")
    cp_outputs: dict[str, Path] = {}
    generated_paths = [ep_png, batch_png, ep_csv, batch_csv]
    selected_cp_values = cp_values if cp_values is not None else DEFAULT_CP_VALUES
    for cp_value in selected_cp_values:
        cp_rows = _rows_for_cp(df, cp_value)
        if cp_rows.empty:
            continue
        cp_best = _best_rows(cp_rows, "ffn_ep", metric_column)
        if cp_best.empty:
            continue
        cp_token = _cp_file_token(cp_value)
        cp_csv = output_dir / f"{prefix}_cp{cp_token}_ep_best.csv"
        cp_png = _save_ep_plot(
            cp_best,
            output_dir,
            prefix,
            f"{title}: {_cp_label(cp_value)} FFN EP vs {metric['title_suffix']}",
            metric,
            suffix=f"cp{cp_token}_{metric['plot_suffix']}",
        )
        cp_best.to_csv(cp_csv, index=False)
        generated_paths.extend([cp_png, cp_csv])
        cp_outputs[f"cp{cp_token}_ep_png"] = cp_png
        cp_outputs[f"cp{cp_token}_ep_csv"] = cp_csv

    copied = _copy_to_web(generated_paths, web_data_dir)
    html_path = _write_html(web_root, copied, ep_best, batch_best, title, prefix, selected_cp_values, metric)
    outputs = {
        "ep_png": ep_png,
        "batch_png": batch_png,
        "ep_csv": ep_csv,
        "batch_csv": batch_csv,
        "html": html_path,
    }
    outputs.update(cp_outputs)
    return outputs

formulas.explanation: df 由 bool, df 等变量组合计算得到。
df 由 _numeric, df, min_batch 等变量组合计算得到。
allowed_ep 由 ep_values, value 等变量组合计算得到。
ep_csv 由 output_dir, prefix 等变量组合计算得到。
batch_csv 由 output_dir, prefix 等变量组合计算得到。
cp_csv 由 cp_token, output_dir, prefix 等变量组合计算得到。

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: 这是一个脚本入口或可视化辅助函数，提取到 0 条关键计算公式，并直接关联 3 个仓库内函数。
nodes.source_excerpt:
def main() -> None:
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Plot B200 FFN EP and batch throughput curves from a decode strategy sweep CSV.")
    parser.add_argument("--input-csv", required=True)
    parser.add_argument("--output-dir", default="result/b200_ep_batch_curves")
    parser.add_argument("--web-root", default="web")
    parser.add_argument("--web-data-dir", default="web/data/b200_ep_batch_curves")
    parser.add_argument("--prefix", default="b200_deepseek_v3")
    parser.add_argument("--title", default="B200 DeepSeek-V3 decode")
    parser.add_argument("--min-batch", type=int, default=2)
    parser.add_argument(
        "--ep-values",
        default=",".join(str(value) for value in DEFAULT_EP_VALUES),
        help="Comma-separated FFN EP values for the EP curve, or 'all'. Defaults to 9,18,36,72,144,288,576.",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--cp-values",
        default=",".join(str(value) for value in DEFAULT_CP_VALUES),
        help="Comma-separated attention CP values for separate EP plots. Use 'all' for the best row across all CP values; 0 is accepted as an alias for all.",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--ep-metric",
        choices=sorted(EP_METRICS),
        default="throughput_per_gpu",
        help="Metric used to select and plot EP best rows.",
    )
    args = parser.parse_args()
    outputs = generate(
        input_csv=Path(args.input_csv),
        output_dir=Path(args.output_dir),
        web_root=Path(args.web_root),
        web_data_dir=Path(args.web_data_dir),
        prefix=args.prefix,
        title=args.title,
        min_batch=args.min_batch,
        ep_values=_parse_ep_values(args.ep_values),
        cp_values=_parse_cp_values(args.cp_values),
        ep_metric=args.ep_metric,
    )
    for name, path in outputs.items():
        print(f"{name}: {path}")

def _decode_split_config(scenario: DisaggregationScenario, args) -> DecodeAttnFfnSplitConfig:
    """Prepare decode-stage configuration for the caller."""
    attention_gpu = scenario.gpu_name
    ffn_gpu = resolve_gpu_name(args.decode_af_ffn_gpu)
    if ffn_gpu != "groq-lpx3":
        raise ValueError("Decode A/F split currently supports only lpx3 for the F side")
    attention_bw = _gpu_info_value(attention_gpu, "nic_bw", args.cx9_bandwidth_GBps)
    attention_latency = _gpu_info_value(attention_gpu, "nic_latency", args.cx9_latency_ns)
    ffn_bw = _gpu_info_value(ffn_gpu, "nic_bw", None)
    ffn_latency = _gpu_info_value(ffn_gpu, "nic_latency", None)
    return DecodeAttnFfnSplitConfig(
        enabled=True,
        transport="cx9",
        bandwidth_GBps=min(attention_bw, ffn_bw),
        latency_ns=min(attention_latency, ffn_latency),
        ffn_gpu=ffn_gpu,
        hidden_size=args.hidden_size,
        activation_bpe=args.activation_bpe,
        n_layers=args.layers,
        transfers_per_layer=args.decode_af_transfers_per_layer,
        hardware_bandwidth_GBps={attention_gpu: attention_bw, ffn_gpu: ffn_bw},
        hardware_latency_ns={attention_gpu: attention_latency, ffn_gpu: ffn_latency},
    )
