nodes.name: run_sm_mha_sweep
nodes.docstring: Run the analysis workflow for the requested inputs.
nodes.summary: Run the analysis workflow for the requested inputs.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def run_sm_mha_sweep():

    """Run the analysis workflow for the requested inputs."""
    logger = logging.getLogger("sm_mha_sweep")
    logging.basicConfig(level=logging.INFO)

    # read gpu_info to get available GPU names (columns)
    xlsx = resolve_data_file('gpu_info.xlsx')
    if not os.path.exists(xlsx):
        logger.error("gpu_info.xlsx not found at %s", xlsx)
        return

    df = pd.read_excel(xlsx)
    df.columns = df.columns.str.strip()
    # hw_inst_from_gpu_info expects the sheet where columns are gpu names and 'name' is index
    df.set_index('name', inplace=True)
    #gpu_names = list(df.columns)
    gpu_names = ['H800',	'HGX-H100',	'HGX-H200',	'DGX-B100',	'DGX-B200',	'DGX-B300',	'GB200-NVL72',	'GB300-NV72',	'Vera-Rubin',	'Rubin-Ultra']

    # small-ish grids to keep runtime reasonable; adjust as needed
    q_seq_list = [64, 128, 256, 512]
    kv_seq_list = [64, 128, 256, 512]
    hidden_list = [64, 128, 256, 512]
    precision = GlobalConfig.acc_precision
    result_dir = os.path.join(os.path.dirname(__file__), 'result')
    os.makedirs(result_dir, exist_ok=True)

    # base data_paser template (matches expected unpacking in sm_mha)
    # Fields: nn_name,gpu_config_tuning,tp_excel,dp_excel,ep_excel,pp_excel,layer,ich,och,batch,expert,topk,qhead,kvhead,kh,kw,h,w,stride,group,layer,weight_en,q_bpe,k_bpe,o_bpe,tp_split_k,precision,precision_group
    base_data_paser = [
        "model", "tuning", 1, 1, 1, 1, "layer",
        1024, 1024, 1, 0, 0, 8, 8, 1, 1, 16, 16, 1, 1, "layer", 1,
    2, 2, 2, True, GlobalConfig.acc_precision, None
    ]

    # we'll test single-GPU hw instances (gpu_num=1)
    for gpu_name in gpu_names:
        logger.info("Testing GPU: %s", gpu_name)
        try:
            hw = hw_inst_from_gpu_info(gpu_name, 1)
        except Exception as e:
            logger.exception("Failed to create hw instance for %s: %s", gpu_name, e)
            continue

        # prepare result storage
        records = []

        # iterate grid
        for hidden in hidden_list:
            gpu_hidden = hidden
            # heatmap matrix for compute % (rows q_seq, cols kv_seq)
            heat = np.zeros((len(q_seq_list), len(kv_seq_list)), dtype=float)
            for i_q, q_seq in enumerate(q_seq_list):
                for j_kv, kv_seq in enumerate(kv_seq_list):
                    best_time = float('inf')
                    best_util = 0.0
                    # iterate all gpu_work_map entries and keep minimal op time
                    for work_map in hw.gpu_work_map:
                        wm = copy.deepcopy(work_map)
                        # prepare nn_info DataFrame with index 0 to avoid indexing issues inside sm_mha
                        nn_info = pd.DataFrame({'type': ['MHA']})
                        # add a row index 0
                        nn_info.loc[0] = pd.NA

                        # construct data_paser - we will override kvhead/qhead/hidden-related fields if needed
                        data_paser = list(base_data_paser)
                        data_paser[12] = 8  # qhead
                        data_paser[13] = 8  # kvhead
                        data_paser[16] = 1  # h (placeholder)
                        data_paser[17] = 1  # w (placeholder)
                        # set precision to GlobalConfig acc
                        data_paser[25] = GlobalConfig.acc_precision

                        # call sm_mha: parameters (global_config,sm_q_seq,sm_kv_seq,sm_k_hidden,sm_v_hidden,sm_head,sm_batch,is_mla,line,nn_info,hw,data_paser,dp,pp,ep,tp,min_time,gpu_work_map,logger)
                        try:
                            # choose sm_head and sm_batch small values for a single-SM test
                            sm_head = 8
                            sm_batch = 1
                            is_mla = False
                            line = 0
                            dp = 1
                            pp = 1
                            ep = 1
                            tp = 1
                            min_time = 10**12
                            # sm level tiling for gemm

                            gpu_e = 1
                            gpu_batch = 1
                            gpu_head = 8
                            gpu_kv_seq = kv_seq 
                            gpu_q_seq = q_seq
                            sm_n_div = work_map['batch_div']*work_map['h_div']
                            from math import ceil, floor
                            sm_n_div_reminder = np.ceil(sm_n_div/gpu_e)

                            # sm level tiling for MHA/softmax
                            total_sm = hw.sm_num
                            sm_batch = ceil(gpu_batch/total_sm)
                            sm_div_reminder0 = max(floor(total_sm/gpu_batch),1)
                            sm_head  = ceil(gpu_head/sm_div_reminder0)
                            sm_div_reminder1 = max(floor(sm_div_reminder0/gpu_head),1)
                            
                            if(GlobalConfig.inference):
                                sm_q_seq  = ceil(2*(gpu_q_seq/2)/sm_div_reminder1/getattr(hw, f"hw_gemm_n_{precision}"))*getattr(hw, f"hw_gemm_n_{precision}")
                                sm_div_reminder2 = max(floor(sm_div_reminder1/(gpu_q_seq/2)),1)
                                if(GlobalConfig.kv_split_by_sm):
                                    sm_kv_seq = ceil(gpu_kv_seq/sm_div_reminder2)
                                else:
                                    sm_kv_seq = gpu_kv_seq
                            else:
                                sm_q_seq = ceil(gpu_q_seq/sm_div_reminder1/getattr(hw, f"hw_gemm_n_{precision}"))*getattr(hw, f"hw_gemm_n_{precision}")
                                sm_div_reminder2 = max(floor(sm_div_reminder1/gpu_q_seq),1)
                                if(GlobalConfig.kv_split_by_sm):
                                    sm_kv_seq = ceil(gpu_kv_seq/sm_div_reminder2)
                                else:
                                    sm_kv_seq = gpu_kv_seq
                            
                            if(ModelArgs.MLA):
                                sm_k_hidden = gpu_hidden
                                sm_v_hidden = ModelArgs.v_head_dim
                            else:
                                sm_k_hidden = gpu_hidden
                                sm_v_hidden = gpu_hidden

                            t, better = sm_mha(GlobalConfig, sm_q_seq, sm_kv_seq, sm_k_hidden, sm_v_hidden, sm_head, sm_batch, ModelArg.MLA, line, nn_info, hw, data_paser, dp, pp, ep, tp, min_time, wm, logger)
                        except Exception as e:
                            logger.debug("sm_mha failed for %s q=%d kv=%d hidden=%d map=%s: %s", gpu_name, q_seq, kv_seq, hidden, wm, e)
                            continue

                        # read op time and compute % from nn_info if present
                        try:
                            op_time = float(nn_info.loc[0, 'op time']) if 'op time' in nn_info.columns and pd.notna(nn_info.loc[0, 'op time']) else t
                        except Exception:
                            op_time = t
                        try:
                            util = float(nn_info.loc[0, 'compute %']) if 'compute %' in nn_info.columns and pd.notna(nn_info.loc[0, 'compute %']) else 0.0
                        except Exception:
                            util = 0.0

                        if op_time < best_time:
                            best_time = op_time
                            best_util = util

                    # record best for this point
                    heat[i_q, j_kv] = best_util
                    records.append({'gpu': gpu_name, 'q_seq': q_seq, 'kv_seq': kv_seq, 'hidden': hidden, 'best_time': best_time, 'best_util': best_util})

            # collect hidden-specific heatmaps for a combined plot later
            if 'hidden_heatmaps' not in locals():
                hidden_heatmaps = {}
            hidden_heatmaps[hidden] = heat

        # After filling all hidden sizes, save a combined figure (one picture per GPU)
        try:
            n_hidden = len(hidden_list)
            ncols = 2
            nrows = int(np.ceil(n_hidden / ncols))
            fig, axes = plt.subplots(nrows=nrows, ncols=ncols, figsize=(6 * ncols, 5 * nrows))
            if nrows == 1 and ncols == 1:
                axes = np.array([[axes]])
            elif nrows == 1:
                axes = np.array([axes])
            elif ncols == 1:
                axes = np.array([[ax] for ax in axes])

            for idx, hidden in enumerate(hidden_list):
                row = idx // ncols
                col = idx % ncols
                ax = axes[row][col]
                heat = hidden_heatmaps.get(hidden)
                if heat is None:
                    ax.axis('off')
                    continue
                im = ax.imshow(heat, origin='lower', aspect='auto', cmap='viridis', vmin=0, vmax=1)
                ax.set_xticks(range(len(kv_seq_list)))
                ax.set_yticks(range(len(q_seq_list)))
                ax.set_xticklabels([str(x) for x in kv_seq_list])
                ax.set_yticklabels([str(x) for x in q_seq_list])
                ax.set_xlabel('kv_seq')
                ax.set_ylabel('q_seq')
                ax.set_title(f"hidden={hidden}")
            # hide any unused subplots
            for idx in range(n_hidden, nrows * ncols):
                row = idx // ncols
                col = idx % ncols
                axes[row][col].axis('off')

            fig.suptitle(f"{gpu_name} sm utilization (compute %) across q/kv/hidden")
            fig.tight_layout(rect=[0, 0, 1, 0.95])
            cbar = fig.colorbar(im, ax=axes.ravel().tolist())
            cbar.set_label('compute %')
            png = os.path.join(result_dir, f"sm_mha_compute_heat_{gpu_name}.png")
            fig.savefig(png)
            plt.close(fig)
            logger.info("Saved combined heatmap %s", png)
        except Exception as e:
            logger.exception("Failed to save combined heatmap for %s: %s", gpu_name, e)

        # reset hidden heatmaps for next GPU
        hidden_heatmaps = {}

        # Save CSV of records for this GPU
        try:
            out_df = pd.DataFrame(records)
            csv_path = os.path.join(result_dir, f"sm_mha_qkv_hidden_{gpu_name}.csv")
            out_df.to_csv(csv_path, index=False)
            logger.info("Saved CSV results to %s", csv_path)
        except Exception as e:
            logger.exception("Failed to save CSV for %s: %s", gpu_name, e)

nodes.name: _af_rows
nodes.docstring: Create decode A/F split points for the selected fixed GPU counts.
nodes.summary: Create decode A/F split points for the selected fixed GPU counts.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def _af_rows(base_rows: pd.DataFrame, gpu_name: str, gpu_nums: list[int], model_args: ModelArgs | None) -> pd.DataFrame:
    """Create decode A/F split points for the selected fixed GPU counts."""
    if base_rows.empty:
        return base_rows.iloc[0:0].copy()
    rows = []
    for _, decode_row in base_rows.iterrows():
        gpu_num = int(decode_row["gpu_num"])
        if gpu_num not in gpu_nums:
            continue
        split_config = _af_split_config_for_strategy(
            gpu_name,
            model_args,
            lpx_device_count=_lpx_device_count_for_gpu_nodes(gpu_name, gpu_num),
        )
        split_config = _af_config_for_decode_row(split_config, decode_row)
        decode = _phase_from_strategy_row(decode_row, "decode", gpu_name, gpu_num)
        decode = _phase_with_lpx_cost_model_ffn_components(decode, decode_row)
        prefill = PhaseResult(
            phase="prefill",
            name=f"af-only-prefill-placeholder-{gpu_num}",
            gpu=gpu_name,
            gpu_num=0,
            batch=decode.batch,
            tpot_s=0.0,
            tps_per_user=1e12,
            tps_per_gpu=1e12,
            throughput_total_tps=1e18,
            input_seq_len=decode.input_seq_len,
            output_seq_len=decode.output_seq_len,
            batch_attn_gpu=decode.batch_attn_gpu,
            batch_ffn_gpu=decode.batch_ffn_gpu,
            total_machine_batch=decode.total_machine_batch,
        )
        result = combine_disaggregated_pair(prefill, decode, decode_split_config=split_config)
        rows.append(_row_from_disaggregated_result(result, decode_row, "af", gpu_num))
    return pd.DataFrame(rows)

formulas.explanation: gpu_num 由 decode_row 等变量组合计算得到。

nodes.name: _af_split_config_for_strategy
nodes.docstring: Build an A/F split config. F side is intentionally restricted to Groq LPX3.
nodes.summary: Build an A/F split config. F side is intentionally restricted to Groq LPX3.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def _af_split_config_for_strategy(
    gpu_name: str,
    model_args: ModelArgs | None,
    ffn_gpu: str = "groq-lpx3",
    lpx_device_count: int | None = None,
) -> DecodeAttnFfnSplitConfig:
    """Build an A/F split config. F side is intentionally restricted to Groq LPX3."""
    if ffn_gpu != "groq-lpx3":
        raise ValueError("Decode A/F split currently supports only groq-lpx3 for the F side")
    attention_bw = _gpu_info_value(gpu_name, "nic_bw", None)
    attention_latency = _gpu_info_value(gpu_name, "nic_latency", None)
    ffn_bw = _gpu_info_value(ffn_gpu, "nic_bw", None)
    ffn_latency = _gpu_info_value(ffn_gpu, "nic_latency", None)
    hidden_size = int(getattr(model_args, "dim", getattr(model_args, "hidden", 7168)))
    n_layers = int(getattr(model_args, "layer", getattr(model_args, "n_layers", 61)))
    dense_layers = int(getattr(model_args, "dense_layer", getattr(model_args, "n_dense_layers", 0)))
    sparse_layers = max(n_layers - dense_layers, 0)
    precision = str(getattr(model_args, "precision", "fp4"))
    return DecodeAttnFfnSplitConfig(
        enabled=True,
        transport="cx9",
        bandwidth_GBps=min(attention_bw, ffn_bw),
        latency_ns=min(attention_latency, ffn_latency),
        ffn_gpu=ffn_gpu,
        hidden_size=hidden_size,
        activation_bpe=float(getattr(model_args, "f_bpe", 2.0)),
        n_layers=n_layers,
        transfers_per_layer=2,
        hardware_bandwidth_GBps={gpu_name: attention_bw, ffn_gpu: ffn_bw},
        hardware_latency_ns={gpu_name: attention_latency, ffn_gpu: ffn_latency},
        lpx_ffn_enabled=True,
        lpx_ffn_device_count=max(int(lpx_device_count or 1), 1),
        lpx_ffn_compute_tflops=_lpx3_compute_tflops(ffn_gpu, precision),
        lpx_ffn_ddr_bandwidth_GBps=_lpx3_ddr_bandwidth_GBps(ffn_gpu),
        lpx_ffn_sram_bytes=_lpx3_sram_bytes(ffn_gpu),
        lpx_ffn_hidden_size=hidden_size,
        lpx_ffn_intermediate_size=int(getattr(model_args, "moe_inter_dim", getattr(model_args, "fc_hidden", 0))),
        lpx_ffn_dense_intermediate_size=int(
            getattr(model_args, "dense_fc_hidden", getattr(model_args, "intermediate_size", getattr(model_args, "fc_hidden", 0)))
        ),
        lpx_ffn_active_experts=int(getattr(model_args, "n_activated_experts", getattr(model_args, "topk", 1))),
        lpx_ffn_routed_experts=int(getattr(model_args, "n_routed_experts", getattr(model_args, "expert", 1))),
        lpx_ffn_shared_experts=int(getattr(model_args, "n_shared_experts", 0)),
        lpx_ffn_sparse_layers=sparse_layers,
        lpx_ffn_dense_layers=dense_layers,
        lpx_ffn_weight_bpe=float(getattr(model_args, "weight_bpe", 1.0)),
    )

formulas.explanation: 注意力 K/Q hidden 维度 主要通过把相关维度相乘得到总规模，通常表示字节数、元素数或 FLOPs。
模型层数 由 model_args 等变量组合计算得到。
dense_layers 由 model_args 等变量组合计算得到。
sparse_layers 由 dense_layers, n_layers 等变量组合计算得到。
precision 由 model_args 等变量组合计算得到。

nodes.name: _af_substage_rows
nodes.docstring: Build AF-on substage latency rows, reconstructing missing legacy fields.
nodes.summary: Build AF-on substage latency rows, reconstructing missing legacy fields.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def _af_substage_rows(df: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:
    """Build AF-on substage latency rows, reconstructing missing legacy fields."""
    if df.empty:
        return pd.DataFrame()

    af_mask = pd.Series(False, index=df.index, dtype=bool)
    if "af_enabled" in df.columns:
        af_mask = df.apply(lambda row: _row_bool(row, "af_enabled", False), axis=1)
    if "strategy_type" in df.columns:
        af_mask = af_mask | df["strategy_type"].fillna("").astype(str).str.contains("af", case=False)
    rows = df[af_mask].copy()
    if rows.empty:
        return rows

    rows = _with_output_config_labels(rows, force=True)
    output_tokens = _numeric_column(rows, "output_seq_len", 1.0).clip(lower=1.0)

    attention_fallback = _component_latency_s(rows, AF_ATTENTION_COMPONENTS, output_tokens)
    rows["decode_attention_latency_s"] = _prefer_positive(
        _numeric_column(rows, "decode_attention_latency_s"),
        attention_fallback,
    )
    rows["decode_attention_cp_ring_latency_s"] = _component_latency_s(rows, ("MLA cp ring",), output_tokens)
    rows["decode_attn_ffn_transfer_time_s"] = _numeric_column(rows, "decode_attn_ffn_transfer_time_s")

    rows["lpx_ffn_compute_latency_s"] = _numeric_column(rows, "lpx_ffn_compute_tpot_s") * output_tokens
    rows["lpx_ffn_weight_load_latency_s"] = _numeric_column(rows, "lpx_ffn_weight_load_tpot_s") * output_tokens
    rows["lpx_ffn_comm_latency_s"] = _numeric_column(rows, "lpx_ffn_comm_tpot_s") * output_tokens
    lpx_detail_latency = (
        rows["lpx_ffn_compute_latency_s"]
        + rows["lpx_ffn_weight_load_latency_s"]
        + rows["lpx_ffn_comm_latency_s"]
    )
    lpx_total_latency = _numeric_column(rows, "lpx_ffn_tpot_s") * output_tokens
    ffn_component_latency = _component_latency_s(rows, AF_FFN_COMPONENTS, output_tokens)
    ffn_fallback = _prefer_positive(lpx_total_latency, ffn_component_latency)
    rows["decode_ffn_latency_s"] = _prefer_positive(_numeric_column(rows, "decode_ffn_latency_s"), ffn_fallback)
    rows["decode_ffn_other_latency_s"] = (rows["decode_ffn_latency_s"] - lpx_detail_latency).clip(lower=0.0)

    rows["decode_af_total_latency_s"] = (
        rows["decode_attention_latency_s"]
        + rows["decode_attention_cp_ring_latency_s"]
        + rows["decode_attn_ffn_transfer_time_s"]
        + rows["lpx_ffn_compute_latency_s"]
        + rows["lpx_ffn_weight_load_latency_s"]
        + rows["lpx_ffn_comm_latency_s"]
        + rows["decode_ffn_other_latency_s"]
    )
    return rows

formulas.explanation: af_mask 由 af_mask, df 等变量组合计算得到。
rows["lpx_ffn_compute_latency_s"] 是时间/时延公式，用工作量除以频率或带宽，再结合必要的固定开销换算得到。

nodes.source_excerpt:
def _decode_config_summary(row) -> str:
    decode_gpu = _row_config_text(row, "decode_gpu_num", fallback="gpu_num", default="0")
    decode_batch = _row_config_text(row, "decode_batch_attn_gpu", fallback="batch_attn_gpu", default="0")
    pp = _row_config_text(row, "pp")
    attn = "/".join(
        [
            _row_config_text(row, "attn_dp"),
            _row_config_text(row, "attn_tp"),
            _row_config_text(row, "attn_ep"),
            _row_config_text(row, "attn_cp"),
        ]
    )
    ffn = "/".join(
        [
            _row_config_text(row, "ffn_dp"),
            _row_config_text(row, "ffn_tp"),
            _row_config_text(row, "ffn_ep"),
        ]
    )
    return f"decode g={decode_gpu} attnGPU_b={decode_batch} pp={pp} attn dp/tp/ep/cp={attn} ffn dp/tp/ep={ffn}"

nodes.name: _draw_strategy_mode_pareto
nodes.summary: 这是一个脚本入口或可视化辅助函数，提取到 2 条关键计算公式，并直接关联 7 个仓库内函数。
nodes.source_excerpt:
def _draw_strategy_mode_pareto(
    ax,
    df: pd.DataFrame,
    *,
    mtp_on: bool,
    pd_on: bool,
    af_on: bool,
    title: str,
):
    mtp_mask = _mtp_enabled_series(df) == mtp_on
    pd_mask = _bool_series(df, "pd_enabled", False) == pd_on
    af_mask = _bool_series(df, "af_enabled", False) == af_on
    subset = df[mtp_mask & pd_mask & af_mask].copy()
    y_col = "throughput_total_tps"

    if subset.empty:
        _plot_empty(ax, title)
        return
    marker_size = 40 + pd.to_numeric(subset.get("attn_tp", 1), errors="coerce").fillna(1) * 18
    color_column = "batch_attn_gpu" if "batch_attn_gpu" in subset.columns else "batch"
    scatter = ax.scatter(
        subset["tps_per_user"],
        subset[y_col],
        c=subset[color_column],
        s=marker_size,
        alpha=0.72,
        cmap="viridis",
        edgecolor="black",
        linewidth=0.3,
    )
    for gpu_num, info in compute_pareto_frontiers_by_gpu(subset, y_col=y_col).items():
        frontier = info["frontier"]
        ax.plot(frontier["tps_per_user"], frontier[y_col], marker="o", linewidth=2, label=f"{gpu_num} GPU")
        previous = None
        for order, row in frontier.reset_index(drop=True).iterrows():
            change = pareto_config_change_label(row, previous)
            label = _compact_config_summary(row) if previous is None else f"{_compact_config_summary(row)}\nchange: {change}"
            ax.annotate(
                _truncate_label(label, 110),
                (row["tps_per_user"], row[y_col]),
                xytext=(7, 7 + (order % 3) * 8),
                textcoords="offset points",
                fontsize=6,
                color="#111827",
                alpha=0.82,
            )
            previous = row
    ax.set_xlabel("TPS per user")
    ax.set_ylabel("Total throughput (tokens/s)")
    ax.set_title(title)
    ax.grid(True, alpha=0.3)
    ax.legend(loc="best", fontsize=8)
    return scatter

formulas.explanation: subset 由 af_mask, df, mtp_mask, pd_mask 等变量组合计算得到。
marker_size 主要通过把相关维度相乘得到总规模，通常表示字节数、元素数或 FLOPs。

nodes.name: _hardware_peak_tflops
nodes.docstring: Compute dense GEMM peak TFLOP/s from the hardware tile rows.
nodes.summary: Compute dense GEMM peak TFLOP/s from the hardware tile rows.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def _hardware_peak_tflops(gpu_name: str, precision: str) -> float:
    """Compute dense GEMM peak TFLOP/s from the hardware tile rows."""
    precision_key = str(precision).lower()
    if "fp4" in precision_key or "nvfp4" in precision_key or "mxfp4" in precision_key:
        suffix = "fp4"
    elif "fp8" in precision_key or "mxfp8" in precision_key:
        suffix = "fp8"
    else:
        suffix = "fp16"
    m = _gpu_info_value(gpu_name, f"gemm_m_{suffix}")
    n = _gpu_info_value(gpu_name, f"gemm_n_{suffix}")
    k = _gpu_info_value(gpu_name, f"gemm_k_{suffix}")
    freq = _gpu_info_value(gpu_name, "sm_freq")
    sm = _gpu_info_value(gpu_name, "sm")
    return m * n * k * 2.0 * freq * sm / 1000.0

formulas.explanation: 返回值 由 freq, k, m, n, sm 等变量组合计算得到。

def _lpx3_chips_per_node(ffn_gpu: str = "groq-lpx3") -> int:
    """Return LPX chips per LPX node from gpu_info."""
    trays_per_node = max(int(_gpu_info_value(ffn_gpu, "lpx_trays_per_node", LPX3_TRAYS_PER_NODE)), 1)
    chips_per_tray = max(int(_gpu_info_value(ffn_gpu, "lpx_chips_per_tray", LPX3_CHIPS_PER_TRAY)), 1)
    return trays_per_node * chips_per_tray

formulas.explanation: trays_per_node 由 LPX3_TRAYS_PER_NODE, _gpu_info_value, ffn_gpu 等变量组合计算得到。
chips_per_tray 由 LPX3_CHIPS_PER_TRAY, _gpu_info_value, ffn_gpu 等变量组合计算得到。
返回值 由 chips_per_tray, trays_per_node 等变量组合计算得到。

nodes.name: _lpx3_compute_tflops
nodes.docstring: Return compute throughput per LPX node.
nodes.summary: Return compute throughput per LPX node.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def _lpx3_compute_tflops(ffn_gpu: str, precision: str) -> float:
    """Return compute throughput per LPX node."""
    chip_tflops = _hardware_peak_tflops(ffn_gpu, precision)
    trays_per_node = max(int(_gpu_info_value(ffn_gpu, "lpx_trays_per_node", LPX3_TRAYS_PER_NODE)), 1)
    chips_per_tray = max(int(_gpu_info_value(ffn_gpu, "lpx_chips_per_tray", LPX3_CHIPS_PER_TRAY)), 1)
    return chip_tflops * trays_per_node * chips_per_tray

formulas.explanation: trays_per_node 由 LPX3_TRAYS_PER_NODE, _gpu_info_value, ffn_gpu 等变量组合计算得到。
chips_per_tray 由 LPX3_CHIPS_PER_TRAY, _gpu_info_value, ffn_gpu 等变量组合计算得到。
返回值 由 chip_tflops, chips_per_tray, trays_per_node 等变量组合计算得到。

nodes.name: _lpx_ffn_cost_model_components
nodes.docstring: Run the native cost model for LPX FFN rows only and return per-token component timings.
nodes.summary: Run the native cost model for LPX FFN rows only and return per-token component timings.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def _lpx_ffn_cost_model_components(
    base_decode: pd.DataFrame,
    model_args: ModelArgs | None,
    source_gpu_config: dict,
    gpu_name: str,
    gpu_num: int,
    batch_size: int,
    mtp_on: bool,
    mtp_stage: int,
    mtp_accept_rate: float,
    ffn_gpu: str = "groq-lpx3",
) -> dict:
    """Run the native cost model for LPX FFN rows only and return per-token component timings."""
    llm_data = _ffn_cost_model_rows(base_decode)
    if llm_data.empty:
        return {}

    lpx_node_count = _lpx_device_count_for_gpu_nodes(gpu_name, gpu_num)
    chips_per_node = _lpx3_chips_per_node(ffn_gpu)
    lpx_chip_count = max(int(lpx_node_count) * int(chips_per_node), 1)
    lpx_gpu_config = _lpx_ffn_cost_model_sys_map(
        model_args,
        source_gpu_config,
        lpx_node_count,
        chips_per_node,
    )

    global_config = GlobalConfig()
    global_config.is_decode = True
    global_config.batch_size = batch_size
    global_config.micro_batch_size = batch_size // 2 if global_config.two_micro_batch else batch_size
    resolved_mtp_stage = int(mtp_stage) if mtp_on else 0
    global_config.MTP_on = bool(mtp_on and resolved_mtp_stage > 0)
    global_config.mtp_enabled = global_config.MTP_on
    global_config.mtp_stage = resolved_mtp_stage
    global_config.mtp_accept_rate = float(mtp_accept_rate)
    global_config.parallel_enabled = False

    with redirect_stdout(io.StringIO()):
        hw = hw_inst_from_gpu_info(ffn_gpu, lpx_chip_count)

    logger = QuietLogger()
    previous_ep = 1
    batch_items = []
    source_attn_dp = int(source_gpu_config.get("attn_dp", 1))

    with warnings.catch_warnings():
        warnings.simplefilter("ignore")
        for line in range(len(llm_data)):
            data_parser = layer_paser(line, llm_data, global_config)
            if str(data_parser[6]) == "0":
                continue
            if data_parser[8] == 0 and data_parser[9] == 0:
                continue
            if data_parser[1] == "attn":
                continue

            if data_parser[1] == "excel":
                tp = data_parser[2]
                dp = data_parser[3]
                ep = data_parser[4]
                pp = data_parser[5]
                cp = 1
            else:
                dp = lpx_gpu_config["ffn_dp"]
                tp = lpx_gpu_config["ffn_tp"]
                ep = lpx_gpu_config["ffn_ep"]
                pp = lpx_gpu_config["pp"]
                cp = 1
                data_parser = _data_parser_with_batch(data_parser, int(data_parser[9]) * source_attn_dp)

            is_ep_boundary = ep != previous_ep
            previous_ep = ep
            batch_items.append(
                {
                    "logger": logger,
                    "gpu_sys_map": lpx_gpu_config,
                    "ModelArg": model_args,
                    "global_config": global_config,
                    "data_paser": data_parser,
                    "hw": hw,
                    "dp": dp,
                    "tp": tp,
                    "ep": ep,
                    "pp": pp,
                    "nn_info": llm_data,
                    "line": line,
                    "tp_split_k": data_parser[25],
                    "is_ep_boundary": is_ep_boundary,
                    "cp": cp,
                }
            )

        if not batch_items:
            return {}
        single_op_process_batch(batch_items)

    summary = summarize_decode(llm_data, model_args, lpx_gpu_config, global_config, lpx_chip_count)
    result = {
        "lpx_ffn_cost_model_enabled": True,
        "lpx_ffn_node_count": int(lpx_node_count),
        "lpx_ffn_chip_count": int(lpx_chip_count),
        "lpx_ffn_dp": int(lpx_gpu_config["ffn_dp"]),
        "lpx_ffn_tp": int(lpx_gpu_config["ffn_tp"]),
        "lpx_ffn_ep": int(lpx_gpu_config["ffn_ep"]),
    }
    for component, column in LPX_COST_MODEL_FFN_COMPONENT_COLUMNS.items():
        result[column] = float(summary.get(component, 0.0) or 0.0)
    return result

formulas.explanation: lpx_chip_count 表示离散切分后的份额，通常会配合 `ceil`/`max` 保证至少切出一个合法分块。

nodes.name: _lpx_ffn_cost_model_sys_map
nodes.docstring: Map one GPU node's attention batch to one LPX node's FFN domain.
nodes.summary: Map one GPU node's attention batch to one LPX node's FFN domain.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def _lpx_ffn_cost_model_sys_map(
    model_args: ModelArgs | None,
    source_gpu_config: dict,
    lpx_node_count: int,
    chips_per_node: int,
) -> dict:
    """Map one GPU node's attention batch to one LPX node's FFN domain."""
    routed_experts = int(getattr(model_args, "n_routed_experts", getattr(model_args, "expert", chips_per_node)))
    ffn_ep = min(max(routed_experts, 1), max(int(chips_per_node), 1))
    ffn_tp = max(int(chips_per_node) // max(ffn_ep, 1), 1)
    return {
        "pp": 1,
        "attn_dp": int(source_gpu_config.get("attn_dp", 1)),
        "attn_tp": 1,
        "attn_cp": 1,
        "attn_ep": 1,
        "ffn_dp": max(int(lpx_node_count), 1),
        "ffn_tp": ffn_tp,
        "ffn_ep": ffn_ep,
    }

formulas.explanation: routed_experts 由 chips_per_node, model_args 等变量组合计算得到。
ffn_ep 由 chips_per_node, routed_experts 等变量组合计算得到。
ffn_tp 由 chips_per_node, ffn_ep 等变量组合计算得到。
attn_dp 由 source_gpu_config.get 等变量组合计算得到。
ffn_dp 由 lpx_node_count 等变量组合计算得到。

nodes.summary: Expand legacy batch rows before rendering labels, without inventing batch for unrelated rows.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def _normalize_config_row_for_labels(row):
    """Expand legacy batch rows before rendering labels, without inventing batch for unrelated rows."""
    if row is None:
        return None
    keys = set(row.index if hasattr(row, "index") else row.keys())
    batch_keys = {
        "batch",
        "Batch",
        "batch_attn_gpu",
        "batch_ffn_gpu",
        "total_machine_batch",
        "decode_batch",
        "decode_batch_attn_gpu",
    }
    if not keys.intersection(batch_keys):
        return row
    return _with_explicit_batch_columns(pd.DataFrame([dict(row)])).iloc[0]

nodes.name: _pd_transfer_config_for_strategy
nodes.docstring: Build the PD transfer model for one fixed-GPU strategy group.
nodes.summary: Build the PD transfer model for one fixed-GPU strategy group.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def _pd_transfer_config_for_strategy(gpu_name: str, model_args: ModelArgs | None, total_gpu_num: int) -> PdTransferConfig:
    """Build the PD transfer model for one fixed-GPU strategy group."""
    gpu_per_node = int(_gpu_info_value(gpu_name, "gpu_per_node", None))
    inter_bw_per_gpu = _gpu_info_value(gpu_name, "nic_bw", None)
    inter_bw = _pd_inter_node_aggregate_bandwidth_GBps(total_gpu_num, gpu_per_node, inter_bw_per_gpu)
    inter_latency = _gpu_info_value(gpu_name, "nic_latency", None)
    intra_bw = _gpu_info_value(gpu_name, "p2p_bw", None)
    intra_latency = _gpu_info_value(gpu_name, "p2p_latency", None)
    placement = "same_node" if int(total_gpu_num) <= gpu_per_node else "inter_node"
    return PdTransferConfig(
        placement=placement,
        inter_node_transport="cx9",
        intra_node_transport="nvlink",
        bandwidth_GBps=inter_bw,
        latency_ns=inter_latency,
        intra_node_bandwidth_GBps=intra_bw,
        intra_node_latency_ns=intra_latency,
        compress_kv=int(getattr(model_args, "compress_kv", 512)),
        rope_dim=int(getattr(model_args, "rope_dim", 64)),
        head_kv=int(getattr(model_args, "head_kv", 1)),
        n_layers=int(getattr(model_args, "layer", getattr(model_args, "n_layers", 61))),
        kv_cache_bpe=float(getattr(model_args, "kv_cache_bpe", 1.0)),
        hardware_gpu_per_node={gpu_name: gpu_per_node},
        hardware_bandwidth_GBps={gpu_name: inter_bw},
        hardware_latency_ns={gpu_name: inter_latency},
        hardware_intra_node_bandwidth_GBps={gpu_name: intra_bw},
        hardware_intra_node_latency_ns={gpu_name: intra_latency},
    )

formulas.explanation: gpu_per_node 由 _gpu_info_value, gpu_name 等变量组合计算得到。
placement 由 gpu_per_node, total_gpu_num 等变量组合计算得到。

nodes.name: _plot_af_on_substage_breakdown
nodes.docstring: Plot AF-on decode attention/transfer/FFN substages for Pareto configs.
nodes.summary: Plot AF-on decode attention/transfer/FFN substages for Pareto configs.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def _plot_af_on_substage_breakdown(df: pd.DataFrame, out_dir: Path, prefix: str, title: str) -> None:
    """Plot AF-on decode attention/transfer/FFN substages for Pareto configs."""
    rows = _af_substage_rows(df)
    rows.to_csv(out_dir / f"{prefix}_af_on_substage_breakdown.csv", index=False)

    selected = _stage_cost_pareto_rows(rows) if not rows.empty else rows
    row_count = max(1, len(selected))
    fig_height = max(8, min(24, 3.0 + row_count * 0.48))
    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(13, fig_height))
    if selected.empty:
        _plot_empty(ax, title)
    else:
        labels = [_compact_config_summary(row) for _, row in selected.iterrows()]
        y = np.arange(len(selected))
        left = np.zeros(len(selected))
        for column, label in AF_SUBSTAGE_PLOT_COLUMNS:
            values = _numeric_column(selected, column).to_numpy(dtype=float)
            if not np.any(values):
                continue
            ax.barh(y, values, left=left, label=label)
            left += values
        ax.set_yticks(y)
        ax.set_yticklabels(labels, fontsize=7)
        ax.invert_yaxis()
        ax.set_xlabel("AF-on substage latency per output sequence (s)")
        ax.set_title(title)
        ax.grid(True, axis="x", alpha=0.3)
        ax.legend(loc="lower right", fontsize=7)
    fig.tight_layout()
    fig.savefig(out_dir / f"{prefix}_af_on_substage_breakdown.png", dpi=160)
    plt.close(fig)

formulas.statement: selected = _stage_cost_pareto_rows(rows) if not rows.empty else rows
formulas.explanation: selected 由 _stage_cost_pareto_rows, rows, rows.empty 等变量组合计算得到。
row_count 表示离散切分后的份额，通常会配合 `ceil`/`max` 保证至少切出一个合法分块。
fig_height 由 row_count 等变量组合计算得到。

nodes.name: _plot_max_throughput_per_gpu_scaling
nodes.docstring: Plot max throughput per GPU across fixed total GPU counts.
nodes.summary: Plot max throughput per GPU across fixed total GPU counts.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def _plot_max_throughput_per_gpu_scaling(df: pd.DataFrame, out_dir: Path, prefix: str, title: str) -> None:
    """Plot max throughput per GPU across fixed total GPU counts."""
    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 6))
    if df.empty:
        _plot_empty(ax, title)
    else:
        rows = df.copy()
        rows["gpu_num"] = pd.to_numeric(rows["gpu_num"], errors="coerce")
        rows["tps_per_gpu"] = pd.to_numeric(rows["tps_per_gpu"], errors="coerce")
        rows = rows.dropna(subset=["gpu_num", "tps_per_gpu"])
        rows = _with_output_config_labels(rows)
        best = (
            rows.sort_values("tps_per_gpu", ascending=False)
            .groupby("gpu_num", as_index=False)
            .head(1)
            .sort_values("gpu_num")
        )
        ax.plot(best["gpu_num"], best["tps_per_gpu"], marker="o", linewidth=2, label="max throughput/GPU")
        for _, row in best.iterrows():
            label = _truncate_label(_compact_config_summary(row), 82)
            if label:
                ax.annotate(
                    label,
                    (row["gpu_num"], row["tps_per_gpu"]),
                    xytext=(6, 6),
                    textcoords="offset points",
                    fontsize=8,
                )
        ax.set_xlabel("Total GPUs")
        ax.set_ylabel("Max throughput per GPU (tokens/s/GPU)")
        ax.set_title(title)
        ax.grid(True, alpha=0.3)
        ax.legend(loc="best", fontsize=8)
    fig.tight_layout()
    fig.savefig(out_dir / f"{prefix}_max_throughput_per_gpu_vs_gpu_num.png", dpi=160)
    plt.close(fig)

nodes.name: _plot_same_gpu_mode_lines
nodes.docstring: Plot fixed-GPU throughput-vs-TPS curves with MTP/PD/AF modes as lines.
nodes.summary: Plot fixed-GPU throughput-vs-TPS curves with MTP/PD/AF modes as lines.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def _plot_same_gpu_mode_lines(df: pd.DataFrame, out_dir: Path, prefix: str, gpu_name: str, model_label: str) -> None:
    """Plot fixed-GPU throughput-vs-TPS curves with MTP/PD/AF modes as lines."""
    mode_specs = [
        (False, False, False, "MTP off, PD off, AF off"),
        (True, False, False, "MTP on, PD off, AF off"),
        (True, True, False, "MTP on, PD on, AF off"),
        (True, True, True, "MTP on, PD on, AF on"),
    ]
    y_col = "throughput_total_tps"
    rows = df.copy()
    for column in ("gpu_num", "tps_per_user", y_col):
        if column not in rows.columns:
            fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 6))
            _plot_empty(ax, f"{model_label} decode on {gpu_label(gpu_name)}: fixed-GPU mode curves")
            fig.tight_layout()
            fig.savefig(out_dir / f"{prefix}_same_gpu_throughput_vs_tps_modes.png", dpi=160)
            plt.close(fig)
            return
        rows[column] = pd.to_numeric(rows[column], errors="coerce")
    rows = rows.dropna(subset=["gpu_num", "tps_per_user", y_col])
    rows = _with_output_config_labels(rows)

    gpu_nums = sorted(rows["gpu_num"].dropna().unique())
    if not gpu_nums:
        fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 6))
        _plot_empty(ax, f"{model_label} decode on {gpu_label(gpu_name)}: fixed-GPU mode curves")
        fig.tight_layout()
        fig.savefig(out_dir / f"{prefix}_same_gpu_throughput_vs_tps_modes.png", dpi=160)
        plt.close(fig)
        return

    ncols = 2 if len(gpu_nums) > 1 else 1
    nrows = int(np.ceil(len(gpu_nums) / ncols))
    fig, axes = plt.subplots(nrows, ncols, figsize=(9 * ncols, 5.6 * nrows), squeeze=False)
    fig.suptitle(f"{model_label} decode on {gpu_label(gpu_name)}: same-GPU mode curves", fontsize=15)

    for ax, gpu_num in zip(axes.ravel(), gpu_nums):
        gpu_rows = rows[rows["gpu_num"] == gpu_num]
        plotted = False
        for mtp_on, pd_on, af_on, label in mode_specs:
            subset = gpu_rows[
                (_mtp_enabled_series(gpu_rows) == mtp_on)
                & (_bool_series(gpu_rows, "pd_enabled", False) == pd_on)
                & (_bool_series(gpu_rows, "af_enabled", False) == af_on)
            ].copy()
            if subset.empty:
                continue
            frontier = compute_pareto_frontier(subset, y_col=y_col)
            if frontier.empty:
                continue
            ax.plot(frontier["tps_per_user"], frontier[y_col], marker="o", linewidth=2, label=label)
            for order, row in frontier.reset_index(drop=True).iterrows():
                ax.annotate(
                    _truncate_label(_compact_config_summary(row), 72),
                    (row["tps_per_user"], row[y_col]),
                    xytext=(6, 7 + (order % 2) * 9),
                    textcoords="offset points",
                    fontsize=6,
                    alpha=0.78,
                )
            plotted = True
        gpu_label_text = _format_config_value(gpu_num)
        if plotted:
            ax.set_title(f"{gpu_label_text} GPU")
            ax.set_xlabel("TPS per user")
            ax.set_ylabel("Total throughput (tokens/s)")
            ax.grid(True, alpha=0.3)
            ax.legend(loc="best", fontsize=8)
        else:
            _plot_empty(ax, f"{gpu_label_text} GPU")

    for ax in axes.ravel()[len(gpu_nums) :]:
        ax.axis("off")
    fig.tight_layout(rect=(0, 0, 1, 0.96))
    fig.savefig(out_dir / f"{prefix}_same_gpu_throughput_vs_tps_modes.png", dpi=170)
    plt.close(fig)

nodes.name: _plot_stage_cost_stack
nodes.docstring: Plot per-stage op/comm cost stacks for Pareto frontier configs.
nodes.summary: Plot per-stage op/comm cost stacks for Pareto frontier configs.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def _plot_stage_cost_stack(df: pd.DataFrame, out_dir: Path, prefix: str, title: str) -> None:
    """Plot per-stage op/comm cost stacks for Pareto frontier configs."""
    available = [name for name, _kind in STAGE_COST_COLUMNS if name in df.columns]
    row_count = 1
    if not df.empty and available:
        row_count = max(1, len(_stage_cost_pareto_rows(df)))
    fig_height = max(8, min(24, 3.0 + row_count * 0.42))
    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(12, fig_height))
    if df.empty or not available:
        _plot_empty(ax, title)
    else:
        rows = _stage_cost_pareto_rows(df)
        labels = [_compact_config_summary(row) for _, row in rows.iterrows()]
        y = np.arange(len(rows))
        left = np.zeros(len(rows))
        for column in available:
            values = pd.to_numeric(rows[column], errors="coerce").fillna(0).to_numpy(dtype=float)
            if not np.any(values):
                continue
            ax.barh(y, values, left=left, label=column)
            left += values
        ax.set_yticks(y)
        ax.set_yticklabels(labels, fontsize=7)
        ax.invert_yaxis()
        ax.set_xlabel("Stage time contribution (s)")
        ax.set_title(title)
        ax.grid(True, axis="x", alpha=0.3)
        ax.legend(loc="lower right", fontsize=7)
    fig.tight_layout()
    fig.savefig(out_dir / f"{prefix}_stage_cost_op_comm_stack.png", dpi=160)
    plt.close(fig)

formulas.explanation: row_count 表示离散切分后的份额，通常会配合 `ceil`/`max` 保证至少切出一个合法分块。
fig_height 由 row_count 等变量组合计算得到。

nodes.name: _plot_strategy_mode_grid
nodes.docstring: Plot the requested MTP/PD/AF throughput-vs-TPS views in one large figure.
nodes.summary: Plot the requested MTP/PD/AF throughput-vs-TPS views in one large figure.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def _plot_strategy_mode_grid(df: pd.DataFrame, out_dir: Path, prefix: str, gpu_name: str, model_label: str) -> None:
    """Plot the requested MTP/PD/AF throughput-vs-TPS views in one large figure."""
    mode_specs = [
        (False, False, False, "MTP off, PD off, AF off"),
        (True, False, False, "MTP on, PD off, AF off"),
        (True, True, False, "MTP on, PD on, AF off"),
        (True, True, True, "MTP on, PD on, AF on"),
    ]
    fig, axes = plt.subplots(2, 2, figsize=(18, 13))
    fig.suptitle(f"{model_label} decode on {gpu_label(gpu_name)}: throughput vs TPS/user modes", fontsize=15)
    for ax, (mtp_on, pd_on, af_on, label) in zip(axes.ravel(), mode_specs):
        scatter = _draw_strategy_mode_pareto(
            ax,
            df,
            mtp_on=mtp_on,
            pd_on=pd_on,
            af_on=af_on,
            title=label,
        )
        if scatter is not None:
            cbar = fig.colorbar(scatter, ax=ax)
            cbar.set_label("batch_attn_gpu")
    fig.tight_layout(rect=(0, 0, 1, 0.97))
    fig.savefig(out_dir / f"{prefix}_throughput_vs_tps_modes.png", dpi=170)
    plt.close(fig)

nodes.name: _row_from_disaggregated_result

nodes.summary: Convert PD/AF helper output into the Pareto point schema.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def _row_from_disaggregated_result(result: dict, decode_row: pd.Series, strategy_type: str, gpu_num: int) -> dict:
    """Convert PD/AF helper output into the Pareto point schema."""
    row = dict(decode_row)
    e2e_tps_per_user = float(result["e2e_tps_per_user"])
    e2e_tpot_ns = 1e9 / max(e2e_tps_per_user, 1e-12)
    decode_batch_attn_gpu = int(result.get("decode_batch_attn_gpu", result.get("decode_batch", row.get("batch_attn_gpu", row.get("batch", 1)))))
    explicit_batches = explicit_batch_values(
        decode_batch_attn_gpu,
        row.get("attn_dp", 1),
        row.get("ffn_dp", 1),
    )
    explicit_batches["batch_ffn_gpu"] = int(result.get("decode_batch_ffn_gpu", explicit_batches["batch_ffn_gpu"]))
    explicit_batches["total_machine_batch"] = int(
        result.get("decode_total_machine_batch", explicit_batches["total_machine_batch"])
    )
    row.update(
        {
            "strategy_type": strategy_type,
            "deployment_mode": strategy_type,
            "gpu_num": int(gpu_num),
            "prefill_gpu_num": int(result.get("prefill_gpu_num", 0)),
            "decode_gpu_num": int(result.get("decode_gpu_num", row.get("gpu_num", gpu_num))),
            **explicit_batches,
            "prefill_batch_attn_gpu": int(result.get("prefill_batch_attn_gpu", result.get("prefill_batch", 0))),
            "decode_batch_attn_gpu": decode_batch_attn_gpu,
            "tpot_ns": e2e_tpot_ns,
            "tpot_ms": e2e_tpot_ns / 1e6,
            "tps_per_user": e2e_tps_per_user,
            "throughput_total_tps": float(result["generation_throughput_tps"]),
            "tps_per_gpu": float(result["generation_throughput_tps"]) / max(int(gpu_num), 1),
            "dominant_component": result["bottleneck_phase"],
            "pd_enabled": strategy_type in ("pd", "pd_af"),
            "af_enabled": strategy_type in ("af", "pd_af"),
            "pd_transfer_transport": result.get("pd_transfer_transport", "disabled"),
            "pd_transfer_time_s": float(result.get("pd_transfer_time_s", 0.0)),
            "decode_attention_gpu": result.get("decode_attention_gpu", ""),
            "decode_attention_latency_s": float(result.get("decode_attention_latency_s", 0.0)),
            "decode_attention_rps": float(result.get("decode_attention_rps", 0.0)),
            "decode_ffn_gpu": result.get("decode_ffn_gpu", ""),
            "decode_ffn_latency_s": float(result.get("decode_ffn_latency_s", 0.0)),
            "decode_ffn_rps": float(result.get("decode_ffn_rps", 0.0)),
            "decode_attn_ffn_transfer_transport": result.get("decode_attn_ffn_transfer_transport", "disabled"),
            "decode_attn_ffn_transfer_bandwidth_GBps": float(
                result.get("decode_attn_ffn_transfer_bandwidth_GBps", 0.0)
            ),
            "decode_attn_ffn_transfer_latency_s": float(result.get("decode_attn_ffn_transfer_latency_s", 0.0)),
            "decode_attn_ffn_transfer_batch": int(result.get("decode_attn_ffn_transfer_batch", 0)),
            "decode_attn_ffn_transfer_bytes": float(result.get("decode_attn_ffn_transfer_bytes", 0.0)),
            "decode_attn_ffn_transfer_messages": int(result.get("decode_attn_ffn_transfer_messages", 0)),
            "decode_attn_ffn_transfer_time_s": float(result.get("decode_attn_ffn_transfer_time_s", 0.0)),
            "decode_attn_ffn_transfer_rps": float(result.get("decode_attn_ffn_transfer_rps", 0.0)),
            "decode_latency_s": float(result.get("decode_latency_s", 0.0)),
            "e2e_latency_s": float(result.get("e2e_latency_s", 0.0)),
            "request_throughput_rps": float(result.get("system_rps", 0.0)),
        }
    )
    for key, value in result.items():
        if key.startswith("lpx_ffn_"):
            row[key] = value
    return row

formulas.explanation: e2e_tps_per_user 表示吞吐或速率，通常由收益与总时间共同决定。
e2e_tpot_ns 由 e2e_tps_per_user 等变量组合计算得到。
decode_batch_attn_gpu 由 result.get, row.get 等变量组合计算得到。
explicit_batches["batch_ffn_gpu"] 由 explicit_batches, result.get 等变量组合计算得到。
explicit_batches["total_machine_batch"] 由 explicit_batches, result.get 等变量组合计算得到。

nodes.name: _strategy_base_rows
nodes.docstring: Return normalized monolithic strategy rows for the requested fixed GPU counts.
nodes.summary: Return normalized monolithic strategy rows for the requested fixed GPU counts.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def _strategy_base_rows(df: pd.DataFrame, gpu_name: str, gpu_nums: list[int]) -> pd.DataFrame:
    """Return normalized monolithic strategy rows for the requested fixed GPU counts."""
    if df.empty:
        return df.copy()
    rows = _with_explicit_batch_columns(df)
    rows = _raw_mtp_off(rows)
    if "hardware" in rows.columns:
        rows = rows[rows["hardware"] == gpu_name]
    rows = rows[pd.to_numeric(rows["gpu_num"]).isin(gpu_nums)].copy()
    if rows.empty:
        return rows
    rows["strategy_type"] = "monolithic"
    rows["deployment_mode"] = "monolithic"
    rows["pd_enabled"] = False
    rows["af_enabled"] = False
    rows["decode_ffn_gpu"] = ""
    rows["prefill_gpu_num"] = 0
    rows["decode_gpu_num"] = rows["gpu_num"].astype(int)
    rows["mtp_stage"] = rows.get("mtp_stage", 0).fillna(0).astype(int) if "mtp_stage" in rows else 0
    rows["mtp_model"] = rows.get("mtp_model", "off") if "mtp_model" in rows else "off"
    rows["mtp_expected_tokens"] = rows.get("mtp_expected_tokens", 1.0) if "mtp_expected_tokens" in rows else 1.0
    rows["mtp_accept_rate"] = rows.get("mtp_accept_rate", 0.0) if "mtp_accept_rate" in rows else 0.0
    return rows

nodes.summary: Attach explicit mode and parallel config labels before writing CSV/JSON.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def _with_output_config_labels(df: pd.DataFrame, *, force: bool = False) -> pd.DataFrame:
    """Attach explicit mode and parallel config labels before writing CSV/JSON."""
    labeled = _with_explicit_batch_columns(df)
    if not force and all(column in labeled.columns for column in OUTPUT_CONFIG_LABEL_COLUMNS):
        return labeled
    for column in OUTPUT_CONFIG_LABEL_COLUMNS:
        if column not in labeled.columns:
            labeled[column] = pd.Series(dtype=object)
    if labeled.empty:
        return labeled
    config_summaries = []
    mode_summaries = []
    decode_summaries = []
    prefill_summaries = []
    for _, row in labeled.iterrows():
        config_summaries.append(_compact_config_summary(row))
        mode_summaries.append(_mode_summary(row))
        decode_summaries.append(_decode_config_summary(row))
        prefill_summaries.append(_prefill_config_summary(row))
    labeled["config_summary"] = config_summaries
    labeled["mode_summary"] = mode_summaries
    labeled["decode_config_summary"] = decode_summaries
    labeled["prefill_config_summary"] = prefill_summaries
    return labeled

nodes.name: apply_decode_memory_budget
nodes.docstring: Apply the decode HBM budget before running an expensive strategy simulation.
nodes.summary: Apply the decode HBM budget before running an expensive strategy simulation.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def apply_decode_memory_budget(
    hw,
    model_args: ModelArgs,
    gpu_config: dict,
    batch_size: int,
    decode_layers: pd.DataFrame | None = None,
) -> bool:
    """Apply the decode HBM budget before running an expensive strategy simulation."""
    mla = 187.17 * 1024 * 1024 * model_args.weight_bpe
    expert_mem = 44.05 * 1024 * 1024 * model_args.weight_bpe
    redundant_experts = math.ceil(
        (
            math.ceil(model_args.n_routed_experts / gpu_config["ffn_ep"])
            * gpu_config["ffn_ep"]
            - model_args.n_routed_experts
        )
        / gpu_config["ffn_ep"]
    )
    if redundant_experts < 0:
        redundant_experts = 1
    gpu_experts = (
        math.ceil(model_args.n_routed_experts / gpu_config["ffn_ep"])
        + model_args.n_shared_experts
        + redundant_experts
    )
    kv_cache_size = decode_kv_cache_size_bytes(model_args, gpu_config, batch_size, decode_layers)
    hw.hbm_size = (
        hw.hbm_size
        - expert_mem * (model_args.n_layers - model_args.n_dense_layers) * gpu_experts
        - mla * model_args.n_layers / gpu_config["attn_tp"]
        - kv_cache_size
    )
    return hw.hbm_size >= 0

formulas.explanation: mla 由 model_args.weight_bpe 等变量组合计算得到。
expert_mem 由 model_args.weight_bpe 等变量组合计算得到。

        )
        / gpu_config["ffn_ep"]
    )

nodes.name: build_pareto_web_payload
nodes.docstring: Build the JSON payload used by the interactive Pareto web page.
nodes.summary: Build the JSON payload used by the interactive Pareto web page.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def build_pareto_web_payload(
    df: pd.DataFrame,
    include_mtp: bool = False,
    title: str = "Decode Pareto frontier",
    description: str = "",
    mtp_note: str | None = None,
) -> dict:
    """Build the JSON payload used by the interactive Pareto web page."""
    raw = df.copy() if include_mtp else _raw_mtp_off(df)
    raw = _with_output_config_labels(raw)
    raw = _without_legacy_batch_column(raw)
    y_col = "throughput_total_tps" if "throughput_total_tps" in raw.columns else "tps_per_gpu"
    frontier = compute_pareto_frontier(raw, y_col=y_col)
    frontiers_by_gpu = compute_pareto_frontiers_by_gpu(raw, y_col=y_col)
    default_mtp_note = (
        "MTP points are native cost-model simulation rows. Stage 0 is the matching baseline decode row; "
        "stage > 0 rows require MTP_on and mtp_stage to be simulated in the raw sweep."
    )
    return {
        "summary": {
            "title": title,
            "description": description,
            "point_count": int(len(raw)),
            "frontier_count": int(len(frontier)),
            "x_metric": "tps_per_user",
            "y_metric": y_col,
            "pareto_rule": "for each fixed gpu_num, maximize TPS per user and total throughput across the strategy candidate set",
            "mtp_note": mtp_note if mtp_note is not None else default_mtp_note,
            "pp_note": "PP is swept when --pp-values includes values beyond 1. PD rows cap prefill at 20% of the fixed total, rounded down to an 8-GPU multiple, with decode taking the remainder. Decode A/F split rows pin the F side to groq-lpx3.",
        },
        "points": _json_records(raw),
        "frontier": _json_records(frontier),
        "frontier_deltas": pareto_parameter_deltas(frontier),
        "frontiers_by_gpu": {
            gpu_num: {
                "summary": info["summary"],
                "frontier": _json_records(info["frontier"]),

nodes.name: build_unified_strategy_candidates
nodes.docstring: Build one Pareto candidate set containing monolithic, MTP, PD, AF, and PD+AF strategies.
nodes.summary: Build one Pareto candidate set containing monolithic, MTP, PD, AF, and PD+AF strategies.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def build_unified_strategy_candidates(
    decode_df: pd.DataFrame,
    gpu_name: str,
    gpu_nums: list[int],
    mtp_stage_model: str = "none",
    mtp_stages: list[int] | None = None,
    mtp_accept_rate: float = 0.7,
    prefill_rows: pd.DataFrame | None = None,
    decode_rows: pd.DataFrame | None = None,
    model_args: ModelArgs | None = None,
    allow_over_routed_ffn_ep: bool = False,
) -> pd.DataFrame:
    """Build one Pareto candidate set containing monolithic, MTP, PD, AF, and PD+AF strategies."""
    stages = list(mtp_stages if mtp_stages is not None else [0])
    decode_df = _with_explicit_batch_columns(decode_df)
    if decode_rows is not None:
        decode_rows = _with_explicit_batch_columns(decode_rows)
    decode_df = _filter_rows_by_model_limits(decode_df, model_args, allow_over_routed_ffn_ep)
    decode_rows = (
        _filter_rows_by_model_limits(decode_rows, model_args, allow_over_routed_ffn_ep)
        if decode_rows is not None
        else None
    )
    base = _strategy_base_rows(decode_df, gpu_name, gpu_nums)
    decode_source = decode_rows if decode_rows is not None else decode_df
    decode_base_source = _raw_mtp_off(decode_source)
    pieces = [base]
    mtp = (
        _simulated_mtp_rows(decode_df, gpu_name, gpu_nums, stages, strategy_type="mtp")
        if mtp_stage_model != "none"
        else pd.DataFrame()
    )
    if not mtp.empty:
        pieces.append(mtp)
    af = _af_rows(base, gpu_name, gpu_nums, model_args)
    if not af.empty:
        pieces.append(af)
    pd_only = _pd_rows(prefill_rows, decode_base_source, gpu_name, gpu_nums, model_args, include_af=False)
    if not pd_only.empty:
        pieces.append(pd_only)
        pd_decode_gpu_nums = [int(total) - pd_prefill_gpu_count(int(total)) for total in gpu_nums]
        simulated_pd_decode = (
            _simulated_mtp_rows(decode_source, gpu_name, pd_decode_gpu_nums, stages, strategy_type="mtp")
            if mtp_stage_model != "none"
            else pd.DataFrame()
        )
        pd_mtp = _pd_rows(prefill_rows, simulated_pd_decode, gpu_name, gpu_nums, model_args, include_af=False)
        if not pd_mtp.empty:
            pd_mtp["strategy_type"] = "pd_mtp"
            pd_mtp["deployment_mode"] = "pd_mtp"
            pd_mtp["pd_enabled"] = True
            pd_mtp["af_enabled"] = False
            pieces.append(pd_mtp)
    pd_af = _pd_rows(prefill_rows, decode_base_source, gpu_name, gpu_nums, model_args, include_af=True)
    if not pd_af.empty:
        pieces.append(pd_af)
        pd_decode_gpu_nums = [int(total) - pd_prefill_gpu_count(int(total)) for total in gpu_nums]
        simulated_pd_decode = (
            _simulated_mtp_rows(decode_source, gpu_name, pd_decode_gpu_nums, stages, strategy_type="mtp")
            if mtp_stage_model != "none"
            else pd.DataFrame()
        )
        pd_af_mtp = _pd_rows(prefill_rows, simulated_pd_decode, gpu_name, gpu_nums, model_args, include_af=True)
        if not pd_af_mtp.empty:
            pd_af_mtp["strategy_type"] = "pd_af_mtp"
            pd_af_mtp["deployment_mode"] = "pd_af_mtp"
            pd_af_mtp["pd_enabled"] = True
            pd_af_mtp["af_enabled"] = True
            pieces.append(pd_af_mtp)
    unified = pd.concat([piece for piece in pieces if piece is not None and not piece.empty], ignore_index=True) if pieces else pd.DataFrame()
    if unified.empty:
        return unified
    unified["strategy_type"] = unified["strategy_type"].fillna("monolithic")
    unified["gpu_num"] = pd.to_numeric(unified["gpu_num"]).astype(int)
    unified = _with_explicit_batch_columns(unified)
    return unified

nodes.name: compute_pareto_frontier
nodes.docstring:
Return non-dominated rows for maximizing x_col and y_col.

The returned frontier is ordered left-to-right by x_col. If multiple rows
share the same x value, only the row with the highest y value is kept.
nodes.summary: Return non-dominated rows for maximizing x_col and y_col.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def compute_pareto_frontier(
    df: pd.DataFrame,
    x_col: str = "tps_per_user",
    y_col: str = "tps_per_gpu",
) -> pd.DataFrame:
    """Return non-dominated rows for maximizing x_col and y_col.

    The returned frontier is ordered left-to-right by x_col. If multiple rows
    share the same x value, only the row with the highest y value is kept.
    """
    if df.empty:
        return df.copy()

    sortable = df.copy()
    sortable[x_col] = pd.to_numeric(sortable[x_col])
    sortable[y_col] = pd.to_numeric(sortable[y_col])
    sortable = sortable.sort_values([x_col, y_col], ascending=[True, False])
    sortable = sortable.drop_duplicates(subset=[x_col], keep="first")

    best_y = -float("inf")
    frontier_indices = []
    for index, row in sortable.sort_values([x_col, y_col], ascending=[False, False]).iterrows():
        if row[y_col] > best_y:
            frontier_indices.append(index)
            best_y = row[y_col]

    frontier = sortable.loc[frontier_indices].sort_values([x_col, y_col], ascending=[True, False])
    return frontier.reset_index(drop=True)

formulas.explanation: best_y 是该函数里的关键中间量。

nodes.summary: Generate an LLM-perf workbook from a Hugging Face config when it is missing.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def ensure_model_workbook(
    workbook: Path,
    config: dict,
    model_name: str,
    input_len: int,
    output_len: int,
    precision: str,
    *,
    overwrite: bool = False,
) -> Path:
    """Generate an LLM-perf workbook from a Hugging Face config when it is missing."""
    if workbook.exists() and not overwrite:
        return workbook

    spec = normalize_config(
        config,
        model_name=model_name,
        input_len=input_len,
        output_len=output_len,
        precision=precision,
    )
    write_llmperf_xlsx(spec, workbook)
    return workbook

nodes.summary: Return the explicit batch semantics used by decode analysis rows.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def explicit_batch_values(batch_attn_gpu: int | float, attn_dp: int | float = 1, ffn_dp: int | float = 1) -> dict:
    """Return the explicit batch semantics used by decode analysis rows."""
    batch_attn_gpu = max(int(batch_attn_gpu), 1)
    attn_dp = max(int(attn_dp), 1)
    ffn_dp = max(int(ffn_dp), 1)
    total_machine_batch = batch_attn_gpu * attn_dp
    return {
        "batch_attn_gpu": batch_attn_gpu,
        "batch_ffn_gpu": _ceil_div_int(total_machine_batch, ffn_dp),
        "total_machine_batch": total_machine_batch,
    }

formulas.explanation: batch_attn_gpu 由 batch_attn_gpu 等变量组合计算得到。
attn_dp 由 attn_dp 等变量组合计算得到。
ffn_dp 由 ffn_dp 等变量组合计算得到。
total_machine_batch 由 attn_dp, batch_attn_gpu 等变量组合计算得到。

def init_worker(xls_file: str) -> None:
    """Load shared workbook data once per multiprocessing worker."""
    global _WORKER_BASE_DECODE, _WORKER_MODEL_ARGS
    workbook = Path(xls_file)
    _WORKER_MODEL_ARGS = load_model_args(workbook)
    _WORKER_BASE_DECODE = load_decode_layers(workbook)

def load_model_args(xls_file: Path) -> ModelArgs:
    """Load model metadata from the compact workbook Model sheet."""
    model_args = ModelArgs()
    model = pd.read_excel(xls_file, sheet_name="Model")
    values = dict(zip(model["field"], model["value"]))

    def as_bool(value) -> bool:
        if isinstance(value, str):
            return value.strip().lower() in {"1", "true", "yes", "y"}
        return bool(value)

    def optional_int(name: str, default: int = 0) -> int:
        if name not in values or pd.isna(values[name]):
            return default
        return int(values[name])

    model_args.model_name = str(values["model_name"])
    model_args.max_batch_size = int(values["batch"])
    model_args.vocabulare = int(values["vocab_size"])
    model_args.vocab_size = model_args.vocabulare
    model_args.precision = str(values["precision"])
    model_args.hidden = int(values["hidden"])
    model_args.dim = model_args.hidden
    model_args.MLA = as_bool(values["mla"])
    model_args.compress_q = int(values["compress_q"])
    model_args.compress_kv = int(values["compress_kv"])
    model_args.head_q = int(values["head_q"])
    model_args.head_kv = int(values["head_kv"])
    model_args.rope_dim = int(values["rope_dim"])
    model_args.v_head_dim = optional_int("v_head_dim", int(getattr(model_args, "v_head_dim", 0)))
    model_args.qk_nope_head_dim = optional_int("qk_nope_head_dim", int(getattr(model_args, "qk_nope_head_dim", 0)))
    model_args.fc_hidden = int(values["fc_hidden"])
    model_args.moe_inter_dim = model_args.fc_hidden
    model_args.dense_fc_hidden = optional_int("dense_fc_hidden", model_args.fc_hidden)
    model_args.n_shared_experts = int(values["shared_experts"])
    model_args.expert = int(values["experts"])
    model_args.n_routed_experts = model_args.expert
    model_args.topk = int(values["topk"])
    model_args.n_activated_experts = model_args.topk
    model_args.dense_layer = int(values["dense_layers"])
    model_args.n_dense_layers = model_args.dense_layer
    model_args.layer = int(values["layers"])
    model_args.n_layers = model_args.layer
    model_args.act = str(values["activation"])
    model_args.f_bpe = float(values["feature_bpe"])
    model_args.kv_cache_bpe = float(values["kv_cache_bpe"])
    model_args.weight_bpe = float(values["weight_bpe"])
    model_args.output_bpe = float(values["output_bpe"])
    model_args.optimizer_bpe = float(values["optimizer_bpe"])
    model_args.input_seq_length = int(values["input_seq_length"])
    model_args.output_seq_length = int(values["output_seq_length"])
    return model_args

nodes.name: main

nodes.summary: CLI entry point for this module.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def main() -> None:
    """CLI entry point for this module."""
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Sweep decode throughput vs TPS on a selected GPU.")
    parser.add_argument("--out-dir", default="result/decode_throughput_tps")
    parser.add_argument("--xls-file", required=True)
    parser.add_argument(
        "--hf-config-json",
        default=None,
        help="Optional local Hugging Face config.json used to generate --xls-file when missing or overwritten.",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--overwrite-workbook",
        action="store_true",
        help="Overwrite --xls-file when --hf-config-json is provided.",
    )
    parser.add_argument("--model-label", default=None, help="Display label and output filename component. Defaults to workbook model name.")
    parser.add_argument("--output-prefix", default=None, help="Override generated output filename prefix.")
    parser.add_argument(
        "--gpu-name",
        default="h100",
        help="GPU alias or gpu_info name, e.g. h100, h200, b200, b300, Vera-Rubin, Rubin-Ultra.",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--gpu-nums",
        default="36",
        help="Raw phase GPU counts to simulate. Supports ranges like 1..72 so PD can pick its capped-prefill split.",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--pareto-gpu-nums",
        default=None,
        help="Fixed total GPU counts used for the unified Pareto frontier. Defaults to --gpu-nums.",
    )
    parser.add_argument("--batches", default="16,32,64,128,256,384,512")
    parser.add_argument("--tp-values", default="1,2,4,8")
    parser.add_argument("--cp-values", default="1,2,4,8")
    parser.add_argument("--pp-values", default="1")
    parser.add_argument("--input-len", type=int, default=1024)
    parser.add_argument("--output-len", type=int, default=8192)
    parser.add_argument("--precision", default="fp4")
    parser.add_argument("--workers", type=int, default=1)
    parser.add_argument("--web-data-dir", default="web/data")
    parser.add_argument("--prefill-table", default="web/data/final_prefill_all.xlsx")
    parser.add_argument(
        "--allow-over-routed-ffn-ep",
        action="store_true",
        help=(
            "Keep FFN EP values larger than the model routed-expert count. "
            "Default keeps the conservative cap; enable for explicit EP scaling studies."
        ),
    )
    parser.add_argument("--mtp-stage-model", choices=["none", "eagle"], default="none")
    parser.add_argument("--mtp-stage-gpu-num", type=int, default=0)
    parser.add_argument("--mtp-stages", default="0..9")
    parser.add_argument("--mtp-accept-rate", type=float, default=0.7)
    args = parser.parse_args()
    gpu_name = resolve_gpu_name(args.gpu_name)

    out_dir = Path(args.out_dir)
    out_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    workbook = resolve_data_file(args.xls_file)
    if args.hf_config_json:
        config = load_hf_config_json(Path(args.hf_config_json))
        workbook = ensure_model_workbook(
            workbook,
            config,
            args.model_label or str(config.get("_name_or_path") or config.get("model_type") or "model"),
            args.input_len,
            args.output_len,
            args.precision,
            overwrite=args.overwrite_workbook,
        )

    model_args = load_model_args(workbook)
    model_label = args.model_label or model_args.model_name or Path(workbook).stem
    prefix_base = args.output_prefix or output_prefix(gpu_name, model_label)
    raw_gpu_nums = parse_int_list(args.gpu_nums)
    pareto_gpu_nums = parse_int_list(args.pareto_gpu_nums or args.gpu_nums)
    tp_values = parse_int_list(args.tp_values)
    cp_values = parse_int_list(args.cp_values)
    pp_values = parse_int_list(args.pp_values)
    mtp_stages = parse_stage_list(args.mtp_stages) if args.mtp_stage_model != "none" else [0]
    simulated_mtp_stages = [stage for stage in mtp_stages if int(stage) > 0]
    tasks = []
    for gpu_num in raw_gpu_nums:
        sys_maps = filter_sys_maps_by_tp_values(
            generate_supported_sys_maps(gpu_name, gpu_num, pp_values),
            tp_values,
            cp_values,
            pp_values,
        )
        sys_maps = filter_sys_maps_by_model_limits(
            sys_maps,
            model_args,
            allow_over_routed_ffn_ep=args.allow_over_routed_ffn_ep,
        )
        for gpu_config in sys_maps:
            for batch_size in parse_int_list(args.batches):
                tasks.append((gpu_name, gpu_num, batch_size, gpu_config, False, 0, args.mtp_accept_rate))
                for mtp_stage in simulated_mtp_stages:
                    tasks.append((gpu_name, gpu_num, batch_size, gpu_config, True, int(mtp_stage), args.mtp_accept_rate))

    rows = []
    if args.workers > 1:
        with concurrent.futures.ProcessPoolExecutor(
            max_workers=args.workers,
            initializer=init_worker,
            initargs=(str(workbook),),
        ) as executor:
            for row in executor.map(run_decode_strategy_worker, tasks, chunksize=1):
                if row is not None:
                    rows.append(row)
    else:
        base_decode = load_decode_layers(workbook)
        for gpu_name, gpu_num, batch_size, gpu_config, mtp_on, mtp_stage, mtp_accept_rate in tasks:
            row = run_decode_strategy(
                base_decode,
                model_args,
                gpu_name,
                gpu_num,
                batch_size,
                gpu_config,
                mtp_on,
                mtp_stage=mtp_stage,
                mtp_accept_rate=mtp_accept_rate,
            )
            if row is not None:
                rows.append(row)

    if not rows:
        raise SystemExit("No valid strategy survived HBM capacity checks.")

    df = _with_explicit_batch_columns(pd.DataFrame(rows))
    df = _filter_rows_by_model_limits(df, model_args, args.allow_over_routed_ffn_ep)
    if df.empty:
        raise SystemExit("No valid strategy survived HBM capacity and routed-expert EP checks.")
    df = _with_output_config_labels(df, force=True)
    csv_path = out_dir / f"{prefix_base}_decode_strategy_sweep.csv"
    _without_legacy_batch_column(df).to_csv(csv_path, index=False)
    prefill_rows = None
    prefill_table = Path(args.prefill_table)
    if prefill_table.exists():
        prefill_rows = pd.read_excel(prefill_table)
    strategy_df = build_unified_strategy_candidates(
        df,
        gpu_name=gpu_name,
        gpu_nums=pareto_gpu_nums,
        mtp_stage_model=args.mtp_stage_model,
        mtp_stages=mtp_stages,
        mtp_accept_rate=args.mtp_accept_rate,
        prefill_rows=prefill_rows,
        decode_rows=df,
        model_args=model_args,
        allow_over_routed_ffn_ep=args.allow_over_routed_ffn_ep,
    )
    strategy_df = _with_output_config_labels(strategy_df, force=True)
    strategy_csv_path = out_dir / f"{prefix_base}_unified_strategy_candidates.csv"
    _without_legacy_batch_column(strategy_df).to_csv(strategy_csv_path, index=False)
    payload = build_pareto_web_payload(
        strategy_df,
        include_mtp=True,
        title=f"{gpu_label(gpu_name)} {model_label} fixed-GPU strategy Pareto",
        description=(
            "Each Pareto line is computed within one fixed GPU count for the selected GPU family. "
            "Candidates include monolithic decode, EAGLE MTP stages, PD split rows when matching prefill/decode split counts exist, "
            "and decode A/F split rows with F pinned to groq-lpx3."
        ),
        mtp_note=(
            "MTP rows are native C++ simulation outputs with MTP_on and mtp_stage enabled; no Python "
            "post-process latency-ratio model is applied."
        ),
    )
    json_path = out_dir / f"{prefix_base}_decode_pareto.json"
    json_path.write_text(json.dumps(payload, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")

    web_data_dir = Path(args.web_data_dir)
    web_data_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    web_json_path = web_data_dir / f"{prefix_base}_decode_pareto.json"
    web_json_path.write_text(json.dumps(payload, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")
    write_mtp_stage_outputs(df, out_dir, web_data_dir, args, prefix_base, gpu_name, model_label)

    best = df[df["mtp_on"] == False].sort_values("throughput_total_tps", ascending=False).head(20)  # noqa: E712
    best = _with_output_config_labels(best, force=True)
    _without_legacy_batch_column(best).to_csv(out_dir / f"{prefix_base}_decode_top20_raw.csv", index=False)
    plot_results(strategy_df, out_dir, prefix_base, gpu_name, model_label)

    print("CSV", csv_path)
    print("Unified Strategy CSV", strategy_csv_path)
    print("Pareto JSON", json_path)
    print("Web JSON", web_json_path)
    print("Rows", len(df))
    print("Unified strategy rows", len(strategy_df))
    for gpu_num, info in payload["frontiers_by_gpu"].items():
        print(f"Pareto {gpu_num} GPU points", info["summary"]["frontier_count"])
    print(
        best[
            [
                "gpu_num",
                "batch_attn_gpu",
                "batch_ffn_gpu",
                "total_machine_batch",
                "attn_tp",
                "attn_dp",
                "ffn_tp",
                "ffn_ep",
                "tpot_ms",
                "tps_per_user",
                "tps_per_gpu",
                "throughput_total_tps",
                "dominant_component",
                "hbm_remaining_gb",
            ]
        ].to_string(index=False)
    )

def output_prefix(gpu_name: str, model_label: str = "model") -> str:
    """Return the output filename prefix for one hardware/model sweep."""
    gpu = slugify_label(gpu_label(resolve_gpu_name(gpu_name)))
    model = slugify_label(model_label)
    return f"{gpu}_{model}"

nodes.summary: Render one or more analysis plots from tabular results.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def plot_mtp_stage_results(mtp_df: pd.DataFrame, out_dir: Path, prefix: str, title: str) -> None:
    """Render one or more analysis plots from tabular results."""
    if mtp_df.empty:
        return

    mtp_df = _with_explicit_batch_columns(mtp_df)
    mtp_df = _with_output_config_labels(mtp_df, force=True)
    y_col = "throughput_total_tps"
    frontier = compute_pareto_frontier(mtp_df, y_col=y_col)
    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 7))
    scatter = ax.scatter(
        mtp_df["tps_per_user"],
        mtp_df[y_col],
        c=mtp_df["mtp_stage"],
        s=40 + mtp_df["batch_attn_gpu"].astype(float).clip(upper=256) / 2,
        alpha=0.72,
        cmap="plasma",
        edgecolor="black",
        linewidth=0.3,
    )
    if not frontier.empty:
        ax.plot(frontier["tps_per_user"], frontier[y_col], marker="o", linewidth=2, color="black", label="Pareto frontier")
        previous = None
        for order, row in frontier.reset_index(drop=True).iterrows():
            change = pareto_config_change_label(row, previous)
            label = _compact_config_summary(row) if previous is None else f"{_compact_config_summary(row)}\nchange: {change}"
            ax.annotate(
                _truncate_label(label, 120),
                (row["tps_per_user"], row[y_col]),
                xytext=(8, 8 + (order % 3) * 8),
                textcoords="offset points",
                fontsize=7,
                bbox={"boxstyle": "round,pad=0.22", "fc": "white", "ec": "0.65", "alpha": 0.82},
                arrowprops={"arrowstyle": "-", "color": "0.55", "lw": 0.6},
            )
            previous = row
    ax.set_xlabel("TPS per user")
    ax.set_ylabel("Total throughput (tokens/s)")
    ax.set_title(title)
    ax.grid(True, alpha=0.3)
    ax.legend(loc="best")
    cbar = fig.colorbar(scatter, ax=ax)
    cbar.set_label("MTP stage")
    fig.tight_layout()
    fig.savefig(out_dir / f"{prefix}_pareto.png", dpi=160)
    plt.close(fig)

    best_by_stage = (
        mtp_df.sort_values(y_col, ascending=False)
        .groupby("mtp_stage", as_index=False)
        .head(1)
        .sort_values("mtp_stage")
    )
    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 6))
    ax.plot(best_by_stage["mtp_stage"], best_by_stage[y_col], marker="o", label="best total throughput")
    ax2 = ax.twinx()
    ax2.plot(best_by_stage["mtp_stage"], best_by_stage["tps_per_user"], marker="s", color="tab:red", label="TPS/user")
    for order, (_, row) in enumerate(best_by_stage.iterrows()):
        ax.annotate(
            _truncate_label(_compact_config_summary(row), 82),
            (row["mtp_stage"], row[y_col]),
            xytext=(8, 12 + (order % 2) * 16),
            textcoords="offset points",
            fontsize=7,
        )
    ax.set_xlabel("MTP stage")
    ax.set_ylabel("tokens/s total")
    ax2.set_ylabel("TPS/user")
    ax.grid(True, alpha=0.3)
    lines, labels = ax.get_legend_handles_labels()
    lines2, labels2 = ax2.get_legend_handles_labels()
    ax.legend(lines + lines2, labels + labels2, loc="best")
    fig.tight_layout()
    fig.savefig(out_dir / f"{prefix}_best_by_stage.png", dpi=160)
    plt.close(fig)
