nodes.summary: Render one or more analysis plots from tabular results.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def plot_results(df: pd.DataFrame, out_dir: Path, prefix: str, gpu_name: str, model_label: str) -> None:
    """Render one or more analysis plots from tabular results."""
    if "strategy_type" in df.columns:
        raw = df.copy()
    else:
        raw = df[df["mtp_on"] == False].copy()  # noqa: E712
    raw = _with_explicit_batch_columns(raw)
    raw = _with_output_config_labels(raw)
    y_col = "throughput_total_tps"
    frontiers_by_gpu = compute_pareto_frontiers_by_gpu(raw, y_col=y_col)
    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 7))
    scatter = ax.scatter(
        raw["tps_per_user"],
        raw[y_col],
        c=raw["batch_attn_gpu"],
        s=40 + raw["attn_tp"] * 18,
        alpha=0.72,
        cmap="viridis",
        edgecolor="black",
        linewidth=0.3,
    )
    for gpu_num, info in frontiers_by_gpu.items():
        frontier = info["frontier"]
        ax.plot(
            frontier["tps_per_user"],
            frontier[y_col],
            marker="o",
            linewidth=2,
            label=f"Pareto {gpu_num} GPU",
        )
        previous = None
        for order, row in frontier.reset_index(drop=True).iterrows():
            change = pareto_config_change_label(row, previous)
            if previous is None or change == "same parameters":
                label = _compact_config_summary(row)
            else:
                label = f"{_compact_config_summary(row)}\nchange: {change}"
            ax.annotate(
                _truncate_label(label, 130),
                (row["tps_per_user"], row[y_col]),
                xytext=(8, 8 + (order % 3) * 8),
                textcoords="offset points",
                fontsize=7,
                color="#111827",
                bbox={"boxstyle": "round,pad=0.22", "fc": "white", "ec": "0.65", "alpha": 0.82},
                arrowprops={"arrowstyle": "-", "color": "0.55", "lw": 0.6},
            )
            previous = row
    ax.set_xlabel("TPS per user")
    ax.set_ylabel("Total throughput (tokens/s)")
    ax.set_title(f"{model_label} decode on {gpu_label(gpu_name)}: fixed-GPU total-throughput Pareto")
    ax.grid(True, alpha=0.3)
    ax.legend(loc="best")
    cbar = fig.colorbar(scatter, ax=ax)
    cbar.set_label("batch_attn_gpu")
    fig.tight_layout()
    fig.savefig(out_dir / f"{prefix}_decode_throughput_vs_tps.png", dpi=160)
    plt.close(fig)

    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 6))
    best_by_batch = (
        raw.sort_values(y_col, ascending=False)
        .groupby("batch_attn_gpu", as_index=False)
        .head(1)
        .sort_values("batch_attn_gpu")
    )
    best_by_batch = _with_best_by_batch_labels(best_by_batch)
    _without_legacy_batch_column(best_by_batch).to_csv(out_dir / f"{prefix}_decode_best_by_batch.csv", index=False)
    ax.plot(best_by_batch["batch_attn_gpu"], best_by_batch[y_col], marker="o", label="best total throughput")
    ax2 = ax.twinx()
    ax2.plot(best_by_batch["batch_attn_gpu"], best_by_batch["tps_per_user"], marker="s", color="tab:red", label="TPS/user")
    for order, (_, row) in enumerate(best_by_batch.iterrows()):
        ax.annotate(
            _plot_annotation_text(row),
            (row["batch_attn_gpu"], row[y_col]),
            xytext=(8, 12 + (order % 2) * 18),
            textcoords="offset points",
            fontsize=7,
            color="#111827",
            bbox={"boxstyle": "round,pad=0.22", "fc": "white", "ec": "0.65", "alpha": 0.84},
            arrowprops={"arrowstyle": "-", "color": "0.55", "lw": 0.6},
        )
    ax.set_xlabel("batch_attn_gpu")
    ax.set_ylabel("tokens/s total")
    ax2.set_ylabel("TPS/user")
    ax.grid(True, alpha=0.3)
    lines, labels = ax.get_legend_handles_labels()
    lines2, labels2 = ax2.get_legend_handles_labels()
    ax.legend(lines + lines2, labels + labels2, loc="best")
    fig.tight_layout()
    fig.savefig(out_dir / f"{prefix}_decode_best_by_batch.png", dpi=160)
    plt.close(fig)

    _plot_strategy_mode_grid(raw, out_dir, prefix, gpu_name, model_label)
    _plot_same_gpu_mode_lines(raw, out_dir, prefix, gpu_name, model_label)
    _plot_max_throughput_per_gpu_scaling(
        raw,
        out_dir,
        prefix,
        f"{model_label} decode on {gpu_label(gpu_name)}: max throughput/GPU vs GPU count",
    )
    _plot_stage_cost_stack(
        raw,
        out_dir,
        prefix,
        f"{model_label} decode on {gpu_label(gpu_name)}: Pareto stage cost op/comm stack",
    )
    _plot_af_on_substage_breakdown(
        raw,
        out_dir,
        prefix,
        f"{model_label} decode on {gpu_label(gpu_name)}: AF-on substage breakdown",
    )

nodes.name: run_decode_strategy
nodes.docstring: Run the analysis workflow for the requested inputs.
nodes.summary: Run the analysis workflow for the requested inputs.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def run_decode_strategy(
    base_decode: pd.DataFrame,
    model_args: ModelArgs,
    gpu_name: str,
    gpu_num: int,
    batch_size: int,
    gpu_config: dict,
    mtp_on: bool,
    mtp_stage: int = 0,
    mtp_accept_rate: float = 0.7,
) -> dict | None:
    """Run the analysis workflow for the requested inputs."""
    global_config = GlobalConfig()
    global_config.is_decode = True
    global_config.batch_size = batch_size
    global_config.micro_batch_size = batch_size // 2 if global_config.two_micro_batch else batch_size
    resolved_mtp_stage = int(mtp_stage) if mtp_on else 0
    global_config.MTP_on = bool(mtp_on and resolved_mtp_stage > 0)
    global_config.mtp_enabled = global_config.MTP_on
    global_config.mtp_stage = resolved_mtp_stage
    global_config.mtp_accept_rate = float(mtp_accept_rate)
    global_config.parallel_enabled = False

    with redirect_stdout(io.StringIO()):
        hw = hw_inst_from_gpu_info(gpu_name, gpu_num)
    if not apply_decode_memory_budget(hw, model_args, gpu_config, batch_size, base_decode):
        return None

    llm_data = copy.deepcopy(base_decode)
    logger = QuietLogger()
    previous_ep = 1
    batch_items = []

    with warnings.catch_warnings():
        warnings.simplefilter("ignore")
        for line in range(len(llm_data)):
            data_parser = layer_paser(line, llm_data, global_config)
            if str(data_parser[6]) == "0":
                continue
            if data_parser[8] == 0 and data_parser[9] == 0:
                continue

            if data_parser[1] == "excel":
                tp = data_parser[2]
                dp = data_parser[3]
                ep = data_parser[4]
                pp = data_parser[5]
                cp = 1
            elif data_parser[1] == "attn":
                dp = gpu_config["attn_dp"]
                tp = gpu_config["attn_tp"]
                cp = gpu_config.get("attn_cp", gpu_config.get("attn_ep", 1))
                ep = 1
                pp = gpu_config["pp"]
                if data_parser[6] not in ATTENTION_PER_GPU_BATCH_OPS:
                    data_parser = _data_parser_with_batch(data_parser, int(data_parser[9]) * int(gpu_config["attn_dp"]))
            else:
                dp = gpu_config["ffn_dp"]
                tp = gpu_config["ffn_tp"]
                ep = gpu_config["ffn_ep"]
                cp = 1
                pp = gpu_config["pp"]
                data_parser = _data_parser_with_batch(data_parser, int(data_parser[9]) * int(gpu_config["attn_dp"]))

            is_ep_boundary = ep != previous_ep
            previous_ep = ep
            batch_items.append(
                {
                    "logger": logger,
                    "gpu_sys_map": gpu_config,
                    "ModelArg": model_args,
                    "global_config": global_config,
                    "data_paser": data_parser,
                    "hw": hw,
                    "dp": dp,
                    "tp": tp,
                    "ep": ep,
                    "pp": pp,
                    "nn_info": llm_data,
                    "line": line,
                    "tp_split_k": data_parser[25],
                    "is_ep_boundary": is_ep_boundary,
                    "cp": cp,
                }
            )
        single_op_process_batch(batch_items)

    row = summarize_decode(llm_data, model_args, gpu_config, global_config, gpu_num)
    input_seq_len = int(getattr(model_args, "input_seq_length", 0))
    output_seq_len = int(getattr(model_args, "output_seq_length", 0))
    row.setdefault(
        "Config_Name",
        f"{gpu_label(gpu_name)}_{gpu_num}_decode_batch{batch_size}_I{input_seq_len}_O{output_seq_len}",
    )
    row.update(
        {
            "hardware": gpu_name,
            "gpu_num": gpu_num,
            **explicit_batch_values(batch_size, gpu_config["attn_dp"], gpu_config["ffn_dp"]),
            "input_seq_len": input_seq_len,
            "output_seq_len": output_seq_len,
            "micro_batch": global_config.micro_batch_size,
            "pp": gpu_config["pp"],
            "attn_dp": gpu_config["attn_dp"],
            "attn_tp": gpu_config["attn_tp"],
            "attn_cp": gpu_config.get("attn_cp", gpu_config.get("attn_ep", 1)),
            "attn_ep": gpu_config["attn_ep"],
            "ffn_dp": gpu_config["ffn_dp"],
            "ffn_tp": gpu_config["ffn_tp"],
            "ffn_ep": gpu_config["ffn_ep"],
            "mtp_on": bool(mtp_on and resolved_mtp_stage > 0),
            "mtp_model": "simulated" if mtp_on and resolved_mtp_stage > 0 else "off",
            "pp_model": "current_cost_model_pp1_only",
            "hbm_remaining_gb": hw.hbm_size / 1024 / 1024 / 1024,
        }
    )
    row.update(
        _lpx_ffn_cost_model_components(
            base_decode,
            model_args,
            gpu_config,
            gpu_name,
            gpu_num,
            batch_size,
            mtp_on,
            resolved_mtp_stage,
            mtp_accept_rate,
        )
    )
    row["ideal_mtp2_tps_per_user"] = row["tps_per_user"] * (2 if mtp_on and resolved_mtp_stage > 0 else 1)
    row["ideal_mtp2_tps_per_gpu"] = row["tps_per_gpu"] * (2 if mtp_on and resolved_mtp_stage > 0 else 1)
    return row

nodes.summary: Run one decode-strategy point inside a multiprocessing worker.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def run_decode_strategy_worker(args: tuple[str, int, int, dict, bool, int, float]) -> dict | None:
    """Run one decode-strategy point inside a multiprocessing worker."""
    if _WORKER_BASE_DECODE is None or _WORKER_MODEL_ARGS is None:
        raise RuntimeError("Worker was not initialized")
    gpu_name, gpu_num, batch_size, gpu_config, mtp_on, mtp_stage, mtp_accept_rate = args
    return run_decode_strategy(
        _WORKER_BASE_DECODE,
        _WORKER_MODEL_ARGS,
        gpu_name,
        gpu_num,
        batch_size,
        gpu_config,
        mtp_on,
        mtp_stage=mtp_stage,
        mtp_accept_rate=mtp_accept_rate,
    )

nodes.name: slugify_label
nodes.docstring: Convert a display label into a stable lowercase file-name component.
nodes.summary: Convert a display label into a stable lowercase file-name component.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def slugify_label(value: str) -> str:
    """Convert a display label into a stable lowercase file-name component."""
    label = re.sub(r"[^a-z0-9]+", "_", str(value).lower()).strip("_")
    return label or "model"

nodes.name: summarize_decode
nodes.docstring: Summarize raw model data into compact metrics.
nodes.summary: Summarize raw model data into compact metrics.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def summarize_decode(llm_data: pd.DataFrame, model_args: ModelArgs, gpu_config: dict, global_config: GlobalConfig, gpu_num: int) -> dict:
    """Summarize raw model data into compact metrics."""
    batch = global_config.micro_batch_size * 2
    token = max(int(llm_data.loc[0, "h"]) * int(llm_data.loc[0, "w"]), 1)
    summary = summarize_llm_timing(
        llm_data,
        model_args,
        gpu_config,
        global_config,
        SimpleNamespace(gpu_num=gpu_num),
        batch=batch,
        h=int(llm_data.loc[0, "h"]),
        w=int(llm_data.loc[0, "w"]),
    )
    tps_per_gpu = summary["tps_per_gpu"]
    throughput_total = tps_per_gpu * gpu_num

    dense_layers = summary["dense_layer_num"]
    sparse_layers = summary["sparse_layer_num"]
    layer_count = sparse_layers + dense_layers
    mla_without_kv = max(summary["sparse_mla"] - summary["kv_load_time"], 0.0)
    components = {
        "mla_compute": mla_without_kv * layer_count,
        "mla_cp_ring": summary["attention_cp_comm_time"] * layer_count,
        "kv_load": summary["kv_load_time"] * layer_count,
        "dense_mlp": summary["dense_mlp"] * dense_layers,
        "dispatch": summary["dispatch_time"] * sparse_layers,
        "shared_expert": summary["shared_expert"] * sparse_layers,
        "routed_expert": summary["routed_expert"] * sparse_layers,
        "combine": summary["combine_time"] * sparse_layers,
        "final_linear_softmax": summary["final_linear_softmax"],
        "mtp_draft": summary["mtp_time_ns"],
    }
    bottleneck = max(components, key=components.get)
    mla_all_reduce_s = summary["mla_all_reduce_time"] * layer_count / 1e9
    ffn_all_reduce_s = _ffn_domain_all_reduce_time_s(
        llm_data,
        summary["ffn_all_reduce_time"] * layer_count / 1e9,
    )

    return {
        "tpot_ns": summary["total_time"],
        "tpot_ms": summary["total_time"] / 1e6,
        "tps_per_user": summary["tps_per_user"],
        "tps_per_gpu": tps_per_gpu,
        "throughput_total_tps": throughput_total,
        "total_compute_time_s": summary["total_compute_time"] / 1e9,
        "total_comm_time_s": summary["total_comm_time"] / 1e9,
        "combine_overhead": summary["combine_overhead"],
        "dispatch_overhead": summary["dispatch_overhead"],
        "mla_all_reduce_s": mla_all_reduce_s,
        "mla_cp_ring_s": summary["attention_cp_comm_time"] * (sparse_layers + dense_layers) / 1e9,
        "ffn_all_reduce_s": ffn_all_reduce_s,
        "mtp_stage": summary["mtp_stage"],
        "mtp_accept_rate": (
            summary.get("mtp_accept_rate", getattr(global_config, "mtp_accept_rate", 0.0))
            if int(summary["mtp_stage"]) > 0
            else 0.0
        ),
        "mtp_expected_tokens": summary["mtp_expected_tokens"],
        "mtp_verifier_input_tokens": summary["mtp_verifier_input_tokens"],
        "mtp_verifier_output_logits": summary["mtp_verifier_output_logits"],
        "mtp_main_verifier_time_s": summary["mtp_main_verifier_time_ns"] / 1e9,
        "mtp_time_s": summary["mtp_time_ns"] / 1e9,
        "mtp_draft_time_s": summary["mtp_draft_time_ns"] / 1e9,
        "dominant_component": bottleneck,
        "dominant_component_s": components[bottleneck] / 1e9,
        "MLA": components["mla_compute"] / 1e9,
        "Load KV": components["kv_load"] / 1e9,
        "MLA all reduce": mla_all_reduce_s,
        "MLA cp ring": components["mla_cp_ring"] / 1e9,
        "final linear softmax": components["final_linear_softmax"] / 1e9,
        "Dense MLP": components["dense_mlp"] / 1e9,
        "Dispatch time": components["dispatch"] / 1e9,
        "Shared Expert": components["shared_expert"] / 1e9,
        "Routed expert": components["routed_expert"] / 1e9,
        "Combine time": components["combine"] / 1e9,
        "FFN all reduce": ffn_all_reduce_s,
    }

nodes.name: write_mtp_stage_outputs
nodes.docstring: Write generated output for this workflow.
nodes.summary: Write generated output for this workflow.
nodes.source_excerpt:
def write_mtp_stage_outputs(
    df: pd.DataFrame,
    out_dir: Path,
    web_data_dir: Path,
    args,
    prefix_base: str,
    gpu_name: str,
    model_label: str,
) -> None:
    """Write generated output for this workflow."""
    if args.mtp_stage_model == "none":
        return

    stages = parse_stage_list(args.mtp_stages)
    gpu_num = args.mtp_stage_gpu_num
    if gpu_num <= 0:
        gpu_num = int(sorted(pd.to_numeric(df["gpu_num"]).unique())[0])

    mtp_df = _simulated_mtp_stage_rows(df, gpu_name, gpu_num, stages)
    mtp_df = _with_output_config_labels(mtp_df)
    model_title = "C++ simulated EAGLE MTP"
    mtp_note = (
        "MTP rows are generated by the native C++ cost model with MTP_on and mtp_stage enabled. "
        "Stage 0 is the matching baseline decode row."
    )

    stage_label = f"{min(stages)}_{max(stages)}"
    rate_label = str(args.mtp_accept_rate).replace(".", "p")
    prefix = f"{prefix_base}_{args.mtp_stage_model}_mtp{gpu_num}_stage{stage_label}_accept{rate_label}"
    _without_legacy_batch_column(mtp_df).to_csv(out_dir / f"{prefix}.csv", index=False)

    title = f"{gpu_label(gpu_name)} {gpu_num} GPU {model_label} {model_title} Stage Pareto"
    description = (
        f"{gpu_num} GPU decode; MTP stage={min(stages)}..{max(stages)}; accept rate={args.mtp_accept_rate}; "
        "x-axis is TPS/user and y-axis is total throughput across all GPUs."
    )
    payload = build_pareto_web_payload(
        mtp_df,
        include_mtp=True,
        title=title,
        description=description,
        mtp_note=mtp_note,
    )
    json_text = json.dumps(payload, indent=2)
    json_path = out_dir / f"{prefix}.json"
    json_path.write_text(json_text, encoding="utf-8")
    web_json_path = web_data_dir / f"{prefix}.json"
    web_json_path.write_text(json_text, encoding="utf-8")
    plot_mtp_stage_results(mtp_df, out_dir, prefix, title)
    print("MTP CSV", out_dir / f"{prefix}.csv")
    print("MTP JSON", json_path)
    print("MTP Web JSON", web_json_path)

formulas.explanation: gpu_num 由 df, pd.to_numeric 等变量组合计算得到。
stage_label 由 stages 等变量组合计算得到。

nodes.source_excerpt:
def build_case_commands(
    *,
    case: WorkbookCase,
    workbook_dir: Path,
    result_root: Path,
    web_root: Path,
    report_root: Path,
    hardware: str,
    gpu_num: int,
    batches: str,
    tp_values: str,
    cp_values: str,
    pp_values_table: str,
    pp_values_sweep: str,
    workers: int,
    top_n: int,
    skip_layer_replay: bool,
    map_mode: str = "same-tp",
    phases: str = "prefill,decode",
    mtp_stages: str = "0..9",
    mtp_seed_count: int = 8,
    mtp_accept_rate: float = 0.7,
    python_bin: str = "python",
) -> tuple[list[str], list[str], list[str]]:
    workbook = workbook_dir / case.workbook_name
    result_dir = _case_dir(result_root, case, hardware, gpu_num)
    web_dir = _case_dir(web_root, case, hardware, gpu_num)
    report_dir = _case_dir(report_root, case, hardware, gpu_num)

    table_cmd = [
        python_bin,
        "-m",
        "scripts.generate_web_table_data",
        "--xls-file",
        str(workbook),
        "--out-dir",
        str(web_dir),
        "--model-label",
        case.model_label,
        "--hardware",
        hardware,
        "--gpu-nums",
        str(gpu_num),
        "--batches",
        batches,
        "--tp-values",
        tp_values,
        "--cp-values",
        cp_values,
        "--pp-values",
        pp_values_table,
        "--phases",
        phases,
        "--map-mode",
        map_mode,
        "--workers",
        str(workers),
    ]

    sweep_cmd = [
        python_bin,
        "-m",
        "scripts.run_profile_sweep",
        "--workbook",
        str(workbook),
        "--result-dir",
        str(result_dir),
        "--web-data-dir",
        str(web_dir),
        "--model-label",
        case.model_label,
        "--hardware",
        hardware,
        "--decode-gpu-nums",
        str(gpu_num),
        "--report-gpu-num",
        str(gpu_num),
        "--batches",
        batches,
        "--tp-values",
        tp_values,
        "--cp-values",
        cp_values,
        "--pp-values",
        pp_values_sweep,
        "--workers",
        str(workers),
        "--mtp-stages",
        mtp_stages,
        "--mtp-seed-count",
        str(mtp_seed_count),
        "--mtp-accept-rate",
        str(mtp_accept_rate),
    ]

    report_cmd = [
        python_bin,
        "-m",
        "scripts.generate_profile_report",
        "--result-dir",
        str(result_dir),
        "--web-data-dir",
        str(web_dir),
        "--out-dir",
        str(report_dir),
        "--workbook",
        str(workbook),
        "--model-label",
        case.model_label,
        "--hardware",
        hardware,
        "--gpu-num",
        str(gpu_num),
        "--input-len",
        str(case.input_len),
        "--output-len",
        str(case.output_len),
        "--top-n",
        str(top_n),
    ]
    if skip_layer_replay:
        report_cmd.append("--skip-layer-replay")
    return table_cmd, sweep_cmd, report_cmd

formulas.explanation: workbook 由 case.workbook_name, workbook_dir 等变量组合计算得到。

def main() -> None:
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Run profile.md data generation for HF architecture workbooks.")
    parser.add_argument("--workbook-dir", default="result/hf_arch/generated/workbooks")
    parser.add_argument("--gpu-info", default="data/gpu_info.csv")
    parser.add_argument("--result-root", default="result/profile_sweeps")
    parser.add_argument("--web-root", default="web/data/profile_sweeps")
    parser.add_argument("--report-root", default="result/profile_reports")
    parser.add_argument("--hardware", default="all-nvidia")
    parser.add_argument("--include-lpx-hardware", action="store_true")
    parser.add_argument("--gpu-nums", default="36,72,144,288,576")
    parser.add_argument("--batches", default="16,32,64,96,128,256,384,512")
    parser.add_argument("--tp-values", default="1,2,4,8")
    parser.add_argument("--cp-values", default="1,2,4,8")
    parser.add_argument("--pp-values-table", default="1")
    parser.add_argument("--pp-values-sweep", default="1,2,4")
    parser.add_argument("--workers", type=int, default=16)
    parser.add_argument("--top-n", type=int, default=5)
    parser.add_argument("--progress-file", default="result/profile_sweeps/profile_hf_arch_progress.jsonl")
    parser.add_argument("--skip-existing", action="store_true")
    parser.add_argument("--skip-layer-replay", action="store_true")
    parser.add_argument("--continue-on-error", action="store_true")
    parser.add_argument("--dry-run", action="store_true")
    args = parser.parse_args()

    workbook_dir = Path(args.workbook_dir)
    result_root = Path(args.result_root)
    web_root = Path(args.web_root)
    report_root = Path(args.report_root)
    progress_file = Path(args.progress_file)

    cases = discover_workbook_cases(workbook_dir)
    if args.hardware == "all-nvidia":
        hardware_names = discover_nvidia_hardware(Path(args.gpu_info), include_lpx=args.include_lpx_hardware)
    else:
        hardware_names = parse_csv_list(args.hardware)
    gpu_nums = [int(value) for value in parse_csv_list(args.gpu_nums)]
    total = len(cases) * len(hardware_names) * len(gpu_nums)

    print(
        f"profile hf_arch cases={len(cases)} hardware={len(hardware_names)} gpu_nums={gpu_nums} total={total} workers={args.workers}",
        flush=True,
    )
    _append_progress(
        progress_file,
        {
            "event": "run-start",
            "cases": len(cases),
            "hardware": hardware_names,
            "gpu_nums": gpu_nums,
            "total": total,
            "workers": args.workers,
        },
    )

    failures = 0
    index = 0
    for case in cases:
        for hardware in hardware_names:
            for gpu_num in gpu_nums:
                index += 1
                label = f"[{index}/{total}] {case.model_id} {hardware} {gpu_num} {case.io_dir}"
                report_path = _profile_report_path(report_root, case, hardware, gpu_num)
                if args.skip_existing and report_path.exists():
                    print(f"{label} skip existing {report_path}", flush=True)
                    _append_progress(progress_file, {"event": "skip", "label": label, "report": str(report_path)})
                    continue

                commands = build_case_commands(
                    case=case,
                    workbook_dir=workbook_dir,
                    result_root=result_root,
                    web_root=web_root,
                    report_root=report_root,
                    hardware=hardware,
                    gpu_num=gpu_num,
                    batches=args.batches,
                    tp_values=args.tp_values,
                    cp_values=args.cp_values,
                    pp_values_table=args.pp_values_table,
                    pp_values_sweep=args.pp_values_sweep,
                    workers=args.workers,
                    top_n=args.top_n,
                    skip_layer_replay=args.skip_layer_replay,
                    python_bin=sys.executable,
                )

                print(f"{label} start", flush=True)
                _append_progress(progress_file, {"event": "case-start", "label": label})
                try:
                    for step_name, command in zip(("table", "sweep", "report"), commands):
                        print(f"{label} {step_name}: {' '.join(command)}", flush=True)
                        _append_progress(
                            progress_file,
                            {"event": "step-start", "label": label, "step": step_name, "command": command},
                        )
                        if not args.dry_run:
                            subprocess.run(command, check=True)
                        _append_progress(progress_file, {"event": "step-done", "label": label, "step": step_name})
                    print(f"{label} done report={report_path}", flush=True)
                    _append_progress(progress_file, {"event": "case-done", "label": label, "report": str(report_path)})
                except Exception as exc:
                    failures += 1
                    print(f"{label} failed: {exc}", flush=True)
                    _append_progress(
                        progress_file,
                        {"event": "case-failed", "label": label, "error": str(exc), "failures": failures},
                    )
                    if not args.continue_on_error:
                        raise

    _append_progress(progress_file, {"event": "run-done", "failures": failures})
    print(f"profile hf_arch finished failures={failures} progress={progress_file}", flush=True)
    if failures:
        raise SystemExit(1)

formulas.explanation: gpu_nums 由 args.gpu_nums, parse_csv_list, value 等变量组合计算得到。
total 由 cases, gpu_nums, hardware_names 等变量组合计算得到。

nodes.source_excerpt:
def parse_workbook_case(path: Path) -> WorkbookCase:
    match = _WORKBOOK_RE.match(path.name)
    if not match:
        raise ValueError(f"unsupported workbook name: {path.name}")
    model_id = match.group("model")
    model_label = model_id.split("_", 1)[1] if "_" in model_id else model_id
    return WorkbookCase(
        workbook_name=path.name,
        model_id=model_id,
        model_label=model_label,
        input_len=int(match.group("input_len")),
        output_len=int(match.group("output_len")),
        precision=match.group("precision"),
    )

nodes.source_excerpt:
def _write_outputs(
    *,
    decode_rows: pd.DataFrame,
    result_dir: Path,
    web_data_dir: Path,
    prefix: str,
    hardware: str,
    model_label: str,
    report_gpu_num: int,
    mtp_stages: list[int],
    mtp_accept_rate: float,
    workbook: Path,
) -> None:
    result_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    web_data_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

    decode_path = result_dir / f"{prefix}_decode_strategy_sweep.csv"
    decode_rows.to_csv(decode_path, index=False)

    model_args = load_model_args(workbook)
    prefill_rows = _read_prefill_rows(web_data_dir)
    strategy_df = build_unified_strategy_candidates(
        decode_rows,
        gpu_name=hardware,
        gpu_nums=[int(report_gpu_num)],
        mtp_stage_model="none",
        prefill_rows=prefill_rows,
        decode_rows=decode_rows,
        model_args=model_args,
    )
    strategy_path = result_dir / f"{prefix}_unified_strategy_candidates.csv"
    strategy_df.to_csv(strategy_path, index=False)

    payload = build_pareto_web_payload(
        strategy_df,
        include_mtp=False,
        title=f"{hardware} {model_label} profile strategy Pareto",
        description="Profile sweep candidates for monolithic, PD, AF, and PD+AF modes.",
    )
    json_text = json.dumps(payload, indent=2)
    (result_dir / f"{prefix}_decode_pareto.json").write_text(json_text, encoding="utf-8")
    (web_data_dir / f"{prefix}_decode_pareto.json").write_text(json_text, encoding="utf-8")

    args = SimpleNamespace(
        mtp_stage_model="eagle",
        mtp_stages=f"{min(mtp_stages)}..{max(mtp_stages)}",
        mtp_stage_gpu_num=int(report_gpu_num),
        mtp_accept_rate=float(mtp_accept_rate),
    )
    write_mtp_stage_outputs(decode_rows, result_dir, web_data_dir, args, prefix, hardware, model_label)

    print("Decode CSV", decode_path)
    print("Unified Strategy CSV", strategy_path)

nodes.source_excerpt:
def build_decode_tasks(
    *,
    workbook: Path,
    hardware: str,
    gpu_nums: Iterable[int],
    batches: Iterable[int],
    tp_values: list[int],
    cp_values: list[int],
    pp_values: list[int],
) -> list[tuple]:
    model_args = load_model_args(workbook)
    tasks = []
    for gpu_num in gpu_nums:
        sys_maps = filter_sys_maps_by_tp_values(
            generate_supported_sys_maps(hardware, int(gpu_num), pp_values),
            tp_values,
            cp_values,
            pp_values,
        )
        sys_maps = filter_sys_maps_by_model_limits(sys_maps, model_args)
        for gpu_config in sys_maps:
            for batch_size in batches:
                tasks.append((hardware, int(gpu_num), int(batch_size), gpu_config, False, 0, 0.7))
    return tasks

nodes.name: build_mtp_tasks

nodes.source_excerpt:
def build_mtp_tasks(
    seeds: pd.DataFrame,
    *,
    hardware: str,
    mtp_stages: list[int],
    mtp_accept_rate: float,
) -> list[tuple]:
    tasks = []
    for _, row in seeds.iterrows():
        for stage in mtp_stages:
            if int(stage) <= 0:
                continue
            tasks.append(
                (
                    hardware,
                    _positive_int(row.get("gpu_num"), 1),
                    _positive_int(row.get("batch_attn_gpu", row.get("batch")), 1),
                    _gpu_config_from_row(row),
                    True,
                    int(stage),
                    float(mtp_accept_rate),
                )
            )
    return tasks

nodes.source_excerpt:
def main() -> None:
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Run a profile.md-oriented Vera-Rubin sweep without full-MTP cross product.")
    parser.add_argument("--workbook", required=True)
    parser.add_argument("--result-dir", required=True)
    parser.add_argument("--web-data-dir", required=True)
    parser.add_argument("--model-label", required=True)
    parser.add_argument("--hardware", default="Vera-Rubin")
    parser.add_argument("--decode-gpu-nums", default="64,72")
    parser.add_argument("--report-gpu-num", type=int, default=72)
    parser.add_argument("--batches", default="16,32,64,96,128,256,384,512")
    parser.add_argument("--tp-values", default="1,2,4,8")
    parser.add_argument("--cp-values", default="1,2,4,8")
    parser.add_argument("--pp-values", default="1,2,4")
    parser.add_argument("--workers", type=int, default=16)
    parser.add_argument("--mtp-stages", default="0..9")
    parser.add_argument("--mtp-seed-count", type=int, default=8)
    parser.add_argument("--mtp-accept-rate", type=float, default=0.7)
    parser.add_argument("--prefix", default=None)
    args = parser.parse_args()

    workbook = Path(args.workbook)
    hardware = resolve_gpu_name(args.hardware)
    prefix = args.prefix or output_prefix(hardware, args.model_label)
    batches = parse_int_list(args.batches)
    tp_values = parse_int_list(args.tp_values)
    cp_values = parse_int_list(args.cp_values)
    pp_values = parse_int_list(args.pp_values)
    decode_gpu_nums = parse_int_list(args.decode_gpu_nums)
    mtp_stages = parse_stage_list(args.mtp_stages)

    baseline_tasks = build_decode_tasks(
        workbook=workbook,
        hardware=hardware,
        gpu_nums=decode_gpu_nums,
        batches=batches,
        tp_values=tp_values,
        cp_values=cp_values,
        pp_values=pp_values,
    )
    print(f"baseline decode tasks={len(baseline_tasks)} workers={args.workers}", flush=True)
    baseline_rows = _run_tasks(workbook, baseline_tasks, args.workers, "baseline")
    baseline_df = pd.DataFrame(baseline_rows)
    if baseline_df.empty:
        raise SystemExit("No valid baseline decode rows survived HBM capacity checks.")

    seeds = select_mtp_seed_rows(baseline_df, gpu_num=args.report_gpu_num, seed_count=args.mtp_seed_count)
    mtp_tasks = build_mtp_tasks(
        seeds,
        hardware=hardware,
        mtp_stages=mtp_stages,
        mtp_accept_rate=args.mtp_accept_rate,
    )
    print(f"mtp replay seeds={len(seeds)} tasks={len(mtp_tasks)} workers={args.workers}", flush=True)
    mtp_rows = _run_tasks(workbook, mtp_tasks, args.workers, "mtp")
    decode_df = pd.concat([baseline_df, pd.DataFrame(mtp_rows)], ignore_index=True)
    _write_outputs(
        decode_rows=decode_df,
        result_dir=Path(args.result_dir),
        web_data_dir=Path(args.web_data_dir),
        prefix=prefix,
        hardware=hardware,
        model_label=args.model_label,
        report_gpu_num=args.report_gpu_num,
        mtp_stages=mtp_stages,
        mtp_accept_rate=args.mtp_accept_rate,
        workbook=workbook,
    )
